papers.title: A Layered Formal Methods Approach to Answering Queue-related Queries.
papers.abstract: Queue dynamics introduce significant uncertainty in network management tasks such as debugging, performance monitoring, and analysis. Despite numerous queue-monitoring techniques, many networks today continue to collect only per-port packet counts (e.g., using SNMP). Although queue lengths are correlated with packet counts, deriving the precise correlation between them is very challenging since packet counts do not specify many quantities (e.g., packet arrival order) which affect queue lengths. This paper presents QuASI, a system that can answer many queue-related queries using only coarse-grained per-port packet counts. QuASI checks whether there exists a packet trace that is consistent with the packet counts and satisfies a query. To scale on large problem instances, QuASI relies on a layered approach and on a novel enqueue-rate abstraction, which is lossless for the class of queries that QuASI answers. The first layer employs a novel and efficient algorithm that generates a cover-set of abstract traces, constructs representative abstract traces from the cover-set, and efficiently checks each representative abstract trace by leveraging a known result on (0,1)-matrix existence. The first layer guarantees no false negatives: if the first layer says "No", there is no packet trace consistent with the observed packet counts that makes the query true. If it says "Yes", further verification is needed, which the second layer resolves using an SMT solver. As a result, QuASI has no false positives and no false negatives. Our evaluations show that QuASI is up to 10 6 X faster than state-of-the-art, and can answer non-trivial queries about queue metrics (e.g., queue length) using minute-granularity packet counts. Our work is the first step toward more practical formal performance analysis under given measurements.
papers.abstract_zh: 队列动态给调试、性能监控和分析等网络管理任务带来了显着的不确定性。尽管有许多队列监控技术，但当今许多网络仍然只收集每个端口的数据包计数（例如，使用 SNMP）。尽管队列长度与数据包计数相关，但导出它们之间的精确相关性非常具有挑战性，因为数据包计数没有指定影响队列长度的许多数量（例如数据包到达顺序）。本文介绍了 QuASI，这是一个仅使用粗粒度的每端口数据包计数即可回答许多与队列相关的查询的系统。 QuASI 检查是否存在与数据包计数一致并满足查询的数据包跟踪。为了扩展大型问题实例，QuASI 依赖于分层方法和新颖的排队速率抽象，这对于 QuASI 回答的查询类别是无损的。第一层采用新颖且高效的算法，生成抽象迹线的覆盖集，从覆盖集构造代表性抽象迹线，并通过利用（0,1）矩阵存在性的已知结果来有效地检查每个代表性抽象迹线。第一层保证没有漏报：如果第一层说“否”，则不存在与观察到的数据包计数一致的数据包跟踪，从而使查询为真。如果显示“是”，则需要进一步验证，第二层使用 SMT 求解器进行解析。因此，QuASI 没有误报，也没有漏报。我们的评估表明，QuASI 的速度比最先进的技术快 10 6 倍，并且可以使用分钟粒度数据包计数来回答有关队列指标（例如队列长度）的重要查询。我们的工作是在给定测量下进行更实用的正式性能分析​​的第一步。

papers.title: Accelerating Design Space Exploration for LLM Training Systems with Multi-experiment Parallel Simulation.
papers.abstract: The rapid expansion of large language models (LLMs) requires the development of extensive GPU clusters, with companies deploying clusters with tens to hundreds of thousands of GPUs. This growth significantly expands the design space for LLM training systems, requiring thorough exploration of different parallelization strategies, communication parameters, congestion control, fabric topology, etc. Current methods require up to 10k simulation experiments to identify optimal configurations, with inadequate exploration leading to significant degradation of training performance. In this paper, we tackle the overlooked problem of efficiently conducting parallel simulation experiments for design space exploration. Our analysis and experiments show that Single-process Multi-experiment (SPME) achieves superior performance by reducing scheduling overhead and optimizing resource utilization, yet remains insufficient for current AI cluster scales. To enhance SPME’s efficacy, we introduce Multiverse, a novel GPU-based AI training simulator. Multiverse leverages the computing throughput of GPUs efficiently with optimizations such as a pull-based synchronization, highfidelity intra-server communication, and a kernel-fusion technique. Extensive experiments validate the accuracy and efficiency of Multiverse, demonstrating less than 3.0% discrepancy with real-world LLM training on clusters of up to 54,000 GPUs, achieving 43.1−73.2X speedup over state-of-the-art CPU-based simulators in various use cases.
papers.abstract_zh: 大语言模型（LLM）的快速扩展需要开发大量的GPU集群，企业部署的集群有数万到数十万个GPU。这种增长显着扩展了 LLM 训练系统的设计空间，需要对不同的并行化策略、通信参数、拥塞控制、结构拓扑等进行彻底探索。当前的方法需要多达 10k 的模拟实验来确定最佳配置，探索不充分会导致训练性能显着下降。在本文中，我们解决了为设计空间探索有效进行并行仿真实验的被忽视的问题。我们的分析和实验表明，单进程多实验（SPME）通过减少调度开销和优化资源利用率实现了卓越的性能，但对于当前的人工智能集群规模来说仍然不足。为了增强 SPME 的功效，我们引入了 Multiverse，这是一种基于 GPU 的新型 AI 训练模拟器。 Multiverse 通过基于拉动的同步、高保真服务器内通信和内核融合技术等优化，有效地利用 GPU 的计算吞吐量。大量实验验证了 Multiverse 的准确性和效率，证明与在多达 54,000 个 GPU 的集群上进行的真实 LLM 训练的差异不到 3.0%，在各种用例中比最先进的基于 CPU 的模拟器实现了 43.1−73.2 倍的加速。

papers.title: Achieving Wire-Latency Storage Systems by Exploiting Hardware ACKs.
papers.abstract: We present Juneberry, a low-latency communication framework for storage systems. Different from existing RPC frameworks, Juneberry provides a fast path for storage requests: they can be committed with a single round trip and server CPU bypass, thus delivering extremely low latency; the execution of these requests is performed asynchronously on the server CPU. Juneberry achieves it by relying on our proposed Ordered Queue abstraction, which exploits NICs’ hardware ACKs as commit signals of requests while ensuring linearizability of the whole system. Juneberry also supports durability by placing requests in persistent memory (PM). We implement Juneberry using commodity RDMA NICs and integrate it into two storage systems: Memcached (a widely used in-memory caching system) and PMemKV (a PM-based persistent key-value store). Evaluation shows that compared with RPC, Juneberry can significantly lower their latency under write-intensive workloads.
papers.abstract_zh: 我们推出了 Juneberry，一种用于存储系统的低延迟通信框架。与现有的 RPC 框架不同，Juneberry 为存储请求提供了快速路径：它们可以通过单次往返和服务器 CPU 旁路来提交，从而提供极低的延迟；这些请求的执行在服务器 CPU 上异步执行。 Juneberry 通过依赖我们提出的有序队列抽象来实现这一目标，该抽象利用 NIC 的硬件 ACK 作为请求的提交信号，同时确保整个系统的线性化。 Juneberry 还通过将请求放入持久内存 (PM) 来支持持久性。我们使用商用 RDMA NIC 实现 Juneberry，并将其集成到两个存储系统中：Memcached（广泛使用的内存缓存系统）和 PMemKV（基于 PM 的持久键值存储）。评估表明，与 RPC 相比，Juneberry 可以显着降低写入密集型工作负载下的延迟。

papers.title: AsTree: An Audio Subscription Architecture Enabling Massive-Scale Multi-Party Conferencing.
papers.abstract: While operating a multi-party video conferencing system (Lark) globally, we find that audio subscription alone may pose considerable challenges to the network, especially when scaling towards massive scales. Traditional strategy of subscribing to all remote participants suffers from issues such as signaling storm, excessive bandwidth and resource consumption on both server and client sides. Aimed at enhanced scalability, we share our design of AsTree, an audio subscription architecture. By a cascading tree topology and media plane-based audio selection, AsTree dramatically reduces the number of signaling messages and audio streams to forward. Practical deployment in Lark reduces audio and video stall ratios by more than 30% and 50%. We also receive 40% less negative client reviews, strongly proving the value of AsTree.
papers.abstract_zh: 在全球范围内运营多方视频会议系统（Lark）时，我们发现仅音频订阅就可能对网络构成相当大的挑战，尤其是在大规模扩展时。传统的订阅所有远程参与者的策略存在信令风暴、服务器和客户端带宽过多以及资源消耗等问题。为了增强可扩展性，我们分享了 AsTree（音频订阅架构）的设计。通过级联树形拓扑和基于媒体平面的音频选择，AsTree 极大地减少了要转发的信令消息和音频流的数量。 Practical deployment in Lark reduces audio and video stall ratios by more than 30% and 50%.我们收到的负面客户评论也减少了 40%，有力地证明了 AsTree 的价值。

papers.title: AutoCCL: Automated Collective Communication Tuning for Accelerating Distributed and Parallel DNN Training.
papers.abstract: The collective communication libraries are pivotal in optimizing the performance of distributed and parallel deep neural network (DNN) training. Most network optimizations are under the assumption that these libraries are well-tuned, ignoring their low-level parameter selection. In this paper, we present a novel automated tuning method AutoCCL that significantly improves communication performance without incurring additional costs. One of the primary challenges we tackle is the state explosion in searching for the optimal configuration. To overcome this, we decouple implementation-related parameters from those sensitive to the search space size and propose a divide-and-conquer algorithm, minimizing the requirement for exhaustive trials. We further propose an online tuning approach that accounts for communication-computation interference to enhance accuracy in finding optimal configurations, while hiding tuning overhead within early iterations of training jobs. We implement AutoCCL atop NCCL, a leading and widely-used communication library provided by NVIDIA. Our evaluation on both a 2-node cluster (16 A40 GPUs, intra-node NVLink, inter-node 2× 400Gbps InfiniBand) and a 4-node cluster (32 A40 GPUs, intra-node PCIe, inter-node 100Gbps InfiniBand) demonstrates that AutoCCL achieves 1.24-1.29× and 1.15-1.22× speedups on microbenchmarks compared to NCCL and another SOTA NCCL tuner, respectively, and up to 1.80× and 1.49× with concurrent computation. End-to-end evaluations on three large language models and one vision model show 1.07-1.32× improvements in periteration training time.
papers.abstract_zh: 集体通信库对于优化分布式并行深度神经网络 (DNN) 训练的性能至关重要。大多数网络优化都是假设这些库经过良好调整，忽略了它们的低级参数选择。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的自动调整方法 AutoCCL，它可以显着提高通信性能，而不会产生额外的成本。我们解决的主要挑战之一是寻找最佳配置时的状态爆炸。为了克服这个问题，我们将与实现相关的参数与对搜索空间大小敏感的参数解耦，并提出了一种分而治之的算法，最大限度地减少了详尽试验的要求。我们进一步提出了一种在线调整方法，该方法考虑了通信计算干扰，以提高寻找最佳配置的准确性，同时隐藏训练作业早期迭代中的调整开销。我们在 NCCL 之上实现 AutoCCL，NCCL 是 NVIDIA 提供的领先且广泛使用的通信库。我们对 2 节点集群（16 个 A40 GPU、节点内 NVLink、节点间 2× 400Gbps InfiniBand）和 4 节点集群（32 个 A40 GPU、节点内 PCIe、节点间 100Gbps InfiniBand）的评估表明，与微基准测试相比，AutoCCL 在微基准上实现了 1.24-1.29 倍和 1.15-1.22 倍的加速NCCL 和另一个 SOTA NCCL 调谐器，并发计算分别高达 1.80× 和 1.49×。对三种大型语言模型和一种视觉模型的端到端评估显示，迭代训练时间提高了 1.07-1.32 倍。

papers.title: Beehive: A Scalable Disaggregated Memory Runtime Exploiting Asynchrony of Multithreaded Programs.
papers.abstract: The Microsecond (µs)-scale I/O fabrics raise a tension between the programming productivity and performance, especially in disaggregated memory systems. The multithreaded synchronous programming model is popular in developing memory-disaggregated applications due to its intuitive program logic. However, our key insight is that although thread switching can effectively mitigate µs-scale latency, it leads to poor data locality and non-trivial scheduling overhead, leaving significant opportunities to improve the performance further. This paper proposes a memory-disaggregated framework, Beehive , which improves the remote access throughput by exploiting the asynchrony within each thread. To improve the programming usability, Beehive allows the programmers to develop applications in the conventional multithreaded synchronous model and automatically transforms the code into pararoutine (a newly proposed computation and scheduling unit) based asynchronous code via the Rust compiler. Beehive outperforms the state-of-the-art memory-disaggregated frameworks, i.e., Fastswap, Hermit, and AIFM, by 4.26×, 3.05×, and 1.58× on average.
papers.abstract_zh: 微秒 (μs) 级 I/O 结构提高了编程效率和性能之间的矛盾，尤其是在分解内存系统中。多线程同步编程模型由于其直观的程序逻辑而在开发内存分解应用程序中很流行。然而，我们的主要见解是，虽然线程切换可以有效地减轻微秒级的延迟，但它会导致较差的数据局部性和不小的调度开销，从而为进一步提高性能留下了重要的机会。本文提出了一种内存分解框架 Beehive，它通过利用每个线程内的异步性来提高远程访问吞吐量。为了提高编程可用性，Beehive 允许程序员在传统的多线程同步模型中开发应用程序，并通过 Rust 编译器自动将代码转换为基于 pararoutine（新提出的计算和调度单元）的异步代码。 Beehive 的性能平均优于最先进的内存分解框架（即 Fastswap、Hermit 和 AIFM）4.26 倍、3.05 倍和 1.58 倍。

papers.title: BFTBrain: Adaptive BFT Consensus with Reinforcement Learning.
papers.abstract: This paper presents BFTBrain, a reinforcement learning (RL) based Byzantine fault-tolerant (BFT) system that provides significant operational benefits: a plug-and-play system suitable for a broad set of hardware and network configurations, and adjusts effectively in real-time to changing fault scenarios and workloads. BFTBrain adapts to system conditions and application needs by switching between a set of BFT protocols in real-time. Two main advances contribute to BFTBrain’s agility and performance. First, BFTBrain is based on a systematic, thorough modeling of metrics that correlate the performance of the studied BFT protocols with varying fault scenarios and workloads. These metrics are fed as features to BFTBrain’s RL engine in order to choose the best-performing BFT protocols in real-time. Second, BFTBrain coordinates RL in a decentralized manner which is resilient to adversarial data pollution, where nodes share local metering values and reach the same learning output by consensus. As a result, in addition to providing significant operational benefits, BFTBrain improves throughput over fixed protocols by 18% to 119% under dynamic conditions and outperforms state-of-the-art learning based approaches by 44% to 154%.
papers.abstract_zh: 本文介绍了 BFTBrain，这是一种基于强化学习 (RL) 的拜占庭容错 (BFT) 系统，可提供显着的运营优势：即插即用系统，适用于广泛的硬件和网络配置，并可以实时有效地调整以适应不断变化的故障场景和工作负载。 BFTBrain 通过在一组 BFT 协议之间实时切换来适应系统条件和应用需求。 BFTBrain 的敏捷性和性能有两项主要进步。首先，BFTBrain 基于系统、彻底的指标建模，将所研究的 BFT 协议的性能与不同的故障场景和工作负载相关联。这些指标作为特征输入 BFTBrain 的 RL 引擎，以便实时选择性能最佳的 BFT 协议。其次，BFTBrain 以去中心化的方式协调强化学习，这种方式能够抵御对抗性数据污染，其中节点共享本地计量值并通过共识达到相同的学习输出。因此，除了提供显着的运营优势外，BFTBrain 在动态条件下将固定协议的吞吐量提高了 18% 至 119%，并且比最先进的基于学习的方法提高了 44% 至 154%。

papers.title: Building an Elastic Block Storage over EBOFs Using Shadow Views.
papers.abstract: The EBOF (Ethernet-Bunch-Of-Flash) has emerged as an enticing and promising disaggregated storage platform due to its streamlined I/O processing, high scalability, and substantial energy/cost-efficiency improvement. An EBOF applies a smart-sender dumb-receiver design philosophy and provides backward-compatible storage volumes to expedite system deployment. Yet, the static and opaque internal I/O processing pipeline lacks resource allocation, I/O scheduling, and traffic orchestration capabilities, entailing bandwidth waste, workload non-adaptiveness, and performance interference. This paper presents the design and implementation of a distributed telemetry system (called shadow view) to tackle the above challenges and facilitate the effective use of an EBOF. We model an EBOF as a two-layer multi-switch architecture and develop a view development protocol to construct the EBOF running snapshot and expose internal execution statistics at runtime. Our design is motivated by the observation that fast data center networks make the overheads of inter-server communication and synchronization negligible. We demonstrate the effectiveness of shadow view by building a block storage (dubbed Flint) atop EBOFs. The enhanced I/O data plane allows us to develop new three techniques–an elastic volume manager, a view-enabled bandwidth auction mechanism, and an eIO scheduler. Our evaluations using the Fungible FS1600 EBOF show that a Flint volume achieves 9.3/9.2 GB/s read/write bandwidth with no latency degradation, significantly outperforming the defacto EBOF volume. It achieves up to 2.9× throughput improvements when running an object store. Flint is tenant-aware and remote target-aware, delivering efficient multi-tenancy and workload adaptiveness.
papers.abstract_zh: EBOF（以太网闪存束）由于其简化的 I/O 处理、高可扩展性以及显着的能源/成本效率改进，已成为一种诱人且有前途的分类存储平台。 EBOF采用智能发送器哑接收器设计理念，并提供向后兼容的存储卷以加快系统部署。然而，静态且不透明的内部I/O处理管道缺乏资源分配、I/O调度和流量编排能力，导致带宽浪费、工作负载不适应性和性能干扰。本文介绍了分布式遥测系统（称为影子视图）的设计和实现，以解决上述挑战并促进 EBOF 的有效使用。我们将 EBOF 建模为两层多交换机架构，并开发视图开发协议来构建 EBOF 运行快照并在运行时公开内部执行统计信息。我们的设计动机是观察到快速的数据中心网络使服务器间通信和同步的开销可以忽略不计。我们通过在 EBOF 上构建块存储（称为 Flint）来演示影子视图的有效性。增强的 I/O 数据平面使我们能够开发三种新技术——弹性卷管理器、支持视图的带宽拍卖机制和 eIO 调度程序。我们使用 Fungible FS1600 EBOF 进行的评估表明，Flint 卷可实现 9.3/9.2 GB/s 读/写带宽，并且没有延迟下降，明显优于实际的 EBOF 卷。运行对象存储时，它的吞吐量提高了 2.9 倍。 Flint 具有租户感知和远程目标感知能力，可提供高效的多租户和工作负载适应性。

papers.title: Building Massive MIMO Baseband Processing on a Single-Node Supercomputer.
papers.abstract: The rising deployment of massive MIMO coupled with the wide adoption of virtualized radio access networks (vRAN) poses an unprecedented computational demand on the baseband processing, hardly met by existing vRAN hardware substrates. The single-node supercomputer, an emerging computing platform, offers scalable computation and communication capabilities, making it a promising target to hold and run the baseband pipeline. However, realizing this is non-trivial due to the mismatch between (a) the diverse execution granularities and incongruent parallel degrees of different stages along the software processing pipeline and (b) the underlying evolving irregular hardware parallelism at runtime. This paper closes the gap by designing and implementing MegaStation–an application-platform co-designed system that effectively harnesses the computing power of a single-node supercomputer for processing massive MIMO baseband. Our key insight is that one can adjust the execution granularity and reconstruct the baseband processing pipeline on the fly based on the monitored hardware parallelism status. Inspired by dynamic instruction scheduling, MegaStation models the single-node supercomputer as a tightly coupled microprocessor and employs a scoreboarding-like algorithm to orchestrate "baseband processing" instructions over GPU-instantiated executors. Our evaluations using the GigaIO FabreX demonstrate that MegaStation achieves up to 66.2% lower tail frame processing latency and 4× higher throughput than state-of-the-art solutions. MegaStation is a scalable and adaptive solution that can meet today’s vRAN requirements.
papers.abstract_zh: 大规模 MIMO 的不断部署，加上虚拟化无线接入网络 (vRAN) 的广泛采用，对基带处理提出了前所未有的计算需求，而现有的 vRAN 硬件基板很难满足。单节点超级计算机是一种新兴的计算平台，提供可扩展的计算和通信能力，使其成为保持和运行基带管道的有希望的目标。然而，实现这一点并非易事，因为（a）软件处理管道上不同阶段的不同执行粒度和不一致的并行度与（b）运行时底层不断发展的不规则硬件并行性之间的不匹配。本文通过设计和实现 MegaStation 来弥补这一差距，MegaStation 是一个应用平台共同设计的系统，可有效利用单节点超级计算机的计算能力来处理大规模 MIMO 基带。我们的主要见解是，可以根据监控的硬件并行状态动态调整执行粒度并重建基带处理管道。受动态指令调度的启发，MegaStation 将单节点超级计算机建模为紧密耦合的微处理器，并采用类似记分板的算法在 GPU 实例化的执行器上编排“基带处理”指令。我们使用 GigaIO FabreX 进行的评估表明，与最先进的解决方案相比，MegaStation 的尾帧处理延迟降低了 66.2%，吞吐量提高了 4 倍。 MegaStation 是一种可扩展、自适应的解决方案，可以满足当今的 vRAN 要求。

papers.title: ByteCheckpoint: A Unified Checkpointing System for Large Foundation Model Development.
papers.abstract: Checkpointing to preserve training states is crucial during the development of Large Foundation Models (LFMs), for training resumption upon various failures or changes in GPU resources and parallelism configurations. In addition, saved checkpoints are dispatched to evaluation tasks or transferred across different training stages (e.g., from pre-training to post-training). All these scenarios require resharding distributed checkpoints from one parallelism to another. In production environments, different LFMs are trained with various frameworks and storage backends, depending on model sizes and training scales. A high performance checkpointing system is needed to enable efficient checkpoint management at scale throughout the lifecycle of LFM development. We introduce ByteCheckpoint, an industrial-grade checkpointing system for large-scale LFM training. ByteCheckpoint features: a parallelism-agnostic checkpoint representation that enables efficient load-time checkpoint resharding; a generic checkpoint saving/loading workflow to accommodate multiple training frameworks and support different storage backends; full-stack optimizations to ensure high I/O efficiency and scalability; a suite of monitoring tools to streamline large-scale performance analysis and bottleneck detection. Compared to existing open-source checkpointing systems [51, 57], ByteCheckpoint significantly reduces runtime checkpoint stalls, achieving an average reduction of 54.20×. For saving and loading times, ByteCheckpoint achieves improvements of up to 9.96× and 8.80×, respectively.
papers.abstract_zh: 在大型基础模型 (LFM) 的开发过程中，用于保留训练状态的检查点至关重要，以便在 GPU 资源和并行配置发生各种故障或变化时恢复训练。此外，保存的检查点被分配给评估任务或在不同的训练阶段（例如，从训练前到训练后）转移。所有这些场景都需要将分布式检查点从一种并行性重新分片到另一种并行性。在生产环境中，根据模型大小和训练规模，不同的 LFM 使用不同的框架和存储后端进行训练。需要高性能检查点系统来在 LFM 开发的整个生命周期中实现大规模的高效检查点管理。我们推出了 ByteCheckpoint，这是一种用于大规模 LFM 训练的工业级检查点系统。 ByteCheckpoint 功能：与并行性无关的检查点表示，可实现高效的加载时检查点重新分片；通用检查点保存/加载工作流程，以适应多个训练框架并支持不同的存储后端；全栈优化，保证高I/O效率和可扩展性；一套监控工具，用于简化大规模性能分析和瓶颈检测。与现有的开源检查点系统[51, 57]相比，ByteCheckpoint 显着减少了运行时检查点停顿，平均减少了 54.20 倍。对于保存和加载时间，ByteCheckpoint 分别实现了高达 9.96 倍和 8.80 倍的改进。

papers.title: CATO: End-to-End Optimization of ML-Based Traffic Analysis Pipelines.
papers.abstract: Machine learning has shown tremendous potential for improving the capabilities of network traffic analysis applications, often outperforming simpler rule-based heuristics. However, ML-based solutions remain difficult to deploy in practice. Many existing approaches only optimize the predictive performance of their models, overlooking the practical challenges of running them against network traffic in real time. This is especially problematic in the domain of traffic analysis, where the efficiency of the serving pipeline is a critical factor in determining the usability of a model. In this work, we introduce CATO, a framework that addresses this problem by jointly optimizing the predictive performance and the associated systems costs of the serving pipeline. CATO leverages recent advances in multi-objective Bayesian optimization to efficiently identify Pareto-optimal configurations, and automatically compiles end-to-end optimized serving pipelines that can be deployed in real networks. Our evaluations show that compared to popular feature optimization techniques, CATO can provide up to 3600× lower inference latency and 3.7× higher zero-loss throughput while simultaneously achieving better model performance.
papers.abstract_zh: 机器学习在提高网络流量分析应用程序的能力方面表现出了巨大的潜力，通常优于更简单的基于规则的启发式方法。然而，基于机器学习的解决方案在实践中仍然难以部署。许多现有方法仅优化其模型的预测性能，而忽略了实时针对网络流量运行模型的实际挑战。这在流量分析领域尤其成问题，其中服务管道的效率是确定模型可用性的关键因素。在这项工作中，我们引入了 CATO，这是一个通过联合优化服务管道的预测性能和相关系统成本来解决此问题的框架。 CATO 利用多目标贝叶斯优化的最新进展来有效识别帕累托最优配置，并自动编译可部署在实际网络中的端到端优化服务管道。我们的评估表明，与流行的特征优化技术相比，CATO 可以提供高达 3600 倍的低推理延迟和高 3.7 倍的零丢失吞吐量，同时实现更好的模型性能。

papers.title: CEGS: Configuration Example Generalizing Synthesizer.
papers.abstract: Network configuration synthesis promises to increase the efficiency of network management by reducing human involvement. However, despite significant advances in this field, existing synthesizers still require much human effort in drafting configuration templates or coding in a domain-specific language. We argue that the main reason for this is that a core capability is missing for current synthesizers: identifying and following configuration examples in configuration manuals and generalizing them to arbitrary topologies. In this work, we fill this capability gap with two recent advancements in artificial intelligence: graph neural networks (GNNs) and large language models (LLMs). We build CEGS, which can automatically identify appropriate configuration examples, follow and generalize them to fit target network scenarios. CEGS features a GNN-based Querier to identify relevant examples from device documentations, a GNN-based Classifier to generalize the example to arbitrary topology, and an efficient LLM-driven synthesis method to quickly and correctly synthesize configurations that comply with the intents. Evaluations of real-world networks and complex intents show that CEGS can automatically synthesize correct configurations for a network of 1094 devices without human involvement. In contrast, the state-of-the-art LLM-based synthesizer are more than 30 times slower than CEGS on average, even when human experts are in the loop.
papers.abstract_zh: 网络配置综合有望通过减少人工参与来提高网络管理的效率。然而，尽管该领域取得了重大进展，现有的合成器仍然需要大量的人力来起草配置模板或使用特定于领域的语言进行编码。我们认为，造成这种情况的主要原因是当前合成器缺少核心功能：识别并遵循配置手册中的配置示例，并将它们推广到任意拓扑。在这项工作中，我们通过人工智能的两项最新进展填补了这一能力差距：图神经网络（GNN）和大型语言模型（LLM）。我们构建了 CEGS，它可以自动识别适当的配置示例，遵循并概括它们以适应目标网络场景。 CEGS 具有基于 GNN 的查询器，用于从设备文档中识别相关示例；基于 GNN 的分类器，用于将示例推广到任意拓扑；以及高效的 LLM 驱动的合成方法，用于快速、正确地合成符合意图的配置。对现实世界网络和复杂意图的评估表明，CEGS 可以自动为包含 1094 个设备的网络合成正确的配置，而无需人工参与。相比之下，最先进的基于 LLM 的合成器平均比 CEGS 慢 30 倍以上，即使是在人类专家参与的情况下也是如此。

papers.title: CellReplay: Towards accurate record-and-replay for cellular networks.
papers.abstract: The inherent variability of real-world cellular networks makes it hard to evaluate, reproduce, and debug the performance of networked applications running on these networks. A common approach is to record and replay a trace of observed cellular network performance. However, we show that the state-of-the-art record-and-replay technique produces empirically inaccurate results that can cause evaluation bias. This paper presents the design and implementation of CellReplay, a tool that records the time-varying performance of a live cellular network into traces using preset workloads and faithfully replays the observed performance for other workloads through an emulated network interface. The key challenge in achieving high accuracy is to replay varying network behavior in a way that captures its sensitivity to the workload. CellReplay records network behavior under two predefined workloads simultaneously and interpolates upon replay for other workloads. Across various challenging network conditions, our evaluation shows that real-world networked applications (e.g., web browsing or video streaming) running on CellReplay achieve similar performance (e.g., page load time or bitrate selection) to their live network counterparts, with significantly reduced error compared to the prior method.
papers.abstract_zh: 现实世界蜂窝网络固有的可变性使得评估、重现和调试在这些网络上运行的网络应用程序的性能变得困难。一种常见的方法是记录并重放观察到的蜂窝网络性能的痕迹。然而，我们表明，最先进的记录和重放技术会产生经验上不准确的结果，可能导致评估偏差。本文介绍了 CellReplay 的设计和实现，该工具使用预设工作负载将实时蜂窝网络随时间变化的性能记录到轨迹中，并通过模拟网络接口忠实地重播其他工作负载观察到的性能。实现高精度的关键挑战是以捕获其对工作负载敏感性的方式重放不同的网络行为。 CellReplay 同时记录两个预定义工作负载下的网络行为，并在重播时对其他工作负载进行插值。在各种具有挑战性的网络条件下，我们的评估表明，在 CellReplay 上运行的现实网络应用程序（例如网页浏览或视频流）可实现与其实时网络对应程序相似的性能（例如页面加载时间或比特率选择），并且与之前的方法相比，错误显着减少。

papers.title: ClubHeap: A High-Speed and Scalable Priority Queue for Programmable Packet Scheduling.
papers.abstract: While PIFO is a powerful priority queue abstraction to support programmable packet scheduling in network devices, the efficient implementation of PIFO faces multiple challenges in performance and scalability. The existing solutions all fall short of certain requirements. In this paper, we propose ClubHeap to address the problem. On the one hand, we develop a novel hardware-friendly heap data structure to support faster PIFO queue operations that can schedule a flow in every clock cycle, reaching the theoretical lower bound; on the other hand, the optimized hardware architecture reduces the circuit complexity and thus enables a higher clock frequency. The end result is the best scheduling performance in its class. Combined with its inherently better scalability and flexibility, ClubHeap is an ideal solution to be built in programmable switches and SmartNICs to support various scheduling algorithms. We build an FPGA-based hardware prototype and conduct a thorough evaluation by comparing ClubHeap with the other state-of-the-art solutions. ClubHeap also allows graceful trade-offs between throughput and resource consumption through parameter adjustments, making it adaptable on different target devices.
papers.abstract_zh: 虽然 PIFO 是一种强大的优先级队列抽象，可支持网络设备中的可编程数据包调度，但 PIFO 的高效实施面临着性能和可扩展性方面的多重挑战。现有的解决方案都达不到一定的要求。在本文中，我们提出 ClubHeap 来解决这个问题。一方面，我们开发了一种新颖的硬件友好堆数据结构，以支持更快的 PIFO 队列操作，可以在每个时钟周期调度一个流，达到理论下限；另一方面，优化的硬件架构降低了电路复杂度，从而实现了更高的时钟频率。最终结果是同类产品中最佳的调度性能。结合其固有的更好的可扩展性和灵活性，ClubHeap 是内置于可编程交换机和 SmartNIC 中以支持各种调度算法的理想解决方案。我们构建了一个基于 FPGA 的硬件原型，并通过将 ClubHeap 与其他最先进的解决方案进行比较来进行彻底的评估。 ClubHeap还允许通过参数调整在吞吐量和资源消耗之间进行优雅的权衡，使其能够适应不同的目标设备。

papers.title: DISC: Backpressure Mitigation In Multi-tier Applications With Distributed Shared Connection.
papers.abstract: Most data-center applications are based on a multi-tier architecture, involving either coarse-grained software components (e.g., traditional 3-tier web applications) or fine-grained ones (e.g., microservices). Such applications are prone to the backpressure problem, which introduces a strong performance coupling between tiers, thus degrading scalability and resource consumption. This problem is due to the fact that, on the response path towards the initial client, a significant fraction of the payloads in the messages exchanged between tiers correspond to “final” data that are simply relayed (i.e., without further modifications) from a backend tier such as a database. This traffic results in additional pressure on the intermediate and frontend tiers. To address this problem, we introduce DISC, a system allowing several tiers within a multi-tier chain to jointly act as endpoints of the same TCP connection. This enables the selective bypass of one or several tiers on the response path. Unlike existing solutions, DISC is (1) flexible — it accommodates arbitrary multi-tier topologies and heterogeneous application-level protocols, (2) fine-grained — it allows multiple tiers to be involved in the generation and emission of a given response message (e.g., to decouple the network path of the response headers and footers from the path of the response body), (3) and non-intrusive — it requires only minor and localized/modular modifications to the code base of legacy applications and is transparent for external clients. Evaluation results with several micro- and macro-benchmarks show that DISC can reduce the cumulative CPU load on servers by up to 41.5%, decrease the average and tail latencies respectively by up to 74.1% and 5.71×, and also improve the request rate by up to 45%.
papers.abstract_zh: 大多数数据中心应用程序都基于多层架构，涉及粗粒度软件组件（例如传统的三层 Web 应用程序）或细粒度软件组件（例如微服务）。此类应用程序很容易出现背压问题，从而在层之间引入强烈的性能耦合，从而降低可扩展性和资源消耗。这个问题的原因是，在通往初始客户端的响应路径上，层之间交换的消息中的有效负载的很大一部分对应于从后端层（例如数据库）简单中继（即，没有进一步修改）的“最终”数据。这种流量会给中间层和前端层带来额外的压力。为了解决这个问题，我们引入了 DISC，该系统允许多层链中的多个层共同充当同一 TCP 连接的端点。这使得能够选择性地绕过响应路径上的一层或多层。与现有解决方案不同，DISC 具有以下特点：(1) 灵活 — 它适应任意多层拓扑和异构应用程序级协议；(2) 细粒度 — 它允许多个层参与给定响应消息的生成和发送（例如，将响应标头和页脚的网络路径与响应正文的路径解耦）；(3) 且非侵入性 — 它只需要对遗留应用程序的代码库进行较小的本地化/模块化修改，并且是透明的对于外部客户。多个微观和宏观基准的评估结果表明，DISC可以将服务器上的累积CPU负载降低高达41.5%，将平均延迟和尾延迟分别降低高达74.1%和5.71倍，并将请求率提高高达45%。

papers.title: Dissecting and Streamlining the Interactive Loop of Mobile Cloud Gaming.
papers.abstract: With cloud-side computing and rendering, mobile cloud gaming (MCG) is expected to deliver high-quality gaming experiences to budget mobile devices. However, our measurement on representative MCG platforms reveals that even under good network conditions, all platforms exhibit high interactive latency of 112–403 ms, from a user-input action to its display response, that critically affects users’ quality of experience. Moreover, jitters in network latency often lead to significant fluctuations in interactive latency. In this work, we collaborate with a commercial MCG platform to conduct the first in-depth analysis on the interactive latency of cloud gaming. We identify VSync, the synchronization primitive of Android graphics pipeline, to be a key contributor to the excessive interactive latency; as many as five VSync events are intricately invoked, which serialize the complex graphics processing logic on both the client and cloud sides. To address this, we design an end-to-end VSync regulator, dubbed LoopTailor, which minimizes VSync events by decoupling game rendering from the lengthy cloud-side graphics pipeline and coordinating cloud game rendering directly with the client. We implement LoopTailor on the collaborated platform and commodity Android devices, reducing the interactive latency (by ∼34%) to stably below 100 ms.
papers.abstract_zh: 借助云端计算和渲染，移动云游戏（MCG）有望为廉价移动设备提供高质量的游戏体验。然而，我们对代表性MCG平台的测量表明，即使在良好的网络条件下，所有平台从用户输入操作到显示响应都表现出112-403毫秒的高交互延迟，这严重影响了用户的体验质量。此外，网络延迟的抖动通常会导致交互延迟的显着波动。在这项工作中，我们与商业MCG平台合作，首次对云游戏的交互延迟进行了深入分析。我们认为 VSync（Android 图形管道的同步原语）是导致交互延迟过大的关键因素；错综复杂地调用了多达5个VSync事件，将客户端和云端复杂的图形处理逻辑序列化。为了解决这个问题，我们设计了一个名为 LoopTailor 的端到端 VSync 调节器，它通过将游戏渲染与冗长的云端图形管道解耦并直接与客户端协调云游戏渲染来最大限度地减少 VSync 事件。我们在协作平台和商用 Android 设备上实施了 LoopTailor，将交互延迟（约 34%）降低到稳定在 100 毫秒以下。

papers.title: Eden: Developer-Friendly Application-Integrated Far Memory.
papers.abstract: Far memory systems are a promising way to address the resource stranding problem in datacenters. Far memory systems broadly fall into two categories. On one hand, paging-based systems use hardware guards at the granularity of pages to intercept remote accesses, which require no application changes but incur significant faulting overhead. On the other hand, app-integrated systems use software guards on data objects and apply application-specific optimizations to avoid faulting overheads, but these systems require significant application redesign and/or suffer from overhead on local accesses. We propose Eden, a new approach to far memory that combines hardware guards with a small number of software guards in the form of programmer annotations, to achieve performance similar to app-integrated systems with minimal developer effort. Eden is based on the insight that applications generate most of their page faults at a small number of code locations, and those locations are easy to find programmatically. By adding hints to such locations, Eden can notify the pager about upcoming memory accesses to customize read-ahead and memory reclamation. We show that Eden achieves 19.4–178% higher performance than Fastswap for memory-intensive applications including DataFrame and memcached. Eden achieves performance comparable to AIFM with almost 100× fewer code changes.
papers.abstract_zh: 远存储系统是解决数据中心资源搁浅问题的一种有前途的方法。远记忆系统大致分为两类。一方面，基于分页的系统使用页面粒度的硬件防护来拦截远程访问，这不需要更改应用程序，但会产生大量的故障开销。另一方面，应用程序集成系统对数据对象使用软件防护，并应用特定于应用程序的优化以避免故障开销，但这些系统需要大量的应用程序重新设计和/或遭受本地访问开销。我们提出了 Eden，一种新的远内存方法，它将硬件防护与少量以程序员注释形式的软件防护相结合，以最少的开发人员工作实现与应用程序集成系统类似的性能。 Eden 基于这样的见解：应用程序在少数代码位置生成大部分页面错误，并且这些位置很容易通过编程方式找到。通过向这些位置添加提示，Eden 可以通知分页器即将进行的内存访问，以自定义预读和内存回收。我们表明，对于 DataFrame 和 memcached 等内存密集型应用程序，Eden 的性能比 Fastswap 高出 19.4-178%。 Eden 的性能可与 AIFM 相媲美，而代码更改量却减少了近 100 倍。

papers.title: Efficient Direct-Connect Topologies for Collective Communications.
papers.abstract: We consider the problem of distilling efficient network topologies for collective communications. We provide an algorithmic framework for constructing direct-connect topologies optimized for the latency vs. bandwidth trade-off associated with the workload. Our approach synthesizes many different topologies and communication schedules for a given cluster size and degree, then identifies the best option for a given workload. Our algorithms start from small, optimal base topologies and associated schedules, using techniques that can be iteratively applied to derive much larger topologies and schedules. Additionally, we incorporate well-studied large-scale graph topologies into our algorithmic framework by producing efficient communication schedules for them using a novel polynomial-time algorithm. Our evaluation uses multiple testbeds and large-scale simulations to demonstrate significant performance benefits from our derived topologies and schedules.
papers.abstract_zh: 我们考虑为集体通信提炼有效网络拓扑的问题。我们提供了一个算法框架，用于构建针对与工作负载相关的延迟与带宽权衡进行优化的直连拓扑。我们的方法针对给定的集群大小和程度综合了许多不同的拓扑和通信调度，然后确定给定工作负载的最佳选择。我们的算法从小型的、最佳的基本拓扑和相关的调度开始，使用可迭代应用的技术来导出更大的拓扑和调度。此外，我们通过使用新颖的多项式时间算法为它们生成有效的通信时间表，将经过充分研究的大规模图拓扑合并到我们的算法框架中。我们的评估使用多个测试台和大规模模拟来证明我们派生的拓扑和时间表带来的显着性能优势。

papers.title: Efficient Multi-WAN Transport for 5G with OTTER.
papers.abstract: In the ongoing cloudiﬁcation of 5G, software network functions (NFs) are replacing ﬁxed-function network hardware, allowing 5G network operators to leverage the beneﬁts of cloud computing. The migration of NFs and their management to the cloud causes 5G trafﬁc to traverse an operator’s wide-area network (WAN) to the cloud WAN that hosts the datacenters (DCs) running 5G NFs and applications. However, achieving end-to-end (E2E) performance for 5G trafﬁc across two WANs is hard. Placing 5G ﬂows across two WANs with different performance and reliability characteristics, edge and DC resource constraints, and interference from other ﬂows is different and more challenging than single-WAN trafﬁc engineering. We address this challenge and show that orchestrating E2E paths across a multi-WAN overlay allows us to achieve average 13% more throughput, 15% less RTT, 45% less jitter, or reduce average loss from 0.06% to under 0.001%. We implement our multi-WAN 5G ﬂow placement in a scalable optimization prototype that allocates 26%–45% more bytes on the network than greedy baselines while also satisfying the service demands of more ﬂows.
papers.abstract_zh: 在正在进行的 5G 云化过程中，软件网络功能 (NF) 正在取代固定功能网络硬件，使 5G 网络运营商能够充分利用云计算的优势。 NF 及其管理向云的迁移导致 5G 流量穿过运营商的广域网 (WAN) 到达托管运行 5G NF 和应用程序的数据中心 (DC) 的云 WAN。然而，跨两个广域网实现 5G 流量的端到端 (E2E) 性能非常困难。将 5G 流放置在具有不同性能和可靠性特征、边缘和 DC 资源限制以及来自其他流的干扰的两个 WAN 上是不同的，并且比单 WAN 流量工程更具挑战性。我们解决了这一挑战，并表明，跨多 WAN 覆盖编排 E2E 路径使我们能够平均提高 13% 的吞吐量、减少 15% 的 RTT、减少 45% 的抖动，或将平均损耗从 0.06% 降低到 0.001% 以下。我们在可扩展的优化原型中实现了多 WAN 5G 流布局，该原型在网络上分配的字节数比贪婪基线多 26%–45%，同时还满足更多流的服务需求。

papers.title: Enabling Portable and High-Performance SmartNIC Programs with Alkali.
papers.abstract: Trends indicate that emerging SmartNICs, either from different vendors or generations from the same vendor, exhibit substantial differences in hardware parallelism and memory interconnects. These variations make porting programs across NICs highly complex and time-consuming, requiring programmers to significantly refactor code for performance based on each target NIC’s hardware characteristics. We argue that an ideal SmartNIC compilation framework should allow developers to write target-independent programs, with the compiler automatically managing cross-NIC porting and performance optimization. We present such a framework, Alkali, that achieves this by (1) proposing a new intermediate representation for building flexible compiler infrastructure for multiple NIC targets and (2) developing a new iterative parallelism optimization algorithm that automatically ports and parallelizes the input programs based on the target NIC’s hardware characteristics. Experiments across a wide range of NIC applications demonstrate that Alkali enables developers to easily write portable, high-performance NIC programs. Our compiler optimization passes can automatically port these programs and make them run efficiently across all targets, achieving performance within 9.8% of hand-tuned expert implementations.
papers.abstract_zh: 趋势表明，新兴的 SmartNIC，无论是来自不同供应商还是来自同一供应商的各代产品，在硬件并行性和内存互连方面都表现出巨大差异。这些变化使得跨 NIC 的移植程序变得非常复杂且耗时，要求程序员根据每个目标 NIC 的硬件特性显着重构代码以提高性能。我们认为，理想的 SmartNIC 编译框架应该允许开发人员编写与目标无关的程序，并且编译器自动管理跨 NIC 移植和性能优化。我们提出了这样一个框架 Alkali，它通过以下方式实现这一目标：(1) 提出一种新的中间表示形式，用于为多个 NIC 目标构建灵活的编译器基础设施；(2) 开发一种新的迭代并行优化算法，根据目标 NIC 的硬件特性自动移植和并行化输入程序。各种 NIC 应用的实验表明，Alkali 使开发人员能够轻松编写可移植、高性能的 NIC 程序。我们的编译器优化过程可以自动移植这些程序，并使它们在所有目标上高效运行，实现的性能比手动调整的专家实现低 9.8%。

papers.title: Enabling Silent Telemetry Data Transmission with InvisiFlow.
papers.abstract: Network applications from traffic engineering to path tracing often rely on the ability to transmit fine-grained telemetry data from network devices to a set of collectors. Unfortunately, prior work has observed—and we validate—that existing transmission methods for such data can result in significant overhead to user traffic and/or loss of telemetry data, particularly when the network is heavily loaded. In this paper, we introduce InvisiFlow, a novel communication substrate to collect network telemetry data, silently. In contrast to previous systems that always push telemetry packets to collectors based on the shortest path, InvisiFlow dynamically seeks out spare network capacity by leveraging opportunistic sending and congestion gradients, thus minimizing both the loss rate of telemetry data and overheads on user traffic. In a FatTree topology, InvisiFlow can achieve near-zero loss rate even under high-load scenarios (around 33.8× lower loss compared to the state-of-the-art transmission methods used by systems like Everflow and Planck).
papers.abstract_zh: 从流量工程到路径跟踪的网络应用程序通常依赖于将细粒度遥测数据从网络设备传输到一组收集器的能力。不幸的是，之前的工作已经观察到（并且我们也验证了）此类数据的现有传输方法可能会导致用户流量的巨大开销和/或遥测数据的丢失，特别是在网络负载较重时。在本文中，我们介绍了 InvisiFlow，这是一种以静默方式收集网络遥测数据的新型通信基础。与之前总是基于最短路径将遥测数据包推送到收集器的系统相比，InvisiFlow 通过利用机会发送和拥塞梯度动态寻找空闲网络容量，从而最大限度地减少遥测数据的丢失率和用户流量的开销。在 FatTree 拓扑中，即使在高负载情况下，InvisiFlow 也能实现接近零的丢失率（与 Everflow 和 Planck 等系统使用的最先进的传输方法相比，丢失率降低约 33.8 倍）。

papers.title: Enhancing Network Failure Mitigation with Performance-Aware Ranking.
papers.abstract: Cloud providers install mitigations to reduce the impact of network failures within their datacenters. Existing network mitigation systems rely on simple local criteria or global proxy metrics to determine the best action. In this paper, we show that we can support a broader range of actions and select more effective mitigations by directly optimizing end-to-end flow-level metrics and analyzing actions holistically. To achieve this, we develop novel techniques to quickly estimate the impact of different mitigations and rank them with high fidelity. Our results on incidents from a large cloud provider show orders of magnitude improvements in flow completion time and throughput. We also show our approach scales to large datacenters.
papers.abstract_zh: 云提供商安装缓解措施以减少其数据中心内网络故障的影响。现有的网络缓解系统依靠简单的本地标准或全局代理指标来确定最佳操作。在本文中，我们表明，通过直接优化端到端流量级别指标并整体分析操作，我们可以支持更广泛的操作并选择更有效的缓解措施。为了实现这一目标，我们开发了新颖的技术来快速估计不同缓解措施的影响，并以高保真度对其进行排名。我们对大型云提供商的事件的结果显示，流程完成时间和吞吐量有了数量级的改进。我们还展示了我们的方法适用于大型数据中心。

papers.title: eTran: Extensible Kernel Transport with eBPF.
papers.abstract: Evolving datacenters with diverse application demands are driving network transport designs. However, few have successfully landed in the widely-used kernel networking stack to benefit broader users, and they take multiple years. We present eTran, a system that makes kernel transport extensible to implement and customize diverse transport designs agilely. To achieve this, eTran leverages and extends eBPF-based techniques to customize the kernel to support complex transport functionalities safely. Meanwhile, eTran carefully absorbs user-space transport techniques for performance gain without sacrificing robust protection. We implement TCP (with DCTCP congestion control) and Homa under eTran, and achieve up to 4.8×/1.8× higher throughput with 3.7×/7.5× lower latency compared to existing kernel implementation.
papers.abstract_zh: 不断发展的数据中心具有多样化的应用需求，正在推动网络传输设计。然而，很少有人能够成功进入广泛使用的内核网络堆栈以使更广泛的用户受益，而且需要多年的时间。我们推出了 eTran，这是一个使内核传输可扩展的系统，可以灵活地实现和定制不同的传输设计。为了实现这一目标，eTran 利用并扩展了基于 eBPF 的技术来定制内核，以安全地支持复杂的传输功能。同时，eTran 仔细吸收了用户空间传输技术以提高性能，同时又不牺牲强大的保护。我们在 eTran 下实现了 TCP（具有 DCTCP 拥塞控制）和 Homa，与现有内核实现相比，吞吐量提高了 4.8×/1.8×，延迟降低了 3.7×/7.5×。

papers.title: Everything Matters in Programmable Packet Scheduling.
papers.abstract: Operators can deploy any scheduler they desire on existing switches through programmable packet schedulers: they tag packets with ranks (which indicate their priority) and schedule them in the order of these ranks. The ideal programmable scheduler is the Push-In First-Out (PIFO) queue, which schedules packets in a perfectly sorted order by "pushing" packets into any position of the queue based on their ranks. However, it is hard to implement PIFO queues in hardware due to their need to sort packets at line rate (based on their ranks). Recent proposals approximate PIFO behaviors on existing data-planes. While promising, they fail to simultaneously capture both of the necessary behaviors of PIFO queues: their scheduling behavior and admission control . We introduce PACKS, an approximate PIFO scheduler that addresses this problem. PACKS runs on top of a set of priority queues and uses packet-rank information and queue-occupancy levels during enqueue to determine whether to admit each incoming packet and to which queue it should be mapped. We fully implement PACKS in P4 and evaluate it on real workloads. We show that PACKS better-approximates PIFO than state-of-the-art approaches. Specifically, PACKS reduces the rank inversions by up to 7× and 15× with respect to SP-PIFO and AIFO, and the number of packet drops by up to 60% compared to SP-PIFO. Under pFabric ranks, PACKS reduces the mean FCT across small flows by up to 33% and 2.6×, compared to SP-PIFO and AIFO. We also show that PACKS runs at line rate on existing hardware (Intel Tofino).
papers.abstract_zh: 运营商可以通过可编程数据包调度程序在现有交换机上部署他们想要的任何调度程序：他们用等级（指示其优先级）标记数据包，并按照这些等级的顺序调度它们。理想的可编程调度程序是推入先出 (PIFO) 队列，它通过根据数据包的排名将数据包“推”到队列的任何位置，以完美排序的顺序来调度数据包。然而，由于需要以线速对数据包进行排序（基于其等级），因此很难在硬件中实现 PIFO 队列。最近的提案近似于现有数据平面上的 PIFO 行为。虽然很有希望，但它们未能同时捕获 PIFO 队列的两个必要行为：调度行为和准入控制。我们引入了 PACKS，一个近似 PIFO 调度程序来解决这个问题。 PACKS 在一组优先级队列之上运行，并在入队期间使用数据包排名信息和队列占用级别来确定是否接纳每个传入数据包以及应将其映射到哪个队列。我们在 P4 中完全实现了 Packs，并在实际工作负载上对其进行了评估。我们证明 PACKS 比最先进的方法更接近 PIFO。具体来说，与 SP-PIFO 和 AIFO 相比，PACKS 减少了多达 7 倍和 15 倍的排名反转，并且与 SP-PIFO 相比，丢包数量减少了多达 60%。在 pFabric 等级下，与 SP-PIFO 和 AIFO 相比，PACKS 将小流量的平均 FCT 降低高达 33% 和 2.6 倍。我们还展示了 Packs 在现有硬件（Intel Tofino）上以线速运行。

papers.title: Evolution of Aegis: Fault Diagnosis for AI Model Training Service in Production.
papers.abstract: Despite the success of diagnosis systems in traditional cloud computing, these systems are not suitable for pinpointing faults in AI model training cloud scenarios due to the differences in computing paradigms between traditional cloud computing and model training. As one of the largest cloud providers, we present Aegis, a fault diagnosis system specifically designed for AI model training service. We share our experience in the motivation, design, and evolution of Aegis. Keeping easy-to-deploy as the primary principle, Aegis Phase- 1 started by enhancing existing general-purpose diagnosis systems. After several months of evolution, Aegis Phase-2 cogitatively chose to customize the collective communication library for sophisticated failure localization in runtime without modifying customer code. Besides the failure localization, we further equipped Aegis with the capabilities on handling performance degradation and failure checking before delivery. Aegis has been deployed in our production training cloud service for one year. Aegis decreases more than 97% of the idle time wasted by diagnosis, 84% of the training task restart count and 71% of the performance degradation.
papers.abstract_zh: 尽管传统云计算中的诊断系统取得了成功，但由于传统云计算和模型训练之间计算范式的差异，这些系统并不适合AI模型训练云场景中的故障定位。作为最大的云提供商之一，我们推出了专为AI模型训练服务设计的故障诊断系统Aegis。我们分享我们在 Aegis 的动机、设计和演变方面的经验。 Aegis 第一阶段以易于部署为首要原则，从增强现有的通用诊断系统开始。经过几个月的演变，Aegis Phase-2深思熟虑地选择定制集体通信库，以在不修改客户代码的情况下在运行时实现复杂的故障定位。除了故障定位之外，我们还为Aegis配备了处理性能下降和交付前故障检查的能力。 Aegis已在我们的生产培训云服务中部署一年了。 Aegis 减少了超过 97% 的诊断浪费时间、84% 的训练任务重启次数以及 71% 的性能下降。

papers.title: From Address Blocks to Authorized Prefixes: Redesigning RPKI ROV with a Hierarchical Hashing Scheme for Fast and Memory-Efficient Validation.
papers.abstract: Route Origin Validation (ROV) with Route Origin Authorizations (ROAs), built on top of the Resource Public Key Infrastructure (RPKI), serves as the only formally standardized and production-grade defense mechanism against route hijackings in global interdomain routing infrastructures. However, the widespread adoption of RPKI has introduced escalating scalability challenges in validating high volumes of route messages against massive ROA entries. In this paper, we attribute the performance bottleneck of existing ROV schemes to their underlying validation model, where the route is matched against rules in the form of address blocks. To overcome this bottleneck, we propose the Authorized Prefix (AP) model that enables validation at the prefix granularity, and redesign RPKI ROV based on this new model with a hierarchical hashing scheme named h 2 ROV . Extensive evaluations verify h 2 ROV 's superiority over state-of-the-art approaches in IPv4, with a speedup of $1.7× ∼ 9.8× in validation and a reduction of 49.3% ∼ 86.6% in memory consumption. System emulations using real-world network topologies further demonstrate h 2 ROV confines its impact to routing convergence to below 8.5% during update burst events, while reducing ROV-induced delays by 30.4% ∼ 64.7% compared to existing solutions.
papers.abstract_zh: 具有路由源授权 (ROA) 的路由源验证 (ROV) 建立在资源公钥基础设施 (RPKI) 之上，是全球域间路由基础设施中针对路由劫持的唯一正式标准化和生产级防御机制。然而，RPKI 的广泛采用在根据大量 ROA 条目验证大量路由消息时带来了不断升级的可扩展性挑战。在本文中，我们将现有 ROV 方案的性能瓶颈归因于其底层验证模型，其中路由与地址块形式的规则进行匹配。为了克服这个瓶颈，我们提出了授权前缀（AP）模型，可以在前缀粒度上进行验证，并基于这个新模型重新设计 RPKI ROV，采用名为 h 2 ROV 的分层哈希方案。广泛的评估验证了 h 2 ROV 相对于 IPv4 中最先进的方法的优越性，验证速度提高了 1.7× ∼ 9.8× 美元，内存消耗减少了 49.3% ∼ 86.6%。使用真实网络拓扑的系统仿真进一步证明，h 2 ROV 在更新突发事件期间将其对路由收敛的影响限制在 8.5% 以下，同时与现有解决方案相比，将 ROV 引起的延迟减少了 30.4% ∼ 64.7%。

papers.title: GPU-Disaggregated Serving for Deep Learning Recommendation Models at Scale.
papers.abstract: Online recommender systems use deep learning recommendation models (DLRMs) to provide accurate, personalized recommendations to improve customer experience. However, efficiently provisioning DLRM services at scale is challenging. DLRMs exhibit distinct resource usage patterns: they require a large number of CPU cores and a tremendous amount of memory, but only a small number of GPUs. Running them in multi-GPU servers quickly exhausts the servers' CPU and memory resources, leaving a large number of unallocated GPUs stranded, unable to utilize by other tasks. This paper describes Prism, a production DLRM serving system that eliminates GPU fragmentation by means of resource disaggregation. In Prism, a fleet of CPU nodes (CNs) interconnect with a cluster of heterogeneous GPU nodes (HNs) through RDMA, leading to two disaggregated resource pools that can independently scale. Prism automatically divides DLRMs into CPU- and GPU-intensive subgraphs and schedules them on CNs and HNs for disaggregated serving. Prism employs various techniques to minimize the latency overhead caused by disaggregation, including optimal graph partitioning, topology-aware resource management, and SLO-aware communication scheduling. Evaluations show that Prism effectively reduces CPU and GPU fragmentation by 53% and 27% in a crowded GPU cluster. During seasonal promotion events, it efficiently enables capacity loaning from training clusters, saving over 90% of GPUs. Prism has been deployed in production clusters for over two years and now runs on over 10k GPUs.
papers.abstract_zh: 在线推荐系统使用深度学习推荐模型 (DLRM) 提供准确、个性化的推荐，以改善客户体验。然而，大规模有效地配置 DLRM 服务具有挑战性。 DLRM 表现出独特的资源使用模式：它们需要大量的 CPU 核心和大量的内存，但只需要少量的 GPU。在多 GPU 服务器中运行它们会很快耗尽服务器的 CPU 和内存资源，导致大量未分配的 GPU 闲置，无法被其他任务利用。本文介绍了 Prism，这是一种生产 DLRM 服务系统，可通过资源分解来消除 GPU 碎片。在 Prism 中，一组 CPU 节点 (CN) 通过 RDMA 与一组异构 GPU 节点 (HN) 互连，从而形成两个可以独立扩展的分解资源池。 Prism 自动将 DLRM 划分为 CPU 和 GPU 密集型子图，并将它们调度到 CN 和 HN 上以进行分类服务。 Prism 采用各种技术来最大限度地减少分解造成的延迟开销，包括最佳图分区、拓扑感知资源管理和 SLO 感知通信调度。评估表明，在拥挤的GPU集群中，Prism有效地将CPU和GPU碎片减少了53%和27%。在季节性促销活动期间，高效实现训练集群容量借用，节省90%以上的GPU资源。 Prism 已在生产集群中部署了两年多，现在运行在超过 10k 个 GPU 上。

papers.title: GRANNY: Granular Management of Compute-Intensive Applications in the Cloud.
papers.abstract: Parallel applications are typically implemented using multi-threading (with shared memory, e.g., OpenMP) or multi-processing (with message passing, e.g., MPI). While it seems attractive to deploy such applications in cloud VMs, existing cloud schedulers fail to manage these applications efficiently: they cannot scale multi-threaded applications dynamically when more vCPUs in a VM become available, and they cause fragmentation over time because of the static allocation of multi-process applications to VMs. We describe GRANNY, a new distributed runtime that enables the fine-granular management of multi-threaded/process applications in cloud environments. GRANNY supports the vertical scaling of multi-threaded applications within a VM and the horizontal migration of multi-process applications between VMs. GRANNY achieves both through a single WebAssembly-based execution abstraction: Granules can execute application code with thread or process semantics and allow for efficient snapshotting. GRANNY scales up applications by adding more Granules at runtime, and de-fragments applications by migrating Granules between VMs. In both cases, it launches new Granules from snapshots efficiently. We evaluate GRANNY with dynamic scheduling policies and show that, compared to current schedulers, it reduces the makespan for OpenMP workloads by up to 60% and the fragmentation for MPI workloads by up to 25%.
papers.abstract_zh: 并行应用程序通常使用多线程（使用共享内存，例如 OpenMP）或多处理（使用消息传递，例如 MPI）来实现。虽然在云虚拟机中部署此类应用程序似乎很有吸引力，但现有的云调度程序无法有效地管理这些应用程序：当虚拟机中的更多 vCPU 可用时，它们无法动态扩展多线程应用程序，并且由于多进程应用程序静态分配给虚拟机，随着时间的推移，它们会导致碎片。我们描述了 GRANNY，一种新的分布式运行时，它可以在云环境中对多线程/进程应用程序进行细粒度管理。 GRANNY支持VM内多线程应用程序的垂直扩展以及VM之间多进程应用程序的水平迁移。 GRANNY 通过单个基于 WebAssembly 的执行抽象来实现这两个目标：Granules 可以使用线程或进程语义执行应用程序代码，并允许高效的快照。 GRANNY 通过在运行时添加更多 Granule 来扩展应用程序，并通过在虚拟机之间迁移 Granules 来整理应用程序碎片。在这两种情况下，它都能有效地从快照启动新的 Granules。我们使用动态调度策略对 GRANNY 进行评估，结果表明，与当前的调度程序相比，它可将 OpenMP 工作负载的完工时间减少高达 60%，将 MPI 工作负载的碎片减少高达 25%。

papers.title: GREEN: Carbon-efficient Resource Scheduling for Machine Learning Clusters.
papers.abstract: This paper explores the problem of scheduling machine Learning (ML) jobs while also taking into account the reduction of carbon emissions in the cluster. Traditional cluster schedulers for ML jobs mainly focus on optimizing job completion time~(JCT), but do not consider the environmental impact of their decisions, resulting in a suboptimal carbon footprint. To address this issue, we propose GREEN, an ML cluster scheduler that is both time-efficient and carbon-efficient. At its core, GREEN uses a unique carbon-aware scheduling algorithm that reduces carbon footprint with minimized impact on JCT. Additionally, it leverages the temporal flexibility of ML jobs to reduce carbon emissions by shifting workloads to less carbon-intensive times, while still maintaining overall daily capacity. Our experiments using real ML jobs workload demonstrate that GREEN can achieve up to 41.2% reduction in cluster-wide carbon footprint and 12% reduction in peak power consumption, while incurring 3.6%-5.9% time efficiency tradeoff compared to existing methods.
papers.abstract_zh: 本文探讨了机器学习（ML）作业的调度问题，同时也考虑到集群中碳排放的减少。传统的机器学习作业集群调度程序主要关注优化作业完成时间（JCT），但没有考虑其决策对环境的影响，导致碳足迹不理想。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了 GREEN，一种既省时又省碳的 ML 集群调度程序。 GREEN 的核心是采用独特的碳感知调度算法，可减少碳足迹，同时将对 JCT 的影响降至最低。此外，它还利用机器学习作业的时间灵活性，通过将工作负载转移到碳密集度较低的时间来减少碳排放，同时仍保持总体每日容量。我们使用真实的 ML 作业工作负载进行的实验表明，与现有方法相比，GREEN 可以使集群范围内的碳足迹减少高达 41.2%，峰值功耗减少 12%，同时产生 3.6%-5.9% 的时间效率权衡。

papers.title: HA/TCP: A Reliable and Scalable Framework for TCP Network Functions.
papers.abstract: Layer 7 network functions (NFs) are a critical piece of modern network infrastructure. As a result, the scalability and reliability of these NFs are important but challenging because of the complexity of layer 7 NFs. This paper presents HA/TCP, a framework that enables migration and failover of layer 7 NFs. HA/TCP uses a novel replication mechanism to synchronize the state between replicas with low overhead, enabling seamless migration and failover of TCP connections. HA/TCP encapsulates the implementation details into our replicated socket interface to allow developers to easily add high availability to their layer 7 NFs such as WAN accelerators, load balancers, and proxies. Our benchmarks show that HA/TCP provides reliability for a 100 Gbps NF with as little as 0.2% decrease in client throughput. HA/TCP transparently migrates a connection between replicas in 38 µs, including the network latency. We provide reliability to a SOCKS proxy and a WAN accelerator with less than 2% decrease in throughput and a modest increase in CPU usage.
papers.abstract_zh: 第 7 层网络功能 (NF) 是现代网络基础设施的关键部分。因此，由于第 7 层 NF 的复杂性，这些 NF 的可扩展性和可靠性非常重要，但也具有挑战性。本文介绍了 HA/TCP，这是一个支持第 7 层 NF 迁移和故障转移的框架。 HA/TCP 使用新颖的复制机制以较低的开销同步副本之间的状态，从而实现 TCP 连接的无缝迁移和故障转移。 HA/TCP 将实现细节封装到我们的复制套接字接口中，使开发人员能够轻松地为其第 7 层 NF 添加高可用性，例如 WAN 加速器、负载均衡器和代理。我们的基准测试表明，HA/TCP 为 100 Gbps NF 提供了可靠性，而客户端吞吐量仅下降了 0.2%。 HA/TCP transparently migrates a connection between replicas in 38 µs, including the network latency.我们为 SOCKS 代理和 WAN 加速器提供可靠性，吞吐量下降不到 2%，CPU 使用率略有增加。

papers.title: High-level Programming for Application Networks.
papers.abstract: Application networks facilitate communication between the microservices of cloud applications. They are built today using service meshes with low-level specifications that make it difficult to express application-specific functionality (e.g., access control based on RPC fields), and they can more than double the RPC latency. We develop AppNet, a framework that makes it easy to build expressive and high-performance application networks. Developers specify rich RPC processing in a high-level language with generalized match-action rules and built-in state management. We compile the specifications to high-performance code after optimizing where (e.g., client, server) and how (e.g., RPC library, proxy) each RPC processing element runs. The optimization uses symbolic abstraction and execution to judge if different runtime configurations of possibly-stateful RPC processing elements are semantically equivalent for arbitrary RPC streams. Our experiments show that AppNet can express common application network function in only 7-28 lines of code. Its optimizations lower RPC processing latency by up to 82%.
papers.abstract_zh: 应用程序网络促进云应用程序的微服务之间的通信。如今，它们是使用具有低级规范的服务网格构建的，这使得表达特定于应用程序的功能（例如，基于 RPC 字段的访问控制）变得困难，并且它们可能会使 RPC 延迟增加一倍以上。我们开发了 AppNet，这是一个可以轻松构建富有表现力和高性能的应用程序网络的框架。开发人员使用高级语言指定丰富的 RPC 处理，并具有通用的匹配操作规则和内置状态管理。在优化每个 RPC 处理元素的运行位置（例如客户端、服务器）以及运行方式（例如 RPC 库、代理）后，我们将规范编译为高性能代码。该优化使用符号抽象和执行来判断可能有状态的 RPC 处理元素的不同运行时配置对于任意 RPC 流在语义上是否等效。我们的实验表明，AppNet 只需 7-28 行代码即可表达常见的应用网络功能。其优化可将 RPC 处理延迟降低高达 82%。

papers.title: Holmes: Localizing Irregularities in LLM Training with Mega-scale GPU Clusters.
papers.abstract: Training Large Language Models (LLMs) on large-scale GPU clusters requires numerous iterations over several months. Existing works mainly focus on addressing failures that interrupt the iterative training process to improve the utilization of GPU clusters. However, our large-scale measurements over tens of thousands of GPUs show that the training process exhibits an unstable state with some irregular iterations taking even more than twice the time of a normal iteration. Surprisingly, we find that these irregular iterations greatly extend the time of LLM training, which is even more severe than the impact of failures. Meanwhile, the irregular phenomenon is silent, making it challenging to be accurately localized. In this paper, we propose a first-of-its-kind system called Holmes, leveraging communication operators to accurately localize these irregularities in real-time. The core of Holmes's approach is to employ an enhanced abnormal operator detection model and a novel communication operator graph to perform efficient irregularity localization. Furthermore, Holmes conducts cross-iteration analysis to improve localization accuracy. We evaluate Holmes using large-scale trace-driven simulations and a production-level prototype. Large-scale simulation results demonstrate that Holmes achieves irregularity localization accuracy of 97.21%. Production-level prototype evaluation results show Holmes can localize irregularity within 30.3 seconds, achieving a speedup of 6.52× as compared to traditional approaches.
papers.abstract_zh: 在大规模 GPU 集群上训练大型语言模型 (LLM) 需要在几个月内进行多次迭代。现有的工作主要集中于解决中断迭代训练过程的故障，以提高 GPU 集群的利用率。然而，我们对数万个 GPU 的大规模测量表明，训练过程表现出不稳定状态，一些不规则迭代的时间甚至是正常迭代时间的两倍以上。令人惊讶的是，我们发现这些不规则的迭代极大地延长了LLM训练的时间，这甚至比失败的影响还要严重。同时，不规则现象是无声的，这使得准确定位具有挑战性。在本文中，我们提出了一种名为 Holmes 的首创系统，利用通信运营商实时准确定位这些违规行为。 Holmes 方法的核心是采用增强的异常算子检测模型和新颖的通信算子图来执行有效的不规则定位。此外，Holmes 还进行交叉迭代分析以提高定位精度。我们使用大规模跟踪驱动模拟和生产级原型来评估 Holmes。大规模仿真结果表明Holmes的不规则定位精度达到97.21%。生产级原型评估结果表明，Holmes 可以在 30.3 秒内定位不规则性，与传统方法相比，速度提高了 6.52 倍。

papers.title: Ladder: A Convergence-based Structured DAG Blockchain for High Throughput and Low Latency.
papers.abstract: Recent literature proposes the use of Directed Acyclic Graphs (DAG) to enhance blockchain performance. However, current block-DAG designs face three important limitations when fully utilizing parallel block processing: high computational overhead due to costly block sorting, complex transaction confirmation process, and vulnerability to balance attacks when determining the pivot chain. To this end, we propose Ladder, a structured twin-chain DAG blockchain with a convergence mechanism that efficiently optimizes parallel block processing strategy and enhances overall performance and security. In each round, a designated convergence node generates a lower-chain block, sorting the forked blocks from the upper-chain, reducing computational overhead and simplifying transaction confirmation.To counter potential adversarial disruptions, a dynamic committee is selected to generate special blocks when faulty blocks are detected. We implemented and evaluated Ladder in a distributed network environment against several state-of-the-art methods. Our results show that Ladder achieves a 59.6% increase in throughput and a 20.9% reduction in latency.
papers.abstract_zh: 最近的文献提出使用有向无环图（DAG）来增强区块链性能。然而，当前的区块 DAG 设计在充分利用并行区块处理时面临三个重要限制：昂贵的区块排序导致的高计算开销、复杂的交易确认过程以及确定主链时容易受到平衡攻击的影响。为此，我们提出了Ladder，一种具有收敛机制的结构化双链DAG区块链，可以有效优化并行块处理策略并增强整体性能和安全性。在每一轮中，指定的汇聚节点生成一个下链区块，对来自上链的分叉区块进行排序，减少计算开销并简化交易确认。为了应对潜在的对抗性干扰，当检测到故障区块时，选择一个动态委员会来生成特殊区块。我们在分布式网络环境中针对几种最先进的方法实现并评估了 Ladder。我们的结果表明，Ladder 的吞吐量提高了 59.6%，延迟降低了 20.9%。

papers.title: Large Network UWB Localization: Algorithms and Implementation.
papers.abstract: Localization of networked nodes is an essential problem in emerging applications, including first-responder navigation, automated manufacturing lines, vehicular and drone navigation, asset tracking, Internet of Things, and 5G communication networks. In this paper, we present Locate3D, a novel system for peer-to-peer node localization and orientation estimation in large networks. Unlike traditional range-only methods, Locate3D introduces angle-of-arrival (AoA) data as an added network topology constraint. The system solves three key challenges: it uses angles to reduce the number of measurements required by 4× and jointly uses range and angle data for location estimation. We develop a spanning-tree approach for fast location updates, and to ensure the output graphs are rigid and uniquely realizable, even in occluded or weakly connected areas. Locate3D cuts down latency by up to 75% without compromising accuracy, surpassing standard range-only solutions. It has a 0.86 meter median localization error for building-scale multi-floor networks (32 nodes, 0 anchors) and 12.09 meters for large-scale networks (100,000 nodes, 15 anchors).
papers.abstract_zh: 网络节点的本地化是新兴应用中的一个重要问题，包括急救人员导航、自动化生产线、车辆和无人机导航、资产跟踪、物联网和 5G 通信网络。在本文中，我们提出了 Locate3D，这是一种用于大型网络中点对点节点定位和方向估计的新颖系统。与传统的仅范围方法不同，Locate3D 引入了到达角 (AoA) 数据作为附加的网络拓扑约束。该系统解决了三个关键挑战：使用角度将所需的测量次数减少 4 倍，并联合使用距离和角度数据进行位置估计。我们开发了一种用于快速位置更新的生成树方法，并确保输出图是刚性的且唯一可实现的，即使在遮挡或弱连接区域也是如此。 Locate3D 在不影响准确性的情况下将延迟减少高达 75%，超越了标准的仅范围解决方案。对于建筑规模的多层网络（32 个节点，0 个锚点），其中位定位误差为 0.86 米；对于大型网络（100,000 个节点，15 个锚点），其中位定位误差为 12.09 米。

papers.title: Learning Production-Optimized Congestion Control Selection for Alibaba Cloud CDN.
papers.abstract: Today's content delivery networks (CDNs) typically use static congestion control (CC) configurations, yet the diverse network environments preclude a universally optimal CC for all geographical regions, as evidenced by our extensive measurements. Current CC algorithms, limited by narrow applicability or high maintenance costs, struggle in large-scale CDNs. This work introduces AliCCS, the first CC Selection (CCS) approach tailored for production CDN, integrating fine-grained domain knowledge for learning to choose the best CC from existing, well-established ones. Through an over-one-year real-world deployment in Alibaba Cloud CDN, AliCCS has enhanced the Quality-of-Experience (QoE) by up to 9.31%, surpassing the competitive margin in the CDN market, and significantly reduced the retransmission rate by 25.51% to 174.36% across all provinces of China, leading to cost savings over 10 million US dollars. We also share key insights and experiences from deploying AliCCS at scale, highlighting traffic patterns in Alibaba Cloud CDN.
papers.abstract_zh: 当今的内容分发网络 (CDN) 通常使用静态拥塞控制 (CC) 配置，但多样化的网络环境阻碍了所有地理区域的通用最佳 CC，正如我们广泛的测量所证明的那样。目前的CC算法由于适用性窄或维护成本高，在大规模CDN中举步维艰。这项工作介绍了 AliCCS，这是第一个为生产 CDN 量身定制的 CC 选择 (CCS) 方法，它集成了细粒度的领域知识，用于学习从现有的、成熟的 CC 中选择最佳的 CC。通过阿里云CDN一年多的实际部署，AliCCS的体验质量（QoE）提升了高达9.31%，超越了CDN市场的竞争优势，并在中国各省份大幅降低了重传率25.51%至174.36%，节省成本超过1000万美元。我们还分享了大规模部署 AliCCS 的重要见解和经验，重点介绍了阿里云 CDN 中的流量模式。

papers.title: Learnings from Deploying Network QoS Alignment to Application Priorities for Storage Services.
papers.abstract: To ensure that application network traffic is prioritized correctly within data center networks, it is critical to align the configuration of network QoS in packets to the intended priority of the application. These QoS configurations, typically encoded in the DSCP bits in the IP header, are interpreted by network switches and routers to determine the resources such as buffer space and scheduling priorities, for network traffic. Conceptually, it appears fairly straightforward to map the application priorities within data center networks to network QoS configurations, as long as the mapping is well defined. In this work, we describe our experience of aligning network QoS settings for intra-cluster storage traffic to application priorities on a per-RPC basis for a large data center network, with well-defined static mappings from priorities to QoS traffic classes. We describe some unexpected insights learned from the deployment experiences, e.g., downgrading traffic to use a lower QoS does not always imply worse network latency due to over-used QoS bands in the network. We also share some challenges encountered along the way to reach the goal of a fleet-wide deployment, including the concerns of potential performance regressions due to QoS downgrades. These lessons provide guidance on the use of a QoS-based scheduling strategy to meet service guarantees and can be deployed to networks of any scale.
papers.abstract_zh: To ensure that application network traffic is prioritized correctly within data center networks, it is critical to align the configuration of network QoS in packets to the intended priority of the application.这些 QoS 配置通常编码在 IP 标头中的 DSCP 位中，由网络交换机和路由器解释以确定网络流量的资源，例如缓冲区空间和调度优先级。从概念上讲，只要映射定义明确，将数据中心网络内的应用程序优先级映射到网络 QoS 配置似乎相当简单。在这项工作中，我们描述了在大型数据中心网络的每个 RPC 基础上将集群内存储流量的网络 QoS 设置与应用程序优先级对齐的经验，并具有从优先级到 QoS 流量类别的明确定义的静态映射。我们描述了从部署经验中学到的一些意想不到的见解，例如，降级流量以使用较低的 QoS 并不总是意味着由于网络中过度使用 QoS 频段而导致更糟糕的网络延迟。我们还分享了在实现全机队部署目标的过程中遇到的一些挑战，包括由于 QoS 降级而导致潜在性能下降的担忧。这些课程为使用基于 QoS 的调度策略来满足服务保证提供了指导，并且可以部署到任何规模的网络。

papers.title: Making Serverless Pay-For-Use a Reality with Leopard.
papers.abstract: Serverless computing has gained traction due to its event-driven architecture and “pay for use” (PFU) billing model. However, our analysis reveals that current billing practices do not align with true resource consumption. This paper challenges the prevailing SLIM (static, linear, interactive-only model) assumptions that underpin existing billing models, demonstrating that current billing does not realize PFU for realistic workloads. We introduce the Nearly Pay-for-Use (NPFU) billing model, which accommodates varying CPU and memory demands, spot cores, and preemptible memory. We also introduce Leopard, an NPFU-based serverless platform that integrates billing awareness into several major subsystems: CPU scheduler, OOM killer, admission controller, and cluster scheduler. Experimental results indicate that Leopard benefits both providers and users, increasing throughput by more than 2x and enabling cost reductions.
papers.abstract_zh: 无服务器计算因其事件驱动架构和“按使用付费”(PFU) 计费模式而受到关注。然而，我们的分析表明，当前的计费实践与真实的资源消耗并不相符。本文对支撑现有计费模型的主流 SLIM（静态、线性、纯交互模型）假设提出了挑战，表明当前计费并未针对实际工作负载实现 PFU。我们引入了按使用付费 (NPFU) 计费模型，该模型可适应不同的 CPU 和内存需求、现货核心和可抢占内存。我们还介绍了 Leopard，这是一个基于 NPFU 的无服务器平台，它将计费感知集成到几个主要子系统中：CPU 调度程序、OOM 杀手、准入控制器和集群调度程序。实验结果表明，Leopard 对提供商和用户都有利，将吞吐量提高了 2 倍以上，并降低了成本。

papers.title: MeshTest: End-to-End Testing for Service Mesh Traffic Management.
papers.abstract: We present MeshTest, the first end-to-end testing framework for traffic management of service mesh. The key idea of MeshTest is to automatically generate input configurations with end-to-end semantics, and then create real test request suites on each input. There are two technical challenges. First, the input space of service mesh configurations is large and complex. The input configurations should be carefully orchestrated to form end-to-end service flow paths. Second, the abstract output network behavior cannot be directly checked for correctness, and we need to generate a set of real requests that are capable of checking possible behaviors. To address these challenges, we model the service flows of traffic management in service mesh, and propose a novel Service Flow Exploration technique to enumerate all possible configuration resources and interactions between them in the input configuration. We design and implement MeshTest, which contains an automatic input configuration generator based on Service Flow Exploration and a Service Mesh Oracle which leverages formal methods to generate test request suites. MeshTest has found 23 new bugs (19 confirmed and 10 fixed) in two popular service mesh systems, Istio and Linkerd.
papers.abstract_zh: 我们推出了 MeshTest，这是第一个用于服务网格流量管理的端到端测试框架。 MeshTest 的关键思想是自动生成具有端到端语义的输入配置，然后在每个输入上创建真正的测试请求套件。有两个技术挑战。首先，服务网格配置的输入空间庞大且复杂。应仔细编排输入配置以形成端到端的服务流路径。其次，抽象输出的网络行为无法直接检查其正确性，我们需要生成一组能够检查可能行为的真实请求。为了解决这些挑战，我们对服务网格中流量管理的服务流进行建模，并提出了一种新颖的服务流探索技术来枚举输入配置中所有可能的配置资源以及​​它们之间的交互。我们设计并实现了 MeshTest，它包含一个基于服务流探索的自动输入配置生成器和一个利用正式方法生成测试请求套件的 Service Mesh Oracle。 MeshTest 在两个流行的服务网格系统 Istio 和 Linkerd 中发现了 23 个新错误（19 个已确认，10 个已修复）。

papers.title: Minder: Faulty Machine Detection for Large-scale Distributed Model Training.
papers.abstract: Large-scale distributed model training requires simultaneous training on up to thousands of machines. Faulty machine detection is critical when an unexpected fault occurs in a machine. From our experience, a training task can encounter two faults per day on average, possibly leading to a halt for hours. To address the drawbacks of the time-consuming and labor-intensive manual scrutiny, we propose Minder, an automatic faulty machine detector for distributed training tasks. The key idea of Minder is to automatically and efficiently detect faulty distinctive monitoring metric patterns, which could last for a period before the entire training task comes to a halt. Minder has been deployed in our production environment for over one year, monitoring daily distributed training tasks where each involves up to thousands of machines. In our real-world fault detection scenarios, Minder can accurately and efficiently react to faults within 3.6 seconds on average, with a precision of 0.904 and F1-score of 0.893.
papers.abstract_zh: 大规模分布式模型训练需要在多达数千台机器上同时训练。当机器发生意外故障时，故障机器检测至关重要。根据我们的经验，训练任务平均每天会遇到两次故障，可能会导致停止几个小时。为了解决手动检查耗时耗力的缺点，我们提出了 Minder，一种用于分布式训练任务的自动故障机器检测器。 Minder 的关键思想是自动有效地检测错误的独特监控指标模式，这种模式可能会在整个训练任务停止之前持续一段时间。 Minder 已经在我们的生产环境中部署了一年多，监控日常分布式训练任务，每个任务涉及多达数千台机器。在我们的实际故障检测场景中，Minder 平均可以在 3.6 秒内准确高效地响应故障，精度为 0.904，F1 分数为 0.893。

papers.title: Mitigating Scalability Walls of RDMA-based Container Networks.
papers.abstract: As a state-of-the-art technique, RDMA-offloaded container networks (RCNs) can provide high-performance data communications among containers. Nevertheless, this seems to be subject to the RCN scale—when there are millions of containers simultaneously running in a data center, the performance decreases sharply and unexpectedly. In particular, we observe that most performance issues are related to RDMA NICs (RNICs), whose design and implementation defects might constitute the "scalability wall" of the RCN. To validate the conjecture, however, we are challenged by the limited visibility into the internals of today's RNICs. To address the dilemma, a more pragmatic approach is to infer the most likely causes of the performance issues according to the common abstractions of an RNIC's components and functionalities. Specifically, we conduct combinatorial causal testing to efficiently reason about an RNIC's architecture model, effectively approximate its performance model, and thereby proactively optimize the NF (network function) offloading schedule. We embody the design into a practical system dubbed ScalaCN. Evaluation on production workloads shows that the end-to-end network bandwidth increases by 1.4× and the packet forwarding latency decreases by 31%, after resolving 82% of the causes inferred by ScalaCN. We report the performance issues of RNICs and the most likely causes to relevant vendors, all of which have been encouragingly confirmed; we are now closely working with the vendors to fix them.
papers.abstract_zh: 作为最先进的技术，RDMA 卸载容器网络 (RCN) 可以在容器之间提供高性能数据通信。然而，这似乎受到 RCN 规模的影响——当数据中心有数百万个容器同时运行时，性能会意外地急剧下降。特别是，我们观察到大多数性能问题都与 RDMA NIC（RNIC）有关，其设计和实现缺陷可能构成 RCN 的“可扩展性墙”。然而，为了验证这个猜想，我们面临着对当今 RNIC 内部结构的有限可见性的挑战。为了解决这个困境，更务实的方法是根据 RNIC 组件和功能的通用抽象来推断性能问题的最可能原因。具体来说，我们进行组合因果测试，以有效地推理 RNIC 的架构模型，有效地近似其性能模型，从而主动优化 NF（网络功能）卸载计划。我们将设计融入到一个名为 ScalaCN 的实用系统中。通过生产负载评估，解决了ScalaCN推断的82%原因后，端到端网络带宽提升了1.4倍，报文转发时延降低了31%。我们向相关厂商报告了RNIC的性能问题以及最可能的原因，所有这些都得到了令人鼓舞的证实；我们现在正在与供应商密切合作来解决这些问题。

papers.title: Mowgli: Passively Learned Rate Control for Real-Time Video.
papers.abstract: Rate control algorithms are at the heart of video conferencing platforms, determining target bitrates that match dynamic network characteristics for high quality. Despite the promise that recent data-driven strategies have shown for this challenging task, the performance degradation that they introduce during training has been a nonstarter for many production services, precluding adoption. This paper aims to bolster the practicality of data-driven rate control by presenting an alternate avenue for experiential learning: using purely existing telemetry logs that we surprisingly observe embed performant decisions but often at the wrong times or in the wrong order. To realize this approach despite the inherent uncertainty that log-based learning brings (i.e., lack of feedback for new decisions), our system, Mowgli, combines a variety of robust learning techniques (i.e., conservatively reasoning about alternate behavior to minimize risk and using a richer model formulation to account for environmental noise). Across diverse networks (emulated and real-world), Mowgli outperforms the widely deployed GCC algorithm, increasing average video bitrates by 15–39% while reducing freeze rates by 60–100%.
papers.abstract_zh: 速率控制算法是视频会议平台的核心，可确定与动态网络特征相匹配的目标比特率以实现高质量。尽管最近的数据驱动策略为这项具有挑战性的任务带来了希望，但它们在训练过程中引入的性能下降对于许多生产服务来说是不可能的，阻碍了采用。本文旨在通过提出一种体验式学习的替代途径来增强数据驱动的速率控制的实用性：使用纯粹现有的遥测日志，我们惊讶地观察到嵌入高性能决策，但通常是在错误的时间或以错误的顺序。为了实现这种方法，尽管基于日志的学习带来了固有的不确定性（即缺乏新决策的反馈），我们的系统 Mowgli 结合了各种强大的学习技术（即保守地推理替代行为以最小化风险并使用更丰富的模型公式来解释环境噪声）。在不同的网络（模拟和现实世界）中，Mowgli 的性能优于广泛部署的 GCC 算法，将平均视频比特率提高了 15-39%，同时将冻结率降低了 60-100%。

papers.title: MTP: Transport for In-Network Computing.
papers.abstract: In-network computing (INC) is being increasingly adopted to accelerate applications by offloading part of the applications’ computation to network devices. Such application-specific (L7) offloads have several attributes that the transport protocol must work with — they may mutate, intercept, reorder and delay application messages that span multiple packets. At the same time the transport must also work with the buffering and computation constraints of network devices hosting the L7 offloads. Existing transports and alternative approaches fall short in these regards. Therefore, we present MTP, the first transport to natively support INC. MTP is built around two major components: 1) a novel message-oriented reliability protocol and 2) a resource-specific congestion control framework. We implement a full-fledged prototype of MTP based on DPDK. We show the efficacy of MTP in a testbed with a real INC application as well as with comprehensive microbenchmarks and large-scale simulations.
papers.abstract_zh: 网络内计算（INC）越来越多地被采用，通过将部分应用程序的计算卸载到网络设备来加速应用程序。这种特定于应用程序的 (L7) 卸载具有传输协议必须使用的多个属性 - 它们可能会改变、拦截、重新排序和延迟跨越多个数据包的应用程序消息。同时，传输还必须适应托管 L7 卸载的网络设备的缓冲和计算限制。现有的运输和替代方法在这些方面都存在不足。因此，我们提出了 MTP，这是第一个原生支持 INC 的传输。MTP 围绕两个主要组件构建：1) 新颖的面向消息的可靠性协议和 2) 特定于资源的拥塞控制框架。我们基于 DPDK 实现了成熟的 MTP 原型。我们通过真实的 INC 应用以及全面的微基准测试和大规模模拟，在测试台中展示了 MTP 的功效。

papers.title: Mutant: Learning Congestion Control from Existing Protocols via Online Reinforcement Learning.
papers.abstract: Learning how to control congestion remains a challenge despite years of progress. Existing congestion control protocols have demonstrated efficacy within specific network conditions, inevitably behaving suboptimally or poorly in others. Machine learning solutions to congestion control have been proposed, though relying on extensive training and specific network configurations. In this paper, we loosen such dependencies by proposing Mutant, an online reinforcement learning algorithm for congestion control that adapts to the behavior of the best-performing schemes, outperforming them in most network conditions. Design challenges included determining the best protocols to learn from, given a network scenario, and creating a system able to evolve to accommodate future protocols with minimal changes. Our evaluation on real-world and emulated scenarios shows that Mutant achieves lower delays and higher throughput than prior learning-based schemes while maintaining fairness by exhibiting negligible harm to competing flows, making it robust across diverse and dynamic network conditions.
papers.abstract_zh: 尽管取得了多年的进展，学习如何控制拥堵仍然是一个挑战。现有的拥塞控制协议已在特定网络条件下表现出有效性，但在其他条件下不可避免地表现不佳或较差。尽管依赖于广泛的训练和特定的网络配置，但已经提出了拥塞控制的机器学习解决方案。在本文中，我们通过提出 Mutant 来放松这种依赖关系，Mutant 是一种用于拥塞控制的在线强化学习算法，它适应性能最佳方案的行为，在大多数网络条件下表现优于它们。设计挑战包括在给定的网络场景下确定最佳的学习协议，以及创建一个能够以最小的变化不断发展以适应未来协议的系统。我们对现实世界和模拟场景的评估表明，与之前基于学习的方案相比，Mutant 实现了更低的延迟和更高的吞吐量，同时通过对竞争流的损害可以忽略不计来保持公平性，使其在多样化和动态的网络条件下保持稳健。

papers.title: NDD: A Decision Diagram for Network Verification.
papers.abstract: State-of-the-art network verifiers extensively use Binary Decision Diagram (BDD) as the underlying data structure to represent the network state and equivalence classes. Despite its wide usage, we find BDD is not ideal for network verification: verifiers need to handle the low-level computation of equivalence classes, and still face scalability issues when the network state has a lot of bits. To this end, this paper introduces Network Decision Diagram (NDD), a new decision diagram customized for network verification. In a nutshell, NDD wraps BDD with another layers of decision diagram, such that each NDD node represents a field of the network, and each edge is labeled with a BDD encoding the values of that field. We designed and implemented a library for NDD, which features a native support for equivalence classes, and higher efficiency in memory and computation. Using the NDD library, we re-implemented five BDD-based verifiers with minor modifications to their original codes, and observed a 100× reduction in memory cost and 100× speedup. This indicates that NDD provides a drop-in replacement of BDD for network verifiers.
papers.abstract_zh: 最先进的网络验证器广泛使用二元决策图（BDD）作为底层数据结构来表示网络状态和等价类。尽管 BDD 用途广泛，但我们发现它对于网络验证来说并不理想：验证者需要处理等价类的低级计算，并且当网络状态有很多位时仍然面临可扩展性问题。为此，本文介绍了网络决策图（NDD），一种为网络验证定制的新型决策图。简而言之，NDD 用另一层决策图包装了 BDD，使得每个 NDD 节点代表网络的一个字段，并且每条边都用编码该字段值的 BDD 进行标记。我们设计并实现了一个 NDD 库，它具有对等价类的原生支持，以及更高的内存和计算效率。使用 NDD 库，我们重新实现了五个基于 BDD 的验证器，对其原始代码进行了少量修改，并观察到内存成本降低了 100 倍，加速提高了 100 倍。这表明 NDD 为网络验证者提供了 BDD 的直接替代品。

papers.title: ODRP: On-Demand Remote Paging with Programmable RDMA.
papers.abstract: Memory disaggregation with OS swapping is becoming popular for next-generation datacenters. RDMA is a promising technique for achieving this. However, RDMA does not support dynamic memory management in the data path. Current systems rely on RDMA’s control path operations, which are designed for coarse-grained memory management.
