This results in a trade-off between performance and memory utilization and also requires significant CPU usage, which is a limited resource on memory nodes. This paper introduces On-Demand Remote Paging, the first system that smartly chains native RDMA data path primitives to offload all memory access and management operations onto the RDMA-capable NIC (RNIC). However, efficiently implementing these operations is challenging due to the limited capability of RNIC. ODRP leverages the semantics of OS swapping and adopts a client-assisted principle to address the efficiency and functionality challenges. Compared to the state-of-the-art system, ODRP can achieve significantly better memory utilization, no CPU usage while introducing only a 0.8% to 14.6% performance overhead in real-world applications.
papers.abstract_zh: 带有操作系统交换的内存分解在下一代数据中心中变得越来越流行。 RDMA 是实现这一目标的一项有前景的技术。但是，RDMA 不支持数据路径中的动态内存管理。当前系统依赖于 RDMA 的控制路径操作，该操作专为粗粒度内存管理而设计。这导致性能和内存利用率之间的权衡，并且还需要大量的 CPU 使用率，而 CPU 是内存节点上的有限资源。本文介绍了按需远程分页，这是第一个智能链接本机 RDMA 数据路径原语以将所有内存访问和管理操作卸载到支持 RDMA 的 NIC (RNIC) 的系统。然而，由于 RNIC 的能力有限，有效地实施这些操作具有挑战性。 ODRP 利用操作系统交换的语义，并采用客户端辅助原则来解决效率和功能挑战。与最先进的系统相比，ODRP 可以实现显着更好的内存利用率，不使用 CPU，同时在实际应用中仅引入 0.8% 至 14.6% 的性能开销。

papers.title: On Temporal Verification of Stateful P4 Programs.
papers.abstract: Stateful P4 programs offload network states from the control plane to the data plane, enabling unprecedented network programmability. However, existing P4 verifiers overapproximate the stateful nature of P4 programs and are inherently inadequate for verifying network functions that require stateful decision-making. To overcome this limitation, this paper introduces an innovative approach to verify P4 programs while accounting for their stateful feature. We propose a specification language named P4LTL, tailored for describing temporal properties of stateful P4 programs at the packet processing level. Additionally, we introduce a novel concept called the Büchi transaction, representing the product of the P4 program and the P4LTL specification. The P4 program verification problem can be reduced to determining the existence of any fair and feasible trace within the Büchi transaction. To the best of our knowledge, our approach represents the first endeavor in temporal verification of stateful P4 programs at the packet processing level. We implemented a prototype tool called p4tv. Evaluation results demonstrate p4tv’s effectiveness and efficiency in temporal verification of stateful P4 programs.
papers.abstract_zh: 有状态 P4 程序将网络状态从控制平面卸载到数据平面，从而实现前所未有的网络可编程性。然而，现有的 P4 验证器过于接近 P4 程序的有状态性质，并且本质上不足以验证需要有状态决策的网络功能。为了克服这一限制，本文引入了一种创新方法来验证 P4 程序，同时考虑其有状态特征。我们提出了一种名为 P4LTL 的规范语言，专门用于描述数据包处理级别的有状态 P4 程序的时间属性。此外，我们引入了一个称为 Büchi 交易的新颖概念，代表 P4 程序和 P4LTL 规范的产物。 P4 程序验证问题可以简化为确定 Büchi 交易中是否存在任何公平可行的踪迹。据我们所知，我们的方法代表了在数据包处理级别对有状态 P4 程序进行时间验证的首次尝试。我们实现了一个名为 p4tv 的原型工具。评估结果证明了 p4tv 在有状态 P4 程序的时间验证方面的有效性和效率。

papers.title: ONCache: A Cache-Based Low-Overhead Container Overlay Network.
papers.abstract: Recent years have witnessed a widespread adoption of containers. While containers simplify and accelerate application development, existing container network technologies either incur significant overhead, which hurts performance for distributed applications, or lose flexibility or compatibility, which hinders the widespread deployment in production. We carefully analyze the kernel data path of an overlay network, quantifying the time consumed by each segment of the data path and identifying the extra overhead in an overlay network compared to bare metal. We observe that this extra overhead generates repetitive results among packets, which inspires us to introduce caches within an overlay network. We design and implement ONCache ( O verlay N etwork Cache ), a cache-based container overlay network, to eliminate the extra overhead while maintaining flexibility and compatibility. We implement ONCache using the extended Berkeley Packet Filter (eBPF) with only 524 lines of code, and integrate it as a plugin of Antrea. With ONCache, containers attain networking performance akin to that of bare metal. Compared to the standard overlay networks, ONCache improves throughput and request-response transaction rate by 12% and 36% for TCP (20% and 34% for UDP), respectively, while significantly reducing per-packet CPU overhead. Popular distributed applications also benefit from ONCache.
papers.abstract_zh: 近年来，容器得到广泛采用。虽然容器简化并加速了应用程序开发，但现有的容器网络技术要么会产生大量开销，从而损害分布式应用程序的性能，要么会失去灵活性或兼容性，从而阻碍生产中的广泛部署。我们仔细分析了覆盖网络的内核数据路径，量化了数据路径每段所消耗的时间，并确定了覆盖网络与裸机相比的额外开销。我们观察到这种额外的开销会在数据包之间产生重复的结果，这激励我们在覆盖网络中引入缓存。我们设计并实现了ONCache（Overlay Network Cache），一种基于缓存的容器覆盖网络，以消除额外的开销，同时保持灵活性和兼容性。我们使用扩展的伯克利数据包过滤器（eBPF）实现ONCache，仅用524行代码，并将其集成为Antrea的插件。借助 ONCache，容器可以获得与裸机类似的网络性能。与标准覆盖网络相比，ONCache 将 TCP 的吞吐量和请求响应事务率分别提高了 12% 和 36%（UDP 分别提高了 20% 和 34%），同时显着降低了每个数据包的 CPU 开销。流行的分布式应用程序也受益于 ONCache。

papers.title: One-Size-Fits-None: Understanding and Enhancing Slow-Fault Tolerance in Modern Distributed Systems.
papers.abstract: Recent studies have shown that various hardware components exhibit fail-slow behavior at scale. However, the characteristics of distributed software's tolerance of such slow faults remain ill-understood. This paper presents a comprehensive study that investigates the characteristics and current practices of slow-fault tolerance in modern distributed software. We focus on the fundamentally nuanced nature of slow faults. We develop a testing pipeline to systematically introduce diverse slow faults, measure their impact under different workloads, and identify the patterns. Our study shows that even small changes can lead to dramatically different reactions. While some systems have added slow-fault handling mechanisms, they are mostly controlled by static thresholds, which can hardly accommodate the highly sensitive and dynamic characteristics. To address this gap, we design ADR, a lightweight library to use within system code and make fail-slow handling adaptive. Evaluation shows ADR significantly reduces the impact of slow faults.
papers.abstract_zh: 最近的研究表明，各种硬件组件大规模地表现出故障缓慢行为。然而，分布式软件对这种缓慢故障的容忍特性仍然不为人所知。本文提出了一项全面的研究，调查现代分布式软件中慢容错的特征和当前实践。我们关注慢故障的根本细微差别。我们开发了一个测试管道来系统地引入各种慢故障，测量它们在不同工作负载下的影响，并识别模式。我们的研究表明，即使很小的变化也会导致截然不同的反应。虽然有些系统增加了慢故障处理机制，但大多采用静态阈值控制，很难适应高敏感和动态的特性。为了弥补这一差距，我们设计了 ADR，这是一个在系统代码中使用的轻量级库，并使慢速故障处理具有适应性。评估表明，ADR 显着降低了慢故障的影响。

papers.title: Optimizing RLHF Training for Large Language Models with Stage Fusion.
papers.abstract: We present RLHFuse, an efficient training system with stage fusion for Reinforcement Learning from Human Feedback (RLHF). Due to the intrinsic nature of RLHF training, i.e., the data skewness in the generation stage and the pipeline bubbles in the training stage, existing RLHF systems suffer from low GPU utilization. RLHFuse breaks the traditional view of RLHF workflow as a composition of individual tasks, splitting each task into finer-grained subtasks, and performing stage fusion to improve GPU utilization. RLHFuse contains two key ideas. First, for generation and inference tasks, RLHFuse splits them into sample-level subtasks, enabling efficient inter-stage fusion to overlap the execution of generation and inference stages, thus mitigating the original generation bottleneck dominated by long-tailed samples. Second, for training tasks, RLHFuse breaks them into subtasks of micro-batches and performs intra-stage fusion to concurrently execute these subtasks in the training stage with a fused pipeline schedule, effectively mitigating the pipeline bubbles. The experiments show that RLHFuse increases the training throughput by up to 3.7×, compared to existing systems.
papers.abstract_zh: 我们推出了 RLHFuse，这是一种具有阶段融合的高效训练系统，用于人类反馈强化学习 (RLHF)。由于 RLHF 训练的本质，即生成阶段的数据偏斜和训练阶段的管道气泡，现有 RLHF 系统的 GPU 利用率较低。 RLHFuse 打破了 RLHF 工作流程由单个任务组成的传统观点，将每个任务拆分为更细粒度的子任务，并进行阶段融合以提高 GPU 利用率。 RLHFuse 包含两个关键思想。首先，对于生成和推理任务，RLHFuse 将其拆分为样本级子任务，实现高效的阶段间融合，以重叠生成和推理阶段的执行，从而缓解原来由长尾样本主导的生成瓶颈。其次，对于训练任务，RLHFuse 将其分解为微批次的子任务，并进行阶段内融合，以融合的流水线调度在训练阶段同时执行这些子任务，有效地减少了流水线气泡。实验表明，与现有系统相比，RLHFuse 的训练吞吐量提高了 3.7 倍。

papers.title: OptiReduce: Resilient and Tail-Optimal AllReduce for Distributed Deep Learning in the Cloud.
papers.abstract: We present OptiReduce, a new collective-communication system for the cloud with bounded, predictable completion times for deep-learning jobs in the presence of varying computation (stragglers) and communication (congestion and gradient drops) variabilities. OptiReduce exploits the inherent resiliency and the stochastic nature of distributed deep-learning (DDL) training and fine-tuning to work with approximated (or lost) gradients—providing an efficient balance between (tail) performance and the resulting accuracy of the trained models. Exploiting this domain-specific characteristic of DDL, OptiReduce introduces (1) mechanisms (e.g., unreliable bounded transport with adaptive timeout) to improve the DDL jobs’ tail execution time, and (2) strategies (e.g., Transpose AllReduce and Hadamard Transform) to mitigate the impact of gradient drops on model accuracy. Our evaluation shows that OptiReduce achieves 70% and 30% faster time-to-accuracy (TTA), on average, when operating in shared, cloud environments (e.g., CloudLab) compared to Gloo and NCCL, respectively.
papers.abstract_zh: 我们推出了 OptiReduce，这是一种新的云集体通信系统，在存在不同计算（落后者）和通信（拥塞和梯度下降）变化的情况下，深度学习作业的完成时间是有限的、可预测的。 OptiReduce 利用分布式深度学习 (DDL) 训练和微调的固有弹性和随机性来处理近似（或丢失）梯度，从而在训练模型的（尾部）性能和最终精度之间提供有效的平衡。利用 DDL 的这种特定于领域的特性，OptiReduce 引入了 (1) 机制（例如，具有自适应超时的不可靠有界传输）来改善 DDL 作业的尾部执行时间，以及 (2) 策略（例如 Transpose AllReduce 和 Hadamard Transform）来减轻梯度下降对模型精度的影响。我们的评估表明，与 Gloo 和 NCCL 相比，在共享云环境（例如 CloudLab）中运行时，OptiReduce 的准确时间 (TTA) 平均分别快了 70% 和 30%。

papers.title: PAPAYA Federated Analytics Stack: Engineering Privacy, Scalability and Practicality.
papers.abstract: Cross-device Federated Analytics (FA) is a distributed computation paradigm designed to answer analytics queries about and derive insights from data held locally on users’ devices. On-device computations combined with other privacy and security measures ensure that only minimal data is transmitted off-device, achieving a high standard of data protection. Despite FA’s broad adoption, the applicability of existing FA systems is limited by compromised accuracy; lack of flexibility for data analytics; and an inability to scale effectively. In this paper, we describe our approach to combine privacy, scalability, and practicality to build a system that overcomes these limitations. The PAPAYA system at Meta system leverages trusted execution environments (TEEs) and optimizes the use of on-device computing resources to facilitate federated data processing across large fleets of devices, while ensuring robust, defensible, and verifiable privacy safeguards. We focus on federated analytics (statistics and monitoring), in contrast to systems for federated learning (ML workloads), and we flag the key differences.
papers.abstract_zh: 跨设备联合分析 (FA) 是一种分布式计算范例，旨在回答有关用户设备本地保存的数据的分析查询并从中获取见解。设备内计算与其他隐私和安全措施相结合，确保只有最少的数据在设备外传输，从而实现高标准的数据保护。尽管 FA 得到了广泛采用，但现有 FA 系统的适用性因准确性受损而受到限制；数据分析缺乏灵活性；以及无法有效扩展。在本文中，我们描述了将隐私性、可扩展性和实用性结合起来构建一个克服这些限制的系统的方法。 Meta 系统的 PAPAYA 系统利用可信执行环境 (TEE) 并优化设备上计算资源的使用，以促进跨大型设备群的联合数据处理，同时确保强大、可防御且可验证的隐私保护。与联邦学习系统（机器学习工作负载）相比，我们专注于联邦分析（统计和监控），并且我们标记了关键差异。

papers.title: Pineapple: Unifying Multi-Paxos and Atomic Shared Registers.
papers.abstract: Linearizable storage systems reduce the complexity of developing correct large-scale customer-facing applications, in the presence of concurrent operations and failures. A common approach for providing linearizability is to use consensus to order operations invoked by applications. This paper explores designs that offload operations (from the consensus component) to improve overall performance. This paper presents Pineapple, which uses logical timestamps to unify Multi-Paxos and atomic shared registers so that any node in the system can serve read and write operations. Compared to Multi-Paxos (or leader-based consensus), Pineapple reduces bottlenecks at the leader. Compared to Gryff, which unifies EPaxos and atomic shared registers, Pineapple has better performance because Pineapple has “non-blocking operation execution.” Our evaluation shows that Pineapple improves both throughput and tail latency, compared to state-of-the-art systems (e.g., Gryff, Multi-Paxos, EPaxos), in both wide-area networks and local-area networks. We also integrate Pineapple with etcd. In a balanced workload, Pineapple reduces median latency by more than 50%, compared to the original system that uses an optimized version of Raft.
papers.abstract_zh: 在存在并发操作和故障的情况下，线性化存储系统降低了开发正确的大规模面向客户的应用程序的复杂性。提供线性化的常见方法是使用共识来对应用程序调用的操作进行排序。本文探讨了卸载操作（从共识组件）以提高整体性能的设计。本文提出了 Pineapple，它使用逻辑时间戳来统一 Multi-Paxos 和原子共享寄存器，以便系统中的任何节点都可以服务于读写操作。与 Multi-Paxos（或基于领导者的共识）相比，Pineapple 减少了领导者的瓶颈。与统一了 EPaxos 和原子共享寄存器的 Gryff 相比，Pineapple 具有更好的性能，因为 Pineapple 具有“非阻塞操作执行”。我们的评估表明，与最先进的系统（例如 Gryff、Multi-Paxos、EPaxos）相比，Pineapple 在广域网和局域网中都提高了吞吐量和尾部延迟。我们还将 Pineapple 与 etcd 集成。在平衡工作负载下，与使用 Raft 优化版本的原始系统相比，Pineapple 将中值延迟降低了 50% 以上。

papers.title: PreAcher: Secure and Practical Password Pre-Authentication by Content Delivery Networks.
papers.abstract: In today's Internet, websites widely rely on password authentication for user logins. However, the intensive computation required for password authentication exposes web servers to Application-layer DoS (ADoS) attacks that exploit the login interfaces. Existing solutions fail to simultaneously prevent such ADoS attacks, preserve password secrecy, and maintain good usability. In this paper, we present PreAcher, a system architecture that incorporates third-party Content Delivery Networks (CDNs) into the password authentication process and offloads the authentication workload to CDNs without divulging the passwords to them. At the core of PreAcher is a novel three-party authentication protocol that combines Oblivious Pseudorandom Function (OPRF) and Locality-Sensitive Hashing (LSH). This protocol allows CDNs to pre-authenticate users and thus filter out ADoS traffic without compromising password security. Our evaluations demonstrate that PreAcher significantly enhances the resilience of web servers against both ADoS attacks and preserves password security while introducing acceptable overheads. Notably, PreAcher can be deployed immediately by websites alone today, without modifications to client software or CDN infrastructure. We release the source code of PreAcher to facilitate its deployment and future research.
papers.abstract_zh: 在当今的互联网中，网站广泛依赖密码身份验证来进行用户登录。然而，密码身份验证所需的密集计算使 Web 服务器面临利用登录界面的应用程序层 DoS (ADoS) 攻击。现有的解决方案无法同时防止此类 ADoS 攻击、保护密码保密性并保持良好的可用性。在本文中，我们提出了 PreAcher，这是一种系统架构，它将第三方内容交付网络 (CDN) 纳入密码身份验证过程，并将身份验证工作负载卸载到 CDN，而无需向其泄露密码。 PreAcher 的核心是一种新颖的三方身份验证协议，它结合了 Oblivious 伪随机函数 (OPRF) 和局部敏感哈希 (LSH)。该协议允许 CDN 预先验证用户身份，从而在不影响密码安全的情况下过滤掉 ADoS 流量。我们的评估表明，PreAcher 显着增强了 Web 服务器抵御 ADoS 攻击的能力，并在引入可接受的开销的同时保持了密码安全。值得注意的是，PreAcher 现在可以仅由网站立即部署，无需修改客户端软件或 CDN 基础设施。我们发布了 PreAcher 的源代码，以方便其部署和未来的研究。

papers.title: PRED: Performance-oriented Random Early Detection for Consistently Stable Performance in Datacenters.
papers.abstract: For decades, Random Early Detection (RED) has been integrated into datacenter switches as a fundamental Active Queue Management (AQM). Accurate configuration of RED parameters is crucial to achieving high throughput and low latency. However, due to the highly dynamic nature of workloads in datacenter networks, maintaining consistently high performance with statically configured RED thresholds poses a challenge. Prior art applies reinforcement learning to predict proper thresholds, but their real-world deployment has been hindered by poor tail performance caused by instability. In this paper, we propose PRED, a novel system that enables automatic and stable RED parameter adjustment in response to traffic dynamics. PRED uses two loosely coupled systems, Flow Concurrent Stabilizer (FCS) and Queue Length Adjuster (QLA), to overcome the challenges of dynamically setting RED parameters to adapt to the ever-changing traffic pattern. We perform extensive evaluations on our physical testbed and large-scale simulations. The results demonstrate that PRED can keep up with the real-time network dynamics generated by realistic workloads. For instance, compared with the static-threshold-based methods, PRED keeps 66%lower switch queue length and obtains up to 80% lower Flow Completion Time (FCT). Compared with the state-of-the-art learning-based method, PRED reduces the tail FCT by 34%.
papers.abstract_zh: 几十年来，随机早期检测 (RED) 已作为基本的主动队列管理 (AQM) 集成到数据中心交换机中。 RED 参数的准确配置对于实现高吞吐量和低延迟至关重要。然而，由于数据中心网络中工作负载的高度动态特性，通过静态配置的 RED 阈值保持一致的高性能构成了挑战。现有技术应用强化学习来预测适当的阈值，但它们在现实世界中的部署因不稳定导致的尾部性能不佳而受到阻碍。在本文中，我们提出了 PRED，这是一种新颖的系统，可以根据交通动态自动稳定地调整 RED 参数。 PRED 使用两个松散耦合的系统：流量并发稳定器 (FCS) 和队列长度调整器 (QLA)，来克服动态设置 RED 参数以适应不断变化的流量模式的挑战。我们对物理测试台和大规模模拟进行了广泛的评估。结果表明，PRED 可以跟上实际工作负载生成的实时网络动态。例如，与基于静态阈值的方法相比，PRED 的交换机队列长度减少了 66%，流完成时间 (FCT) 减少了 80%。与最先进的基于学习的方法相比，PRED 将尾部 FCT 降低了 34%。

papers.title: Preventing Network Bottlenecks: Accelerating Datacenter Services with Hotspot-Aware Placement for Compute and Storage.
papers.abstract: Datacenter network hotspots, defined as links with persistently high utilization, can lead to performance bottlenecks.In this work, we study hotspots in Google’s datacenter networks. We find that these hotspots occur most frequently at ToR switches and can persist for hours. They are caused mainly by bandwidth demand-supply imbalance, largely due to high demand from network-intensive services, or demand exceeding available bandwidth when compute/storage upgrades outpace ToR bandwidth upgrades. Compounding this issue is bandwidth-independent task/data placement by data-center compute and storage schedulers. We quantify the performance impact of hotspots, and find that they can degrade the end-to-end latency of some distributed applications by over 2× relative to low utilization levels. Finally, we describe simple improvements we deployed. In our cluster scheduler, adding hotspot-aware task placement reduced the number of hot ToRs by 90%; in our distributed file system, adding hotspot-aware data placement reduced p95 network latency by more than 50%. While congestion control, load balancing, and traffic engineering can efficiently utilize paths for a fixed placement, we find hotspot-aware placement – placing tasks and data under ToRs with higher available bandwidth – is crucial for achieving consistently good performance.
papers.abstract_zh: 数据中心网络热点定义为持续高利用率的链接，可能会导致性能瓶颈。在这项工作中，我们研究了 Google 数据中心网络中的热点。我们发现这些热点最常出现在 ToR 交换机上，并且可能持续数小时。它们主要是由于带宽供需不平衡造成的，很大程度上是由于网络密集型服务的高需求，或者当计算/存储升级超过ToR带宽升级时需求超过可用带宽。数据中心计算和存储调度程序的与带宽无关的任务/数据放置使这个问题变得更加复杂。我们量化了热点对性能的影响，发现相对于低利用率水平，它们可以使某些分布式应用程序的端到端延迟降低超过 2 倍。最后，我们描述了我们部署的简单改进。在我们的集群调度程序中，添加热点感知任务放置将热点 ToR 的数量减少了 90%；在我们的分布式文件系统中，添加热点感知数据放置可将 p95 网络延迟减少 50% 以上。虽然拥塞控制、负载平衡和流量工程可以有效地利用固定放置的路径，但我们发现热点感知放置（将任务和数据放置在具有更高可用带宽的 ToR 下）对于实现一致的良好性能至关重要。

papers.title: Pushing the Limits of In-Network Caching for Key-Value Stores.
papers.abstract: We present OrbitCache, a new in-network caching architecture that can cache variable-length items to balance a wide range of key-value workloads. Unlike existing works, OrbitCache does not cache hot items in the switch memory. Instead, we make hot items revisit the switch data plane continuously by exploiting packet recirculation. Our approach keeps cached key-value pairs in the switch data plane while freeing them from item size limitations caused by hardware constraints. We implement an OrbitCache prototype on an Intel Tofino switch. Our experimental results show that OrbitCache can balance highly skewed workloads and is robust to various system conditions.
papers.abstract_zh: 我们推出了 OrbitCache，这是一种新的网络内缓存架构，可以缓存可变长度项目以平衡各种键值工作负载。与现有作品不同，OrbitCache 不会在交换机内存中缓存热门项目。相反，我们通过利用数据包再循环使热点项目不断地重新访问交换机数据平面。我们的方法将缓存的键值对保留在交换机数据平面中，同时使它们免受硬件限制引起的项目大小限制。我们在 Intel Tofino 交换机上实现了 OrbitCache 原型。我们的实验结果表明，OrbitCache 可以平衡高度倾斜的工作负载，并且对各种系统条件都具有鲁棒性。

papers.title: Pyrrha: Congestion-Root-Based Flow Control to Eliminate Head-of-Line Blocking in Datacenter.
papers.abstract: In modern datacenters, the effectiveness of end-to-end congestion control (CC) is quickly diminishing with the rapid bandwidth evolution. Per-hop flow control (FC) can react to congestion more promptly. However, a coarse-grained FC can result in Head-Of-Line (HOL) blocking. A fine-grained, per-flow FC can eliminate HOL blocking caused by flow control, however, it does not scale well. This paper presents Pyrrha, a scalable flow control approach that provably eliminates HOL blocking while using a minimum number of queues. In Pyrrha, flow control first takes effect on the root of the congestion, i.e., the port where congestion occurs. And then flows are controlled according to their contributed congestion roots. A prototype of Pyrrha is implemented on Tofino2 switches. Compared with state-of-the-art approaches, the average FCT of uncongested flows is reduced by 42%-98%, and 99th-tail latency can be 1.6×-215× lower, without compromising the performance of congested flows.
papers.abstract_zh: 在现代数据中心中，端到端拥塞控制 (CC) 的有效性随着带宽的快速发展而迅速减弱。每跳流量控制 (FC) 可以更迅速地对拥塞做出反应。然而，粗粒度 FC 可能会导致队头 (HOL) 阻塞。细粒度的、按流的 FC 可以消除由流控制引起的 HOL 阻塞，但是它的扩展性不佳。本文介绍了 Pyrrha，这是一种可扩展的流量控制方法，可在使用最少数量的队列的同时消除 HOL 阻塞。在Pyratha中，流量控制首先对拥塞的根源起作用，即发生拥塞的端口。然后根据其贡献的拥塞根源来控制流量。 Pyratha 的原型是在 Tofino2 交换机上实现的。与最先进的方法相比，非拥塞流的平均 FCT 降低了 42%-98%，第 99 尾延迟可降低 1.6×-215×，而不会影响拥塞流的性能。

papers.title: Quicksand: Harnessing Stranded Datacenter Resources with Granular Computing.
papers.abstract: Datacenters today waste CPU and memory, as resources demanded by applications often fail to match the resources available on machines. This leads to stranded resources because one resource that runs out prevents placing additional applications that could consume the other resources. Unusable stranded resources result in reduced utilization of servers, and wasted money and energy. Quicksand is a new framework and runtime system that unstrands resources by providing developers with familiar, high-level abstractions (e.g., data structures, batch computing). Internally Quicksand decomposes them into resource proclets, granular units that each primarily consume resources of one type. Inspired by recent granular programming models, Quicksand decouples consumption of resources as much as possible. It splits, merges, and migrates resource proclets in milliseconds, so it can use resources on any machine, even if available only briefly. Evaluation of our prototype with four applications shows that Quicksand uses stranded resources effectively; that Quicksand reacts to changing resource availability and demand within milliseconds, increasing utilization; and that porting applications to Quicksand requires moderate effort.
papers.abstract_zh: 如今的数据中心浪费 CPU 和内存，因为应用程序所需的资源通常无法与计算机上的可用资源相匹配。这会导致资源搁浅，因为一种资源耗尽会阻止放置可能消耗其他资源的其他应用程序。无法使用的闲置资源会导致服务器利用率降低，并浪费金钱和能源。 Quicksand 是一种新的框架和运行时系统，它通过为开发人员提供熟悉的高级抽象（例如数据结构、批处理计算）来释放资源。在内部，Quicksand 将它们分解为资源过程，即每个主要消耗一种类型资源的粒度单元。受最新粒度编程模型的启发，Quicksand 尽可能地解耦资源消耗。它可以在几毫秒内分割、合并和迁移资源 proclet，因此它可以使用任何机器上的资源，即使只是短暂可用。通过四个应用程序对我们的原型进行的评估表明，Quicksand 可以有效地利用闲置资源； Quicksand 在几毫秒内对不断变化的资源可用性和需求做出反应，从而提高利用率；并且将应用程序移植到 Quicksand 需要付出一定的努力。

papers.title: Rajomon: Decentralized and Coordinated Overload Control for Latency-Sensitive Microservices.
papers.abstract: Microservices are increasingly central for cloud applications due to their flexibility and support for rapid integration and deployment. However, applications often experience overload or sudden traffic surges that exceed service capacity, resulting in increased latency or service failures. Moreover, microservices are decentralized, interdependent, and multiplexed, exacerbating risks from overload. We present RAJOMON, a market-based overload control system for large microservice graphs. RAJOMON controls overload through distributed rate-limiting and load shedding. Clients attach tokens to requests and services charge a price for each API, dropping requests with insufficient tokens. Tokens and prices propagate through the entire call graph, piggybacking on requests and responses. Thus, RAJOMON is the first decentralized, end-to-end overload control system. We implement and evaluate RAJOMON on a setup of up to 140 cores and on a variety of applications from academia and industry. Experiments indicate RAJOMON protects microservice goodput and tail latency from substantial demand spikes, even in the case of mixed request types and deeper service graphs. For high-load scenarios, RAJOMON reduces tail latency by 78% and increases goodput by 45% when compared against state-of-the-art overload control for microservices.
papers.abstract_zh: 微服务因其灵活性以及对快速集成和部署的支持而日益成为云应用程序的核心。然而，应用程序经常会遇到过载或突然的流量激增超出服务容量的情况，从而导致延迟增加或服务故障。此外，微服务是分散的、相互依赖的和多重的，加剧了过载的风险。我们推出 RAJOMON，一种基于市场的大型微服务图过载控制系统。 RAJOMON 通过分布式速率限制和减载来控制过载。客户端将令牌附加到请求，服务对每个 API 收费，并丢弃令牌不足的请求。 Tokens and prices propagate through the entire call graph, piggybacking on requests and responses.因此，RAJOMON 是第一个分散式端到端过载控制系统。我们在多达 140 个内核的设置以及来自学术界和工业界的各种应用程序上实施和评估 RAJOMON。实验表明，即使在混合请求类型和更深的服务图的情况下，RAJOMON 也能保护微服务的吞吐量和尾部延迟免受大量需求峰值的影响。对于高负载场景，与最先进的微服务过载控制相比，RAJOMON 将尾部延迟减少了 78%，并将吞吐量提高了 45%。

papers.title: Region-based Content Enhancement for Efficient Video Analytics at the Edge.
papers.abstract: Video analytics is widespread in various applications serving our society. Recent advances of content enhancement in video analytics offer signiﬁcant beneﬁts for the bandwidth saving and accuracy improvement. However, existing content-enhanced video analytics systems are excessively computationally expensive and provide extremely low throughput. In this paper, we present region-based content enhancement, that enhances only the important regions in videos, to improve analytical accuracy. Our system, RegenHance, enables high-accuracy and high-throughput video analytics at the edge by 1) a macroblock-based region importance predictor that identifies the important regions fast and precisely, 2) a regionaware enhancer that stitches sparsely distributed regions into dense tensors and enhances them efﬁciently, and 3) a proﬁle-based execution planer that allocates appropriate resources for enhancement and analytics components. We prototype RegenHance on ﬁve heterogeneous edge devices. Experiments on two analytical tasks reveal that region-based enhancement improves the overall accuracy of 10-19% and achieves 2-3× throughput compared to the state-of-the-art frame-based enhancement methods.
papers.abstract_zh: 视频分析广泛应用于服务于我们社会的各种应用中。视频分析内容增强的最新进展为节省带宽和提高准确性提供了显着的好处。然而，现有的内容增强视频分析系统的计算成本过高，并且吞吐量极低。在本文中，我们提出了基于区域的内容增强，仅增强视频中的重要区域，以提高分析准确性。我们的系统 RegenHance 通过以下方式在边缘实现高精度和高吞吐量视频分析：1）基于宏块的区域重要性预测器，可快速准确地识别重要区域；2）区域感知增强器，将稀疏分布的区域拼接成密集张量并有效增强它们；3）基于配置文件的执行规划器，为增强和分析组件分配适当的资源。 We prototype RegenHance on ﬁve heterogeneous edge devices.两项分析任务的实验表明，与最先进的基于帧的增强方法相比，基于区域的增强将整体精度提高了 10-19%，并实现了 2-3 倍的吞吐量。

papers.title: Resolving Packets from Counters: Enabling Multi-scale Network Traffic Super Resolution via Composable Large Traffic Model.
papers.abstract: Realistic fine-grained traffic traces are valuable to numerous applications in both academia and industry. However, obtaining them directly from devices is significantly challenging, while coarse-grained counters are readily available on almost all network devices. None of existing work can restore fine-grained traffic traces from counters, which we call network traffic super-resolution (TSR). To this end, we propose ZOOMSYNTH, the first TSR system that can achieve packet-level trace synthesis with counter traces as input. Following the basic structure of the TSR task, we design the Granular Traffic Transformer (GTT) model and the Composable Large Traffic Model (CLTM). CLTM is a tree of GTT models, and the GTT models in each layer perform upscaling on a particular granularity, which allows each GTT model to capture the traffic characteristics at this resolution. Using CLTM, we synthesize fine-grained traces from counters. We also leverage a rule-following model to comprehend counter rules (e.g. ACLs) when available, guiding the generations of fine-grained traces. We implement ZOOMSYNTH and perform extensive evaluations. Results show that, with only second-level counter traces, ZOOMSYNTH achieves synthesis quality comparable to existing solutions that takes packet-level traces as input. CLTM can also be fine-tuned to support downstream tasks. For example, ZOOMSYNTH with fine-tuned CLTM outperforms the existing solution by 27.5% and 9.8% in anomaly detection and service recognition tasks, respectively. To promote future research, we release the pre-trained CLTM-1.8B model weights along with its source code.
papers.abstract_zh: 真实的细粒度流量跟踪对于学术界和工业界的众多应用都很有价值。然而，直接从设备获取它们非常具有挑战性，而粗粒度计数器几乎可以在所有网络设备上使用。现有的工作都无法从计数器恢复细粒度的流量跟踪，我们称之为网络流量超分辨率（TSR）。为此，我们提出了 ZOOMSYNTH，这是第一个可以以计数器跟踪作为输入实现数据包级跟踪合成的 TSR 系统。根据 TSR 任务的基本结构，我们设计了粒度流量变换器（GTT）模型和可组合大流量模型（CLTM）。 CLTM是一棵GTT模型树，每一层的GTT模型都在特定的粒度上进行升级，这使得每个GTT模型能够捕获该分辨率下的流量特征。使用 CLTM，我们从计数器合成细粒度的痕迹。我们还利用规则遵循模型来理解可用的反规则（例如 ACL），指导细粒度跟踪的生成。我们实施 ZOOMSYNTH 并进行广泛的评估。结果表明，仅使用二级计数器跟踪，ZOOMSYNTH 即可实现与采用数据包级跟踪作为输入的现有解决方案相当的综合质量。 CLTM 还可以进行微调以支持下游任务。例如，经过微调的 CLTM 的 ZOOMSYNTH 在异常检测和服务识别任务中分别比现有解决方案提高了 27.5% 和 9.8%。为了促进未来的研究，我们发布了预训练的 CLTM-1.8B 模型权重及其源代码。

papers.title: Runtime Protocol Refinement Checking for Distributed Protocol Implementations.
papers.abstract: Despite significant progress in verifying protocols, services that implement distributed protocols (we refer to these as DPIs in what follows), e.g., Chubby or Etcd, can exhibit safety bugs in production deployments. These bugs are often introduced by programmers when converting protocol descriptions into code. This paper introduces Runtime Protocol Refinement Checking (RPRC) a runtime approach for detecting protocol implementation bugs in DPIs. RPRC systems observe a deployed DPI's runtime behavior and notify operators when this behavior evidences a protocol implementation bug, allowing operators to mitigate the bugs impact and developers to fix the bug. We have developed an algorithm for RPRC and implemented it in a system called Ellsberg that targets DPIs that assume fail-stop failures and the asynchronous (or partially synchronous) model. Our goal when designing Ellsberg was to make no assumptions about how DPIs are implemented, and to avoid additional coordination or communication. Therefore, Ellsberg builds on the observation that in the absence of Byzantine failures, a protocol safety properties are maintained if all live DPI processes correctly implement the protocol. Thus, Ellsberg checks RPRC by comparing messages sent and received by each DPI process to those produced by a simulated execution of the protocol. We apply Ellsberg to three open source DPIs, Etcd, Zookeeper and Redis Raft, and show that we can detect previously reported protocol bugs in these DPIs.
papers.abstract_zh: 尽管在验证协议方面取得了重大进展，但实现分布式协议（我们在下文中将其称为 DPI）的服务（例如 Chubby 或 Etcd）可能会在生产部署中出现安全错误。这些错误通常是程序员在将协议描述转换为代码时引入的。本文介绍了运行时协议细化检查 (RPRC)，一种用于检测 DPI 中协议实现错误的运行时方法。 RPRC 系统观察已部署的 DPI 的运行时行为，并在该行为证明存在协议实现错误时通知操作员，从而允许操作员减轻错误影响并允许开发人员修复错误。我们开发了一种 RPRC 算法，并在名为 Ellsberg 的系统中实现它，该系统针对假设故障停止故障和异步（或部分同步）模型的 DPI。我们设计 Ellsberg 时的目标是不对 DPI 的实施方式做出任何假设，并避免额外的协调或沟通。因此，Ellsberg 的观察结果是，在没有拜占庭故障的情况下，如果所有实时 DPI 进程都正确实现了协议，则可以维持协议安全属性。因此，Ellsberg 通过将每个 DPI 进程发送和接收的消息与协议模拟执行生成的消息进行比较来检查 RPRC。我们将 Ellsberg 应用于三个开源 DPI：Etcd、Zookeeper 和 Redis Raft，并表明我们可以检测到这些 DPI 中先前报告的协议错误。

papers.title: Scaling IP Lookup to Large Databases using the CRAM Lens.
papers.abstract: Wide-area scaling trends require new approaches to Internet Protocol (IP) lookup, enabled by modern networking chips such as Intel Tofino, AMD Pensando, and Nvidia BlueField, which provide substantial ternary content-addressable memory (TCAM) and static random-access memory (SRAM). However, designing and evaluating scalable algorithms for these chips is challenging due to hardware-level constraints. To address this, we introduce the CRAM (CAM+RAM) lens, a framework that combines a formal model for evaluating algorithms on modern network processors with a set of optimization idioms. We demonstrate the effectiveness of CRAM by designing and evaluating three new IP lookup schemes: RESAIL, BSIC, and MashUp. RESAIL enables Tofino-2 to scale to 2.25 million IPv4 prefixes—likely sufficient for the next decade—while a pure TCAM approach supports only 250k prefixes, just 27% of the current global IPv4 routing table. Similarly, BSIC scales to 390k IPv6 prefixes on Tofino-2, supporting 3.2 times as many prefixes as a pure TCAM implementation. In contrast, existing state-of-the-art algorithms, SAIL for IPv4 and Hi-BST for IPv6, scale to considerably smaller sizes on Tofino-2.
papers.abstract_zh: 广域扩展趋势需要新的互联网协议 (IP) 查找方法，而现代网络芯片（例如 Intel Tofino、AMD Pensando 和 Nvidia BlueField）可提供大量三态内容寻址存储器 (TCAM) 和静态随机存取存储器 (SRAM)。然而，由于硬件级的限制，设计和评估这些芯片的可扩展算法具有挑战性。为了解决这个问题，我们引入了 CRAM (CAM+RAM) 镜头，该框架将用于评估现代网络处理器上的算法的形式模型与一组优化习惯相结合。我们通过设计和评估三种新的 IP 查找方案来证明 CRAM 的有效性：RESAIL、BSIC 和 MashUp。 RESAIL 使 Tofino-2 能够扩展到 225 万个 IPv4 前缀（可能足够未来十年使用），而纯 TCAM 方法仅支持 25 万个前缀，仅占当前全球 IPv4 路由表的 27%。同样，BSIC 在 Tofino-2 上扩展到 390k IPv6 前缀，支持的前缀数量是纯 TCAM 实现的 3.2 倍。相比之下，现有最先进的算法（用于 IPv4 的 SAIL 和用于 IPv6 的 Hi-BST）在 Tofino-2 上可扩展到相当小的尺寸。

papers.title: Securing Public Cloud Networks with Efficient Role-based Micro-Segmentation.
papers.abstract: Securing network traffic within data centers is a critical and daunting challenge due to the increasing complexity and scale of modern public clouds. Micro-segmentation offers a promising solution by implementing fine-grained, workload-specific network security policies to mitigate potential attacks. However, the dynamic nature and large scale of deployments present significant obstacles in crafting precise security policies, limiting the practicality of this approach. To address these challenges, we introduce a novel system that efficiently processes vast volumes of network-flow logs and effectively infers the roles of network endpoints. Our method integrates domain knowledge and communication patterns in a principled manner, facilitating the creation of micro-segmentation policies at a large scale. Evaluations with real-world deployment demonstrate that our solution significantly surpasses existing algorithms in role inference accuracy. We implement our solution as an end-to-end system, and we show that our system is up to 21.5× more cost-efficient than Apache Flink, a widely used open-source stream processing system.
papers.abstract_zh: 由于现代公共云的复杂性和规模不断增加，保护数据中心内的网络流量是一项至关重要且艰巨的挑战。微分段通过实施细粒度、特定于工作负载的网络安全策略来减轻潜在的攻击，提供了一种有前途的解决方案。然而，部署的动态性和大规模给制定精确的安全策略带来了重大障碍，限制了这种方法的实用性。为了应对这些挑战，我们引入了一种新颖的系统，该系统可以有效处理大量网络流日志并有效推断网络端点的角色。我们的方法以原则性的方式集成了领域知识和通信模式，有助于大规模创建微细分策略。实际部署的评估表明，我们的解决方案在角色推断准确性方面显着超越现有算法。我们将我们的解决方案实现为端到端系统，并证明我们的系统比广泛使用的开源流处理系统 Apache Flink 的成本效率高出 21.5 倍。

papers.title: Self-Clocked Round-Robin Packet Scheduling.
papers.abstract: Deficit Round Robin (DRR) is the de facto fair packet scheduler in the Internet due to its superior fairness and scalability. We show that DRR can perform poorly due to its assumptions about packet size distributions and traffic bursts. Concretely, DRR performs best if (1) packet size distributions are known in advance; its optimal performance depends on tuning a parameter based on the largest packet, and (2) all bursts are long and create backlogged queues. We show that neither of these assumptions holds in today's Internet: packet size distributions are varied and dynamic, complicating the tuning of DRR. Plus, Internet traffic consists of many short, latency-sensitive flows, creating small bursts. These flows can experience high latency under DRR as it serves a potentially large number of flows in a round-robin fashion. To address these shortcomings while retaining the fairness and scalability of DRR, we introduce Self-Clocked Round-Robin Scheduling (SCRR), a parameter-less, low-latency, and scalable packet scheduler that boosts short latency-sensitive flows through careful adjustments to their virtual times without violating their fair share guarantees. We evaluate SCRR using theoretical models and a Linux implementation on a physical testbed. Our results demonstrate that while performing on an equal footing with DRR on achieving flow fairness, SCRR reduces the average CPU overhead by 23% compared to DRR with a small quantum while improving the application latency by 71% compared to DRR with a large quantum.
papers.abstract_zh: 赤字轮询（DRR）由于其卓越的公平性和可扩展性，成为互联网上事实上的公平数据包调度器。我们表明，由于 DRR 对数据包大小分布和流量突发的假设，它的性能可能很差。具体而言，如果 (1) 预先知道数据包大小分布，则 DRR 性能最佳；其最佳性能取决于根据最大数据包调整参数，并且（2）所有突发都很长并会产生积压队列。我们表明，这些假设在当今的互联网中都不成立：数据包大小分布是变化的且动态的，这使得 DRR 的调整变得复杂。此外，互联网流量由许多短的、延迟敏感的流组成，产生小突发。这些流在 DRR 下可能会经历高延迟，因为它以循环方式为潜在大量流提供服务。为了解决这些缺点，同时保留 DRR 的公平性和可扩展性，我们引入了自时钟循环调度 (SCRR)，这是一种无参数、低延迟且可扩展的数据包调度程序，可通过仔细调整虚拟时间来增强短延迟敏感流，而不会违反其公平份额保证。我们使用理论模型和物理测试台上的 Linux 实现来评估 SCRR。我们的结果表明，在实现流量公平性方面与 DRR 处于同等水平时，SCRR 与小量程的 DRR 相比，平均 CPU 开销降低了 23%，同时与大量程的 DRR 相比，应用程序延迟提高了 71%。

papers.title: Shoal++: High Throughput DAG BFT Can Be Fast and Robust!
papers.abstract: Today's practical partially synchronous Byzantine Fault Tolerant consensus protocols trade off low latency and high throughput. On the one end, traditional BFT protocols such as PBFT and its derivatives optimize for latency. They require, in fault-free executions, only 3 message delays to commit, the optimum for BFT consensus. However, this class of protocols typically relies on a single leader, hampering throughput scalability. On the other end, a new class of so-called DAG-BFT protocols demonstrates how to achieve highly scalable throughput by separating data dissemination from consensus, and using every replica as proposer. Unfortunately, existing DAG-BFT protocols pay a steep latency premium, requiring on average 10.5 message delays to commit transactions. This work aims to soften this tension, and proposes Shoal++, a novel DAG-based BFT consensus system that offers the throughput of DAGs while reducing end-to-end consensus commit latency to an average of 4.5 message delays. Our empirical findings are encouraging, showing that Shoal++ achieves throughput comparable to state-of-the-art DAG BFT solutions while reducing latency by up to 60%, even under less favorable network and failure conditions.
papers.abstract_zh: 当今实用的部分同步拜占庭容错共识协议在低延迟和高吞吐量之间进行了权衡。一方面，传统的 BFT 协议（例如 PBFT 及其衍生品）针对延迟进行了优化。在无故障执行中，它们只需要 3 个消息延迟即可提交，这是 BFT 共识的最佳选择。然而，此类协议通常依赖于单个领导者，从而阻碍了吞吐量可扩展性。另一方面，一类新的所谓 DAG-BFT 协议演示了如何通过将数据传播与共识分离并使用每个副本作为提议者来实现高度可扩展的吞吐量。不幸的是，现有的 DAG-BFT 协议付出了高昂的延迟代价，平均需要 10.5 条消息延迟才能提交交易。这项工作旨在缓解这种紧张局势，并提出了 Shoal++，这是一种新型的基于 DAG 的 BFT 共识系统，它提供 DAG 的吞吐量，同时将端到端共识提交延迟减少到平均 4.5 条消息延迟。我们的实证结果令人鼓舞，表明即使在不太有利的网络和故障条件下，Shoal++ 也能实现与最先进的 DAG BFT 解决方案相当的吞吐量，同时将延迟减少高达 60%。

papers.title: SimAI: Unifying Architecture Design and Performance Tuning for Large-Scale Large Language Model Training with Scalability and Precision.
papers.abstract: The large number of GPUs required for a single LLM training significantly hinders the validation of new designs, tunings, and optimizations, calling for the occurrence of efficient simulators. Existing simulators, however, only target a specific granularity of the entire training, intrinsically leading to imprecision. This paper presents SimAI, a unified simulator aiming at precisely and efficiently simulating the LLM training procedure at scale. Through selective and high-fidelity integration of the training frameworks, the kernel computation, and the collective communication library into the simulating procedure, SimAI achieves high precision in simulations. SimAI further conducts multi-thread acceleration and implements lock-free global context-sharing to accelerate the execution speed. The effectiveness of SimAI is validated by its performance results, which show an average of 98.1% alignment to real-world results under various test scenarios and affirm its robustness and adaptability from small-scale labs to large-scale industrial environments. SimAI delivers meaningful guidelines for new host designs and parameter settings, directly benefiting in-production LLM training. We also share experiences and lessons learned during the evolution of SimAI. SimAI is open sourced at https://github.com/aliyun/SimAI .
papers.abstract_zh: 单个 LLM 训练所需的大量 GPU 严重阻碍了新设计、调整和优化的验证，需要高效模拟器的出现。然而，现有的模拟器仅针对整个训练的特定粒度，本质上导致不精确。本文介绍了 SimAI，这是一个统一的模拟器，旨在精确有效地大规模模拟法学硕士培训过程。通过将训练框架、内核计算和集体通信库选择性地、高保真地集成到仿真程序中，SimAI 实现了高精度的仿真。 SimAI进一步进行多线程加速，并实现无锁全局上下文共享，加快执行速度。 SimAI 的有效性通过其性能结果得到了验证，该结果显示在各种测试场景下与实际结果的平均吻合度为 98.1%，并证实了其从小规模实验室到大规模工业环境的稳健性和适应性。 SimAI 为新主机设计和参数设置提供了有意义的指南，直接有利于生产中的 LLM 培训。我们还分享 SimAI 发展过程中的经验教训。 SimAI 开源于 https://github.com/aliyun/SimAI 。

papers.title: SIRD: A Sender-Informed, Receiver-Driven Datacenter Transport Protocol.
papers.abstract: Datacenter congestion control protocols are challenged to navigate the throughput-buffering trade-off while relative packet buffer capacity is trending lower year-over-year. In this context, receiver-driven protocols — which schedule packet transmissions instead of reacting to congestion — excel when the bottleneck lies at the ToR-to-receiver link. However, when multiple receivers must use a shared link (e.g., ToR to Spine), their independent schedules can conflict. We present SIRD, a receiver-driven congestion control protocol designed around the simple insight that single-owner links should be scheduled, while shared links should be managed with reactive control algorithms. The approach allows receivers to both precisely schedule their downlinks and to coordinate over shared bottlenecks. Critically, SIRD also treats sender uplinks as shared links, enabling the flow of congestion feedback from senders to receivers, which then adapt their scheduling to each sender’s real time capacity. This results in tight scheduling, enabling high bandwidth utilization with little contention, and thus minimal latency-inducing buffering in the fabric. We implement SIRD on top of the Caladan stack and show that SIRD’s asymmetric design can deliver 100Gbps in software while keeping network queuing minimal. We further compare SIRD to state-of-the-art receiver-driven protocols (Homa, dcPIM, and ExpressPass) and production-grade reactive protocols (Swift and DCTCP) and show that SIRD is uniquely able to simultaneously maximize link utilization, minimize queuing, and obtain near-optimal latency.
papers.abstract_zh: 数据中心拥塞控制协议面临着处理吞吐量缓冲权衡的挑战，而相对数据包缓冲容量则逐年下降。在这种情况下，当瓶颈位于 ToR 到接收器的链路时，接收器驱动的协议（调度数据包传输而不是对拥塞做出反应）表现出色。然而，当多个接收器必须使用共享链路（例如，ToR 到 Spine）时，它们的独立调度可能会发生冲突。我们提出了 SIRD，这是一种接收器驱动的拥塞控制协议，其设计围绕这样一个简单的见解：应调度单所有者链路，而应使用反应控制算法来管理共享链路。该方法允许接收器精确调度其下行链路并协调共享瓶颈。至关重要的是，SIRD 还将发送方上行链路视为共享链路，从而实现从发送方到接收方的拥塞反馈流，然后接收方根据每个发送方的实时容量调整其调度。这会导致严格的调度，从而实现高带宽利用率和很少的争用，从而最大限度地减少结构中引起延迟的缓冲。我们在 Caladan 堆栈之上实施 SIRD，并表明 SIRD 的非对称设计可以在软件中提供 100Gbps，同时保持网络队列最小化。我们进一步将 SIRD 与最先进的接收器驱动协议（Homa、dcPIM 和 ExpressPass）以及生产级反应式协议（Swift 和 DCTCP）进行比较，并表明 SIRD 能够同时最大化链路利用率、最小化排队并获得接近最优的延迟。

papers.title: Smart Casual Verification of the Confidential Consortium Framework.
papers.abstract: The Confidential Consortium Framework (CCF) is an open-source platform for developing trustworthy and reliable cloud applications. CCF powers Microsoft's Azure Confidential Ledger service and as such it is vital to build confidence in the correctness of CCF's design and implementation. This paper reports our experiences applying smart casual verification to validate the correctness of CCF's novel distributed protocols, focusing on its unique distributed consensus protocol and its custom client consistency model. We use the term smart casual verification to describe our hybrid approach, which combines the rigor of formal specification and model checking with the pragmatism of automated testing, in our case binding the formal specification in TLA+ to the C++ implementation. While traditional formal methods approaches require substantial buy-in and are often one-off efforts by domain experts, we have integrated our smart casual verification approach into CCF's CI pipeline, allowing contributors to continuously validate CCF as it evolves. We describe the challenges we faced in applying smart casual verification to a complex existing codebase and how we overcame them to find six subtle bugs in the design and implementation before they could impact production.
papers.abstract_zh: 机密联盟框架 (CCF) 是一个用于开发值得信赖且可靠的云应用程序的开源平台。 CCF 为 Microsoft 的 Azure 机密账本服务提供支持，因此建立对 CCF 设计和实施正确性的信心至关重要。本文报告了我们应用智能休闲验证来验证 CCF 新颖的分布式协议的正确性的经验，重点关注其独特的分布式共识协议及其自定义客户端一致性模型。我们使用术语智能休闲验证来描述我们的混合方法，它将正式规范和模型检查的严格性与自动化测试的实用性结合起来，在我们的示例中，将 TLA+ 中的正式规范绑定到 C++ 实现。虽然传统的形式化方法需要大量的支持，并且通常是领域专家的一次性工作，但我们已将我们的智能休闲验证方法集成到 CCF 的 CI 管道中，允许贡献者在 CCF 的发展过程中不断验证它。我们描述了将智能休闲验证应用于复杂的现有代码库时所面临的挑战，以及我们如何克服这些挑战，在设计和实现中发现六个细微的错误，以免它们影响生产。

papers.title: State-Compute Replication: Parallelizing High-Speed Stateful Packet Processing.
papers.abstract: With the slowdown of Moore’s law, CPU-oriented packet processing in software will be significantly outpaced by emerging line speeds of network interface cards (NICs). Single-core packet-processing throughput has saturated. We consider the problem of high-speed packet processing with multiple CPU cores. The key challenge is state—memory that multiple packets must read and update. The prevailing method to scale throughput with multiple cores involves state sharding, processing all packets that update the same state, e.g., flow, at the same core. However, given the skewed nature of realistic flow size distributions, this method is untenable, since total throughput is limited by single-core performance. This paper introduces state-compute replication, a principle to scale the throughput of a single stateful flow across multiple cores using replication. Our design leverages a packet history sequencer running on a NIC or top-of-the-rack switch to enable multiple cores to update state without explicit synchronization. Our experiments with realistic data center and wide-area Internet traces show that state-compute replication can scale total packet-processing throughput linearly with cores, independent of flow size distributions, across a range of realistic packet-processing programs.
papers.abstract_zh: 随着摩尔定律的放缓，软件中面向 CPU 的数据包处理速度将明显被网络接口卡 (NIC) 的新兴线路速度所超越。单核数据包处理吞吐量已饱和。我们考虑多CPU核高速数据包处理的问题。关键的挑战是多个数据包必须读取和更新的状态内存。扩展多核吞吐量的流行方法涉及状态分片，即在同一核处理更新相同状态（例如流）的所有数据包。然而，考虑到实际流大小分布的倾斜性质，这种方法是站不住脚的，因为总吞吐量受到单核性能的限制。本文介绍了状态计算复制，这是一种使用复制来扩展跨多个核心的单个状态流的吞吐量的原理。我们的设计利用在 NIC 或架顶交换机上运行的数据包历史排序器，使多个内核能够更新状态，而无需显式同步。我们对真实数据中心和广域互联网跟踪的实验表明，状态计算复制可以在一系列真实的数据包处理程序中随内核线性扩展总数据包处理吞吐量，而与流大小分布无关。

papers.title: SuperServe: Fine-Grained Inference Serving for Unpredictable Workloads.
papers.abstract: The increasing deployment of ML models on the critical path of production applications requires ML inference serving systems to serve these models under unpredictable and bursty request arrival rates. Serving many models under such conditions requires a careful balance between each application’s latency and accuracy requirements and the overall efficiency of utilization of scarce resources. Faced with this tension, state-of-the-art systems either choose a single model representing a static point in the latency-accuracy tradeoff space to serve all requests or incur latency target violations by loading specific models on the critical path of request serving. Our work instead resolves this tension through a resource-efficient serving of the entire range of models spanning the latency-accuracy tradeoff space. Our novel mechanism, SubNetAct, achieves this by carefully inserting specialized control-flow operators in pre-trained, weight-shared super-networks. These operators enable SubNetAct to dynamically route a request through the network to actuate a specific model that meets the request’s latency and accuracy target. Thus, SubNetAct can serve a vastly higher number of models than prior systems while requiring upto 2.6× lower memory. More crucially, SubNetAct’s near-instantaneous actuation of a wide-range of models unlocks the design space of fine-grained, reactive scheduling policies. We design one such extremely effective policy, SlackFit, and instantiate both SubNetAct and SlackFit in a real system, SuperServe. On real-world traces derived from a Microsoft workload, SuperServe achieves 4.67% higher accuracy for the same latency targets and 2.85× higher latency target attainment for the same accuracy.
papers.abstract_zh: 机器学习模型在生产应用程序的关键路径上的部署不断增加，需要机器学习推理服务系统在不可预测的突发请求到达率下为这些模型提供服务。在这种条件下为许多模型提供服务需要在每个应用程序的延迟和准确性要求以及稀缺资源利用的整体效率之间进行仔细的平衡。面对这种紧张局势，最先进的系统要么选择代表延迟精度权衡空间中静态点的单个模型来服务所有请求，要么通过在请求服务的关键路径上加载特定模型来导致延迟目标违规。相反，我们的工作通过对跨越延迟精度权衡空间的整个模型范围提供资源高效的服务来解决这种紧张关系。我们的新颖机制 SubNetAct 通过在预先训练的、权重共享的超级网络中仔细插入专门的控制流运算符来实现这一目标。这些运算符使 SubNetAct 能够通过网络动态路由请求，以启动满足请求的延迟和准确性目标的特定模型。因此，与之前的系统相比，SubNetAct 可以服务更多数量的模型，同时所需的内存最多可减少 2.6 倍。更重要的是，SubNetAct 对各种模型的近乎瞬时驱动开启了细粒度、反应式调度策略的设计空间。我们设计了这样一种极其有效的策略：SlackFit，并在真实的系统 SuperServe 中实例化 SubNetAct 和 SlackFit。在源自 Microsoft 工作负载的真实跟踪中，SuperServe 在相同延迟目标下的准确度提高了 4.67%，在相同准确度下，延迟目标达到了 2.85 倍。

papers.title: Suppressing BGP Zombies with Route Status Transparency.
papers.abstract: Withdrawal suppression has been a known weakness of BGP for over a decade. It has a significant detrimental impact on both the reliability and security of inter-domain routing on the Internet. This paper presents Route Status Transparency (RoST), the first design that efficiently and securely thwarts withdrawal suppression misconfigurations and attacks. RoST allows ASes to efficiently verify whether a route has been withdrawn; it is compatible with BGP as well as with BGP security enhancements. We use simulations on the Internet’s AS-level topology to evaluate the benefits from adopting RoST. We use an extensive real-world BGP announcements dataset to show that it is efficient in terms of storage, bandwidth, and computational requirements.
papers.abstract_zh: 十多年来，提款抑制一直是 BGP 的一个已知弱点。它对 Internet 上域间路由的可靠性和安全性产生重大不利影响。本文介绍了路由状态透明性 (RoST)，这是第一个能够有效、安全地阻止撤回抑制错误配置和攻击的设计。 RoST可以让AS高效地验证路由是否被撤销；它与 BGP 以及 BGP 安全增强功能兼容。我们使用对互联网 AS 级拓扑的模拟来评估采用 RoST 的好处。我们使用广泛的现实世界 BGP 公告数据集来证明它在存储、带宽和计算要求方面是高效的。

papers.title: The Benefits and Limitations of User Interrupts for Preemptive Userspace Scheduling.
papers.abstract: Preemptive scheduling promises to mitigate head-of-line blocking and enable flexible scheduling while retaining a simple programming model. Despite this, preemption is underutilized in server-side software today. Instead, high-performance datacenter systems and language runtimes often rely on cooperative concurrency, or else use preemption only at very coarse timescales, limiting its effectiveness. A key reason that preemption is underutilized today is that existing preemption mechanisms have high and unpredictable overheads. Intel recently introduced support for user interrupts, a new feature that offers an opportunity to change this. By enabling interrupts to be sent and received entirely in user space, user interrupts can significantly lower the overhead of preemption. In this paper, we shed light on how user interrupts impact the landscape of preemption mechanisms. We build two user-level schedulers that leverage user interrupts for low-overhead preemption. We find that user interrupts are not a panacea. For example, they provide limited benefits when other software layers constrain the kinds of scheduling policies that can be used. Still, user interrupts can match or exceed the performance of existing mechanisms for all but the highest preemption rates, while achieving much more consistent overheads and retaining a user friendly programming model.
papers.abstract_zh: 抢占式调度有望减轻队头阻塞并实现灵活的调度，同时保留简单的编程模型。尽管如此，抢占在当今的服务器端软件中并未得到充分利用。相反，高性能数据中心系统和语言运行时通常依赖于协作并发，或者仅在非常粗略的时间尺度上使用抢占，从而限制了其有效性。目前抢占未得到充分利用的一个关键原因是现有的抢占机制具有较高且不可预测的开销。英特尔最近推出了对用户中断的支持，这一新功能为改变这一现状提供了机会。通过使中断完全在用户空间中发送和接收，用户中断可以显着降低抢占的开销。在本文中，我们阐明了用户中断如何影响抢占机制的前景。我们构建了两个用户级调度程序，它们利用用户中断来实现低开销抢占。我们发现用户中断并不是万能的。例如，当其他软件层限制可以使用的调度策略类型时，它们提供的好处有限。尽管如此，除了最高抢占率之外，用户中断可以匹配或超过现有机制的性能，同时实现更加一致的开销并保留用户友好的编程模型。

papers.title: Tooth: Toward Optimal Balance of Video QoE and Redundancy Cost by Fine-Grained FEC in Cloud Gaming Streaming.
papers.abstract: Despite the rapid rise of cloud gaming, real-world evaluations of its quality of experience (QoE) remain scarce. To fill this gap, we conduct a large-scale measurement campaign, analyzing over 60,000 sessions on an operational cloud gaming platform. We find that current cloud gaming streaming suffers from substantial bandwidth wastage and severe interaction stalls simultaneously. In-depth investigation reveals the underlying reason, i.e., existing streaming adopts coarse-grained Forward Error Correction (FEC) encoding, without considering the adverse impact of frame length variation, which results in over-protection of large frames (i.e., bandwidth waste) and under-protection of smaller ones (i.e., interaction stalls). To remedy the problem, we propose Tooth, a per-frame adaptive FEC that aims to achieve the optimal balance between satisfactory QoE and efficient bandwidth usage. To build Tooth, we design a dual-module FEC encoding strategy, which takes full consideration of both frame length variation and network dynamics, and hence determines an appropriate FEC redundancy rate for each frame. Moreover, we also circumvent the formidable per-frame FEC computational overhead by designing a lightweight Tooth, so as to meet the rigid latency bound of real-time cloud gaming. We implement, deploy, and evaluate Tooth in the operational cloud gaming system. Extensive field tests demonstrate that Tooth significantly outperforms existing state-of-the-art FEC methods, reducing stall rates by 40.2% to 85.2%, enhancing video bitrates by 11.4% to 29.2%, and lowering bandwidth costs by 54.9% to 75.0%.
papers.abstract_zh: 尽管云游戏迅速崛起，但对其体验质量 (QoE) 的现实评估仍然很少。为了填补这一空白，我们开展了大规模的测量活动，分析了运营云游戏平台上的 60,000 多个会话。我们发现当前的云游戏流媒体同时遭受大量带宽浪费和严重的交互停滞。深入调查揭示了根本原因，即现有流媒体采用粗粒度的前向纠错（FEC）编码，没有考虑帧长度变化的不利影响，导致对大帧的过度保护（即带宽浪费）和对较小帧的保护不足（即交互停顿）。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了 Tooth，一种每帧自适应 FEC，旨在实现令人满意的 QoE 和有效带宽使用之间的最佳平衡。为了构建Tooth，我们设计了双模块FEC编码策略，该策略充分考虑帧长度变化和网络动态，从而为每帧确定合适的FEC冗余率。此外，我们还通过设计轻量级Tooth来规避每帧FEC计算开销，以满足实时云游戏的严格延迟限制。我们在运营的云游戏系统中实施、部署和评估 Tooth。广泛的现场测试表明，Tooth 的性能显着优于现有最先进的 FEC 方法，将停顿率降低了 40.2% 至 85.2%，将视频比特率提高了 11.4% 至 29.2%，并将带宽成本降低了 54.9% 至 75.0%。

papers.title: Towards Energy Efficient 5G vRAN Servers.
papers.abstract: We study the problem of improving energy efficiency in virtualized radio access network (vRAN) servers, focusing on CPUs. Two distinct characteristics of vRAN software—strict real-time sub-millisecond deadlines and its proprietary black-box nature—preclude the use of existing general-purpose CPU energy management techniques. This paper presents RENC, a system that saves energy by adjusting CPU frequency in response to sub-second variations in cellular workloads, using the following techniques. First, despite large fluctuations in vRAN CPU load at sub-ms timescales, RENC establishes safe low-load intervals, e.g., by coupling Media Access Control (MAC) layer rate limiting with CPU frequency changes. This prevents high traffic during low-power operation, which would otherwise cause deadline misses. Second, we design techniques to compute CPU frequencies that are safe for these low-load intervals, achieved by measuring the slack in vRAN threads' deadlines using Linux eBPF hooks, or minor binary rewriting of the vRAN software. Third, we demonstrate the need to handle CPU load spikes triggered by control operations, such as new users attaching to the network. Our evaluation in a state-of-the-art vRAN testbed shows that our techniques reduces a vRAN server's CPU power consumption by up to 45% (29% server-wide).
papers.abstract_zh: 我们研究提高虚拟化无线接入网络 (vRAN) 服务器能源效率的问题，重点关注 CPU。 vRAN 软件的两个明显特征——严格的实时亚毫秒期限及其专有的黑盒性质——阻碍了现有通用 CPU 能源管理技术的使用。本文介绍了 RENC，这是一个通过调整 CPU 频率来响应蜂窝工作负载的亚秒级变化来节省能源的系统，使用以下技术。首先，尽管 vRAN CPU 负载在亚毫秒时间尺度上波动较大，但 RENC 仍建立了安全的低负载间隔，例如通过将媒体访问控制 (MAC) 层速率限制与 CPU 频率变化相结合。这可以防止低功耗操作期间出现高流量，否则会导致错过最后期限。其次，我们设计了计算在这些低负载间隔内安全的 CPU 频率的技术，这是通过使用 Linux eBPF 挂钩测量 vRAN 线程截止时间的裕度或对 vRAN 软件进行少量二进制重写来实现的。第三，我们演示了处理由控制操作触发的 CPU 负载峰值的需要，例如新用户连接到网络。我们在最先进的 vRAN 测试台中进行的评估表明，我们的技术可将 vRAN 服务器的 CPU 功耗降低高达 45%（服务器范围内为 29%）。

papers.title: Understanding and Profiling NVMe-over-TCP Using ntprof.
papers.abstract: NVMe-over-TCP (NVMe/TCP) is an emerging remote storage protocol, increasingly adopted in enterprises and clouds. It establishes a high-performance reliable data channel between clients and storage targets to deliver block I/Os. Understanding and analyzing the protocol execution details and how well storage workloads run atop are pivotal for system developers and infrastructure engineers. However, our community lacks such a profiling utility, whereas existing solutions are ad-hoc, tedious, and heuristic-driven. Realizing it is challenging due to the unpredictable I/O workload profile, intricate system layer interaction, and deep execution pipeline. This paper presents ntprof, a systematic, informative, and lightweight NVMe/TCP profiler. Our key idea is to view the NVMe/TCP storage substrate as a lossless switched network and apply network monitoring techniques. We model each on-path system module as a software switch, equip it with a programmable profiling agent on the data plane, and develop a proactive query interface for statistics collection and analysis. ntprof, comprising a kernel module and a user-space utility, allows developers to define various profiling tasks, incurs marginal overhead when co-locating with applications, and generates performance reports based on prescribed specifications. We build ntprof atop Linux kernel 5.15.143 and apply it in six cases, i.e., end-to-end latency breakdown, interference analysis, SW/HW bottleneck localization, and application performance diagnostic. ntprof is available at https://github.com/netlab-wisconsin/ntprof .
papers.abstract_zh: NVMe-over-TCP (NVMe/TCP) 是一种新兴的远程存储协议，越来越多地在企业和云中采用。它在客户端和存储目标之间建立高性能可靠的数据通道以提供块 I/O。对于系统开发人员和基础设施工程师来说，理解和分析协议执行细节以及存储工作负载的运行情况至关重要。然而，我们的社区缺乏这样的分析实用程序，而现有的解决方案是临时的、乏味的和启发式驱动的。由于不可预测的 I/O 工作负载配置文件、复杂的系统层交互和深度执行管道，实现这一点具有挑战性。本文介绍了 ntprof，一个系统性、信息丰富且轻量级的 NVMe/TCP 分析器。我们的核心思想是将 NVMe/TCP 存储底层视为无损交换网络并应用网络监控技术。我们将每个路径系统模块建模为软件交换机，在数据平面上为其配备可编程分析代理，并开发用于统计收集和分析的主动查询接口。 ntprof 由内核模块和用户空间实用程序组成，允许开发人员定义各种分析任务，与应用程序共置时会产生边际开销，并根据规定的规范生成性能报告。我们在 Linux 内核 5.15.143 上构建 ntprof 并将其应用于六种情况，即端到端延迟分解、干扰分析、软件/硬件瓶颈定位和应用程序性能诊断。 ntprof 可从 https://github.com/netlab-wisconsin/ntprof 获取。

papers.title: Unlocking ECMP Programmability for Precise Traffic Control.
papers.abstract: ECMP (equal-cost multi-path) has become a fundamental mechanism in data centers, which distributes flows along multiple equivalent paths based on their hash values. Randomized distribution optimizes for the aggregate case, spreading load across flows over time. However, there exists a class of important Precise Traffic Control (PTC) tasks that are at odds with ECMP randomness. For instance, if an end host perceives that its flows are traversing a problematic switch/link, it often needs to change their paths before a fix can be rolled out. With randomized hashing, existing solutions resort to modifying flow tuples; since hashing mechanisms are unknown and they vary across switches/vendors, it may take many trials before yielding a new path. Many other similar cases exist where precise and timely response is critical to the network. We propose programmable ECMP (P-ECMP), a programming model, compiler, and runtime that provides precise traffic control. P-ECMP leverages an oft-ignored feature, ECMP groups, which allows for a constrained set of capabilities that are nonetheless sufficiently expressive for our tasks. An operator supplies high-level descriptions of their topology and policies, and our compiler generates PTC configurations for each switch. End hosts can reconfigure specific flows to use different PTC policies precisely and quickly, addressing a range of important use cases. We have evaluated P-ECMP using simulation at scale, and deployed one use case to a real-world data center that serves live user traffic.
papers.abstract_zh: ECMP（等价多路径）已成为数据中心的基本机制，它根据哈希值沿多个等效路径分配流量。随机分布针对聚合情况进行优化，随着时间的推移将负载分散到各个流中。然而，有一类重要的精确流量控制 (PTC) 任务与 ECMP 随机性不一致。例如，如果终端主机发现其流量正在穿越有问题的交换机/链路，则通常需要更改其路径，然后才能推出修复程序。通过随机散列，现有的解决方案诉诸于修改流元组；由于哈希机制是未知的，并且它们因交换机/供应商而异，因此在产生新路径之前可能需要进行多次试验。存在许多其他类似的情况，其中精确和及时的响应对于网络至关重要。我们提出了可编程 ECMP (P-ECMP)，这是一种提供精确流量控制的编程模型、编译器和运行时。 P-ECMP 利用了一个经常被忽视的功能，即 ECMP 组，它允许一组受限的功能，但仍足以满足我们的任务。运营商提供其拓扑和策略的高级描述，我们的编译器为每个交换机生成 PTC 配置。终端主机可以重新配置特定流，以准确、快速地使用不同的 PTC 策略，从而解决一系列重要的用例。我们使用大规模模拟评估了 P-ECMP，并将一个用例部署到为实时用户流量提供服务的真实数据中心。

papers.title: ValidaTor: Domain Validation over Tor.
papers.abstract: Domain Validation (DV) is the primary method used by Certificate Authorities (CAs) to confirm administrative control over a domain before issuing digital certificates. Despite its widespread use, DV is vulnerable to various attacks, prompting the adoption of multiple vantage points to enhance security, such as the state of the art DV mechanism supported by Let’s Encrypt. However, even distributed static vantage points remain susceptible to targeted attacks. In this paper we introduce ValidaTor, an HTTP-based domain validation system that leverages the Tor network to create a distributed and unpredictable set of validators. By utilizing Tor’s exit nodes, ValidaTor significantly increases the pool of available validators, providing high path diversity and resilience against strong adversaries. Our empirical evaluations demonstrate that ValidaTor can achieve the validation throughput of a commercial CA and has the potential to scale to a validation volume comparable to Let’s Encrypt, while using minimal dedicated infrastructure and only a small fraction (~0.1%) of Tor’s available bandwidth. While unpredictable selection of validators makes ValidaTor fully resistant to targeted attacks on validators, we also show the use of Tor nodes improves path diversity and thereby the resilience of DV to subversion by well-positioned ASes, reducing the number of Autonomous Systems (ASes) capable of issuing fraudulent certificates by up to 27% compared to Let’s Encrypt. Lastly, we show that the chance of subversion by malicious, colluding exit nodes is negligible (≤ 1% even with a quarter of existing exit nodes). We make the code of ValidaTor as well as the datasets and measurements publicly available for use, reproduction, and future research.
papers.abstract_zh: 域验证 (DV) 是证书颁发机构 (CA) 在颁发数字证书之前确认对域的管理控制的主要方法。尽管使用广泛，但 DV 很容易受到各种攻击，因此需要采用多种优势来增强安全性，例如 Let’s Encrypt 支持的最先进的 DV 机制。然而，即使是分布式静态有利点仍然容易受到有针对性的攻击。在本文中，我们介绍了 ValidaTor，这是一个基于 HTTP 的域验证系统，它利用 Tor 网络创建一组分布式且不可预测的验证器。通过利用 Tor 的出口节点，ValidaTor 显着增加了可用验证器池，提供高路径多样性和抵御强大对手的弹性。我们的实证评估表明，ValidaTor 可以实现商业 CA 的验证吞吐量，并且有潜力扩展到与 Let’s Encrypt 相当的验证量，同时使用最少的专用基础设施和 Tor 可用带宽的一小部分 (~0.1%)。虽然验证器的不可预测性选择使 ValidaTor 能够完全抵御针对验证器的针对性攻击，但我们还表明，Tor 节点的使用提高了路径多样性，从而提高了 DV 对定位良好的 AS 颠覆的弹性，与 Let’s Encrypt 相比，能够将能够颁发欺诈证书的自治系统 (AS) 数量减少高达 27%。最后，我们表明，恶意、共谋的出口节点颠覆的可能性可以忽略不计（即使现有出口节点有四分之一，该可能性也≤ 1%）。我们公开 ValidaTor 的代码以及数据集和测量结果，以供使用、复制和未来研究。

papers.title: Vegeta: Enabling Parallel Smart Contract Execution in Leaderless Blockchains.
papers.abstract: Consensus and smart contract execution play complementary roles in blockchain systems. Leaderless consensus, as a promising direction in the blockchain context, can better utilize the resources of each node and/or avoid incurring the extra burden of timing assumptions. As modern Byzantine-Fault Tolerant (BFT) consensus protocols can order several hundred thousand transactions per second, contract execution is becoming the performance bottleneck. Adding concurrency to contract execution is a natural way to boost its performance, but none of the existing frameworks is a perfect fit for leaderless consensus. We propose speculate-order-replay, a generic framework tailored to leaderless consensus protocols. Our framework allows each proposer to (pre-)process transactions prior to consensus, better utilizing its computing resources. We instantiate the framework with a concrete concurrency control protocol Vegeta. Vegeta speculatively executes a series of transactions and analyzes their dependencies before consensus, and later deterministically replays the schedule. We ran experiments under the real-world Ethereum workload on 16vCPU virtual machines. Our evaluation results show that Vegeta achieved up to 7.8× speedup compared to serial execution. When deployed on top of a leaderless consensus protocol with 10 nodes, Vegeta still achieved 6.9× speedup.
papers.abstract_zh: 共识和智能合约执行在区块链系统中发挥着互补作用。无领导共识作为区块链环境中的一个有前途的方向，可以更好地利用每个节点的资源和/或避免产生时序假设的额外负担。由于现代拜占庭容错（BFT）共识协议每秒可以订购数十万笔交易，合约执行正在成为性能瓶颈。在合约执行中添加并发性是提高其性能的自然方法，但现有框架都不是完美适合无领导共识的。我们提出推测顺序重放，这是一个针对无领导共识协议量身定制的通用框架。我们的框架允许每个提议者在达成共识之前（预）处理交易，更好地利用其计算资源。我们使用具体的并发控制协议 Vegeta 实例化该框架。 Vegeta 推测性地执行一系列交易并在达成共识之前分析它们的依赖关系，然后确定性地重播计划。我们在 16vCPU 虚拟机上的真实以太坊工作负载下进行了实验。我们的评估结果表明，与串行执行相比，Vegeta 实现了高达 7.8 倍的加速。当部署在具有 10 个节点的无领导共识协议之上时，Vegeta 仍然实现了 6.9 倍的加速。

papers.title: VEP: A Two-stage Verification Toolchain for Full eBPF Programmability.
papers.abstract: Extended Berkely Package Filter (eBPF) is a revolutionary technology that can safely and efficiently extend kernel capabilities. It has been widely used in networking, tracing, security, and more. However, existing eBPF verifiers impose strict constraints, often requiring repeated modifications to eBPF programs to pass verification. To enhance programmability, we introduce VEP, an annotation-guided eBPF program verification toolchain. VEP consists of three components: VEP-C, a verifier for annotated eBPF-C programs; VEP-compiler, a compiler targeting annotated eBPF bytecode; and VEP-eBPF, a lightweight bytecode-level proof checker. VEP allows users to verify the correctness of their programs with appropriate annotations, thus enabling full programmability. Our experimental results demonstrate that VEP addresses the limitations of existing verifiers, i.e. the Linux verifier and PREVAIL, and provides a more flexible and automated approach to kernel security.
papers.abstract_zh: 扩展伯克利包过滤器（eBPF）是一项革命性的技术，可以安全高效地扩展内核功能。它已广泛应用于网络、跟踪、安全等领域。然而，现有的 eBPF 验证器有严格的限制，通常需要对 eBPF 程序进行重复修改才能通过验证。为了增强可编程性，我们引入了 VEP，一个注释引导的 eBPF 程序验证工具链。 VEP 由三个组件组成：VEP-C，带注释的 eBPF-C 程序的验证器； VEP-compiler，一个针对带注释的 eBPF 字节码的编译器；以及 VEP-eBPF，一种轻量级字节码级证明检查器。 VEP 允许用户通过适当的注释验证其程序的正确性，从而实现完全的可编程性。我们的实验结果表明，VEP 解决了现有验证器（即 Linux 验证器和 PREVAIL）的局限性，并为内核安全提供了更灵活和自动化的方法。

papers.title: Verifying maximum link loads in a changing world.
papers.abstract: To meet ever more stringent requirements, network operators often need to reason about worst-case link loads. Doing so involves analyzing traffic forwarding after failures and BGP route changes. State-of-the-art systems identify failure scenarios causing congestion, but they ignore route changes. We present Velo, the first verification system that efficiently finds maximum link loads under failures and route changes. The key building block of Velo is its ability to massively reduce the gigantic space of possible route changes thanks to (i) a router-based abstraction for route changes, (ii) a theoretical characterization of scenarios leading to worst-case link loads, and (iii) an approximation of input traffic matrices. We fully implement and extensively evaluate Velo. Velo takes only a few minutes to accurately compute all worst-case link loads in large ISP networks. It thus provides operators with critical support to robustify network configurations, improve network management and take business decisions.
papers.abstract_zh: 为了满足越来越严格的要求，网络运营商通常需要考虑最坏情况的链路负载。这样做涉及分析故障后的流量转发和 BGP 路由更改。最先进的系统可以识别导致拥塞的故障场景，但它们会忽略路线变化。我们推出了 Velo，这是第一个能够在故障和路由变化情况下有效找到最大链路负载的验证系统。 Velo 的关键构建模块是其能够大幅减少可能的路由更改的巨大空间，这要归功于 (i) 基于路由器的路由更改抽象，(ii) 导致最坏情况链路负载的场景的理论特征，以及 (iii) 输入流量矩阵的近似。我们全面实施并广泛评估 Velo。 Velo 只需几分钟即可准确计算大型 ISP 网络中所有最坏情况的链路负载。因此，它为运营商提供了关键支持，以增强网络配置、改进网络管理和制定业务决策。

papers.title: When P4 Meets Run-to-completion Architecture.
papers.abstract: P4 programmable data planes have significantly accelerated the evolution of various network technologies. Although the P4 language has gained wide acceptance, its further development encounters two obstacles: limited programmability and the cessation of the next-generation Tofino chip. As a hardware manufacturer, we try to address the above dilemmas by opening the P4 programmability of our run-to-completion (RTC) chips. At present, there is no publicly available experience in this field. We introduce P4RTC, a comprehensive consolidation of our experiences applying the P4 language to RTC architecture. P4RTC introduces a new P4 architecture model and a set of beneficial extern constructs to fully leverage the RTC architecture’s programmability. Besides, we share the insights we have gained from designing and implementing compilers. We also provide a performance model to facilitate profiling P4RTC’s performance on user-customized P4 code. We prototype P4RTC on an RTC chip with 1.2 Tbps bandwidth. Case-oriented evaluation demonstrates that P4RTC can enhance P4 programmability and reduce the burdens of RTC development. The performance model can provide substantial insights into optimizing P4RTC programs.
papers.abstract_zh: P4可编程数据平面显着加速了各种网络技术的演进。尽管P4语言获得了广泛接受，但其进一步发展遇到了两个障碍：有限的可编程性和下一代Tofino芯片的停产。作为硬件制造商，我们尝试通过开放运行到完成（RTC）芯片的 P4 可编程性来解决上述困境。目前，该领域还没有公开的经验。我们推出 P4RTC，全面整合了我们将 P4 语言应用于 RTC 架构的经验。 P4RTC 引入了新的 P4 架构模型和一组有益的外部构造，以充分利用 RTC 架构的可编程性。此外，我们还分享了从设计和实现编译器中获得的见解。我们还提供了一个性能模型，以方便分析 P4RTC 在用户定制的 P4 代码上的性能。我们在带宽为 1.2 Tbps 的 RTC 芯片上制作了 P4RTC 原型。面向案例的评估表明，P4RTC可以增强P4的可编程性并减轻RTC开发的负担。性能模型可以为优化 P4RTC 程序提供重要的见解。

papers.title: White-Boxing RDMA with Packet-Granular Software Control.
papers.abstract: Driven by diverse workloads and deployments, numerous innovations emerge to customize RDMA transport, spanning congestion control, multi-tenant isolation, routing, and more. However, RDMA's hardware-offloading nature poses significant rigidity when landing these innovations. Prior workflows to deliver customizations have either waited for lengthy hardware iterations, developed bespoke hardware, or applied coarse-grained control over the black-box RDMA NIC. Despite considerable efforts, current customization workflows still lack flexibility, raw performance, and broad availability. In this work, we advocate for White-Boxing RDMA, which provides control of the hardware transport to general-purpose software while preserving raw data path performance. To facilitate the white-boxing methodology, we design and implement Software-Controlled RDMA (SCR) , a framework enabling packet-granular software control over the hardware transport. To address challenges stemming from granular control over high-speed line rates, SCR employs effective control models, boosts the efficiency of subsystems within the framework, and leverages emerging hardware capabilities. We implement SCR on the latest Nvidia BlueField-3 equipped with Datapath Accelerators, delivering a spectrum of new customizations not present in legacy RDMA transport, such as Multi-Tenant Fair Scheduler, User-Defined Congestion Control, Receiver-Driven Flow Control, and Multi-Path Routing Selection. Furthermore, we demonstrate SCR's applicability for GPU-Direct and NVMe-oF RDMA with zero modifications to machine learning or storage code.
papers.abstract_zh: 在不同的工作负载和部署的推动下，出现了大量定制 RDMA 传输的创新，涵盖拥塞控制、多租户隔离、路由等。然而，RDMA 的硬件卸载特性在实现这些创新时带来了显着的刚性。以前提供定制的工作流程要么等待漫长的硬件迭代，开发定制硬件，要么对黑盒 RDMA NIC 应用粗粒度控制。尽管付出了巨大的努力，当前的定制工作流程仍然缺乏灵活性、原始性能和广泛的可用性。在这项工作中，我们提倡白盒 RDMA，它提供对通用软件的硬件传输控制，同时保留原始数据路径性能。为了促进白盒方法，我们设计并实现了软件控制 RDMA (SCR)，这是一个能够对硬件传输进行数据包粒度软件控制的框架。为了应对高速线速精细控制带来的挑战，SCR 采用有效的控制模型，提高框架内子系统的效率，并利用新兴的硬件功能。我们在配备数据路径加速器的最新 Nvidia BlueField-3 上实施 SCR，提供传统 RDMA 传输中不存在的一系列新定制，例如多租户公平调度程序、用户定义的拥塞控制、接收器驱动的流量控制和多路径路由选择。此外，我们还展示了 SCR 对 GPU-Direct 和 NVMe-oF RDMA 的适用性，并且对机器学习或存储代码进行零修改。

papers.title: A High-Performance Design, Implementation, Deployment, and Evaluation of The Slim Fly Network.
papers.abstract: Novel low-diameter network topologies such as Slim Fly (SF) offer significant cost and power advantages over the established Fat Tree, Clos, or Dragonfly. To spearhead the adoption of low-diameter networks, we design, implement, deploy, and evaluate the first real-world SF installation. We focus on deployment, management, and operational aspects of our test cluster with 200 servers and carefully analyze performance. We demonstrate techniques for simple cabling and cabling validation as well as a novel high-performance routing architecture for InfiniBand-based low-diameter topologies. Our real-world benchmarks show SF's strong performance for many modern workloads such as deep neural network training, graph analytics, or linear algebra kernels. SF outperforms non-blocking Fat Trees in scalability while offering comparable or better performance and lower cost for large network sizes. Our work can facilitate deploying SF while the associated (open-source) routing architecture is fully portable and applicable to accelerate any low-diameter interconnect.
papers.abstract_zh: 与现有的 Fat Tree、Clos 或 Dragonfly 相比，Slim Fly (SF) 等新型低直径网络拓扑具有显着的成本和功耗优势。为了率先采用低直径网络，我们设计、实施、部署和评估第一个真实的 SF 安装。我们专注于拥有 200 台服务器的测试集群的部署、管理和操作方面，并仔细分析性能。我们演示了简单布线和布线验证技术以及基于 InfiniBand 的低直径拓扑的新型高性能路由架构。我们的实际基准测试显示 SF 对于许多现代工作负载（例如深度神经网络训练、图形分析或线性代数内核）具有强大的性能。 SF 在可扩展性方面优于非阻塞胖树，同时为大型网络规模提供相当或更好的性能和更低的成本。我们的工作可以促进 SF 的部署，同时相关的（开源）路由架构是完全可移植的，并且适用于加速任何低直径互连。

papers.title: A large-scale deployment of DCTCP.
papers.abstract: This paper describes the process and operational experiences of deploying the Data Center TCP (DCTCP) protocol in a large-scale data center network. In contrast to legacy congestion control protocols that rely on loss as the primary signal of congestion, DCTCP signals in-network congestion (based on queue occupancy) to senders and adjusts the sending rate proportional to the level of congestion. At the time of our deployment, this protocol was well-studied and fairly established with proven efficiency gains in other networks. As expected, we also observed improved performance, and notably decreased packet losses, compared to legacy protocols in our data centers. Perhaps unexpectedly, however, we faced numerous hurdles in rolling out DCTCP; we chronicle these unexpected challenges, ranging from its unfairness (to other classes of traffic) to implementation bugs. We close by discussing some of the open research questions and challenges.
papers.abstract_zh: 本文介绍了在大规模数据中心网络中部署数据中心TCP（DCTCP）协议的流程和操作经验。与依赖丢失作为主要拥塞信号的传统拥塞控制协议相比，DCTCP 向发送方发出网络内拥塞信号（基于队列占用率），并根据拥塞程度按比例调整发送速率。在我们部署时，该协议经过了充分研究并相当成熟，并在其他网络中证明了效率提升。正如预期的那样，与我们数据中心的传统协议相比，我们还观察到性能有所提高，并且数据包丢失显着减少。然而，也许出乎意料的是，我们在推出 DCTCP 时遇到了许多障碍；我们记录了这些意想不到的挑战，从其不公平性（对其他类别的流量）到实施错误。我们最后讨论一些开放的研究问题和挑战。

papers.title: A System to Detect Forged-Origin BGP Hijacks.
papers.abstract: Despite global efforts to secure Internet routing, attackers still successfully exploit the lack of strong BGP security mechanisms. This paper focuses on an attack vector that is frequently used: Forged-origin hijacks, a type of BGP hijack where the attacker manipulates the AS path to make it immune to RPKI-ROV filters and appear as legitimate routing updates from a BGP monitoring standpoint. Our contribution is DFOH, a system that quickly and consistently detects forged-origin hijacks in the whole Internet. Detecting forged-origin hijacks boils down to inferring whether the AS path in a BGP route is legitimate or has been manipulated. We demonstrate that current state-of-art approaches to detect BGP anomalies are insufficient to deal with forged-origin hijacks. We identify the key properties that make the inference of forged AS paths challenging, and design DFOH to be robust against real-world factors. Our inference pipeline includes two key ingredients: (i) a set of strategically selected features, and (ii) a training scheme adapted to topological biases. DFOH detects 90.9% of the forged-origin hijacks within only ≈5min. In addition, it only reports ≈17.5 suspicious cases every day for the whole Internet, a small number that allows operators to investigate the reported cases and take countermeasures.
papers.abstract_zh: 尽管全球都在努力保护互联网路由的安全，但攻击者仍然成功地利用了缺乏强大 BGP 安全机制的漏洞。本文重点介绍一种经常使用的攻击媒介：伪造源劫持，这是一种 BGP 劫持，其中攻击者操纵 AS 路径，使其不受 RPKI-ROV 过滤器的影响，并从 BGP 监控的角度来看，显示为合法的路由更新。我们的贡献是 DFOH，这是一个能够快速、一致地检测整个互联网中的伪造来源劫持的系统。检测伪造源劫持归结为推断 BGP 路由中的 AS 路径是否合法或已被操纵。我们证明，当前检测 BGP 异常的最先进方法不足以应对伪造源劫持。我们确定了使伪造 AS 路径的推断具有挑战性的关键属性，并将 DFOH 设计为对现实世界因素具有鲁棒性。我们的推理管道包括两个关键要素：（i）一组战略性选择的特征，以及（ii）适应拓扑偏差的训练方案。 DFOH 仅在约 5 分钟内即可检测到 90.9% 的伪造源劫持。此外，它每天仅向整个互联网报告约17.5个可疑案例，这个数字很小，可供运营商调查报告的案例并采取应对措施。

papers.title: Accelerating Neural Recommendation Training with Embedding Scheduling.
papers.abstract: Deep learning recommendation models (DLRM) are extensively adopted to support many online services. Typical DLRM training frameworks adopt the parameter server (PS) in CPU servers to maintain memory-intensive embedding tables, and leverage GPU workers with embedding cache to accelerate compute-intensive neural network computation and enable fast embedding lookups. However, such distributed systems suffer from significant communication overhead caused by the embedding transmissions between workers and PS. Prior work reduces the number of cache embedding transmissions by compromising model accuracy, including oversampling hot embeddings or applying staleness-tolerant updates. This paper reveals that many of such transmissions can be avoided given the predictability and infrequency natures of in-cache embedding accesses in distributed training. Based on this observation, we explore a new direction to accelerate distributed DLRM training without compromising model accuracy, i.e., embedding scheduling—with the core idea of proactively determining "where embeddings should be trained" and "which embeddings should be synchronized" to increase the cache hit rate and decrease unnecessary updates, thus achieving a low communication overhead. To realize this idea, we design Herald, a real-time embedding scheduler consisting of two main components: an adaptive location-aware inputs allocator to determine where embeddings should be trained and an optimal communication plan generator to determine which embeddings should be synchronized. Our experiments with real-world workloads show that Herald reduces 48%-89% embedding transmissions, leading up to 2.11× and up to 1.61× better performance with TCP and RDMA, respectively, over 100 Gbps Ethernet for end-to-end DLRM training.
papers.abstract_zh: 深度学习推荐模型（DLRM）被广泛采用来支持许多在线服务。典型的DLRM训练框架采用CPU服务器中的参数服务器（PS）来维护内存密集型嵌入表，并利用具有嵌入缓存的GPU工作器来加速计算密集型神经网络计算并实现快速嵌入查找。然而，这种分布式系统由于工作器和 PS 之间的嵌入传输而导致显着的通信开销。先前的工作通过损害模型准确性来减少缓存嵌入传输的数量，包括过采样热嵌入或应用过时容忍更新。本文揭示，鉴于分布式训练中缓存内嵌入访问的可预测性和不频繁的性质，许多此类传输是可以避免的。基于这一观察，我们探索了一个在不影响模型精度的情况下加速分布式DLRM训练的新方向，即嵌入调度——其核心思想是主动确定“应该在哪里训练嵌入”和“应该同步哪些嵌入”，以提高缓存命中率并减少不必要的更新，从而实现低通信开销。 To realize this idea, we design Herald, a real-time embedding scheduler consisting of two main components: an adaptive location-aware inputs allocator to determine where embeddings should be trained and an optimal communication plan generator to determine which embeddings should be synchronized.我们对实际工作负载的实验表明，Herald 减少了 48%-89% 的嵌入传输，在端到端 DLRM 训练的 100 Gbps 以太网上，TCP 和 RDMA 的性能分别提高了 2.11 倍和 1.61 倍。

papers.title: Accelerating Skewed Workloads With Performance Multipliers in the TurboDB Distributed Database.
papers.abstract: Distributed databases suffer from performance degradation under skewed workloads. Such workloads cause high contention, which is exacerbated by cross-node network latencies. In contrast, single-machine databases better handle skewed workloads because their centralized nature enables performance optimizations that execute contended requests more efficiently.
