Based on this insight, we propose a novel hybrid architecture that employs a single-machine database inside a distributed database and present TurboDB, the first distributed database that leverages this hybrid architecture to achieve up to an order of magnitude better performance than representative solutions under skewed workloads. TurboDB introduces two designs to tackle the core challenges unique to its hybrid architecture. First, Hybrid Concurrency Control is a specialized technique that coordinates the single-machine and distributed databases to collectively ensure process-ordered serializability. Second, Phalanx Replication provides fault tolerance for the single-machine database without significantly sacrificing its performance benefits. We implement TurboDB using CockroachDB and Cicada as the distributed and single-machine databases, respectively. Our evaluation shows that TurboDB significantly improves the performance of CockroachDB under skewed workloads.
papers.abstract_zh: 分布式数据库在不平衡的工作负载下会遭受性能下降的困扰。此类工作负载会导致高争用，而跨节点网络延迟会加剧这种争用。相比之下，单机数据库可以更好地处理倾斜的工作负载，因为它们的集中式特性可以实现性能优化，从而更有效地执行竞争请求。基于这一见解，我们提出了一种新颖的混合架构，该架构在分布式数据库中采用单机数据库，并提出了 TurboDB，这是第一个利用这种混合架构的分布式数据库，在倾斜工作负载下比代表性解决方案实现了一个数量级的性能提升。 TurboDB 引入了两种设计来解决其混合架构特有的核心挑战。首先，混合并发控制是一种协调单机和分布式数据库以共同确保流程有序可串行化的专业技术。其次，Phalanx Replication 为单机数据库提供容错能力，而不会显着牺牲其性能优势。我们分别使用 CockroachDB 和 Cicada 作为分布式数据库和单机数据库来实现 TurboDB。我们的评估表明，TurboDB 显着提高了 CockroachDB 在倾斜工作负载下的性能。

papers.title: ADR-X: ANN-Assisted Wireless Link Rate Adaptation for Compute-Constrained Embedded Gaming Devices.
papers.abstract: The wireless channel between gaming console and accessories e.g. controllers and headsets, experiences extremely rapid variations due to abrupt head and hand movements amidst an exciting game. In the absence of prior studies on wireless packet losses for console gaming, through extensive evaluations and user studies, we find that state-of-the-art rate adaptation schemes, unable to keep up with these rapid changes, experience packet loss rates of 2-10% while loss rates that are 10× lower (0.1-0.5%) are required to ensure a high quality gaming experience. We present ADR-X, an ANN-based contextual multi-armed bandit rate adaptation technique that continuously predicts and tracks the channel and picks appropriate data rates. A key challenge for ADR-X is that it must run on power and compute constrained embedded devices under realtime constraints. ADR-X addresses this challenge by meticulously crafting an ANN that leverages existing communication theory results to incorporate domain knowledge. This allows ADR-X to achieve 10× lower packet losses than existing schemes while also running 100× faster than state-of-the-art reinforcement learning schemes, making it suitable for deployment on embedded gaming devices.
papers.abstract_zh: 游戏机和配件（例如游戏机）之间的无线通道在激动人心的游戏中，由于头部和手部的突然运动，控制器和耳机会经历极其快速的变化。由于之前缺乏对主机游戏无线丢包的研究，通过广泛的评估和用户研究，我们发现最先进的速率适配方案无法跟上这些快速变化，丢包率达到 2-10%，而丢包率需要降低 10 倍（0.1-0.5%）才能确保高质量的游戏体验。我们提出了 ADR-X，这是一种基于 ANN 的上下文多臂老虎机速率自适应技术，可连续预测和跟踪信道并选择适当的数据速率。 ADR-X 的一个关键挑战是它必须在实时限制下在功率和计算受限的嵌入式设备上运行。 ADR-X 通过精心设计一个 ANN 来应对这一挑战，该 ANN 利用现有的通信理论结果来整合领域知识。这使得 ADR-X 的数据包丢失率比现有方案低 10 倍，同时运行速度比最先进的强化学习方案快 100 倍，使其适合部署在嵌入式游戏设备上。

papers.title: Alea-BFT: Practical Asynchronous Byzantine Fault Tolerance.
papers.abstract: Traditional Byzantine Fault Tolerance (BFT) state machine replication protocols assume a partial synchrony model, leading to a design where a leader replica drives the protocol and is replaced after a timeout. Recently, we witnessed a surge of asynchronous BFT protocols, which use randomization to remove the need for bounds on message delivery times, making them more resilient to adverse network conditions. However, existing research proposals still fall short of gaining practical adoption, plausibly because they are not able to combine good performance with a simple design that can be readily understood and adopted. In this paper, we present Alea-BFT, a simple and highly efficient asynchronous BFT protocol, which is gaining practical adoption, namely in Ethereum distributed validators. Alea-BFT brings the key design insight from classical protocols of concentrating part of the work on a single designated replica and incorporates this principle in a simple two-stage pipelined design, with an efficient broadcast led by the designated replica, followed by an inexpensive binary agreement. The evaluation of our research prototype implementation and two real-world integrations in cryptocurrency ecosystems shows excellent performance, improving on the fastest protocol (Dumbo-NG) in terms of latency and displaying good performance under faults.
papers.abstract_zh: 传统的拜占庭容错 (BFT) 状态机复制协议采用部分同步模型，导致领导副本驱动协议并在超时后被替换的设计。最近，我们目睹了异步 BFT 协议的激增，这些协议使用随机化来消除对消息传递时间的限制，从而使它们对不利的网络条件更具弹性。然而，现有的研究提案仍然未能获得实际采用，这可能是因为它们无法将良好的性能与易于理解和采用的简单设计结合起来。在本文中，我们提出了 Alea-BFT，一种简单且高效的异步 BFT 协议，该协议正在获得实际应用，即在以太坊分布式验证器中。 Alea-BFT 带来了经典协议的关键设计见解，即将部分工作集中在单个指定副本上，并将这一原则融入到简单的两级流水线设计中，由指定副本主导高效广播，然后是廉价的二进制协议。对我们的研究原型实施和加密货币生态系统中的两个现实世界集成的评估显示出出色的性能，在延迟方面改进了最快的协议（Dumbo-NG），并在故障下显示出良好的性能。

papers.title: Application-Level Service Assurance with 5G RAN Slicing.
papers.abstract: This paper presents Zipper, a novel Radio Access Network (RAN) slicing system that provides assurances of application-level throughput and latency. Existing RAN slicing systems optimize for slice-level assurance, but these methods fail to provide predictable network performance to individual mobile apps. Extending the slice-level formulation to app-level introduces an intractable optimization problem with exploding state and action spaces. To simplify the search space, Zipper casts the problem as a model predictive controller, and explicitly tracks the network dynamics of each user. It uses an efficient algorithm to compute slice bandwidth allocations that meet each app's requirements. To assist operators with interfacing admission control policies, Zipper exposes a primitive that estimates if there is bandwidth available to accommodate an incoming app's requirements. We implemented Zipper on a production-class 5G virtual RAN testbed integrated with hooks to control slice bandwidth, and we evaluated it on real workloads, including video conferencing and virtual reality apps. On a representative RAN workload, our real-time implementation supports up to 200 apps and over 70 slices on a 100 MHz channel. Relative to a slice-level service assurance system, Zipper reduces tail throughput and latency violations, measured as a ratio of violation of the app's request, by 9×.
papers.abstract_zh: 本文介绍了 Zipper，一种新颖的无线接入网络 (RAN) 切片系统，可确保应用程序级吞吐量和延迟。现有的 RAN 切片系统针对切片级保证进行了优化，但这些方法无法为单个移动应用程序提供可预测的网络性能。将切片级公式扩展到应用程序级会带来一个棘手的优化问题，其中状态和操作空间会爆炸。为了简化搜索空间，Zipper 将问题转化为模型预测控制器，并显式跟踪每个用户的网络动态。它使用高效的算法来计算满足每个应用程序要求的切片带宽分配。为了帮助操作员连接准入控制策略，Zipper 公开了一个原语，用于估计是否有可用带宽来满足传入应用程序的要求。我们在生产级 5G 虚拟 RAN 测试台上实施了 Zipper，该测试台集成了用于控制切片带宽的钩子，并在实际工作负载（包括视频会议和虚拟现实应用程序）上对其进行了评估。在典型的 RAN 工作负载上，我们的实时实施支持 100 MHz 通道上多达 200 个应用程序和超过 70 个切片。相对于切片级服务保证系统，Zipper 将尾部吞吐量和延迟违规（以应用程序请求的违规比率来衡量）减少了 9 倍。

papers.title: Approximate Caching for Efficiently Serving Text-to-Image Diffusion Models.
papers.abstract: Text-to-image generation using diffusion models has seen explosive popularity owing to their ability in producing high quality images adhering to text prompts. However, diffusion-models go through a large number of iterative denoising steps, and are resource-intensive, requiring expensive GPUs and incurring considerable latency. In this paper, we introduce a novel approximate-caching technique that can reduce such iterative denoising steps by reusing intermediate noise states created during a prior image generation. Based on this idea, we present an end-to-end text-to-image generation system, NIRVANA, that uses approximate-caching with a novel cache management policy to provide 21% GPU compute savings, 19.8% end-to-end latency reduction, and 19% dollar savings on two real production workloads. We further present an extensive characterization of real production text-to-image prompts from the perspective of caching, popularity and reuse of intermediate states in a large production environment.
papers.abstract_zh: 使用扩散模型生成文本到图像已经得到了爆炸式的流行，因为它们能够生成符合文本提示的高质量图像。然而，扩散模型需要经历大量的迭代去噪步骤，并且是资源密集型的，需要昂贵的 GPU 并产生相当大的延迟。在本文中，我们介绍了一种新颖的近似缓存技术，该技术可以通过重用先前图像生成期间创建的中间噪声状态来减少这种迭代去噪步骤。基于这个想法，我们提出了一种端到端文本到图像生成系统 NIRVANA，它使用近似缓存和新颖的缓存管理策略，在两个实际生产工作负载上节省 21% 的 GPU 计算量、减少 19.8% 的端到端延迟以及节省 19% 的美元。我们从大型生产环境中中间状态的缓存、流行和重用的角度进一步展示了实际生产文本到图像提示的广泛特征。

papers.title: ARTEMIS: Adaptive Bitrate Ladder Optimization for Live Video Streaming.
papers.abstract: Live streaming of segmented videos over the Hypertext Transfer Protocol (HTTP) is increasingly popular and serves heterogeneous clients by offering each segment in multiple representations. A bitrate ladder expresses this choice as an ordered list of bitrate-resolution pairs. Whereas existing solutions for HTTP-based live streaming use a static bitrate ladder, the fixed ladders struggle to appropriately accommodate the dynamics in the video content and network-conditioned client capabilities. This paper proposes ARTEMIS as a practical scalable alternative that dynamically configures the bitrate ladder depending on the content complexity, network conditions, and clients' statistics. ARTEMIS seamlessly integrates with the end-to-end streaming pipeline and operates transparently to video encoders and clients. We develop a cloud-based implementation of ARTEMIS and conduct extensive real-world and trace-driven experiments. The experimental comparison vs. existing prominent bitrate ladders demonstrates that live streaming with ARTEMIS outperforms all baselines, reduces encoding computation by 25%, end-to-end latency by 18%, and increases quality of experience by 11%.
papers.abstract_zh: 通过超文本传输​​协议 (HTTP) 进行分段视频直播越来越受欢迎，并通过以多种表示形式提供每个片段来服务于异构客户端。比特率阶梯将这种选择表示​​为比特率-分辨率对的有序列表。虽然现有的基于 HTTP 的实时流媒体解决方案使用静态比特率阶梯，但固定阶梯很难适当适应视频内容的动态和网络条件客户端功能。本文提出 ARTEMIS 作为一种实用的可扩展替代方案，可根据内容复杂性、网络条件和客户端统计数据动态配置比特率阶梯。 ARTEMIS 与端到端流媒体管道无缝集成，并对视频编码器和客户端透明地运行。我们开发基于云的 ARTEMIS 实施，并进行广泛的现实世界和跟踪驱动的实验。与现有著名比特率阶梯的实验比较表明，使用 ARTEMIS 进行直播的性能优于所有基线，将编码计算量减少了 25%，端到端延迟减少了 18%，并将体验质量提高了 11%。

papers.title: AUGUR: Practical Mobile Multipath Transport Service for Low Tail Latency in Real-Time Streaming.
papers.abstract: Real-time streaming applications like cloud gaming require consistently low latency, even at the tail. Our large-scale measurement based on a major cloud gaming service provider reveals that in Wi-Fi networks, the delay of the wireless hop can inflate due to its fluctuating nature, making it difficult to achieve consistently low tail latency. While cellular paths can be leveraged to alleviate the impact of wireless fluctuation of Wi-Fi paths, our user study reveals that it is crucial to constrain cellular data usage while using multipath transport. In this paper, we present AUGUR, a multipath transport service designed to reduce long tail latency and video frame stall rates in mobile real-time streaming. To address the challenge of reducing long tail latency by utilizing cellular paths while minimizing cellular data usage, AUGUR captures user characteristics by deriving state probability models and formulates the equilibrium into Integer Linear Programming (ILP) problems for each user session to determine the opportunity of frame retransmission and path selection. Our trace-driven emulation and large-scale real-world deployment in a Tencent Start cloud gaming platform demonstrate that AUGUR achieves up to 66.0% reduction in tail latency and 99.5% reduction in frame stall rate with 88.1% decrease in cellular data usage compared to other multipath transport schemes.
papers.abstract_zh: 云游戏等实时流应用程序需要始终保持低延迟，即使在尾部也是如此。我们基于一家主要云游戏服务提供商的大规模测量表明，在 Wi-Fi 网络中，无线跳的延迟可能会因其波动性而增大，从而难以实现持续的低尾延迟。虽然可以利用蜂窝路径来减轻 Wi-Fi 路径无线波动的影响，但我们的用户研究表明，在使用多路径传输时限制蜂窝数据使用至关重要。在本文中，我们提出了 AUGUR，一种多路径传输服务，旨在减少移动实时流中的长尾延迟和视频帧停顿率。为了解决利用蜂窝路径减少长尾延迟的挑战，同时最大限度地减少蜂窝数据使用量，AUGUR 通过导出状态概率模型来捕获用户特征，并将平衡公式化为每个用户会话的整数线性规划 (ILP) 问题，以确定帧重传和路径选择的机会。我们在Tencent Start云游戏平台上进行的跟踪驱动仿真和大规模实际部署表明，与其他多路径传输方案相比，AUGUR 可将尾延迟降低高达 66.0%，帧停顿率降低 99.5%，蜂窝数据使用量降低 88.1%。

papers.title: Automatic Parallelization of Software Network Functions.
papers.abstract: Software network functions (NFs) trade-off flexibility and ease of deployment for an increased challenge of performance. The traditional way to increase NF performance is by distributing traffic to multiple CPU cores, but this poses a significant challenge: how to parallelize an NF without breaking its semantics? We propose Maestro, a tool that analyzes a sequential implementation of an NF and automatically generates an enhanced parallel version that carefully configures the NIC's Receive Side Scaling mechanism to distribute traffic across cores, while preserving semantics. When possible, Maestro orchestrates a shared-nothing architecture, with each core operating independently without shared memory coordination, maximizing performance. Otherwise, Maestro choreographs a fine-grained read-write locking mechanism that optimizes operation for typical Internet traffic. We parallelized 8 software NFs and show that they generally scale-up linearly until bottlenecked by PCIe when using small packets or by 100~Gbps line-rate with typical Internet traffic. Maestro further outperforms modern hardware-based transactional memory mechanisms, even for challenging parallel-unfriendly workloads.
papers.abstract_zh: 软件网络功能 (NF) 需要权衡灵活性和易于部署性，以应对更大的性能挑战。提高 NF 性能的传统方法是将流量分配给多个 CPU 核心，但这提出了一个重大挑战：如何在不破坏其语义的情况下并行化 NF？我们提出了 Maestro，这是一种工具，可以分析 NF 的顺序实现并自动生成增强的并行版本，该版本仔细配置 NIC 的接收端扩展机制以跨内核分配流量，同时保留语义。在可能的情况下，Maestro 会编排无共享架构，每个核心独立运行，无需共享内存协调，从而最大限度地提高性能。除此之外，Maestro 精心设计了一种细粒度的读写锁定机制，可优化典型互联网流量的操作。我们并行化了 8 个软件 NF，并表明它们通常会线性扩展，直到使用小数据包时出现 PCIe 瓶颈，或者典型互联网流量出现 100~Gbps 线速时出现瓶颈。 Maestro 的性能进一步优于基于硬件的现代事务内存机制，即使对于具有挑战性的并行不友好的工作负载也是如此。

papers.title: AutoSketch: Automatic Sketch-Oriented Compiler for Query-driven Network Telemetry.
papers.abstract: Recent network telemetry witnesses tremendous progress in two directions: query-driven telemetry that targets expressiveness as the primary goal, and sketch-based algorithms that address resource-accuracy trade-offs. In this paper, we propose AutoSketch that aims to integrate the advantages of both classes. In a nutshell, AutoSketch automatically compiles high-level operators into sketch instances that can be readily deployed with low resource usage and incur limited accuracy drop. However, there remains a gap between the expressiveness of high-level operators and the underlying realization of sketch algorithms. AutoSketch bridges this gap in three aspects. First, AutoSketch extends its interface derived from existing query-driven telemetry such that users can specify the desired telemetry accuracy. The specified accuracy intent will be utilized to guide the compiling procedure. Second, AutoSketch leverages various techniques, such as syntax analysis and performance estimation, to construct efficient sketch instances. Finally, AutoSketch automatically searches for the most suitable parameter configurations that fulfill the accuracy intent with minimum resource usage. Our experiments demonstrate that AutoSketch can achieve high expressiveness, high accuracy, and low resource usage compared to state-of-the-art telemetry solutions.
papers.abstract_zh: 最近的网络遥测在两个方向取得了巨大进展：以表达能力为主要目标的查询驱动遥测，以及解决资源准确性权衡的基于草图的算法。在本文中，我们提出了 AutoSketch，旨在整合这两个类别的优点。简而言之，AutoSketch 自动将高级运算符编译为草图实例，这些实例可以轻松部署，资源占用率低，并且精度下降有限。然而，高级算子的表达能力与草图算法的底层实现之间仍然存在差距。 AutoSketch 在三个方面弥补了这一差距。首先，AutoSketch 扩展了其源自现有查询驱动遥测的接口，以便用户可以指定所需的遥测精度。指定的准确性意图将用于指导编译过程。其次，AutoSketch 利用语法分析和性能估计等各种技术来构建高效的草图实例。最后，AutoSketch 会自动搜索最合适的参数配置，以最少的资源使用满足精度意图。我们的实验表明，与最先进的遥测解决方案相比，AutoSketch 可以实现高表现力、高精度和低资源占用。

papers.title: Autothrottle: A Practical Bi-Level Approach to Resource Management for SLO-Targeted Microservices.
papers.abstract: Achieving resource efficiency while preserving end-user experience is non-trivial for cloud application operators. As cloud applications progressively adopt microservices, resource managers are faced with two distinct levels of system behavior: end-to-end application latency and per-service resource usage. Translating between the two levels, however, is challenging because user requests traverse heterogeneous services that collectively (but unevenly) contribute to the end-to-end latency. We present Autothrottle , a bi-level resource management framework for microservices with latency SLOs (service-level objectives). It architecturally decouples application SLO feedback from service resource control, and bridges them through the notion of performance targets. Specifically, an application-wide learning-based controller is employed to periodically set performance targets—expressed as CPU throttle ratios—for per-service heuristic controllers to attain. We evaluate Autothrottle on three microservice applications, with workload traces from production scenarios. Results show superior CPU savings, up to 26.21% over the best-performing baseline and up to 93.84% over all baselines.
papers.abstract_zh: 对于云应用运营商来说，在保持最终用户体验的同时实现资源效率并非易事。随着云应用程序逐渐采用微服务，资源管理器面临着两个不同级别的系统行为：端到端应用程序延迟和每个服务的资源使用情况。然而，在两个级别之间进行转换具有挑战性，因为用户请求遍历异构服务，这些服务共同（但不均匀）导致端到端延迟。我们推出了 Autothrottle，这是一种针对具有延迟 SLO（服务级别目标）的微服务的双层资源管理框架。它在架构上将应用程序 SLO 反馈与服务资源控制解耦，并通过性能目标的概念将它们联系起来。具体来说，采用基于应用程序学习的控制器来定期设置性能目标（以 CPU 节流比率表示），以实现每个服务启发式控制器的目标。我们在三个微服务应用程序上评估 Autothrottle，并使用来自生产场景的工作负载跟踪。结果显示，CPU 节省率出色，比最佳性能基准节省高达 26.21%，比所有基准节省高达 93.84%。

papers.title: BBQ: A Fast and Scalable Integer Priority Queue for Hardware Packet Scheduling.
papers.abstract: The need for fairness, strong isolation, and fine-grained control over network traffic in multi-tenant cloud settings has engendered a rich literature on packet scheduling in switches and programmable hardware. Recent proposals for hardware scheduling primitives (e.g., PIFO, PIEO, BMW-Tree) have enabled run-time programmable packet schedulers, considerably expanding the suite of scheduling policies that can be applied to network traffic. However, no existing solution can be practically deployed on modern switches and NICs because they either do not scale to the number of elements required by these devices or fail to deliver good throughput, thus requiring an impractical number of replicas. In this work, we ask: is it possible to achieve priority packet scheduling at line-rate while supporting a large number of flows? Our key insight is to leverage a scheduling primitive used previously in software – called Hierarchical Find First Set – and port this to a highly pipeline-parallel hardware design. We present the architecture and implementation of the Bitmapped Bucket Queue (BBQ), a hardware-based integer priority queue that supports a wide range of scheduling policies (via a PIFO-like abstraction). BBQ, for the first time, supports hundreds of thousands of concurrent flows while guaranteeing 100 Gbps line rate (148.8 Mpps) on FPGAs and 1 Tbps (1,488 Mpps) line rate on ASICs. We demonstrate this by implementing BBQ on a commodity FPGA where it is capable of supporting over 100K flows and 32K priorities at 300 MHz, 3× the packet rate of similar hardware priority queue designs. On ASIC, we can synthesize 100K elements at 3.1 GHz using a 7nm process.
papers.abstract_zh: 多租户云设置中对网络流量的公平性、强隔离性和细粒度控制的需求催生了有关交换机和可编程硬件中数据包调度的丰富文献。最近提出的硬件调度原语（例如 PIFO、PIEO、BMW-Tree）已经启用了运行时可编程数据包调度程序，大大扩展了可应用于网络流量的调度策略套件。然而，现有的解决方案实际上无法部署在现代交换机和 NIC 上，因为它们要么无法扩展到这些设备所需的元素数量，要么无法提供良好的吞吐量，从而需要不切实际的副本数量。在这项工作中，我们要问：是否有可能在支持大量流的同时实现线速优先分组调度？我们的主要见解是利用以前在软件中使用的调度原语（称为“分层查找第一集”）并将其移植到高度管道并行的硬件设计中。我们介绍了位映射桶队列 (BBQ) 的架构和实现，这是一种基于硬件的整数优先级队列，支持广泛的调度策略（通过类似 PIFO 的抽象）。 BBQ 首次支持数十万并发流，同时保证 FPGA 上的 100 Gbps 线速 (148.8 Mpps) 和 ASIC 上的 1 Tbps (1,488 Mpps) 线速。我们通过在商用 FPGA 上实现 BBQ 来证明这一点，它能够在 300 MHz 下支持超过 100K 流和 32K 优先级，是类似硬件优先级队列设计的数据包速率的 3 倍。在 ASIC 上，我们可以使用 7nm 工艺在 3.1 GHz 下合成 100K 个元件。

papers.title: BFMSense: WiFi Sensing Using Beamforming Feedback Matrix.
papers.abstract: WiFi-based contactless sensing has attracted a tremendous amount of attention due to its pervasiveness, low-cost, and non-intrusiveness to users. Existing systems mainly leverage channel state information (CSI) for sensing. However, CSI can only be extracted from very few commodity WiFi devices through driver hacking, severely limiting the adoption of WiFi sensing in real life. We observe a new opportunity that a large range of new-generation WiFi cards can report another piece of information, i.e., beamforming feedback matrix (BFM). In this paper, we propose to leverage this new BFM information for WiFi sensing. Through establishing the relationship between BFM and CSI, we lay the theoretical foundations for BFM-based WiFi sensing for the first time. We show that through careful signal processing, BFM can be utilized for fine-grained sensing. We showcase the sensing capability of BFM using two representative sensing applications, i.e., respiration sensing and human trajectory tracking. Comprehensive experiments show that BFM-based WiFi sensing can achieve highly accurate sensing performance on a large range of new-generation WiFi devices from various manufacturers, moving WiFi sensing one big step towards real-life adoption.
papers.abstract_zh: 基于 WiFi 的非接触式传感因其普遍性、低成本和对用户的非侵入性而引起了极大的关注。现有系统主要利用信道状态信息（CSI）进行感知。然而，CSI 只能通过驱动程序黑客从极少数商用 WiFi 设备中提取，这严重限制了 WiFi 传感在现实生活中的采用。我们观察到一个新的机会，即大量新一代 WiFi 卡可以报告另一条信息，即波束成形反馈矩阵 (BFM)。在本文中，我们建议利用这一新的 BFM 信息进行 WiFi 传感。通过建立BFM和CSI之间的关系，我们首次为基于BFM的WiFi传感奠定了理论基础。我们证明，通过仔细的信号处理，BFM 可用于细粒度传感。我们使用两种代表性的传感应用（即呼吸传感和人体轨迹跟踪）展示 BFM 的传感能力。综合实验表明，基于 BFM 的 WiFi 传感可以在来自不同制造商的大量新一代 WiFi 设备上实现高精度的传感性能，使 WiFi 传感向现实生活中的采用迈出了一大步。

papers.title: Brain-on-Switch: Towards Advanced Intelligent Network Data Plane via NN-Driven Traffic Analysis at Line-Speed.
papers.abstract: The emerging programmable networks sparked significant research on Intelligent Network Data Plane (INDP), which achieves learning-based traffic analysis at line-speed. Prior art in INDP focus on deploying tree/forest models on the data plane. We observe a fundamental limitation in tree-based INDP approaches: although it is possible to represent even larger tree/forest tables on the data plane, the flow features that are computable on the data plane are fundamentally limited by hardware constraints. In this paper, we present BoS to push the boundaries of INDP by enabling Neural Network (NN) driven traffic analysis at line-speed. Many types of NNs (such as Recurrent Neural Network (RNN), and transformers) that are designed to work with sequential data have advantages over tree-based models, because they can take raw network data as input without complex feature computations on the fly. However, the challenge is significant: the recurrent computation scheme used in RNN inference is fundamentally different from the match-action paradigm used on the network data plane. BoS addresses this challenge by (i) designing a novel data plane friendly RNN architecture that can execute unlimited RNN time steps with limited data plane stages, effectively achieving line-speed RNN inference; and (ii) complementing the on-switch RNN model with an off-switch transformer-based traffic analysis module to further boost the overall performance. We implement a prototype of BoS using a P4 programmable switch as our data plane, and extensively evaluate it over multiple traffic analysis tasks. The results show that BoS outperforms state-of-the-art in both analysis accuracy and scalability.
papers.abstract_zh: 新兴的可编程网络引发了对智能网络数据平面（INDP）的重要研究，该平面实现了基于学习的线速流量分析。 INDP 中的现有技术侧重于在数据平面上部署树/森林模型。我们观察到基于树的 INDP 方法的基本限制：尽管可以在数据平面上表示更大的树/森林表，但在数据平面上可计算的流特征从根本上受到硬件约束的限制。在本文中，我们提出 BoS 通过启用神经网络 (NN) 驱动的线速流量分析来突破 INDP 的界限。设计用于处理顺序数据的许多类型的神经网络（例如循环神经网络 (RNN) 和转换器）比基于树的模型具有优势，因为它们可以将原始网络数据作为输入，而无需动态进行复杂的特征计算。然而，挑战是巨大的：RNN 推理中使用的循环计算方案与网络数据平面上使用的匹配动作范式有着根本的不同。 BoS 通过 (i) 设计一种新颖的数据平面友好的 RNN 架构来应对这一挑战，该架构可以在有限的数据平面阶段执行无限的 RNN 时间步长，有效实现线速 RNN 推理； (ii) 用基于开关变压器的流量分析模块补充开关 RNN 模型，以进一步提高整体性能。我们使用 P4 可编程交换机作为数据平面实现了 BoS 原型，并通过多个流量分析任务对其进行了广泛评估。结果表明，BoS 在分析准确性和可扩展性方面均优于最先进的技术。

papers.title: Can't Be Late: Optimizing Spot Instance Savings under Deadlines.
papers.abstract: Cloud providers offer spot instances alongside on-demand instances to optimize resource utilization. While economically appealing, spot instances’ preemptible nature causes them ill-suited for deadline-sensitive jobs. To allow jobs to meet deadlines while leveraging spot instances, we propose a simple idea: use on-demand instances judiciously as a backup resource. However, due to the unpredictable spot instance availability, determining when to switch between spot and on-demand to minimize cost requires careful policy design. In this paper, we first provide an in-depth characterization of spot instances (e.g., availability, pricing, duration), and develop a basic theoretical model to examine the worst and average-case behaviors of baseline policies (e.g., greedy). The model serves as a foundation to motivate our design of a simple and effective policy, Uniform Progress, which is parameter-free and requires no assumptions on spot availability. Our empirical study, based on three-month-long real spot availability traces on AWS, demonstrates that it can (1) outperform the greedy policy by closing the gap to the optimal policy by 2× in both average and bad cases, and (2) further reduce the gap when limited future knowledge is given. These results hold in a variety of conditions ranging from loose to tight deadlines, low to high spot availability, and on single or multiple instances. By implementing this policy on top of SkyPilot, an intercloud broker system, we achieve 27%-84% cost savings across a variety of representative real-world workloads and deadlines. The spot availability traces are open-sourced for future research.
papers.abstract_zh: 云提供商提供现货实例和按需实例，以优化资源利用率。虽然在经济上很有吸引力，但现场实例的抢占性质导致它们不适合对截止日期敏感的工作。为了让作业在利用现货实例的同时按时完成任务，我们提出了一个简单的想法：明智地使用按需实例作为备份资源。然而，由于现货实例可用性不可预测，确定何时在现货实例和按需实例之间切换以最大限度地降低成本需要仔细的策略设计。在本文中，我们首先提供了现货实例的深入特征（例如可用性、定价、持续时间），并开发了一个基本理论模型来检查基线策略的最坏和平均情况行为（例如贪婪）。该模型是激励我们设计简单有效的政策“Uniform Progress”的基础，该政策是无参数的，并且不需要对现货可用性进行假设。我们的实证研究基于 AWS 上长达三个月的实际现货可用性跟踪，表明它可以 (1) 在平均情况和不良情况下将与最优策略的差距缩小 2 倍，从而超越贪婪策略；(2) 在给出有限的未来知识时进一步缩小差距。这些结果适用于各种条件，从宽松到严格的截止日期、从低到高的现货可用性以及单个或多个实例。通过在跨云代理系统 SkyPilot 上实施此策略，我们在各种具有代表性的实际工作负载和截止日期内实现了 27%-84% 的成本节省。现货可用性跟踪是开源的，以供未来研究。

papers.title: CAPA: An Architecture For Operating Cluster Networks With High Availability.
papers.abstract: Management operations are a major source of outages for networks. A number of best practices designed to reduce and mitigate such outages are well known, but their enforcement has been challenging, leaving the network vulnerable to inadvertent mistakes and gaps which repeatedly result in outages. We present our experiences with CAPA, Google’s “containment and prevention architecture” for regulating management operations on our cluster networking fleet. Our goal with CAPA is to limit the systems where strict adherence to best practices is required, so that availability of the network is not dependent on the good intentions of every engineer and operator. We enumerate the features of CAPA which we have found to be necessary to effectively enforce best practices within a thin “regulation“ layer. We evaluate CAPA based on case studies of outages prevented, counter-factual analysis of past incidents, and known limitations. Management-plane-related outages have substantially reduced both in frequency and severity, with a 82% reduction in cumulative duration of incidents normalized to fleet size over five years.
papers.abstract_zh: 管理操作是网络中断的主要根源。旨在减少和缓解此类中断的许多最佳实践众所周知，但其执行一直具有挑战性，使网络容易受到无意错误和漏洞的影响，从而反复导致中断。我们展示了我们在 CAPA 方面的经验，CAPA 是 Google 的“遏制和预防架构”，用于规范我们集群网络舰队的管理操作。我们 CAPA 的目标是限制需要严格遵守最佳实践的系统，以便网络的可用性不依赖于每个工程师和操作员的良好意图。我们列举了 CAPA 的特征，我们发现这些特征对于在薄弱的“监管”层内有效实施最佳实践是必要的。我们根据预防中断的案例研究、对过去事件的反事实分析以及已知的局限性来评估 CAPA。与管理飞机相关的停机频率和严重程度均大幅降低，五年内按机队规模归一化的事故累积持续时间减少了 82%。

papers.title: CASSINI: Network-Aware Job Scheduling in Machine Learning Clusters.
papers.abstract: We present CASSINI, a network-aware job scheduler for machine learning (ML) clusters. CASSINI introduces a novel geometric abstraction to consider the communication pattern of different jobs while placing them on network links. To do so, CASSINI uses an Affinity graph that finds a series of time-shift values to adjust the communication phases of a subset of jobs, such that the communication patterns of jobs sharing the same network link are interleaved with each other. Experiments with 13 common ML models on a 24-server testbed demonstrate that compared to the state-of-the-art ML schedulers, CASSINI improves the average and tail completion time of jobs by up to 1.6x and 2.5x, respectively. Moreover, we show that CASSINI reduces the number of ECN marked packets in the cluster by up to 33x.
papers.abstract_zh: 我们推出了 CASSINI，一种用于机器学习 (ML) 集群的网络感知作业调度程序。 CASSINI 引入了一种新颖的几何抽象来考虑不同作业的通信模式，同时将它们放置在网络链路上。为此，CASSINI 使用亲和图查找一系列时移值来调整作业子集的通信阶段，以便共享同一网络链路的作业的通信模式彼此交错。在 24 台服务器测试台上对 13 个常见 ML 模型进行的实验表明，与最先进的 ML 调度程序相比，CASSINI 将作业的平均完成时间和尾部完成时间分别提高了 1.6 倍和 2.5 倍。此外，我们还发现 CASSINI 将集群中 ECN 标记数据包的数量减少了 33 倍。

papers.title: Catch Me If You Can: Laser Tethering with Highly Mobile Targets.
papers.abstract: Conventional wisdom holds that laser-based systems cannot handle high mobility due to the strong directionality of laser light. We challenge this belief by presenting Lasertag, a generic framework that tightly integrates laser steering with optical tracking to maintain laser connectivity with high-velocity targets. Lasertag creates a constantly connected, laser-based tether between the Lasertag core unit and a remote target, irrespective of the target's movement. Key elements of Lasertag include (1) a novel optical design that superimposes the optical paths of a steerable laser beam and image sensor, (2) a lightweight optical tracking mechanism for passive retroreflective markers, (3) an automated mapping method to translate scene points to laser steering commands, and (4) a predictive steering algorithm that overcomes limited image sensor frame rates and laser steering delays to quadruple the steering rate up to 151Hz. Experiments with the Lasertag prototype demonstrate that, on average, Lasertag transmits a median 0.97 of laser energy with a median alignment offset of only 1.03cm for mobile targets accelerating up to 49m/s^2, with speeds up to 6.5m/s, and distances up to 6m (≈ 47°/s). Additional experiments translate the above performance to a 10^-8 median bit error rate across trials when transmitting a 1Gbps, on-off keying signal. Lasertag paves the way for various laser applications (e.g., communication, sensing, power delivery) in mobile settings. A demonstration video of Lasertag is available at: mobilex.cs.columbia.edu/lasertag
papers.abstract_zh: 传统观点认为，由于激光的强方向性，基于激光的系统无法处理高移动性。我们通过推出 Lasertag 来挑战这一信念，这是一个通用框架，它将激光转向与光学跟踪紧密集成，以保持激光与高速目标的连接。 Lasertag 在 Lasertag 核心单元和远程目标之间创建了一条持续连接的、基于激光的系绳，无论目标如何移动。 Lasertag 的关键要素包括 (1) 一种新颖的光学设计，叠加了可操纵激光束和图像传感器的光路，(2) 用于无源回射标记的轻型光学跟踪机制，(3) 一种将场景点转换为激光转向命令的自动映射方法，以及 (4) 一种预测转向算法，该算法克服了有限的图像传感器帧速率和激光转向延迟，将转向速率提高了四倍，高达 151Hz。 Lasertag 原型的实验表明，平均而言，Lasertag 传输的激光能量中位数为 0.97，对于加速高达 49m/s^2、速度高达 6.5m/s、距离高达 6m (≈ 47°/s) 的移动目标，中值对准偏移仅为 1.03cm。当传输 1Gbps 开关键控信号时，其他实验将上述性能转化为 10^-8 的中位误码率。 Lasertag 为移动环境中的各种激光应用（例如通信、传感、电力传输）铺平了道路。 Lasertag 的演示视频可在以下位置获取：mobilex.cs.columbia.edu/lasertag

papers.title: Characterization of Large Language Model Development in the Datacenter.
papers.abstract: Large Language Models (LLMs) have presented impressive performance across several transformative tasks. However, it is non-trivial to efficiently utilize large-scale cluster resources to develop LLMs, often riddled with numerous challenges such as frequent hardware failures, intricate parallelization strategies, and imbalanced resource utilization. In this paper, we present an in-depth characterization study of a six-month LLM development workload trace collected from our GPU datacenter Acme. Specifically, we investigate discrepancies between LLMs and prior task-specific Deep Learning (DL) workloads, explore resource utilization patterns, and identify the impact of various job failures. Our analysis summarizes hurdles we encountered and uncovers potential opportunities to optimize systems tailored for LLMs. Furthermore, we introduce our system efforts: (1) fault-tolerant pretraining , which enhances fault tolerance through LLM-involved failure diagnosis and automatic recovery. (2) decoupled scheduling for evaluation , which achieves timely performance feedback via trial decomposition and scheduling optimization.
papers.abstract_zh: 大型语言模型 (LLM) 在多项变革性任务中表现出了令人印象深刻的性能。然而，高效利用大规模集群资源来开发LLM并非易事，常常面临硬件故​​障频繁、并行策略复杂、资源利用不平衡等诸多挑战。在本文中，我们对从 GPU 数据中心 Acme 收集的为期六个月的 LLM 开发工作负载跟踪进行了深入的特征研究。具体来说，我们调查法学硕士与先前特定任务的深度学习 (DL) 工作负载之间的差异，探索资源利用模式，并确定各种作业失败的影响。我们的分析总结了我们遇到的障碍，并发现了优化专为法学硕士量身定制的系统的潜在机会。此外，我们介绍了我们的系统工作：（1）容错预训练，通过LLM涉及的故障诊断和自动恢复来增强容错能力。 (2)解耦调度评估，通过试验分解和调度优化实现及时的性能反馈。

papers.title: CHISEL: An optical slice of the wide-area network.
papers.abstract: Network slicing reserves a portion of the physical resources of radio access networks and makes them available to consumers. Slices guarantee traffic isolation, strict bandwidth and quality of service. However, the abstraction of slicing has been limited to access networks. We develop CHISEL, a system that dynamically carves slices of the wide-area network (WAN), enabling an end-to-end network slicing abstraction. CHISEL creates optical slices between WAN endpoints to avoid queueing and congestion delays inherent in packet switched paths in WANs. CHISEL incrementally allocates optical spectrum on long-haul fiber to provision slices. This task is made challenging by the co-existence of data-carrying channels on the fiber and numerous physical constraints associated with provisioning optical paths e.g., spectrum contiguity, continuity and optical reach constraints. CHISEL leverages the empirical finding that cloud WANs have abundant optical spectrum to spare — 75% of optical spectrum on 75% of fiber spans is unused. CHISEL can optimally allocate terabits of slice requests while consuming minimal optical spectrum within seconds without increasing spectral fragmentation on fiber. CHISEL trades-off optimality of slice bandwidth allocation for faster run-time, provisioning slices within 2% of optimal in less than 30 seconds in a commercial cloud WAN. Finally, CHISEL reduces the latency of provisioning optical slices on hardware by 10X. Compared to IP tunnels of equivalent capacity, CHISEL consumes 3.3X fewer router ports.
papers.abstract_zh: 网络切片保留了无线接入网络的一部分物理资源，并将其提供给消费者。切片保证流量隔离、严格的带宽和服务质量。然而，切片的抽象仅限于接入网络。我们开发了 CHISEL，这是一个动态划分广域网 (WAN) 切片的系统，从而实现端到端网络切片抽象。 CHISEL 在 WAN 端点之间创建光学切片，以避免 WAN 中数据包交换路径固有的排队和拥塞延迟。 CHISEL 在长距离光纤上增量分配光谱以配置切片。由于光纤上数据承载通道的共存以及与配置光路相关的众多物理限制（例如频谱连续性、连续性和光学范围限制），使这项任务变得具有挑战性。 CHISEL 利用了云 WAN 有丰富的备用光谱的经验发现 — 75% 的光纤跨度上有 75% 的光谱未使用。 CHISEL 可以优化分配太比特的切片请求，同时在几秒钟内消耗最少的光谱，而不会增加光纤上的光谱碎片。 CHISEL 会权衡切片带宽分配的最优性以换取更快的运行时间，在商业云 WAN 中不到 30 秒的时间内将切片配置在最优值的 2% 范围内。最后，CHISEL 将硬件上配置光学切片的延迟减少了 10 倍。与同等容量的 IP 隧道相比，CHISEL 消耗的路由器端口数减少了 3.3 倍。

papers.title: Cloud-LoRa: Enabling Cloud Radio Access LoRa Networks Using Reinforcement Learning Based Bandwidth-Adaptive Compression.
papers.abstract: The Cloud Radio Access Network (CRAN) architecture has been proposed as a way of addressing the network throughput and scalability challenges of large-scale LoRa networks. CRANs can improve network throughput by coherently combining signals, and scale to multiple channels by implementing the receivers in the cloud. However, in remote LoRa deployments, a CRAN's demand for high-backhaul bandwidths can be challenging to meet. Therefore, bandwidth-aware compression of LoRa samples is needed to reap the benefits of CRANs. We introduce Cloud-LoRa, the first practical CRAN for LoRa, that can detect sub-noise LoRa signals and perform bandwidth-adaptive compression. To the best of our knowledge, this is the first demonstration of CRAN for LoRa operating in real-time. We deploy Cloud-LoRa in an agricultural field over multiple days with USRP as the gateway. A cellular backhaul hotspot is then used to stream the compressed samples to a Microsoft Azure server. We demonstrate SNR gains of over 6 dB using joint multi-gateway decoding and over 2x throughput improvement using state-of-the-art receivers, enabled by CRAN in real-world deployments.
papers.abstract_zh: 云无线接入网络 (CRAN) 架构已被提出作为解决大规模 LoRa 网络的网络吞吐量和可扩展性挑战的一种方法。 CRAN 可以通过连贯地组合信号来提高网络吞吐量，并通过在云中实施接收器来扩展到多个通道。然而，在远程 LoRa 部署中，CRAN 对高回程带宽的需求可能难以满足。因此，需要对 LoRa 样本进行带宽感知压缩才能获得 CRAN 的优势。我们推出了 Cloud-LoRa，这是第一个适用于 LoRa 的实用 CRAN，它可以检测亚噪声 LoRa 信号并执行带宽自适应压缩。据我们所知，这是 LoRa 实时运行的 CRAN 的首次演示。我们以 USRP 作为网关，在农业领域部署了几天的 Cloud-LoRa。然后使用蜂窝回程热点将压缩样本流式传输到 Microsoft Azure 服务器。我们展示了使用联合多网关解码可实现超过 6 dB 的 SNR 增益，以及使用最先进的接收器可将吞吐量提高 2 倍以上，这一切均由 CRAN 在实际部署中实现。

papers.title: Cloudcast: High-Throughput, Cost-Aware Overlay Multicast in the Cloud.
papers.abstract: Bulk data replication across multiple cloud regions and providers is essential for large organizations to support data analytics, disaster recovery, and geo-distributed model serving. However, data multicast in the cloud can be expensive due to network egress costs and slow due to cloud network constraints. In this paper, we study the design of high-throughput, cost-optimized overlay multicast for bulk cloud data replication that exploits trends in modern provider pricing models along with techniques like ephemeral waypoints to minimize cloud networking costs. To that end, we design an optimization algorithm that uses information about cloud network throughput and pricing to identify cost-minimizing multicast replication trees under user-given runtime budgets. Our open-source implementation, Cloudcast, is used for cloud overlay multicast that supports pluggable algorithms for determining the multicast tree structure. Our evaluations show that Cloudcast achieves 61.5% cost reduction and 2.3× replication speedup compared to both academic and commercial baselines (e.g., AWS multi-region bucket) for multi-region replication.
papers.abstract_zh: 跨多个云区域和提供商的批量数据复制对于大型组织支持数据分析、灾难恢复和地理分布式模型服务至关重要。然而，由于网络出口成本，云中的数据多播可能会很昂贵，并且由于云网络限制而速度缓慢。在本文中，我们研究了用于批量云数据复制的高吞吐量、成本优化的覆盖多播的设计，该设计利用现代提供商定价模型的趋势以及临时路径点等技术来最大限度地降低云网络成本。为此，我们设计了一种优化算法，该算法使用有关云网络吞吐量和定价的信息来识别用户给定的运行时预算下成本最小化的多播复制树。我们的开源实现 Cloudcast 用于云覆盖多播，支持用于确定多播树结构的可插入算法。我们的评估显示，与多区域复制的学术和商业基准（例如 AWS 多区域存储桶）相比，Cloudcast 实现了 61.5% 的成本降低和 2.3 倍的复制加速。

papers.title: Cloudy with a Chance of Cyberattacks: Dangling Resources Abuse on Cloud Platforms.
papers.abstract: Recent works showed that it is feasible to hijack resources on cloud platforms. In such hijacks, attackers can take over released resources that belong to legitimate organizations. It was proposed that adversaries could abuse these resources to carry out attacks against customers of the hijacked services, e.g., through malware distribution. However, to date, no research has confirmed the existence of these attacks. We identify, for the first time, real-life hijacks of cloud resources. This yields a number of surprising and important insights. First, contrary to previous assumption that attackers primarily target IP addresses, our findings reveal that the type of resource is not the main consideration in a hijack. Attackers focus on hijacking records that allow them to determine the resource by entering freetext. The costs and overhead of hijacking such records are much lower than those of hijacking IP addresses, which are randomly selected from a large pool. Second, identifying hijacks poses a substantial challenge. Monitoring resource changes, e.g., changes in content, is insufficient, since such changes could also be legitimate. Retrospective analysis of digital assets to identify hijacks is also arduous due to the immense volume of data involved and the absence of indicators to search for. To address this challenge, we develop a novel approach that involves analyzing data from diverse sources to effectively differentiate between malicious and legitimate modifications. Our analysis has revealed 20,904 instances of hijacked resources on popular cloud platforms. While some hijacks are short-lived (up to 15 days), 1/3 persist for more than 65 days. We study how attackers abuse the hijacked resources and find that, in contrast to the threats considered in previous work, the majority of the abuse (75%) is blackhat search engine optimization. We also find fraudulent certificates and stolen cookies. We cluster the abuse resources and abuse content to identify about 1,800 individual attacking infrastructures.
papers.abstract_zh: 最近的工作表明劫持云平台上的资源是可行的。在此类劫持中，攻击者可以接管属于合法组织的已释放资源。有人提出，对手可以滥用这些资源，对被劫持服务的客户进行攻击，例如通过恶意软件分发。然而，迄今为止，还没有研究证实这些攻击的存在。我们首次发现现实生活中对云资源的劫持。这产生了许多令人惊讶且重要的见解。首先，与之前攻击者主要针对 IP 地址的假设相反，我们的研究结果表明，资源类型并不是劫持的主要考虑因素。攻击者专注于劫持记录，使他们能够通过输入自由文本来确定资源。劫持此类记录的成本和开销远低于劫持 IP 地址，因为 IP 地址是从大池中随机选择的。其次，识别劫持是一个巨大的挑战。监视资源变化（例如内容变化）是不够的，因为此类变化也可能是合法的。由于涉及大量数据且缺乏可供搜索的指标，对数字资产进行回顾性分析以识别劫持也很困难。为了应对这一挑战，我们开发了一种新颖的方法，该方法涉及分析来自不同来源的数据，以有效区分恶意修改和合法修改。我们的分析显示，流行云平台上有 20,904 个资源被劫持的实例。虽然有些劫持是短暂的（最多 15 天），但 1/3 的劫持持续时间超过 65 天。我们研究了攻击者如何滥用被劫持的资源，发现与之前的工作中考虑的威胁相比，大多数滥用（75％）是黑帽搜索引擎优化。我们还发现欺诈性证书和被盗的 cookie。我们对滥用资源和滥用内容进行聚类，以识别大约 1,800 个攻击基础设施的个人。

papers.title: Credence: Augmenting Datacenter Switch Buffer Sharing with ML Predictions.
papers.abstract: Packet buffers in datacenter switches are shared across all the switch ports in order to improve the overall throughput. The trend of shrinking buffer sizes in datacenter switches makes buffer sharing extremely challenging and a critical performance issue. Literature suggests that push-out buffer sharing algorithms have significantly better performance guarantees compared to drop-tail algorithms. Unfortunately, switches are unable to benefit from these algorithms due to lack of support for push-out operations in hardware. Our key observation is that drop-tail buffers can emulate push-out buffers if the future packet arrivals are known ahead of time. This suggests that augmenting drop-tail algorithms with predictions about the future arrivals has the potential to significantly improve performance. This paper is the first research attempt in this direction. We propose CREDENCE, a drop-tail buffer sharing algorithm augmented with machine-learned predictions. CREDENCE can unlock the performance only attainable by push-out algorithms so far. Its performance hinges on the accuracy of predictions. Specifically, CREDENCE achieves near-optimal performance of the best known push-out algorithm LQD (Longest Queue Drop) with perfect predictions, but gracefully degrades to the performance of the simplest drop-tail algorithm Complete Sharing when the prediction error gets arbitrarily worse. Our evaluations show that CREDENCE improves throughput by 1.5x compared to traditional approaches. In terms of flow completion times, we show that CREDENCE improves upon the state-of-the-art approaches by up to 95% using off-the-shelf machine learning techniques that are also practical in today’s hardware. We believe this work opens several interesting future work opportunities both in systems and theory that we discuss at the end of this paper.
papers.abstract_zh: 数据中心交换机中的数据包缓冲区在所有交换机端口之间共享，以提高整体吞吐量。数据中心交换机中缓冲区大小不断缩小的趋势使得缓冲区共享极具挑战性，并且成为一个关键的性能问题。文献表明，与 drop-tail 算法相比，推出缓冲区共享算法具有明显更好的性能保证。不幸的是，由于硬件中缺乏对推出操作的支持，交换机无法从这些算法中受益。我们的主要观察结果是，如果提前知道未来数据包的到达，则丢弃尾部缓冲区可以模拟推出缓冲区。这表明通过对未来到达的预测来增强落尾算法有可能显着提高性能。本文是该方向的首次研究尝试。我们提出了 CREDENCE，一种通过机器学习预测增强的尾部缓冲区共享算法。 CREDENCE 可以释放迄今为止只能通过推出算法才能实现的性能。其性能取决于预测的准确性。具体来说，CREDENCE 通过完美的预测实现了最著名的推出算法 LQD（最长队列丢弃）的近乎最佳性能，但当预测误差变得任意更差时，它的性能会优雅地降级到最简单的尾部丢弃算法完全共享的性能。我们的评估表明，与传统方法相比，CREDENCE 将吞吐量提高了 1.5 倍。在流程完成时间方面，我们表明，CREDENCE 使用现成的机器学习技术比最先进的方法提高了 95%，这些技术在当今的硬件中也很实用。我们相信这项工作在系统和理论方面开辟了一些有趣的未来工作机会，我们将在本文末尾讨论这些机会。

papers.title: Crescent: Emulating Heterogeneous Production Network at Scale.
papers.abstract: This paper presents the design, implementation, evaluation, and deployment of Crescent , ByteDance’s network emulation platform, for preventing change-induced network incidents. Inspired by prior art such as CrystalNet, Crescent achieves high fidelity by running switch vendor images inside containers. But, we explore a different route to scaling up the emulator with unique challenges. First, we analyze our past network incidents to reveal the difficulty in identifying a safe emulation boundary. Instead of emulating the entire network, we exploit the inherent symmetry and modularity of data center network architectures to strike a balance between coverage and resource cost. Second, we study the node-to-host assignment by formulating it as a graph partitioning problem. Evaluation results show that our partitioning algorithm reduces the testbed bootup time by up to 20× compared with random partitioning. Third, we developed an incremental approach to modify the emulated network on the fly. This approach can be 30× faster than creating a new testbed of the same scale. Crescent has been actively used for three and a half years, which led to a significant reduction in change-induced network incidents. We also share Crescent ’s success in many other use cases and the critical lessons learned from its deployment.
papers.abstract_zh: 本文介绍了字节跳动网络仿真平台 Crescent 的设计、实现、评估和部署，以防止变化引起的网络事件。受 CrystalNet 等现有技术的启发，Crescent 通过在容器内运行交换机供应商映像来实现高保真度。但是，我们探索了一条不同的途径来扩展模拟器，并面临独特的挑战。首先，我们分析过去的网络事件，以揭示识别安全模拟边界的困难。我们没有模拟整个网络，而是利用数据中心网络架构固有的对称性和模块化来在覆盖范围和资源成本之间取得平衡。其次，我们通过将节点到主机分配表示为图划分问题来研究节点到主机的分配。评估结果表明，与随机分区相比，我们的分区算法将测试床启动时间缩短了 20 倍。第三，我们开发了一种增量方法来动态修改模拟网络。这种方法比创建相同规模的新测试台快 30 倍。 Crescent 已被积极使用了三年半，导致变更引发的网络事件显着减少。我们还分享了 Crescent 在许多其他用例中的成功以及从其部署中汲取的重要经验教训。

papers.title: Cyclops: A Nanomaterial-based, Battery-Free Intraocular Pressure (IOP) Monitoring System inside Contact Lens.
papers.abstract: Intraocular pressure (IOP), commonly known as eye pressure, is a critical physiological parameter related to health. Contact lens-based IOP sensing has garnered significant attention in research. Existing research has been focusing on developing the sensor itself, so the techniques used to read sensing data only support a reading range of several centimeters, becoming the main obstacle for real-world deployment. This paper presents Cyclops, the first battery-free IOP sensing system integrated into a contact lens, which overcomes the proximity constraints of traditional reading methods. Cyclops features a three-layer antenna comprising two metallic layers and a nanomaterial-based sensing layer in between. This innovative antenna serves a dual purpose, functioning as both a pressure sensor and a communication antenna simultaneously. The antenna is connected to an RFID chip, which utilizes a low-power self-tuning circuit to achieve high-precision pressure sensing, akin to a 9-bit ADC. Extensive experimental results demonstrate that Cyclops supports communication at meter-level distances, and its IOP measurement accuracy surpasses that of commercial portable IOP measurement devices.
papers.abstract_zh: 眼压（IOP），俗称眼压，是与健康相关的重要生理参数。基于隐形眼镜的眼压传感在研究中引起了广泛关注。现有的研究一直集中在传感器本身的开发上，因此用于读取传感数据的技术仅支持几厘米的读取范围，成为实际部署的主要障碍。本文介绍了 Cyclops，这是第一个集成到隐形眼镜中的无电池 IOP 传感系统，它克服了传统阅读方法的近距离限制。 Cyclops 具有三层天线，包括两个金属层和中间的基于纳米材料的传感层。这种创新的天线具有双重用途，可同时用作压力传感器和通信天线。天线连接到RFID芯片，该芯片利用低功耗自调谐电路来实现高精度压力传感，类似于9位ADC。大量实验结果表明，Cyclops支持米级距离通信，其眼压测量精度超越商用便携式眼压测量设备。

papers.title: Democratizing Direct-to-Cell Low Earth Orbit Satellite Networks.
papers.abstract: Multi-tenant Low Earth Orbit (LEO) satellites emerge as a cost-effective win-win solution for direct 4G/5G access to our regular phones/IoTs anywhere on Earth. However, the current hop-by-hop stateful cellular session impedes this effort due to its need for tight functional coupling and stable service relationships among satellite operators, mobile operators, and users. Our empirical study with real satellite data shows that, it restricts LEO satellites' serviceable areas, limits the use of available (possibly competitive) satellites, and suffers from signaling storms and dynamic many-to-many relationships in extreme LEO mobility. We thus devise MOSAIC to strive for self-serve multi-tenant LEO satellites. MOSAIC defines policy-embedded one-time tokens for pay-as-you-go local satellite access. These tokens allow satellites to self-serve users anywhere without relying on remote mobile operators, alleviate inter-satellite coordinations to enjoy competitive satellites, and simplify many-to-many service relationships for on-demand multi-tenancy. MOSAIC is attack-resilient and incrementally deployable using our SIM-based solution. Our evaluations with the real satellite data and commodity 3GPP NTN protocol stack validate MOSAIC's viability.
papers.abstract_zh: 多租户低地球轨道 (LEO) 卫星成为一种经济高效的双赢解决方案，可直接 4G/5G 访问地球上任何地方的常规电话/物联网。然而，当前的逐跳状态蜂窝会话阻碍了这一努力，因为它需要卫星运营商、移动运营商和用户之间紧密的功能耦合和稳定的服务关系。我们对真实卫星数据的实证研究表明，它限制了低地球轨道卫星的服务范围，限制了可用（可能是竞争性）卫星的使用，并在极端低地球轨道移动性下遭受信号风暴和动态多对多关系的影响。因此，我们设计了 MOSAIC 来争取自助式多租户 LEO 卫星。 MOSAIC 定义了政策嵌入的一次性令牌，用于即用即付的本地卫星访问。这些令牌允许卫星在任何地方为用户提供自助服务，而无需依赖远程移动运营商，减轻卫星间协调以享受有竞争力的卫星，并简化按需多租户的多对多服务关系。 MOSAIC 具有抗攻击能力，并且可以使用我们基于 SIM 的解决方案进行增量部署。我们使用真实卫星数据和商用 3GPP NTN 协议栈进行的评估验证了 MOSAIC 的可行性。

papers.title: DINT: Fast In-Kernel Distributed Transactions with eBPF.
papers.abstract: Serializable distributed in-memory transactions are important building blocks for data center applications. To achieve high throughput and low latency, existing distributed transaction systems eschew the kernel networking stack and rely heavily on kernel-bypass networking techniques such as RDMA and DPDK. However, kernel-bypass networking techniques generally suffer from security, isolation, protection, maintainability, and debuggability issues, while the kernel networking stack supports these properties well, but performs poorly. We present DINT, a kernel networking stack-based distributed transaction system that achieves kernel-bypass-like throughput and latency. To gain the performance back under the kernel stack, DINT offloads frequent-path transaction operations directly into the kernel via eBPF techniques without kernel modifications or customized kernel modules, avoiding most of the kernel stack overheads. DINT does not lose the good properties of the kernel stack, as eBPF is a kernel-native technique on modern OSes. On typical transaction workloads, DINT even achieves up to 2.6× higher throughput than using a DPDK-based kernel-bypass stack, while only adding at most 10%/16% average/99th-tail unloaded latency.
papers.abstract_zh: 可串行化的分布式内存事务是数据中心应用程序的重要构建块。为了实现高吞吐量和低延迟，现有的分布式事务系统避开内核网络堆栈，并严重依赖内核旁路网络技术，例如 RDMA 和 DPDK。然而，内核绕过网络技术通常存在安全性、隔离性、保护性、可维护性和可调试性问题，而内核网络堆栈很好地支持这些属性，但性能较差。我们提出了 DINT，一种基于内核网络堆栈的分布式事务系统，可实现类似内核旁路的吞吐量和延迟。为了在内核堆栈下恢复性能，DINT 通过 eBPF 技术将频繁路径事务操作直接卸载到内核中，无需修改内核或定制内核模块，从而避免了大部分内核堆栈开销。 DINT 不会失去内核堆栈的良好特性，因为 eBPF 是现代操作系统上的内核本机技术。在典型的事务工作负载上，DINT 甚至比使用基于 DPDK 的内核旁路堆栈实现了高达 2.6 倍的吞吐量，同时仅增加最多 10%/16% 平均/第 99 尾卸载延迟。

papers.title: DISTMM: Accelerating Distributed Multimodal Model Training.
papers.abstract: Multimodal model training takes multiple types of inputs to process with differently structured submodules, and aggregates outcomes from the submodules to learn the relationship among various types of inputs, e.g., correlating text to image for text-to-image generation. The differences of submodule architectures as well as their inputs lead to heterogeneity in terms of computation efficiency. Failing to account for such heterogeneity, existing distributed training systems treat all submodules as a monolithic entity and thus have sub-optimal performance. Moreover, the outcome aggregation phase introduces cross-sample dependencies with contrasting positive and negative sample pairs (i.e., contrastive loss). Such dependencies make the existing pipeline parallelism scheduling algorithms not applicable for multimodal training with contrastive loss. To address the limitations of existing solutions, we propose DISTIMM. For a given multimodal model, DISTIMM exploits the heterogeneity among submodules, applying different distributed parallelism strategies for each submodule, e.g., using Tensor Parallelism for a computation-intensive submodule, and Data Parallelism for a submodule with a small number of parameters. DISTIMM balances the computation of parallelized submodules to reduce the computing resource idle time of waiting for the slowest submodule. DISTIMM further optimizes the locality of submodules by leveraging the heterogeneous bandwidth of interconnections among accelerators. To address the limitation of existing pipeline execution schedules, we propose a new pipeline execution primitive, called batch-sync instruction, and a corresponding schedule, called DISTIMM-Pipe. We build a prototype of DISTIMM and evaluate it with existing solutions on models with various sizes ranging from 1.1 billion to 26 billion parameters and observe 1.32-3.27 × speedup over Megatron-LM.
papers.abstract_zh: 多模态模型训练采用多种类型的输入来处理不同结构的子模块，并聚合子模块的结果以学习各种类型输入之间的关系，例如，将文本与图像关联起来以生成文本到图像。子模块架构及其输入的差异导致计算效率方面的异构性。由于未能考虑到这种异构性，现有的分布式训练系统将所有子模块视为一个整体实体，因此性能不佳。此外，结果聚合阶段引入了具有对比正负样本对的跨样本依赖性（即对比损失）。这种依赖性使得现有的管道并行调度算法不适用于具有对比损失的多模态训练。为了解决现有解决方案的局限性，我们提出了 DISTIMM。对于给定的多模态模型，DISTIMM利用子模块之间的异构性，为每个子模块应用不同的分布式并行策略，例如，对计算密集型子模块使用张量并行，对参数数量较少的子模块使用数据并行。 DISTIMM 平衡并行子模块的计算，以减少等待最慢子模块的计算资源空闲时间。 DISTIMM 通过利用加速器之间互连的异构带宽进一步优化子模块的局部性。为了解决现有管道执行调度的限制，我们提出了一种新的管道执行原语（称为批处理同步指令）和相应的调度（称为 DISTIMM-Pipe）。我们构建了 DISTIMM 原型，并使用现有解决方案在具有 11 亿到 260 亿个参数的各种规模的模型上对其进行评估，并观察到比 Megatron-LM 提高了 1.32-3.27 倍。

papers.title: EdgeRIC: Empowering Real-time Intelligent Optimization and Control in NextG Cellular Networks.
papers.abstract: Radio Access Networks (RAN) are increasingly softwarized and accessible via data-collection and control interfaces. RAN intelligent control (RIC) is an approach to manage these interfaces at different timescales. In this paper, we introduce EdgeRIC, a real-time RIC co-located with the Distributed Unit (DU). It is decoupled from the RAN stack, and operates at the RAN timescale. EdgeRIC serves as the seat of real-time AI-in-the-loop for decision and control. It can access RAN and application-level information to execute AI-optimized and other policies in real-time (sub-millisecond). We demonstrate that EdgeRIC operates as if embedded within the RAN stack. We showcase RT applications called μ Apps over EdgeRIC that significantly outperforms a cloud-based near real-time RIC (> 15 ms latency) in terms of attained system throughput. Further, our over-the-air experiments with AI-based policies showcase their resilience to channel dynamics. Remarkably, these AI policies outperform model-based strategies by 5% to 25% in both system throughput and end user application-level benchmarks across diverse mobile scenarios.
papers.abstract_zh: 无线接入网络 (RAN) 日益软件化，并且可以通过数据收集和控制接口进行访问。 RAN 智能控制 (RIC) 是一种在不同时间尺度管理这些接口的方法。在本文中，我们介绍了 EdgeRIC，这是一种与分布式单元 (DU) 共置的实时 RIC。它与 RAN 堆栈解耦，并在 RAN 时间尺度上运行。 EdgeRIC 充当实时人工智能在环决策和控制的基础。它可以访问 RAN 和应用程序级信息，以实时（亚毫秒）执行 AI 优化和其他策略。我们演示了 EdgeRIC 的运行方式就像嵌入在 RAN 堆栈中一样。我们展示了名为 μ Apps over EdgeRIC 的 RT 应用程序，其在获得的系统吞吐量方面显着优于基于云的近实时 RIC（> 15 毫秒延迟）。此外，我们对基于人工智能的政策进行的无线实验展示了它们对渠道动态的适应能力。值得注意的是，这些人工智能策略在不同移动场景的系统吞吐量和最终用户应用程序级基准方面均优于基于模型的策略 5% 至 25%。

papers.title: Efficient Exposure of Partial Failure Bugs in Distributed Systems with Inferred Abstract States.
papers.abstract: Many distributed system failures, especially the notorious partial service failures, are caused by bugs that are only triggered by subtle faults at rare timing. Existing testing is inefficient in exposing such bugs. This paper presents Legolas, a fault injection testing framework designed to address this gap. To precisely simulate subtle faults, Legolas statically analyzes the system code and instruments hooks within a system. To efficiently explore numerous faults, Legolas introduces a novel notion of abstract states and automatically infers abstract states from code. During testing, Legolas designs an algorithm that leverages the inferred abstract states to make careful fault injection decisions. We applied Legolas on the latest releases of six popular, extensively tested distributed systems. Legolas found 20 new bugs that result in partial service failures.
papers.abstract_zh: 许多分布式系统故障，尤其是臭名昭著的部分服务故障，都是由错误引起的，这些错误仅由罕见的细微故障触发。现有的测试在暴露此类错误方面效率低下。本文介绍了 Legolas，这是一个旨在解决这一差距的故障注入测试框架。为了精确模拟细微的故障，Legolas 静态分析系统内的系统代码和工具钩子。为了有效地探索众多故障，Legolas 引入了一种新颖的抽象状态概念，并自动从代码中推断出抽象状态。在测试过程中，Legolas 设计了一种算法，利用推断的抽象状态来做出谨慎的故障注入决策。我们在六种流行的、经过广泛测试的分布式系统的最新版本上应用了 Legolas。 Legolas 发现了 20 个导致部分服务失败的新错误。

papers.title: Empower Programmable Pipeline for Advanced Stateful Packet Processing.
papers.abstract: Programmable pipeline offers flexible and high-throughput packet processing capability, but only to some extent. When more advanced dataplane functions beyond basic packet processing and forwarding are desired, the pipeline becomes handicapped. The fundamental reason is that most stateful operations require backward cross-stage data passing and pipeline stalling for state update and consistency, which are anomalous to a standard pipeline. To solve the problem, we augment the pipeline with a low-cost, yet fast side ring to facilitate the backward data passing. We further apply the speculative execution technique to avoid pipeline stalling. The resulting architecture, RAPID, supports native and generic stateful function programming using the enhanced P4 language. We build an FPGA-based prototype to evaluate the system, and a software emulator to assess the cost and performance of an ASIC implementation. We realize several stateful applications enabled by RAPID to show how it extends a programmable dataplane's potential to a new level.
papers.abstract_zh: 可编程管道提供灵活和高吞吐量的数据包处理能力，但只是在一定程度上。当需要超出基本数据包处理和转发的更高级数据平面功能时，管道就会受到阻碍。根本原因是大多数有状态操作需要向后跨阶段数据传递和管道停顿以实现状态更新和一致性，这对于标准管道来说是异常的。为了解决这个问题，我们用低成本但快速的侧环来增强管道，以促进向后数据传递。我们进一步应用推测执行技术来避免管道停顿。由此产生的架构 RAPID 支持使用增强型 P4 语言的本机和通用有状态函数编程。我们构建了一个基于 FPGA 的原型来评估系统，并构建了一个软件仿真器来评估 ASIC 实施的成本和性能。我们实现了 RAPID 支持的多个有状态应用程序，以展示它如何将可编程数据平面的潜力扩展到新的水平。

papers.title: EPVerifier: Accelerating Update Storms Verification with Edge-Predicate.
papers.abstract: Data plane verification is designed to automatically verify network correctness by directly analyzing the data plane. Recent data plane verifiers have achieved sub-millisecond verification for per rule update by partitioning packets into equivalence classes (ECs). A large number of data plane updates can be generated in a short interval, known as update storms , due to network events such as end-to-end establishments, disruption or recovery. When it comes to update storms, however, the verification speed of current EC-based methods is often slowed down by the maintenance of their EC-based network model (EC-model). This paper presents EPVerifier, a fast, partitioned data plane verification for update storms to further accelerate update storms verification. EPVerifier uses a novel edge-predicate-based (EP-based) local modeling approach to avoid drastic oscillations of the EC-model caused by changes in the set of equivalence classes. In addition, with local EPs, EPVerifier can achieve a partition of verification tasks by switches that EC-based methods cannot to get better parallel performance. We implement EPVerifier as an easy-to-use tool, allowing users to quickly get the appropriate verification results at any moment by providing necessary input. Both dataset trace-driven simulations and deployments in the wild show that EPVerifier achieves robustly fast update storm verification and superior parallel performance and these advantages expand with the data plane's complexity and storm size growth. The verification time of EPVerifier for an update storm of size 1M is around 10s on average, a 2-10× improvement over the state-of-the-art.
papers.abstract_zh: 数据平面验证旨在通过直接分析数据平面来自动验证网络的正确性。最近的数据平面验证器通过将数据包划分为等价类 (EC)，实现了每个规则更新的亚毫秒级验证。由于端到端建立、中断或恢复等网络事件，可能会在短时间内产生大量数据平面更新，称为更新风暴。然而，当涉及到更新风暴时，当前基于 EC 的方法的验证速度往往会因为维护其基于 EC 的网络模型（EC-model）而减慢。本文提出了 EPVerifier，一种针对更新风暴的快速分区数据平面验证，以进一步加速更新风暴验证。 EPVerifier 使用一种新颖的基于边缘谓词（基于 EP）的局部建模方法来避免等价类集的变化引起的 EC 模型的剧烈振荡。此外，借助本地EP，EPVerifier可以通过切换来实现基于EC的方法无法实现的验证任务划分，从而获得更好的并行性能。我们将 EPVerifier 实现为一个易于使用的工具，允许用户通过提供必要的输入随时快速获得适当的验证结果。数据集跟踪驱动的模拟和野外部署都表明 EPVerifier 实现了稳健的快速更新风暴验证和卓越的并行性能，并且这些优势随着数据平面的复杂性和风暴规模的增长而扩展。 EPVerifier 对于 1M 大小的更新风暴的验证时间平均约为 10 秒，比现有技术提高了 2-10 倍。

papers.title: ExChain: Exception Dependency Analysis for Root Cause Diagnosis.
papers.abstract: Many failures in large-scale online services stem from incorrect handling of exceptions. We focus on exception-handling failures characterized by three features that make them difficult to diagnose using classical techniques: (1) implicit dependencies across multiple exceptions due to state changes; (2) silent code handling without logging; and (3) separation (in code and in time) between the root cause exception and the failure manifestation. In this paper, we present the design and implementation of ExChain, a framework that helps developers diagnose such exception-dependent failures in test/canary deployment environments. ExChain constructs causal links between exceptions even in the presence of the aforementioned factors. Our key observation is that mishandled exceptions invariably modify critical system states, which impact downstream functions. A key challenge in tracking these states is balancing the tradeoff between performance overhead and accuracy. To this end, ExChain uses state-impact analysis to establish potential causal links between exceptions and uses a novel hybrid taint tracking approach for tracking state propagation. Using ExChain, we were able to successfully identify the root cause for 8 out of 11 reported subtle exception-dependent failures in 10 popular applications. ExChain significantly outperforms state-of-art approaches, while producing several orders of magnitude fewer false positives. ExChain also offers significantly better accuracy-performance tradeoffs relative to baseline static/dynamic analysis alternatives.
papers.abstract_zh: 大规模在线服务的许多故障都源于对异常的错误处理。我们重点关注异常处理故障，其特征在于三个特征，这些特征使得使用经典技术难以诊断它们：（1）由于状态变化而导致多个异常之间的隐式依赖关系； (2) 不记录代码的静默代码处理； (3)根本原因异常和故障表现之间的分离（在代码和时间上）。在本文中，我们介绍了 ExChain 的设计和实现，该框架可帮助开发人员在测试/金丝雀部署环境中诊断此类与异常相关的故障。即使存在上述因素，ExChain 也会在异常之间构建因果关系。我们的主要观察结果是，错误处理的异常总是会修改关键系统状态，从而影响下游功能。跟踪这些状态的一个关键挑战是平衡性能开销和准确性之间的权衡。为此，ExChain 使用状态影响分析来建立异常之间的潜在因果关系，并使用一种新颖的混合污点跟踪方法来跟踪状态传播。使用 ExChain，我们能够成功识别 10 个流行应用程序中 11 个报告的微妙异常相关故障中的 8 个的根本原因。 ExChain 的性能显着优于最先进的方法，同时误报率降低了几个数量级。相对于基线静态/动态分析替代方案，ExChain 还提供了明显更好的准确性与性能权衡。

papers.title: Fast Vector Query Processing for Large Datasets Beyond GPU Memory with Reordered Pipelining.
papers.abstract: Vector query processing powers a wide range of AI applications. While GPUs are optimized for massive vector operations, today's practice relies on CPUs to process queries for large vector datasets, due to limited GPU memory. We present RUMMY, the first GPU-accelerated vector query processing system that achieves high performance and supports large vector datasets beyond GPU memory. The core of RUMMY is a novel reordered pipelining technique that exploits the characteristics of vector query processing to efficiently pipeline data transmission from host memory to GPU memory and query processing in GPU. Specifically, it leverages three ideas: (i) cluster-based retrofitting to eliminate redundant data transmission across queries in a batch, (ii) dynamic kernel padding with cluster balancing to maximize spatial and temporal GPU utilization for GPU computation, and (iii) query-aware reordering and grouping to optimally overlap transmission and computation. We also tailor GPU memory management for vector queries to reduce GPU memory fragmentation and cache misses. We evaluate RUMMY with a variety of billion-scale benchmarking datasets. The experimental results show that RUMMY outperforms IVF-GPU with CUDA unified memory by up to 135×. Compared to the CPU-based solution (with 64 vCPUs), RUMMY (with one NVIDIA A100 GPU) achieves up to 23.1× better performance and is up to 37.7× more cost-effective.
papers.abstract_zh: 矢量查询处理为广泛的人工智能应用提供支持。虽然 GPU 针对大规模矢量运算进行了优化，但由于 GPU 内存有限，当今的实践依赖于 CPU 来处理大型矢量数据集的查询。我们推出 RUMMY，这是第一个 GPU 加速的矢量查询处理系统，它实现了高性能并支持超出 GPU 内存的大型矢量数据集。 RUMMY的核心是一种新颖的重新排序流水线技术，它利用向量查询处理的特点，高效地流水线式地将数据从主机内存传输到GPU内存并在GPU中进行查询处理。具体来说，它利用了三个想法：（i）基于集群的改造，以消除批量查询中的冗余数据传输，（ii）具有集群平衡的动态内核填充，以最大限度地提高 GPU 计算的空间和时间 GPU 利用率，以及（iii）查询感知重新排序和分组，以最佳地重叠传输和计算。我们还为向量查询定制 GPU 内存管理，以减少 GPU 内存碎片和缓存未命中。我们使用各种数十亿规模的基准数据集来评估 RUMMY。实验结果表明，RUMMY 的性能比带有 CUDA 统一内存的 IVF-GPU 提高了 135 倍。与基于 CPU 的解决方案（具有 64 个 vCPU）相比，RUMMY（具有 1 个 NVIDIA A100 GPU）的性能提高了 23.1 倍，成本效益提高了 37.7 倍。

papers.title: Finding Adversarial Inputs for Heuristics using Multi-level Optimization.
papers.abstract: Production systems use heuristics because they are faster or scale better than their optimal counterparts. Yet, practitioners are often unaware of the performance gap between a heuristic and the optimum or between two heuristics in realistic scenarios. MetaOpt is a system that helps analyze these heuristics. Users specify the heuristic and the optimal (or another heuristic) as input, and MetaOpt encodes these efficiently for a solver to find performance gaps and their corresponding adversarial inputs. Its suite of built-in optimizations helps it scale to practical problem sizes. We used MetaOpt to analyze heuristics from three domains (traffic engineering, vector bin packing, and packet scheduling). We found a production traffic engineering heuristic can require 30\% more capacity than the optimal in realistic cases. We modified the heuristic based on the patterns in the adversarial inputs MetaOpt discovered and reduced the performance gap by 12.5×. We examined adversarial inputs to a vector bin packing heuristic and proved a new lower bound on its performance.
papers.abstract_zh: 生产系统使用启发式方法，因为它们比最佳对应系统更快或可扩展性更好。然而，从业者常常没有意识到启发式方法与最优方法之间或现实场景中两种启发式方法之间的性能差距。 MetaOpt 是一个帮助分析这些启发式方法的系统。用户指定启发式和最优（或其他启发式）作为输入，MetaOpt 对这些进行有效编码，以便求解器找到性能差距及其相应的对抗性输入。其内置优化套件有助于扩展到实际问题的规模。我们使用 MetaOpt 来分析三个领域的启发式方法（流量工程、向量装箱和数据包调度）。我们发现生产流量工程启发式需要的容量比实际情况下的最佳容量多 30%。我们根据 MetaOpt 发现的对抗性输入模式修改了启发式，并将性能差距缩小了 12.5 倍。我们检查了向量箱打包启发式的对抗性输入，并证明了其性能的新下限。

papers.title: Flow Scheduling with Imprecise Knowledge.
papers.abstract: Most existing data center network (DCN) flow scheduling solutions aim to minimize flow completion times (FCT). However, these solutions either require precise flow information (e.g., per-flow size), which is challenging to implement on commodity switches (e.g., pFabric), or no prior flow information at all, which is at the cost of performance (e.g., PIAS). In this work, we present QCLIMB, a new flow scheduling solution designed to minimize FCT by utilizing imprecise flow information. Our key observation is that although obtaining precise flow information can be challenging, it is possible to accurately estimate each flow's lower and upper bounds with machine learning techniques. QCLIMB has two key parts: i) a novel scheduling algorithm that leverages the lower bounds of different flows to prioritize small flow over large flows from the beginning of transmission, rather than at later stages; and ii) an efficient out-of-order handling mechanism that addresses practical reordering issues resulting from the algorithm. We show that QCLIMB significantly outperforms PIAS (88% lower average FCT of small flows) and is surprisingly close to pFabric (around 9% gap) while not requiring any switch modifications.
papers.abstract_zh: 大多数现有的数据中心网络 (DCN) 流调度解决方案旨在最大限度地减少流完成时间 (FCT)。然而，这些解决方案要么需要精确的流信息（例如，每个流的大小），这在商用交换机（例如，pFabric）上实现具有挑战性，要么根本不需要先前的流信息，这以性能为代价（例如，PIAS）。在这项工作中，我们提出了 QCLIMB，这是一种新的流调度解决方案，旨在通过利用不精确的流信息来最小化 FCT。我们的主要观察结果是，尽管获得精确的流量信息可能具有挑战性，但可以通过机器学习技术准确估计每个流量的下限和上限。 QCLIMB 有两个关键部分：i) 一种新颖的调度算法，该算法利用不同流的下限，从传输开始时（而不是在后期阶段）将小流优先于大流； ii) 一种高效的乱序处理机制，可解决算法产生的实际重新排序问题。我们表明，QCLIMB 的性能显着优于 PIAS（小流量的平均 FCT 低 88%），并且令人惊讶地接近 pFabric（大约 9% 的差距），同时不需要任何开关修改。

papers.title: Gemino: Practical and Robust Neural Compression for Video Conferencing.
papers.abstract: Video conferencing systems suffer from poor user experience when network conditions deteriorate because current video codecs simply cannot operate at extremely low bitrates. Recently, several neural alternatives have been proposed that reconstruct talking head videos at very low bitrates using sparse representations of each frame such as facial landmark information. However, these approaches produce poor reconstructions in scenarios with major movement or occlusions over the course of a call, and do not scale to higher resolutions. We design Gemino, a new neural compression system for video conferencing based on a novel high-frequency-conditional super-resolution pipeline. Gemino upsamples a very low-resolution version of each target frame while enhancing high-frequency details (e.g., skin texture, hair, etc.) based on information extracted from a single high-resolution reference image. We use a multi-scale architecture that runs different components of the model at different resolutions, allowing it to scale to resolutions comparable to 720p, and we personalize the model to learn specific details of each person, achieving much better fidelity at low bitrates. We implement Gemino atop aiortc, an open-source Python implementation of WebRTC, and show that it operates on 1024x1024 videos in real-time on a Titan X GPU, and achieves 2.2–5x lower bitrate than traditional video codecs for the same perceptual quality.
papers.abstract_zh: 当网络条件恶化时，视频会议系统的用户体验会很差，因为当前的视频编解码器根本无法在极低的比特率下运行。最近，已经提出了几种神经替代方案，使用每帧的稀疏表示（例如面部标志信息）以非常低的比特率重建头部说话视频。然而，这些方法在通话过程中发生重大移动或遮挡的场景中会产生较差的重建效果，并且无法扩展到更高分辨率。我们设计了 Gemino，这是一种基于新颖的高频条件超分辨率管道的新型视频会议神经压缩系统。 Gemino 对每个目标帧的极低分辨率版本进行上采样，同时根据从单个高分辨率参考图像中提取的信息增强高频细节（例如皮肤纹理、头发等）。我们使用多尺度架构，以不同的分辨率运行模型的不同组件，使其能够扩展到与 720p 相当的分辨率，并且我们对模型进行个性化以了解每个人的具体细节，从而在低比特率下实现更好的保真度。我们在 aiortc（WebRTC 的开源 Python 实现）之上实现了 Gemino，并表明它可以在 Titan X GPU 上实时处理 1024x1024 视频，并且在相同的感知质量下实现比传统视频编解码器低 2.2-5 倍的比特率。

papers.title: GRACE: Loss-Resilient Real-Time Video through Neural Codecs.
papers.abstract: In real-time video communication, retransmitting lost packets over high-latency networks is not viable due to strict latency requirements. To counter packet losses without retransmission, two primary strategies are employed—encoder-based forward error correction (FEC) and decoder-based error concealment. The former encodes data with redundancy before transmission, yet determining the optimal redundancy level in advance proves challenging. The latter reconstructs video from partially received frames, but dividing a frame into independently coded partitions inherently compromises compression efficiency, and the lost information cannot be effectively recovered by the decoder without adapting the encoder. We present a loss-resilient real-time video system called GRACE, which preserves the user’s quality of experience (QoE) across a wide range of packet losses through a new neural video codec. Central to GRACE’s enhanced loss resilience is its joint training of the neural encoder and decoder under a spectrum of simulated packet losses . In lossless scenarios, GRACE achieves video quality on par with conventional codecs (e.g., H.265). As the loss rate escalates, GRACE exhibits a more graceful, less pronounced decline in quality, consistently outperforming other loss-resilient schemes. Through extensive evaluation on various videos and real network traces, we demonstrate that GRACE reduces undecodable frames by 95% and stall duration by 90% compared with FEC, while markedly boosting video quality over error concealment methods. In a user study with 240 crowdsourced participants and 960 subjective ratings, GRACE registers a 38% higher mean opinion score (MOS) than other baselines.
papers.abstract_zh: 在实时视频通信中，由于严格的延迟要求，通过高延迟网络重传丢失的数据包是不可行的。为了在不重传的情况下防止数据包丢失，采用了两种主要策略：基于编码器的前向纠错 (FEC) 和基于解码器的错误隐藏。前者在传输前对数据进行冗余编码，但提前确定最佳冗余级别具有挑战性。后者从部分接收的帧中重建视频，但将帧划分为独立编码的分区本质上会损害压缩效率，并且在不调整编码器的情况下解码器无法有效恢复丢失的信息。我们提出了一种名为 GRACE 的抗丢失实时视频系统，它通过新的神经视频编解码器在各种数据包丢失情况下保持用户的体验质量 (QoE)。 GRACE 增强的丢包恢复能力的核心是在一系列模拟丢包情况下对神经编码器和解码器进行联合训练。在无损场景中，GRACE 可以实现与传统编解码器（例如 H.265）相当的视频质量。随着丢失率的上升，GRACE 表现出更优雅、更不明显的质量下降，始终优于其他抗丢失方案。通过对各种视频和真实网络跟踪的广泛评估，我们证明与 FEC 相比，GRACE 减少了 95% 的不可解码帧，并将停顿持续时间减少了 90%，同时与错误隐藏方法相比，显着提高了视频质量。在一项包含 240 名众包参与者和 960 项主观评分的用户研究中，GRACE 的平均意见得分 (MOS) 比其他基线高 38%。

papers.title: Habitus: Boosting Mobile Immersive Content Delivery through Full-body Pose Tracking and Multipath Networking.
papers.abstract: Delivering immersive content such as volumetric videos and virtual/mixed reality requires tremendous network bandwidth. Millimeter Wave (mmWave) radios such as 802.11ad/ay and mmWave 5G can provide multi-Gbps peak bandwidth, making them good candidates. However, mmWave is vulnerable to blockage/mobility and its signal attenuates very fast, posing a major challenge to mobile immersive content delivery systems where viewers are in constant motion and the human body may easily block the line-of-sight. To overcome this challenge, in this paper, we investigate two under-explored dimensions. First, we use the combination of a viewer’s full-body pose and the network information to predict mmWave performance as the viewer exercises six-degree-of-freedom (6-DoF) motion. We apply both offline and online transfer learning to enable the prediction models to react to unseen changes during initial training. Second, we jointly use the omnidirectional radio and mmWave radio available on commodity mobile devices, which have complementary network characteristics, to deliver immersive data. We integrate the above two features into a user-space software framework called Habitus, and demonstrate how it can be easily integrated into existing immersive content delivery systems to boost their network performance, which leads to up to 72% of quality-of-experience (QoE) improvement
papers.abstract_zh: 提供体积视频和虚拟/混合现实等沉浸式内容需要巨大的网络带宽。 802.11ad/ay 和毫米波 5G 等毫米波 (mmWave) 无线电可以提供数 Gbps 峰值带宽，使其成为良好的候选者。然而，毫米波很容易受到阻塞/移动的影响，而且其信号衰减非常快，这对移动沉浸式内容传输系统构成了重大挑战，因为观看者不断运动，人体很容易遮挡视线。为了克服这一挑战，在本文中，我们研究了两个尚未探索的维度。首先，我们结合观看者的全身姿势和网络信息来预测观看者进行六自由度 (6-DoF) 运动时的毫米波性能。我们应用离线和在线迁移学习，使预测模型能够对初始训练期间未见的变化做出反应。其次，我们联合使用商用移动设备上可用的全向无线电和毫米波无线电（它们具有互补的网络特性）来提供沉浸式数据。我们将上述两个功能集成到名为 Habitus 的用户空间软件框架中，并演示如何将其轻松集成到现有的沉浸式内容交付系统中，以提升其网络性能，从而将体验质量 (QoE) 提高高达 72%

papers.title: Hairpin: Rethinking Packet Loss Recovery in Edge-based Interactive Video Streaming.
papers.abstract: Interactive streaming requires minimizing stuttering events (or deadline misses for video frames) to ensure seamless interaction between users and applications. However, existing packet loss recovery mechanisms uniformly optimize redundancy for initial transmission and retransmission, which still could not satisfy the delay requirements of interactive streaming, but also introduces considerable bandwidth costs. Our insight is that in edge-based interactive streaming, differentiating retransmissions on redundancy settings can often achieve a low bandwidth cost and a low deadline miss rate simultaneously. In this paper, we propose Hairpin, a new packet loss recovery mechanism for edge-based interactive streaming. Hairpin finds the optimal combination of data packets, retransmissions, and redundant packets over multiple rounds of transmissions, which significantly reduces the bandwidth cost while ensuring the end-to-end latency requirement. Experiments with production deployments demonstrate that Hairpin can simultaneously reduce the bandwidth cost by 40% and the deadline miss rate by 32% on average in the wild against state-of-the-art solutions.
papers.abstract_zh: 交互式流媒体需要最大限度地减少卡顿事件（或视频帧的截止日期错过），以确保用户和应用程序之间的无缝交互。然而，现有的丢包恢复机制对初传和重传统一优化冗余，仍然无法满足交互流的时延要求，而且还引入了相当大的带宽成本。我们的见解是，在基于边缘的交互式流媒体中，区分冗余设置的重传通常可以同时实现低带宽成本和低截止期限错过率。在本文中，我们提出了 Hairpin，一种用于基于边缘的交互式流媒体的新的丢包恢复机制。 Hairpin在多轮传输中找到数据包、重传和冗余包的最佳组合，在保证端到端延迟要求的同时，显着降低带宽成本。生产部署实验表明，与最先进的解决方案相比，Hairpin 可以同时将带宽成本平均降低 40%，并将截止日期错过率平均降低 32%。

papers.title: Harmonic: Hardware-assisted RDMA Performance Isolation for Public Clouds.
papers.abstract: Performance isolation is essential for sharing resources in multi-tenant public clouds. Compared with traditional kernel-based networking, RDMA presents unique challenges especially because RDMA NIC's complex microarchitecture resources are often hidden from users. Current RDMA isolation methods overlook these microarchitecture resources, leading to insufficient performance isolation. Consequently, a faulty/malicious tenant can exploit these microarchitecture resources to compromise well-behaved tenants' network performance. In this paper, we introduce the first microarchitecture-resource-aware RDMA performance isolation solution for public clouds, Harmonic. It consists of two key components designed to be conscious of the RDMA NIC's microarchitectural resources: (1) a programmable intelligent PCIe switch (prototyped with FPGA) and (2) an RDMA-friendly rate limiter. At runtime, these two components allow us to accurately monitor and modulate the RDMA NIC resource usage per tenant. We evaluate Harmonic with a state-of-the-art RDMA performance isolation test suite (Husky) and a popular in-memory database application (Redis). We demonstrate that Harmonic can not only successfully pass Husky but also provide Redis with 1.4× higher throughput than the best alternative isolation solution.
papers.abstract_zh: 性能隔离对于在多租户公共云中共享资源至关重要。与传统的基于内核的网络相比，RDMA 提出了独特的挑战，特别是因为 RDMA NIC 复杂的微架构资源通常对用户隐藏。目前的RDMA隔离方法忽略了这些微架构资源，导致性能隔离不足。因此，有缺陷/恶意的租户可以利用这些微架构资源来损害表现良好的租户的网络性能。在本文中，我们介绍了第一个适用于公共云的微架构资源感知 RDMA 性能隔离解决方案 Harmonic。它由两个关键组件组成，旨在了解 RDMA NIC 的微架构资源：(1) 可编程智能 PCIe 交换机（采用 FPGA 原型）和 (2) RDMA 友好的速率限制器。在运行时，这两个组件使我们能够准确监控和调整每个租户的 RDMA NIC 资源使用情况。我们使用最先进的 RDMA 性能隔离测试套件 (Husky) 和流行的内存数据库应用程序 (Redis) 来评估 Harmonic。我们证明 Harmonic 不仅可以成功通过 Husky，还可以为 Redis 提供比最佳替代隔离解决方案高 1.4 倍的吞吐量。

papers.title: Harmony: A Congestion-free Datacenter Architecture.
papers.abstract: Datacenter networks today provide best-effort delivery—messages may observe unpredictable queueing, delays, and drops due to switch buffer overflows within the network. Such weak guarantees reduce the set of assumptions that system designers can rely upon from the network, thus introducing inefficiency and complexity in host hardware and software. We present Harmony, a datacenter network architecture that provides powerful "congestion-free" message delivery guarantees—each message, once transmitted by the sender, observes bounded queueing at each switch in the network. Thus, network delays are bounded in failure-free scenarios, and congestion-related drops are completely eliminated. We establish, both theoretically and empirically, that Harmony provides such powerful guarantees with near-zero overheads compared to best-effort delivery networks: it incurs a tiny additive latency overhead that diminishes with message sizes, while achieving near-optimal network utilization.
papers.abstract_zh: 如今的数据中心网络提供尽力而为的传送，由于网络内交换机缓冲区溢出，消息可能会出现不可预测的排队、延迟和丢弃。这种弱保证减少了系统设计者可以依赖网络的假设集，从而导致主机硬件和软件的低效率和复杂性。我们推出了 Harmony，这是一种数据中心网络架构，它提供强大的“无拥塞”消息传递保证——每条消息一旦被发送者传输，就会在网络中的每个交换机上观察有界排队。因此，网络延迟在无故障情况下受到限制，并且完全消除了与拥塞相关的丢包。我们从理论上和经验上都证明，与尽力而为的交付网络相比，Harmony 提供了如此强大的保证，且开销接近于零：它会产生微小的附加延迟开销，该开销随着消息大小而减小，同时实现接近最佳的网络利用率。

papers.title: Harvesting Idle Memory for Application-managed Soft State with Midas.
papers.abstract: Many applications can benefit from data that increases performance but is not required for correctness (commonly referred to as soft state ). Examples include cached data from backend web servers and memoized computations in data analytics systems. Today's systems generally statically limit the amount of memory they use for storing soft state in order to prevent unbounded growth that could exhaust the server's memory. Static provisioning, however, makes it difficult to respond to shifts in application demand for soft state and can leave significant amounts of memory idle.
