Existing OS kernels can only spend idle memory on caching disk blocks—which may not have the most utility—because they do not provide the right abstractions to safely allow applications to store their own soft state. To effectively manage and dynamically scale soft state, we propose soft memory , an elastic virtual memory abstraction with unmap-and-reconstruct semantics that makes it possible for applications to use idle memory to store whatever soft state they choose while guaranteeing both safety and efficiency. We present Midas, a soft memory management system that contains (1) a runtime that is linked to each application to manage soft memory objects and (2) OS kernel support that coordinates soft memory allocation between applications to maximize their performance. Our experiments with four real-world applications show that Midas can efficiently and safely harvest idle memory to store applications' soft state, delivering near-optimal application performance and responding to extreme memory pressure without running out of memory.
papers.abstract_zh: 许多应用程序可以从提高性能但不需要正确性的数据中受益（通常称为软状态）。示例包括来自后端 Web 服务器的缓存数据和数据分析系统中的记忆计算。当今的系统通常静态地限制用于存储软状态的内存量，以防止无限制的增长，从而耗尽服务器的内存。然而，静态配置使得响应应用程序对软状态的需求变化变得困难，并且可能导致大量内存空闲。现有的操作系​​统内核只能将空闲内存用于缓存磁盘块，这可能没有最大的实用性，因为它们没有提供正确的抽象来安全地允许应用程序存储自己的软状态。为了有效管理和动态扩展软状态，我们提出了软内存，这是一种具有取消映射和重构语义的弹性虚拟内存抽象，使应用程序可以使用空闲内存来存储它们选择的任何软状态，同时保证安全性和效率。我们提出了 Midas，一种软内存管理系统，它包含 (1) 链接到每个应用程序以管理软内存对象的运行时，以及 (2) 操作系统内核支持，用于协调应用程序之间的软内存分配以最大限度地提高其性能。我们对四个实际应用程序的实验表明，Midas 可以高效、安全地收集空闲内存来存储应用程序的软状态，提供接近最佳的应用程序性能并响应极端的内存压力，而不会耗尽内存。

papers.title: Horus: Granular In-Network Task Scheduler for Cloud Datacenters.
papers.abstract: Short-lived tasks are prevalent in modern interactive datacenter applications. However, designing schedulers to assign these tasks to workers distributed across the whole datacenter is challenging, because such schedulers need to make decisions at a microsecond scale, achieve high throughput, and minimize the tail response time. Current task schedulers in the literature are limited to individual racks. We present Horus, a new in-network task scheduler for short tasks that operates at the datacenter scale. Horus efficiently tracks and distributes the worker state among switches, which enables it to schedule tasks in parallel at line rate while optimizing the scheduling quality. We propose a new distributed task scheduling policy that minimizes the state and communication overheads, handles dynamic loads, and does not buffer tasks in switches. We compare Horus against the state-of-the-art in-network scheduler in a testbed with programmable switches as well as using simulations of datacenters with more than 27K hosts and thousands of switches handling diverse and dynamic workloads. Our results show that Horus efficiently scales to large datacenters, and it substantially outperforms the state-of-the-art across all performance metrics, including tail response time and throughput.
papers.abstract_zh: 短期任务在现代交互式数据中心应用程序中普遍存在。然而，设计调度程序将这些任务分配给分布在整个数据中心的工作人员具有挑战性，因为此类调度程序需要在微秒级做出决策，实现高吞吐量，并最大限度地缩短尾部响应时间。当前文献中的任务调度程序仅限于单个机架。我们推出了 Horus，这是一种新的网络内任务调度程序，用于在数据中心规模运行的短任务。 Horus 有效地跟踪和分配交换机之间的工作状态，这使其能够以线速并行调度任务，同时优化调度质量。我们提出了一种新的分布式任务调度策略，可以最大限度地减少状态和通信开销，处理动态负载，并且不在交换机中缓冲任务。我们在具有可编程交换机的测试台上将 Horus 与最先进的网络内调度程序进行比较，并使用具有超过 27K 主机和数千台交换机的数据中心模拟来处理各种动态工作负载。我们的结果表明，Horus 可以有效地扩展到大型数据中心，并且在所有性能指标（包括尾响应时间和吞吐量）上都远远优于最先进的技术。

papers.title: iStack: A General and Stateful Name-based Protocol Stack for Named Data Networking.
papers.abstract: Named Data Networking (NDN) shifts the network from host-centric to data-centric with a clean-slate design, in which packet forwarding is based on names, and the data plane maintains per-packet state. Different forwarders have been implemented to provide NDN capabilities for various scenarios, however, there is a lack of a network stack that is integrated with operating systems (OS) for general purpose. Designing a stateful and entirely name-based protocol stack in OS kernel remains a challenge due to three factors: (i) an in-kernel name resolution architecture for packet demultiplexing is necessary, (ii) an entirely name-based stack requires to be compatible with the current address (MAC/IP/port)-based architecture in OS kernel, and (iii) maintaining per-packet state introduces a trade-off between performance and resource consumption. In this paper, for the first time, we take NDN into OS kernel by proposing iStack, an Information-Centric Networking (ICN) protocol stack. The main innovations of iStack are threefold. First, we propose a name resolution architecture to support both network-layer forwarding and local packet demultiplexing. Second, a two-layer face system is proposed to provide abstraction of address-based network interfaces. Third, we design socket-compatible interfaces to keep the uniformity of current network stack in OS. Besides, we design compact forwarding data structures for fast packet processing with low memory footprint. We have implemented prototypes on multiple platforms. The evaluation results show that iStack achieves 6.50 Gbps throughput, outperforming the NDN-testbed forwarder by a factor of 16.25x, and reduces 46.08% forwarding latency for cached packets with its inkernel packet caching. iStack is not just another forwarder for NDN, but a step forward for practical development of ICN.
papers.abstract_zh: 命名数据网络 (NDN) 通过全新的设计将网络从以主机为中心转变为以数据为中心，其中数据包转发基于名称，数据平面维护每个数据包的状态。已经实现了不同的转发器来为各种场景提供NDN功能，但是，缺乏与通用操作系统（OS）集成的网络堆栈。由于以下三个因素，在操作系统内核中设计一个有状态且完全基于名称的协议栈仍然是一个挑战：(i) 用于数据包解复用的内核内名称解析架构是必要的，(ii) 完全基于名称的协议栈需要与操作系统内核中当前基于地址（MAC/IP/端口）的架构兼容，以及 (iii) 维护每个数据包状态需要在性能和资源消耗之间进行权衡。在本文中，我们首次通过提出 iStack（一种以信息为中心的网络（ICN）协议栈）将 NDN 纳入操作系统内核。 iStack的主要创新有三个方面。首先，我们提出了一个名称解析架构来支持网络层转发和本地数据包解复用。其次，提出了一个两层人脸系统来提供基于地址的网络接口的抽象。第三，我们设计了套接字兼容的接口，以保持操作系统中当前网络堆栈的一致性。此外，我们设计了紧凑的转发数据结构，以低内存占用实现快速数据包处理。我们已经在多个平台上实现了原型。评估结果显示，iStack 实现了 6.50 Gbps 的吞吐量，是 NDN 测试床转发器的 16.25 倍，并通过其内核数据包缓存将缓存数据包的转发延迟降低了 46.08%。 iStack不仅仅是NDN的又一个转发器，更是ICN实际发展的一个进步。

papers.title: Jolteon: Unleashing the Promise of Serverless for Serverless Workflows.
papers.abstract: Serverless computing promises automatic resource provisioning to relieve the burden of developers. Yet, developers still have to manually configure resources on current serverless platforms to satisfy application-level requirements. This is because cloud applications are orchestrated as serverless workflows with multiple stages, exhibiting a complex relationship between resource configuration and application requirements. We propose Jolteon, an orchestrator to unleash the promise of automatic resource provisioning for serverless workflows. At the core of Jolteon is a stochastic performance model that combines the benefits of whitebox modeling to capture the execution characteristics of serverless computing and blackbox modeling to accommodate the inherent performance variability. We formulate a chance constrained optimization problem based on the performance model, and exploit sampling and convexity to find optimal resource configurations that satisfy user-defined cost or latency bounds. We implement a system prototype of Jolteon and evaluate it on AWS Lambda with a variety of serverless workflows. The experimental results show that Jolteon outperforms the state-of-the-art solution, Orion, by up to 2.3× on cost and 2.1× on latency.
papers.abstract_zh: 无服务器计算承诺自动资源配置，以减轻开发人员的负担。然而，开发人员仍然需要在当前的无服务器平台上手动配置资源来满足应用程序级别的需求。这是因为云应用程序被编排为具有多个阶段的无服务器工作流程，表现出资源配置和应用程序需求之间的复杂关系。我们提出了 Jolteon，这是一个协调器，可以释放无服务器工作流程自动资源配置的希望。 Jolteon 的核心是随机性能模型，它结合了白盒建模的优点来捕获无服务器计算的执行特征和黑盒建模的优点以适应固有的性能变化。我们根据性能模型制定机会约束优化问题，并利用采样和凸性来找到满足用户定义的成本或延迟界限的最佳资源配置。我们实现了 Jolteon 的系统原型，并在 AWS Lambda 上使用各种无服务器工作流程对其进行评估。实验结果表明，Jolteon 的成本优于最先进的解决方案 Orion，高达 2.3 倍，延迟高达 2.1 倍。

papers.title: Klonet: an Easy-to-Use and Scalable Platform for Computer Networks Education.
papers.abstract: Currently, one of the simplest and most effective ways for people to gain an in-depth understanding of computer networks is through hands-on practice and experimentation on software platforms. While education is important for the field of computer networks, existing platforms are inadequate in usability and scalability, failing to fully meet all the teaching needs of computer networking education. This paper describes our experiences in designing and using Klonet, an emulation platform for computer networking education. Klonet is easy-to-use for both students and tutors, which has been carefully designed to lower the barrier to use, thus making the practice more efficient. Klonet also demonstrates good scalability . It adopts a container-based distributed architecture and a virtual network embedding algorithm customized for this platform. Evaluation experiments show that Klonet exhibits better scalability, such as supporting more students with fewer hardware resources ( i.e. , servers) and deploying virtual network topologies more quickly. Furthermore, to ensure stability during teaching, Klonet enhances the robustness of its upper orchestrator and underlying virtual networks. So far, Klonet has been adopted in 3 universities and 4 courses, serving more than 800 students. We showcase Klonet's usefulness in networking education with real use cases, including a scenario with ~10,000 emulated routers. We also share our lessons learned from the 4 years of Klonet development and 2 years of operations.
papers.abstract_zh: 目前，人们深入了解计算机网络最简单、最有效的方法之一就是通过软件平台的动手实践和实验。教育对于计算机网络领域十分重要，但现有平台在可用性和可扩展性方面存在不足，未能完全满足计算机网络教育的全部教学需求。本文介绍了我们设计和使用 Klonet（计算机网络教育仿真平台）的经验。 Klonet对于学生和导师来说都易于使用，经过精心设计，降低了使用门槛，从而使练习更加高效。 Klonet还表现出了良好的可扩展性。它采用基于容器的分布式架构以及为本平台定制的虚拟网络嵌入算法。评估实验表明，Klonet表现出更好的可扩展性，例如用更少的硬件资源（即服务器）支持更多的学生以及更快地部署虚拟网络拓扑。此外，为了保证教学过程中的稳定性，Klonet增强了上层编排器和底层虚拟网络的鲁棒性。截至目前，Klonet已在3所大学、4个课程中采用，服务超过800名学生。我们通过实际用例展示了 Klonet 在网络教育中的实用性，其中包括约 10,000 个模拟路由器的场景。我们还分享了 Klonet 4 年开发和 2 年运营的经验教训。

papers.title: Known Knowns and Unknowns: Near-realtime Earth Observation Via Query Bifurcation in Serval.
papers.abstract: Earth observation satellites, in low Earth orbits, are increasingly approaching near-continuous imaging of the Earth. Today, these satellites capture an image of every part of Earth every few hours. However, the networking capabilities haven’t caught up, and can introduce delays of few hours to days in getting these images to Earth. While this delay is acceptable for delay-tolerant applications like land cover maps, crop type identification, etc., it is unacceptable for latency-sensitive applications like forest fire detection or disaster monitoring. We design Serval to enable near-realtime insights from Earth imagery for latency-sensitive applications despite the networking bottlenecks by leveraging the emerging computational capabilities on the satellites and ground stations. The key challenge for our work stems from the limited computational capabilities and power resources available on a satellite. We solve this challenge by leveraging predictability in satellite orbits to bifurcate computation across satellites and ground stations. We evaluate Serval using trace-driven simulations and hardware emulations on a dataset comprising ten million images captured using the Planet Dove constellation comprising nearly 200 satellites. Serval reduces end-to-end latency for high priority queries from 71.71 hours (incurred by state of the art) to 2 minutes, and 90-th percentile from 149 hours to 47 minutes.
papers.abstract_zh: 近地轨道上的地球观测卫星越来越接近对地球进行近乎连续的成像。如今，这些卫星每隔几个小时就会捕获地球各个部分的图像。然而，网络能力还没有跟上，并且可能会导致这些图像到达地球时延迟几小时到几天。虽然这种延迟对于土地覆盖图、作物类型识别等延迟容忍的应用程序是可以接受的，但对于森林火灾检测或灾害监测等延迟敏感的应用程序来说，这是不可接受的。我们设计 Serval 的目的是通过利用卫星和地面站上新兴的计算能力，尽管存在网络瓶颈，但仍可以从地球图像中获得近乎实时的洞察，从而满足对延迟敏感的应用程序的需求。我们工作的主要挑战源于卫星上可用的计算能力和电力资源有限。我们通过利用卫星轨道的可预测性来跨卫星和地面站进行分叉计算来解决这一挑战。我们使用跟踪驱动的模拟和硬件模拟对包含近 200 颗卫星的 Planet Dove 星座捕获的一千万张图像的数据集进行评估。 Serval 将高优先级查询的端到端延迟从 71.71 小时（由最先进的技术产生）减少到 2 分钟，将第 90 个百分点的延迟从 149 小时减少到 47 分钟。

papers.title: LDB: An Efficient Latency Profiling Tool for Multithreaded Applications.
papers.abstract: Maintaining low tail latency is critical for the efficiency and performance of large-scale datacenter systems. Software bugs that cause tail latency problems, however, are notoriously difficult to debug. We present LDB, a new latency profiling tool that aims to overcome this challenge by precisely identifying the specific functions that are responsible for tail latency anomalies. LDB observes the latency of all functions in a running program. It uses a novel, software-only technique called stack sampling, where a busy-spinning stack scanner thread polls lightweight metadata recorded in the call stack, shifting tracing costs away from program threads. In addition, LDB uses event tagging to record requests, inter-thread synchronization, and context switching. This can be used, for example, to generate per-request timelines and to find the root cause of complex tail latency problems such as lock contention in multi-threaded programs. We evaluate LDB with three datacenter applications, finding latency problems in each. Our results further show that LDB produces actionable insights, has low overhead, and can rapidly analyze recordings, making it feasible to use in production settings.
papers.abstract_zh: 保持低尾部延迟对于大规模数据中心系统的效率和性能至关重要。然而，导致尾部延迟问题的软件错误非常难以调试。我们推出了 LDB，这是一种新的延迟分析工具，旨在通过精确识别导致尾部延迟异常的特定函数来克服这一挑战。 LDB 观察正在运行的程序中所有函数的延迟。它使用一种称为堆栈采样的新颖的纯软件技术，其中繁忙的堆栈扫描器线程轮询调用堆栈中记录的轻量级元数据，从而将跟踪成本从程序线程中转移出来。此外，LDB使用事件标记来记录请求、线程间同步和上下文切换。例如，这可以用于生成每个请求的时间线并查找复杂尾部延迟问题（例如多线程程序中的锁争用）的根本原因。我们使用三个数据中心应用程序评估 LDB，发现每个应用程序中的延迟问题。我们的结果进一步表明，LDB 可以产生可操作的见解，开销较低，并且可以快速分析记录，使其可以在生产环境中使用。

papers.title: Leo: Online ML-based Traffic Classification at Multi-Terabit Line Rate.
papers.abstract: Online traffic classification enables critical applications such as network intrusion detection and prevention, providing Quality-of-Service, and real-time IoT analytics. However, with increasing network speeds, it has become extremely challenging to analyze and classify traffic online. In this paper, we present Leo, a system for online traffic classification at multi-terabit line rates. At its core, Leo implements an online machine learning (ML) model for traffic classification, namely the decision tree, in the network switch's data plane. Leo's design is fast (can classify packets at switch's line rate), scalable (can automatically select a resource-efficient design for the class of decision tree models a user wants to support), and runtime programmable (the model can be updated on-the-fly without switch downtime), while achieving high model accuracy. We implement Leo on top of Intel Tofino switches. Our evaluations show that Leo is able to classify traffic at line rate with nominal latency overhead, can scale to model sizes more than twice as large as state-of-the-art data plane ML classification systems, while achieving classification accuracy on-par with an offline traffic classifier.
papers.abstract_zh: 在线流量分类支持网络入侵检测和预防等关键应用，提供服务质量和实时物联网分析。然而，随着网络速度的提高，在线分析和分类流量变得极具挑战性。在本文中，我们提出了 Leo，一个用于多太比特线路速率的在线流量分类的系统。 Leo 的核心是在网络交换机的数据平面中实现用于流量分类的在线机器学习 (ML) 模型，即决策树。 Leo's design is fast (can classify packets at switch's line rate), scalable (can automatically select a resource-efficient design for the class of decision tree models a user wants to support), and runtime programmable (the model can be updated on-the-fly without switch downtime), while achieving high model accuracy.我们在 Intel Tofino 交换机之上实施 Leo。我们的评估表明，Leo 能够以标称延迟开销的线速对流量进行分类，可以扩展到比最先进的数据平面 ML 分类系统大两倍以上的模型大小，同时实现与离线流量分类器相当的分类精度。

papers.title: LiFteR: Unleash Learned Codecs in Video Streaming with Loose Frame Referencing.
papers.abstract: Video codecs are essential for video streaming. While traditional codecs like AVC and HEVC are successful, learned codecs built on deep neural networks (DNNs) are gaining popularity due to their superior coding efficiency and quality of experience (QoE) in video streaming. However, using learned codecs built with sophisticated DNNs in video streaming leads to slow decoding and low frame rate, thereby degrading the QoE. The fundamental problem is the tight frame referencing design adopted by most codecs, which delays the processing of the current frame until its immediate predecessor frame is reconstructed. To overcome this limitation, we propose LiFteR, a novel video streaming system that operates a learned video codec with loose frame referencing (LFR). LFR is a unique frame referencing paradigm that redefines the reference relation between frames and allows parallelism in the learned video codec to boost the frame rate. LiFteR has three key designs: (i) the LFR video dispatcher that routes video data to the codec based on LFR, (ii) LFR learned codec that enhances coding efficiency in LFR with minimal impact on decoding speed, and (iii) streaming supports that enables adaptive bitrate streaming with learned codecs in existing infrastructures. In our evaluation, LiFteR consistently outperforms existing video streaming systems. Compared to the existing best-performing learned and traditional systems, LiFteR demonstrates up to 23.8% and 19.7% QoE gain, respectively. Furthermore, LiFteR achieves up to a 3.2× frame rate improvement through frame rate configuration.
papers.abstract_zh: 视频编解码器对于视频流至关重要。虽然 AVC 和 HEVC 等传统编解码器很成功，但基于深度神经网络 (DNN) 的学习编解码器因其在视频流中卓越的编码效率和体验质量 (QoE) 而越来越受欢迎。然而，在视频流中使用通过复杂的 DNN 构建的学习编解码器会导致解码速度慢和帧速率低，从而降低 QoE。根本问题是大多数编解码器采用的严格帧参考设计，这会延迟当前帧的处理，直到重建其直接前驱帧。为了克服这一限制，我们提出了 LiFteR，这是一种新颖的视频流系统，它运行具有松散帧参考（LFR）的学习视频编解码器。 LFR 是一种独特的帧引用范例，它重新定义了帧之间的引用关系，并允许学习的视频编解码器中的并行性以提高帧速率。 LiFteR 具有三个关键设计：(i) LFR 视频调度程序，将视频数据路由到基于 LFR 的编解码器；(ii) LFR 学习编解码器，可提高 LFR 中的编码效率，同时对解码速度的影响最小；(iii) 流支持，可在现有基础设施中使用学习编解码器实现自适应比特率流。在我们的评估中，LiFteR 始终优于现有的视频流系统。与现有性能最佳的学习系统和传统系统相比，LiFteR 的 QoE 分别提高了 23.8% 和 19.7%。此外，LiFteR 通过帧率配置实现了高达 3.2 倍的帧率提升。

papers.title: LitePred: Transferable and Scalable Latency Prediction for Hardware-Aware Neural Architecture Search.
papers.abstract: Hardware-Aware Neural Architecture Search (NAS) has demonstrated success in automating the design of affordable deep neural networks (DNNs) for edge platforms by incorporating inference latency in the search process. However, accurately and efficiently predicting DNN inference latency on diverse edge platforms remains a significant challenge. Current approaches require several days to construct new latency predictors for each one platform, which is prohibitively time-consuming and impractical. In this paper, we propose LitePred, a lightweight approach for accurately predicting DNN inference latency on new platforms with minimal adaptation data by transferring existing predictors. LitePred builds on two key techniques: (i) a Variational Autoencoder (VAE) data sampler to sample high-quality training and adaptation data that conforms to the model distributions in NAS search spaces, overcoming the out-of-distribution challenge; and (ii) a latency distribution-based similarity detection method to identify the most similar pre-existing latency predictors for the new target platform, reducing adaptation data required while achieving high prediction accuracy. Extensive experiments on 85 edge platforms and 6 NAS search spaces demonstrate the effectiveness of our approach, achieving an average latency prediction accuracy of 99.3% with less than an hour of adaptation cost. Compared with SOTA platform-specific methods, LitePred achieves up to 5.3% higher accuracy with a significant 50.6× reduction in profiling cost. Code and predictors are available at https://github.com/microsoft/Moonlit/tree/main/LitePred .
papers.abstract_zh: 硬件感知神经架构搜索 (NAS) 通过在搜索过程中纳入推理延迟，成功地为边缘平台实现了经济实惠的深度神经网络 (DNN) 的自动化设计。然而，准确有效地预测不同边缘平台上的 DNN 推理延迟仍然是一个重大挑战。当前的方法需要几天的时间来为每个平台构建新的延迟预测器，这是非常耗时且不切实际的。在本文中，我们提出了 LitePred，这是一种轻量级方法，通过转移现有预测器，以最少的适应数据准确预测新平台上的 DNN 推理延迟。 LitePred 基于两项关键技术：(i) 变分自动编码器 (VAE) 数据采样器，用于采样符合 NAS 搜索空间中模型分布的高质量训练和适应数据，克服分布外的挑战； (ii)基于延迟分布的相似性检测方法，用于识别新目标平台最相似的预先存在的延迟预测器，减少所需的适应数据，同时实现高预测精度。在 85 个边缘平台和 6 个 NAS 搜索空间上进行的大量实验证明了我们方法的有效性，以不到一小时的适应成本实现了 99.3% 的平均延迟预测精度。与 SOTA 平台特定方法相比，LitePred 的准确度提高了 5.3%，分析成本显着降低了 50.6 倍。代码和预测器可在 https://github.com/microsoft/Moonlit/tree/main/LitePred 获取。

papers.title: Load is not what you should balance: Introducing Prequal.
papers.abstract: We present PReQuaL (Probing to Reduce Queuing and Latency) , a load balancer for distributed multi-tenant systems. PReQuaL is designed to minimize real-time request latency in the presence of heterogeneous server capacities and non-uniform, time-varying antagonist load. To achieve this, PReQuaL actively probes server load and leverages the power of d choices paradigm , extending it with asynchronous and reusable probes. Cutting against received wisdom, PReQuaL does not balance CPU load, but instead selects servers according to estimated latency and active requests-in-flight (RIF). We explore the major design features of PReQuaL on a testbed system and describe our experience using it to balance load within YouTube, where it has been running for more than a year. PReQuaL has dramatically decreased tail latency, error rates, and resource use, enabling YouTube and other production systems at Google to run at much higher utilization.
papers.abstract_zh: 我们推出了 PReQuaL（探索减少排队和延迟），这是一种用于分布式多租户系统的负载均衡器。 PReQuaL 旨在最大限度地减少存在异构服务器容量和非均匀、时变对抗负载的情况下的实时请求延迟。为了实现这一目标，PReQuaL 主动探测服务器负载并利用 d 选择范式的强大功能，通过异步和可重用的探测对其进行扩展。与人们普遍认为的相反，PReQuaL 并不平衡 CPU 负载，而是根据估计的延迟和动态请求 (RIF) 选择服务器。我们在测试台系统上探索了 PReQuaL 的主要设计功能，并描述了我们使用它来平衡 YouTube 内负载的经验，它已经在 YouTube 上运行了一年多。 PReQuaL 显着降低了尾部延迟、错误率和资源使用，使 YouTube 和 Google 的其他生产系统能够以更高的利用率运行。

papers.title: LoLKV: The Logless, Linearizable, RDMA-based Key-Value Storage System.
papers.abstract: We present LoLKV, a novel logless replicated key-value storage system. LoLKV follows a fundamentally different approach for designing a linearizable key-value storage system compared to state-of-the-art systems. LoLKV forgoes the classical log-based design and uses lock-free approach to allow multiple threads to concurrently update objects. It presents a novel leader election and consolidation approach to handle complex failure scenarios. LoLKV’s followers are passive, reducing their overall CPU usage. Our evaluation shows that LoLKV achieves 1.7–10× higher throughput and 20–92% lower tail latency than other state-of-the-art low-latency key-value stores.
papers.abstract_zh: 我们推出了 LoLKV，一种新颖的无日志复制键值存储系统。与最先进的系统相比，LoLKV 遵循一种根本不同的方法来设计线性化键值存储系统。 LoLKV放弃了经典的基于日志的设计，并使用无锁的方法来允许多个线程并发更新对象。它提出了一种新颖的领导者选举和整合方法来处理复杂的故障场景。 LoLKV 的追随者是被动的，减少了他们的整体 CPU 使用率。我们的评估表明，与其他最先进的低延迟键值存储相比，LoLKV 的吞吐量提高了 1.7–10 倍，尾部延迟降低了 20–92%。

papers.title: LuoShen: A Hyper-Converged Programmable Gateway for Multi-Tenant Multi-Service Edge Clouds.
papers.abstract: Edge clouds are expected to be a key revenue growth driver for cloud vendors in the next decade; however, simply replicating the network infrastructure for the public cloud to the edge experiences deployment issues. At the edge, the challenge for cloud network design is to deliver the required performance under the stringent restrictions of hardware budget and deployment footprints, while retaining functionality equivalence. To this end, we propose LuoShen , a hyper-converged gateway for multi-tenant multi-service edge clouds by consolidating the entire cloud network infrastructure into a 2U server switch with a P4-centric architecture. At the data plane, LuoShen conducts pipeline folding and fits the original overlay and underlay devices into the switch pipeline via meticulous on-chip resource budgeting. At the control plane, LuoShen relies on BGP peering to ensure inter-component reachability. LuoShen achieves 1.2Tbps throughput and reduces the upfront cost, deployment size and power usage by 75%, 87%, 60%, compared with the original cloud network architecture. It has been deployed in Alibaba Cloud at hundreds of edge sites.
papers.abstract_zh: 边缘云预计将成为未来十年云厂商收入增长的关键驱动力；然而，简单地将公共云的网络基础设施复制到边缘会遇到部署问题。在边缘，云网络设计面临的挑战是在硬件预算和部署占用空间的严格限制下提供所需的性能，同时保持功能等效性。为此，我们提出了洛神，一种用于多租户多服务边缘云的超融合网关，通过将整个云网络基础设施整合到具有以P4为中心的架构的2U服务器交换机中。在数据层面，洛神进行了管线折叠，通过细致的片上资源预算，将原有的Overlay和Underlay设备纳入到交换管线中。在控制平面，LuoShen依靠BGP对等互连来确保组件间的可达性。洛神实现了1.2Tbps的吞吐量，与原有云网络架构相比，前期成本、部署规模和功耗分别降低了75%、87%、60%。目前已部署在阿里云数百个边缘站点。

papers.title: MadEye: Boosting Live Video Analytics Accuracy with Adaptive Camera Configurations.
papers.abstract: Camera orientations (i.e., rotation and zoom) govern the content that a camera captures in a given scene, which in turn heavily influences the accuracy of live video analytics pipelines. However, existing analytics approaches leave this crucial adaptation knob untouched, instead opting to only alter the way that captured images from fixed orientations are encoded, streamed, and analyzed. We present MadEye, a camera-server system that automatically and continually adapts orientations to maximize accuracy for the workload and resource constraints at hand. To realize this using commodity pan-tilt-zoom (PTZ) cameras, MadEye embeds (1) a search algorithm that rapidly explores the massive space of orientations to identify a fruitful subset at each time, and (2) a novel knowledge distillation strategy to efficiently (with only camera resources) select the ones that maximize workload accuracy. Experiments on diverse workloads show that MadEye boosts accuracy by 2.9-25.7% for the same resource usage, or achieves the same accuracy with 2-3.7× lower resource costs.
papers.abstract_zh: 相机方向（即旋转和缩放）控制相机在给定场景中捕获的内容，这反过来又严重影响实时视频分析管道的准确性。然而，现有的分析方法并未触及这一关键的适应旋钮，而是选择仅改变从固定方向捕获的图像的编码、流式传输和分析方式。我们推出了 MadEye，这是一种相机服务器系统，可以自动、持续地调整方向，以最大程度地提高当前工作负载和资源限制的准确性。为了使用商用云台变焦 (PTZ) 摄像头实现这一目标，MadEye 嵌入了 (1) 一种搜索算法，可快速探索巨大的方向空间，以便每次识别出丰富的子集；(2) 一种新颖的知识提炼策略，可有效（仅使用摄像头资源）选择能够最大限度提高工作负载准确性的知识提炼策略。对不同工作负载的实验表明，在相同的资源使用情况下，MadEye 将准确率提高了 2.9-25.7%，或者在资源成本降低 2-3.7 倍的情况下实现了相同的准确率。

papers.title: Making Kernel Bypass Practical for the Cloud with Junction.
papers.abstract: Kernel bypass systems have demonstrated order of magnitude improvements in throughput and tail latency for network-intensive applications relative to traditional operating systems (OSes). To achieve such excellent performance, however, they rely on dedicated resources ( e.g., spinning cores, pinned memory) and require application rewriting. This is unattractive to cloud operators because they aim to densely pack applications, and rewriting cloud software requires a massive investment of valuable developer time. For both reasons, kernel bypass, as it exists, is impractical for the cloud. In this paper, we show these compromises are not necessary to unlock the full benefits of kernel bypass. We present Junction, the first kernel bypass system that can pack thousands of instances on a machine while providing compatibility with unmodified Linux applications. Junction achieves high density through several advanced NIC features that reduce pinned memory and the overhead of monitoring large numbers of queues. It maintains compatibility with minimal overhead through optimizations that exploit a shared address space with the application. Junction scales to 19–62× more instances than existing kernel bypass systems and can achieve similar or better performance without code changes. Furthermore, Junction delivers significant performance benefits to applications previously unsupported by kernel bypass, including those that depend on runtime systems like Go, Java, Node, and Python. In a comparison to native Linux, Junction increases throughput by 1.6–7.0× while using 1.2–3.8× less cores across seven applications.
papers.abstract_zh: 与传统操作系统 (OS) 相比，内核旁路系统已证明网络密集型应用程序的吞吐量和尾部延迟有数量级的改进。然而，为了实现如此出色的性能，它们依赖于专用资源（例如，旋转核心、固定内存）并且需要重写应用程序。这对于云运营商来说没有吸引力，因为他们的目标是密集打包应用程序，而重写云软件需要投入大量宝贵的开发时间。由于这两个原因，现有的内核旁路对于云来说是不切实际的。在本文中，我们展示了这些妥协对于释放内核绕过的全部优势来说并不是必要的。我们推出了 Junction，这是第一个内核旁路系统，可以在一台机器上打包数千个实例，同时提供与未修改的 Linux 应用程序的兼容性。 Junction 通过多种先进的 NIC 功能实现高密度，这些功能减少了固定内存和监视大量队列的开销。它通过利用与应用程序共享的地址空间的优化，以最小的开销保持兼容性。 Junction 的实例数量比现有内核旁路系统多 19-62 倍，并且无需更改代码即可实现类似或更好的性能。此外，Junction 为以前不受内核旁路支持的应用程序提供了显着的性能优势，包括那些依赖于 Go、Java、Node 和 Python 等运行时系统的应用程序。与原生 Linux 相比，Junction 将吞吐量提高了 1.6–7.0 倍，同时在 7 个应用程序中使用的内核数减少了 1.2–3.8 倍。

papers.title: MegaScale: Scaling Large Language Model Training to More Than 10, 000 GPUs.
papers.abstract: We present the design, implementation and engineering experience in building and deploying MegaScale, a production system for training large language models (LLMs) at the scale of more than 10,000 GPUs. Training LLMs at this scale brings unprecedented challenges to training efficiency and stability. We take a full-stack approach that co-designs the algorithmic and system components across model block and optimizer design, computation and communication overlapping, operator optimization, data pipeline, and network performance tuning. Maintaining high efficiency throughout the training process (i.e., stability) is an important consideration in production given the long extent of LLM training jobs. Many hard stability issues only emerge at large scale, and in-depth observability is the key to address them. We develop a set of diagnosis tools to monitor system components and events deep in the stack, identify root causes, and derive effective techniques to achieve fault tolerance and mitigate stragglers. MegaScale achieves 55.2% Model FLOPs Utilization (MFU) when training a 175B LLM model on 12,288 GPUs, improving the MFU by 1.34x compared to Megatron-LM. We share our operational experience in identifying and fixing failures and stragglers. We hope by articulating the problems and sharing our experience from a systems perspective, this work can inspire future LLM systems research.
papers.abstract_zh: 我们展示了构建和部署 MegaScale 的设计、实施和工程经验，MegaScale 是一个用于训练超过 10,000 个 GPU 规模的大型语言模型 (LLM) 的生产系统。如此规模的法学硕士培训给培训效率和稳定性带来了前所未有的挑战。我们采用全栈方法，跨模型块和优化器设计、计算和通信重叠、操作员优化、数据管道和网络性能调整来共同设计算法和系统组件。鉴于LLM培训工作的范围很长，在整个培训过程中保持高效率（即稳定性）是生产中的一个重要考虑因素。许多硬稳定性问题只会大规模出现，而深入的可观测性是解决这些问题的关键。我们开发了一套诊断工具来监控堆栈深处的系统组件和事件，识别根本原因，并得出有效的技术来实现容错并减少掉队的情况。在 12,288 个 GPU 上训练 175B LLM 模型时，MegaScale 实现了 55.2% 的模型 FLOP 利用率 (MFU)，与 Megatron-LM 相比，MFU 提高了 1.34 倍。我们分享在识别和修复故障和落后者方面的运营经验。我们希望通过从系统角度阐明问题并分享我们的经验，这项工作能够启发未来的法学硕士系统研究。

papers.title: MESSI: Behavioral Testing of BGP Implementations.
papers.abstract: Complex network protocols like the Border Gateway Protocol (BGP) are prone to implementation errors that cause unintended behaviors with potentially global consequences. We introduce an approach and tool called MESSI (Modular Exploration of State and Structure Inclusively) to automatically generate tests for black-box BGP implementations. Our approach is model-based, leveraging an executable model of BGP to generate behavioral tests. However, doing so effectively requires addressing new challenges such as the stateful nature of BGP and the need to generate complex structures like regular expressions in route maps. We used MESSI to generate roughly 150K tests that capture different aspects of BGP, such as route-map filtering, the decision process, route aggregation, and dynamics. These tests identified 22 correctness bugs across several widely used open-source BGP implementations (FRR, Quagga, GoBGP, BIRD, Batfish) and one closed-source implementation. Eight of these errors have already been fixed. While our models are BGP-specific our approach is not: thus we expect it can be adapted to test other stateful protocols with complex structures.
papers.abstract_zh: 边界网关协议 (BGP) 等复杂的网络协议很容易出现实施错误，从而导致意外行为，并可能造成全球后果。我们引入了一种称为 MESSI（包含状态和结构的模块化探索）的方法和工具，用于自动生成黑盒 BGP 实现的测试。我们的方法是基于模型的，利用 BGP 的可执行模型来生成行为测试。然而，有效地做到这一点需要解决新的挑战，例如 BGP 的状态性质以及生成复杂结构（如路由映射中的正则表达式）的需要。我们使用 MESSI 生成了大约 15 万个测试，捕获 BGP 的不同方面，例如路由映射过滤、决策过程、路由聚合和动态。这些测试发现了几种广泛使用的开源 BGP 实现（FRR、Quagga、GoBGP、BIRD、Batfish）和一种闭源实现中的 22 个正确性错误。其中八个错误已得到修复。虽然我们的模型是特定于 BGP 的，但我们的方法不是：因此我们希望它可以适用于测试具有复杂结构的其他有状态协议。

papers.title: mmComb: High-speed mmWave Commodity WiFi Backscatter.
papers.abstract: High-speed connectivity is key to enabling a range of novel IoT applications. Millimeter-wave (mmWave) backscatter has emerged as a possible solution to create high-speed, low-power IoT networks. However, state-of-the-art mmWave backscatter systems are costly due to the need for dedicated mmWave reader devices. This paper presents mmComb, a mmWave backscatter system that is built to operate on commodity mmWave WiFi. mmComb is developed with the aim that mmWave backscatter tags can be directly integrated into 802.11ad/ay mmWave WiFi networks. mmComb makes two key contributions. First, We propose a technique to communicate with backscatter tags using existing beamforming protocol frames from mmWave WiFi devices, without any protocol modification. Second, we develop a self-interference suppression solution that intelligently uses receive beamforming to extract weak mmWave backscatter signal even in indoor multipath-rich channels. We implement our solution with a tag prototype and 60 GHz commodity WiFi devices. Our results show that mmComb can achieve a maximum data rate of 55 Mbps just by leveraging 802.11ad/ay control frames while consuming 87.3 μW with BER lower than 10^−3 up to 5.5 m range.
papers.abstract_zh: 高速连接是实现一系列新颖的物联网应用的关键。毫米波 (mmWave) 反向散射已成为创建高速、低功耗物联网网络的可能解决方案。然而，由于需要专用的毫米波读取器设备，最先进的毫米波反向散射系统成本高昂。本文介绍了 mmComb，这是一种毫米波反向散射系统，专为在商用毫米波 WiFi 上运行而构建。 mmComb 的开发目标是将毫米波反向散射标签直接集成到 802.11ad/ay 毫米波 WiFi 网络中。 mmComb 做出了两个关键贡献。首先，我们提出了一种使用毫米波 WiFi 设备现有波束成形协议帧与反向散射标签进行通信的技术，无需任何协议修改。其次，我们开发了一种自干扰抑制解决方案，即使在室内多径丰富的信道中，也可以智能地使用接收波束成形来提取微弱的毫米波反向散射信号。我们使用标签原型和 60 GHz 商用 WiFi 设备来实施我们的解决方案。我们的结果表明，mmComb 只需利用 802.11ad/ay 控制帧即可实现 55 Mbps 的最大数据速率，同时消耗 87.3 μW，且在 5.5 m 范围内 BER 低于 10^−3。

papers.title: MobileConfig: Remote Configuration Management for Mobile Apps at Hyperscale.
papers.abstract: While software configuration management is a ubiquitous practice in the industry and has been extensively studied, prior research has focused solely on desktop or server applications. This paper presents MobileConfig, perhaps the world's largest configuration management system for mobile apps. It has been in production since 2015 and manages apps running on billions of devices, including Facebook, Instagram, Messenger, and AR/VR/glasses apps. Every day, Meta's developers make a staggering number of live configuration changes, often in the thousands, to remotely control mobile apps, driving them to change runtime behaviors without requiring app code updates. These configuration changes serve diverse purposes such as A/B testing, feature rollout, and app personalization. We discuss how MobileConfig addresses several challenges unique to mobile environments, including (1) the lack of data consistency models that can simultaneously ensure both fast app startup and configuration data freshness; (2) the risk of misconfiguration impacting billions of app users; and (3) the proliferation of mobile client SDKs needed to support diverse mobile platforms, programming languages, and configuration use cases.
papers.abstract_zh: 虽然软件配置管理是业界普遍存在的做法，并且已得到广泛研究，但先前的研究仅集中于桌面或服务器应用程序。本文介绍了 MobileConfig，它可能是世界上最大的移动应用配置管理系统。它自 2015 年开始投入生产，管理数十亿设备上运行的应用程序，包括 Facebook、Instagram、Messenger 和 AR/VR/眼镜应用程序。每天，Meta 的开发人员都会进行数量惊人的实时配置更改（通常为数千个），以远程控制移动应用程序，从而促使它们更改运行时行为，而无需更新应用程序代码。这些配置更改可用于多种目的，例如 A/B 测试、功能推出和应用程序个性化。我们讨论 MobileConfig 如何解决移动环境特有的几个挑战，包括（1）缺乏可以同时确保应用程序快速启动和配置数据新鲜度的数据一致性模型； (2) 错误配置的风险影响数十亿应用程序用户； (3) 支持不同移动平台、编程语言和配置用例所需的移动客户端 SDK 的激增。

papers.title: MuCache: A General Framework for Caching in Microservice Graphs.
papers.abstract: This paper introduces MuCache , a framework for extending arbitrary microservice applications with inter-service caches. MuCache significantly improves the performance of microservice graphs (commonly found in large applications like Uber or Twitter) by eliminating the need for one microservice to call another when the relevant state has not changed. MuCache is enabled by a novel non-blocking cache coherence and invalidation protocol for graph topologies that minimizes critical-path overhead. For this protocol, we prove a strong correctness result: any execution observed by the cache-enabled microservice application could have been observed by the original application without caches. Our evaluation on well-known microservice benchmarks shows that MuCache reduces the median request latency by up to 2.5×, and increases throughput by up to 60%.
papers.abstract_zh: 本文介绍了 MuCache，一个用于通过服务间缓存扩展任意微服务应用程序的框架。 MuCache 通过消除一个微服务在相关状态未更改时调用另一个微服务的需要，显着提高了微服务图（常见于 Uber 或 Twitter 等大型应用程序中）的性能。 MuCache 由一种新颖的非阻塞缓存一致性和图拓扑失效协议实现，可最大限度地减少关键路径开销。对于这个协议，我们证明了一个很强的正确性结果：启用缓存的微服务应用程序观察到的任何执行都可以由没有缓存的原始应用程序观察到。我们对知名微服务基准的评估表明，MuCache 将平均请求延迟降低了 2.5 倍，并将吞吐量提高了 60%。

papers.title: Multitenant In-Network Acceleration with SwitchVM.
papers.abstract: We propose a practical approach to implementing multitenancy on programmable network switches to make in-network acceleration accessible to cloud users. We introduce a Switch Virtual Machine (SwitchVM), that is deployed on the switches and offers an expressive instruction set and program state abstractions. Tenant programs, called Data-Plane filters (DPFs), are executed on top of SwitchVM in a sandbox with memory, network and state isolation policies controlled by network operators. The packets that trigger DPF execution include the code to execute or a reference to the DPFs deployed in the switch. DPFs are Turing-complete, may maintain state in the packet and in switch virtual memory, may form a dynamic chain, and may steer packets to desired destinations, all while enforcing the operator’s policies. We demonstrate that this idea is practical by prototyping SwitchVM in P4 on Intel Tofino switches. We describe a variety of use cases that SwitchVM supports, and implement three complex applications from prior works – key-value store cache, Load-aware load balancer and Paxos accelerator. We also show that SwitchVM provides strong performance isolation, zero-overhead runtime programmability, may hold two orders of magnitude more in-switch programs than existing techniques, and may support up to thirty thousand concurrent tenants each with its private state.
papers.abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种在可编程网络交换机上实现多租户的实用方法，以使云用户可以访问网络内加速。我们引入了交换机虚拟机（SwitchVM），它部署在交换机上并提供富有表现力的指令集和程序状态抽象。租户程序称为数据平面过滤器 (DPF)，在 SwitchVM 之上的沙箱中执行，内存、网络和状态隔离策略由网络运营商控制。触发 DPF 执行的数据包包括要执行的代码或对交换机中部署的 DPF 的引用。 DPF 是图灵完备的，可以维护数据包和交换机虚拟内存中的状态，可以形成动态链，并且可以将数据包引导到所需的目的地，同时执行运营商的策略。我们通过在 Intel Tofino 交换机上的 P4 中对 SwitchVM 进行原型设计，证明了这一想法的实用性。我们描述了 SwitchVM 支持的各种用例，并实现了之前工作中的三个复杂应用程序——键值存储缓存、负载感知负载均衡器和 Paxos 加速器。我们还表明，SwitchVM 提供了强大的性能隔离、零开销运行时可编程性，可以​​比现有技术容纳多两个数量级的交换机内程序，并且可以支持多达三万个并发租户，每个租户都有其私有状态。

papers.title: NetAssistant: Dialogue Based Network Diagnosis in Data Center Networks.
papers.abstract: In large-scale data center networks, answering network diagnosis queries from users still heavily rely on manual oncall services. A widespread scenario is when network users query whether any network issue is causing problems with their services/applications. However, this approach requires extensive experience and considerable efforts from network engineers who must repeatedly go through lots of monitoring dashboards and logs. It is notoriously slow, error-prone, and costly. We ask: is this the right solution, given the state of the art in network intelligence? To answer, we first extensively study thousands of real network diagnosis cases and provide insights into how to address these issues more efficiently. Then we propose an AI enabled diagnosis framework and instantiate it in a task-oriented dialogue based diagnosis system, or colloquially, a chatbot, called NetAssistant. It accepts questions in natural language and performs proper diagnosis workflows in a timely manner. NetAssistant has been deployed and running in the data centers of our company for more than three years with hundreds of usages every day. We show it significantly decreases the number and duration of human involved oncalls. We share our experience on how to make it reliable and trustworthy and showcase how it helps solve real production issues efficiently.
papers.abstract_zh: 在大规模数据中心网络中，回答用户的网络诊断查询仍然严重依赖人工oncall服务。一种普遍的情况是网络用户询问是否有任何网络问题导致其服务/应用程序出现问题。然而，这种方法需要网络工程师丰富的经验和大量的努力，他们必须反复检查大量的监控仪表板和日志。众所周知，它速度慢、容易出错且成本高昂。我们问：考虑到网络智能的最新水平，这是正确的解决方案吗？为了回答这个问题，我们首先广泛研究了数千个真实的网络诊断案例，并提供了如何更有效地解决这些问题的见解。然后，我们提出了一个人工智能支持的诊断框架，并将其实例化在一个基于任务的对话诊断系统中，或者通俗地说，一个聊天机器人，称为 NetAssistant。它接受自然语言的问题并及时执行正确的诊断工作流程。 NetAssistant已经在我们公司的数据中心部署和运行了三年多，每天有数百次使用。我们发现它显着减少了待命人员的数量和持续时间。我们分享如何使其可靠且值得信赖的经验，并展示它如何帮助有效解决实际生产问题。

papers.title: Netcastle: Network Infrastructure Testing At Scale.
papers.abstract: Network operators have long struggled to achieve reliability. Increased complexity risks surprising interactions, increased downtime, and lost person-hours trying to debug correctness and performance problems in large systems. For these reasons, network operators have also long pushed back on deploying promising network research, fearing the unexpected consequences of increased network complexity. Despite the changes’ potential benefits, the corresponding increase in complexity may result in a net loss. The method to build reliability despite complexity in Software Engineering is testing. In this paper, we use statistics from a large-scale network to identify unique challenges in network testing. To tackle the challenges, we develop Netcastle: a system that provides continuous integration/continuous deployment (CI/CD) network testing as a service for 11 different networking teams, across 68 different use-cases, and O(1k) of test devices. Netcastle supports comprehensive network testing, including device-level firmware, datacenter distributed control planes, and backbone centralized controllers, and runs 500K+ network tests per day, a scale and depth of test coverage previously unpublished. We share five years of experiences in building and running Netcastle at Meta.
papers.abstract_zh: 网络运营商长期以来一直在努力实现可靠性。复杂性的增加可能会带来令人惊讶的交互、增加停机时间以及尝试调试大型系统中的正确性和性能问题的工时损失。由于这些原因，网络运营商也长期以来一直推迟部署有前景的网络研究，担心网络复杂性增加会带来意想不到的后果。尽管这些变化有潜在的好处，但复杂性的相应增加可能会导致净损失。尽管软件工程很复杂，但构建可靠性的方法是测试。在本文中，我们使用大型网络的统计数据来识别网络测试中的独特挑战。为了应对这些挑战，我们开发了 Netcastle：一个为 11 个不同的网络团队提供持续集成/持续部署 (CI/CD) 网络测试即服务、跨 68 个不同用例和 O(1k) 测试设备的系统。 Netcastle 支持全面的网络测试，包括设备级固件、数据中心分布式控制平面和骨干集中式控制器，每天运行 500K+ 网络测试，测试覆盖的规模和深度此前从未发布过。我们分享在 Meta 上构建和运行 Netcastle 五年的经验。

papers.title: NetVigil: Robust and Low-Cost Anomaly Detection for East-West Data Center Security.
papers.abstract: The growing number of breaches in data centers underscores an urgent need for more effective security. Traditional perimeter defense measures and static zero-trust approaches are unable to address the unique challenges that arise from the scale, complexity, and evolving nature of today's data center networks. To tackle these issues, we introduce NetVigil, a robust and cost-efficient anomaly detection system specifically designed for east-west traffic within data center networks. NetVigil adeptly extracts security-focused, graph-based features from network flow logs and employs domain-specific graph neural networks (GNNs) and contrastive learning techniques to strengthen its resilience against normal traffic variations and adversarial evasion strategies. Our evaluation, over various attack scenarios and traces from real-world production clusters, shows that NetVigil delivers significant improvements in accuracy, cost, and detection latency compared to state-of-the-art anomaly detection systems, providing a practical, supplementary security mechanism to protect the east-west traffic within data center networks.
papers.abstract_zh: 数据中心的违规事件数量不断增加，凸显了对更有效安全措施的迫切需要。传统的外围防御措施和静态零信任方法无法解决当今数据中心网络的规模、复杂性和不断发展的性质所带来的独特挑战。为了解决这些问题，我们引入了 NetVigil，这是一种强大且经济高效的异常检测系统，专为数据中心网络内的东西向流量而设计。 NetVigil 熟练地从网络流日志中提取以安全为中心的、基于图形的特征​​，并采用特定领域的图形神经网络 (GNN) 和对比学习技术来增强其针对正常流量变化和对抗性规避策略的弹性。我们对各种攻击场景和来自现实生产集群的跟踪进行的评估表明，与最先进的异常检测系统相比，NetVigil 在准确性、成本和检测延迟方面都有显着改进，提供了实用的补充安全机制来保护数据中心网络内的东西向流量。

papers.title: NN-Defined Modulator: Reconfigurable and Portable Software Modulator on IoT Gateways.
papers.abstract: A physical-layer modulator is a vital component for an IoT gateway to map the symbols to signals. However, due to the soldered hardware chipsets on the gateway's motherboards or the diverse toolkits on different platforms for the software radio, the existing solutions either have limited extensibility or are platform specific. Such limitation is hard to ignore when modulation schemes and hardware platforms have become extremely diverse. This paper presents a new paradigm of using neural networks as an abstraction layer for physical layer modulators in IoT gateway devices, referred to as NN-defined modulators. Our approach addresses the challenges of extensibility and portability for multiple technologies on various hardware platforms. The proposed NN-defined modulator uses a model-driven methodology rooted in solid mathematical foundations while having native support for hardware acceleration and portability to heterogeneous platforms. We conduct the evaluation of NN-defined modulators on different platforms, including Nvidia Jetson Nano, Raspberry Pi. Evaluations demonstrate that our NN-defined modulator effectively operates as conventional modulators and provides significant efficiency gains (up to 4.7× on Nvidia Jetson Nano and 1.1× on Raspberry Pi), indicating high portability. Furthermore, we show the real-world applications using our NN-defined modulators to generate ZigBee and WiFi packets, which are compliant with commodity TI CC2650 (ZigBee) and Intel AX201 (WiFi NIC) respectively.
papers.abstract_zh: 物理层调制器是物联网网关将符号映射到信号的重要组件。然而，由于网关主板上焊接的硬件芯片组或不同平台上用于软件无线电的不同工具包，现有的解决方案要么具有有限的可扩展性，要么是特定于平台的。当调制方案和硬件平台变得极其多样化时，这种限制很难被忽视。本文提出了一种使用神经网络作为物联网网关设备中物理层调制器的抽象层的新范例，称为神经网络定义的调制器。我们的方法解决了各种硬件平台上多种技术的可扩展性和可移植性的挑战。所提出的神经网络定义的调制器使用植根于坚实数学基础的模型驱动方法，同时具有对硬件加速和异构平台可移植性的本机支持。我们在不同平台上对神经网络定义的调制器进行了评估，包括 Nvidia Jetson Nano、Raspberry Pi。评估表明，我们的神经网络定义的调制器可以像传统调制器一样有效地运行，并提供显着的效率增益（在 Nvidia Jetson Nano 上最高可达 4.7 倍，在 Raspberry Pi 上最高可达 1.1 倍），这表明了高可移植性。此外，我们还展示了使用 NN 定义的调制器生成 ZigBee 和 WiFi 数据包的实际应用，这些数据包分别符合商品 TI CC2650 (ZigBee) 和 Intel AX201 (WiFi NIC) 的要求。

papers.title: NR-Surface: NextG-ready µW-reconfigurable mmWave Metasurface.
papers.abstract: Metasurface has recently emerged as an economic solution to expand mmWave coverage. However, their pervasive deployment remains a challenge, mainly due to the difficulty in reaching the tight 260ns NR synchronization requirement and real-time wireless reconfiguration while maintaining multi-year battery life. This paper presents NR-Surface, the first real-time reconfigurable metasurface fully compliant with the NR standard, operating at 242.7 µW for a 2.1-year lifetime on an AA battery. NR-Surface incorporates (i) a new extremely low-power (14KHz sampling) reconfiguration interface, NarrowBand Packet Unit (NBPU), for synchronization and real-time reconfiguration, and (ii) a highly responsive and low-leakage metasurface designed for low-duty cycled operation, by carefully leveraging the structure and the periodicity of the NR beam management procedure in the NR standard. NR-Surface is prototyped and evaluated end-to-end with NR BS built on srsRAN to demonstrate diverse usage scenarios including multiple NR-Surface per BS, multiple UE per NR-Surface, and 3D beamforming. Around-the-corner UE evaluations showcase NR-Surface efficacy under different user mobility patterns (20.3dB gain) and dynamic blockage (22.2dB gain).
papers.abstract_zh: 超表面最近成为扩大毫米波覆盖范围的经济解决方案。然而，它们的普遍部署仍然是一个挑战，主要是因为难以达到严格的 260ns NR 同步要求和实时无线重新配置，同时保持多年的电池寿命。本文介绍了 NR-Surface，这是第一个完全符合 NR 标准的实时可重构超表面，运行功耗为 242.7 µW，使用 AA 电池可实现 2.1 年的使用寿命。 NR-Surface 通过仔细利用 NR 标准中 NR 波束管理程序的结构和周期性，采用了 (i) 新型极低功耗（14KHz 采样）重配置接口、窄带数据包单元 (NBPU)，用于同步和实时重配置，以及 (ii) 专为低占空比运行而设计的高响应性和低泄漏超表面。 NR-Surface 使用基于 srsRAN 构建的 NR BS 进行了原型设计和端到端评估，以演示不同的使用场景，包括每个 BS 多个 NR-Surface、每个 NR-Surface 多个 UE 以及 3D 波束成形。拐角处的 UE 评估展示了不同用户移动模式（20.3dB 增益）和动态阻塞（22.2dB 增益）下的 NR-Surface 功效。

papers.title: OctoSketch: Enabling Real-Time, Continuous Network Monitoring over Multiple Cores.
papers.abstract: Sketching algorithms (sketches) have emerged as a resource-efficient and accurate solution for software-based network monitoring. However, existing sketch-based monitoring makes sacrifices in online accuracy (query time accuracy) and performance (handling line rate traffic with low latency) when dealing with distributed traffic across multiple cores. In this work, we present OctoSketch, a software monitoring framework that can scale a wide spectrum of sketches to many cores with high online accuracy and performance. In contrast to previous systems that adopt straightforward sketch merges from individual cores to obtain the aggregated result, we devise a continuous, change-based mechanism that can generally be applied to sketches to perform the aggregation. This design ensures high online accuracy of the aggregated result at any query time and reduces computation costs to achieve high throughput. We apply OctoSketch to nine representative sketches on three software platforms (CPU, DPDK, and eBPF XDP). Our results demonstrate that OctoSketch achieves about 15.6× lower errors and up to 4.5× higher throughput than the state-of-the-art.
papers.abstract_zh: 草图算法（草图）已成为基于软件的网络监控的资源高效且准确的解决方案。然而，现有的基于草图的监控在处理跨多个核心的分布式流量时，会牺牲在线准确性（查询时间准确性）和性能（以低延迟处理线速流量）。在这项工作中，我们介绍了 OctoSketch，这是一种软件监控框架，可以将各种草图扩展到多个内核，并具有较高的在线准确性和性能。与以前采用从各个核心直接进行草图合并来获得聚合结果的系统相比，我们设计了一种连续的、基于更改的机制，通常可以应用于草图来执行聚合。这种设计保证了任何查询时刻聚合结果在线的高准确性，并降低计算成本以实现高吞吐量。我们将 OctoSketch 应用于三个软件平台（CPU、DPDK 和 eBPF XDP）上的九个代表性草图。我们的结果表明，与最先进的技术相比，OctoSketch 的错误率降低了约 15.6 倍，吞吐量提高了 4.5 倍。

papers.title: OPPerTune: Post-Deployment Configuration Tuning of Services Made Easy.
papers.abstract: Real-world application deployments have hundreds of inter-dependent configuration parameters, many of which significantly influence performance and efficiency. With today's complex and dynamic services, operators need to continuously monitor and set the right configuration values (configuration tuning) well after a service is widely deployed. This is challenging since experimenting with different configurations post-deployment may reduce application performance or cause disruptions. While state-of-the-art ML approaches do help to automate configuration tuning, they do not fully address the multiple challenges in end-to-end configuration tuning of deployed applications. This paper presents OpperTune, a service that enables configuration tuning of applications in deployment at Microsoft. OpperTune reduces application interruptions while maximizing the performance of deployed applications as and when the workload or the underlying infrastructure changes. It automates three essential processes that facilitate post-deployment configuration tuning: (a) determining which configurations to tune, (b) automatically managing the scope at which to tune the configurations, and (c) using a novel reinforcement learning algorithm to simultaneously and quickly tune numerical and categorical configurations, thereby keeping the overhead of configuration tuning low. We deploy OpperTune on two enterprise applications in Microsoft Azure's clusters. Our experiments show that OpperTune reduces the end-to-end P95 latency of microservice applications by more than 50% over expert configuration choices made ahead of deployment. The code and datasets used are made available at https://aka.ms/OPPerTune .
papers.abstract_zh: 现实世界的应用程序部署有数百个相互依赖的配置参数，其中许多参数显着影响性能和效率。面对当今复杂且动态的服务，运营商需要在服务广泛部署后持续监控并设置正确的配置值（配置调整）。这是具有挑战性的，因为在部署后尝试不同的配置可能会降低应用程序性能或导致中断。虽然最先进的机器学习方法确实有助于自动化配置调整，但它们并不能完全解决已部署应用程序的端到端配置调整中的多重挑战。本文介绍了 OpperTune，这是一项能够在 Microsoft 部署中对应用程序进行配置调整的服务。当工作负载或底层基础设施发生变化时，OpperTune 可以减少应用程序中断，同时最大限度地提高已部署应用程序的性能。它自动化了促进部署后配置调整的三个基本过程：(a) 确定要调整的配置，(b) 自动管理调整配置的范围，以及 (c) 使用新颖的强化学习算法来同时快速调整数字和分类配置，从而保持较低的配置调整开销。我们在 Microsoft Azure 集群中的两个企业应用程序上部署 OpperTune。我们的实验表明，与部署前的专家配置选择相比，OpperTune 将微服务应用程序的端到端 P95 延迟降低了 50% 以上。使用的代码和数据集可从 https://aka.ms/OPPerTune 获取。

papers.title: Orthcatter: High-throughput In-band OFDM Backscatter with Over-the-Air Code Division.
papers.abstract: The existing ambient backscatter systems suffer from either more spectrum utilization or low throughput. we propose Orthcatter, the first in-band OFDM backscatter system that provides a higher throughput while consuming fewer spectrum resources. Our key innovation is the designed over-the-air code division technique that enables the cancellation of the co-channel interferences, solving the core challenge of the in-band backscatter communication. Unlike the common code-division systems that generate orthogonal codewords locally, we construct the quasi-orthogonal backscatter codewords by swapping the subcarriers of each excitation OFDM symbol and concrete this design passively with a double side-band symbol construction method. Armed with these quasi-orthogonal codewords, we design a two-step interference cancellation scheme, significantly improving reliability. We prototype and test Orthcatter. The results show that Orthcatter can achieve throughput of 248kbps and a BER of 10^-4 under OFDM WiFi exciter, improving by over 4.6× and 300× compared with the state-of-the-art in-band backscatter system. Our throughput and BER can even be 11kbps higher and 59× better than the prior side-band backscatter systems, and the exciter-to-tag communication range is 3× of prior OFDM backscatter systems.
papers.abstract_zh: 现有的环境反向散射系统要么频谱利用率高，要么吞吐量低。我们提出了 Orthcatter，这是第一个带内 OFDM 反向散射系统，可提供更高的吞吐量，同时消耗更少的频谱资源。我们的关键创新是设计的无线码分技术，能够消除同信道干扰，解决带内反向散射通信的核心挑战。与本地生成正交码字的常见码分系统不同，我们通过交换每个激励 OFDM 符号的子载波来构造准正交反向散射码字，并通过双边带符号构造方法被动地具体化该设计。借助这些准正交码字，我们设计了两步干扰消除方案，显着提高了可靠性。我们制作原型并测试 Orthcatter。结果表明，Orthcatter 在 OFDM WiFi 激励器下可实现 248kbps 的吞吐量和 10^-4 的 BER，与最先进的带内反向散射系统相比分别提高了 4.6 倍和 300 倍以上。我们的吞吐量和 BER 甚至可以比以前的边带反向散射系统高 11kbps 和 59 倍，并且激励器到标签的通信范围是以前 OFDM 反向散射系统的 3 倍。

papers.title: Parcae: Proactive, Liveput-Optimized DNN Training on Preemptible Instances.
papers.abstract: Deep neural networks (DNNs) are becoming progressively large and costly to train. This paper aims to reduce DNN training costs by leveraging preemptible instances on modern clouds, which can be allocated at a much lower price when idle but may be preempted by the cloud provider at any time. Prior work that supports DNN training on preemptive instances employs a reactive approach to handling instance preemptions and allocations after their occurrence, which only achieves limited performance and scalability. We present Parcae, a system that enables cheap, fast, and scalable DNN training on preemptible instances by proactively adjusting the parallelization strategy of a DNN training job to adapt to predicted resource changes before instance preemptions and allocations really happen, which significantly reduces the cost of handling these events. Parcae optimizes liveput , a novel metric that measures the expected training throughput of a DNN job under various possible preemption scenarios. Compared to existing reactive, throughput-optimized systems, Parcae's proactive, live-optimized solution considers both the throughput of a job and its robustness under preemptions. To optimize liveput, Parcae supports lightweight instance migration and uses an availability predictor to forecast future preemptions. It then uses a liveput optimizer to discover an optimal strategy to parallelize DNN training under predicted preemptions. We evaluate Parcae on a variety of DNNs and preemption traces and show that Parcae outperforms existing spot-instance DNN training systems by up to 10×. More importantly, Parcae achieves near-optimal performance for training large DNNs under frequent preemptions, in which case existing approaches cannot make any progress.
papers.abstract_zh: 深度神经网络 (DNN) 变得越来越大，训练成本也越来越高。本文旨在通过利用现代云上的可抢占实例来降低 DNN 训练成本，这些实例在空闲时可以以低得多的价格分配，但可以随时被云提供商抢占。先前支持对抢占式实例进行 DNN 训练的工作采用反应式方法来处理实例抢占和分配，但这种方法只能实现有限的性能和可扩展性。我们推出了 Parcae，这是一个系统，通过主动调整 DNN 训练作业的并行化策略，在实例抢占和分配真正发生之前适应预测的资源变化，从而在可抢占实例上实现廉价、快速且可扩展的 DNN 训练，从而显着降低处理这些事件的成本。 Parcae 优化了 liveput ，这是一种新颖的指标，用于测量 DNN 作业在各种可能的抢占场景下的预期训练吞吐量。与现有的反应式吞吐量优化系统相比，Parcae 的主动式实时优化解决方案同时考虑了作业的吞吐量及其在抢占情况下的鲁棒性。为了优化 liveput，Parcae 支持轻量级实例迁移，并使用可用性预测器来预测未来的抢占。然后，它使用 liveput 优化器来发现在预测抢占情况下并行化 DNN 训练的最佳策略。我们在各种 DNN 和抢占轨迹上评估 Parcae，结果表明 Parcae 的性能比现有的现货 DNN 训练系统高出 10 倍。更重要的是，Parcae 在频繁抢占的情况下训练大型 DNN 实现了近乎最佳的性能，在这种情况下，现有方法无法取得任何进展。

papers.title: Passengers' Safety Matters: Experiences of Deploying a Large-Scale Indoor Delivery Monitoring System.
papers.abstract: Delivering goods to many indoor stores poses significant safety issues, as heavy, high-stacked packages carried on delivery trolleys may fall and hurt passersby. This paper reports our experiences of developing and operating DeMo, a practical system for real-time monitoring of indoor delivery. DeMo attaches sensors to trolleys and analyzes the Inertial Measurement Unit (IMU) and Bluetooth Low Energy (BLE) readings to detect delivery violations such as speeding and using non-designated delivery paths. Differing from typical indoor localization applications, DeMo overcomes unique challenges such as unique sensor placement and complex electromagnetic characteristics underground. In particular, DeMo adapts the classical logarithmic radio signal model to support fingerprint-free localization, drastically lowering the deployment and maintenance cost. DeMo has been operating since May 2020, covering more than 200 shops with 42,248 deliveries (3521.4 km) across 12 subway stations in Hong Kong. DeMo's 3-year operation witnessed a significant violation rate drop, from 19% (May 2020) to 2.7% (Mar 2023).
papers.abstract_zh: 向许多室内商店运送货物会带来严重的安全问题，因为运送手推车上装载的重型、高堆包裹可能会掉落并伤害路人。本文报告了我们开发和运营 DeMo 的经验，DeMo 是一个用于室内交付实时监控的实用系统。 Demo 将传感器安装到手推车上，并分析惯性测量单元 (IMU) 和蓝牙低功耗 (BLE) 读数，以检测超速和使用非指定配送路径等配送违规行为。与典型的室内定位应用不同，Demo克服了独特的挑战，例如独特的传感器放置和地下复杂的电磁特性。特别是，Demo采用经典的对数无线电信号模型，支持无指纹定位，大大降低了部署和维护成本。 DeMo自2020年5月开始运营，覆盖香港12个地铁站的200多家商店，交付42,248次（3521.4公里）。 Demo 的三年运营中，违规率大幅下降，从 19%（2020 年 5 月）降至 2.7%（2023 年 3 月）。

papers.title: POSEIDON: A Consolidated Virtual Network Controller that Manages Millions of Tenants via Config Tree.
papers.abstract: As the cloud rapidly expands in scale, the virtual network controller must manage an increasing number of devices with higher update frequencies. Furthermore, the emergence of cloud-native services has substantially intensified program-triggered updates, leading to more frequent API invocations. To enhance performance and extensibility, we propose Poseidon, a novel virtual network control framework. Specifically, to reduce operational expenses (OpEx), we have consolidated the common functions of multiple service controllers into a single controller. To manage heterogeneous devices and eliminate the multi-table lookup complexity due to config dependencies, we introduce Trident, a tree-based service- and device-independent abstraction, so that config dependency calculation can be replaced by more efficient tree traversal. After deploying Poseidon on Alibaba Cloud, we observed a 21x increase in the throughput of virtual network configuration tasks, along with a 4.4x decrease in the P99 API processing latency. Poseidon completes the task of enabling hundreds of Elastic IP addresses (EIPs) 1.8 to 55 times faster than Vendors A and B, both of which are among the top 5 providers, for identical network configuration jobs.
papers.abstract_zh: 随着云规模的迅速扩大，虚拟网络控制器必须管理越来越多且更新频率越来越高的设备。此外，云原生服务的出现大大加剧了程序触发的更新，导致API调用更加频繁。为了增强性能和可扩展性，我们提出了 Poseidon，一种新颖的虚拟网络控制框架。具体来说，为了降低运营费用（OpEx），我们将多个服务控制器的通用功能整合到一个控制器中。为了管理异构设备并消除由于配置依赖关系而导致的多表查找复杂性，我们引入了Trident，一种基于树的独立于服务和设备的抽象，以便配置依赖关系计算可以被更高效的树遍历代替。在阿里云上部署 Poseidon 后，我们观察到虚拟网络配置任务的吞吐量提高了 21 倍，同时 P99 API 处理延迟降低了 4.4 倍。对于相同的网络配置作业，Poseidon 完成了启用数百个弹性 IP 地址 (EIP) 的任务，速度比供应商 A 和 B 快 1.8 到 55 倍，这两个供应商都属于排名前 5 的供应商。

papers.title: Precise Data Center Traffic Engineering with Constrained Hardware Resources.
papers.abstract: Data center traffic engineering (TE) routes flows over a set of available paths following custom weight distributions to achieve optimal load balancing or flow throughput. However, as a result of hardware constraints, it is challenging, and often impossible for larger data center networks, to precisely implement the TE weight distributions on the data plane switches. The resulting precision loss in the TE implementation causes load imbalances that can result in congestion and traffic loss. Instead of treating all flows equally, we adapt the hardware resource allocation to a flow’s traffic volume and its contribution to the overall precision loss. We intelligently prune select ports in weight distributions and merge identical distributions to free up hardware resources. Evaluation using realistic traffic loads shows that our techniques approximate ideal TE solutions under various scenarios within 7% error, compared to a 67% error for today’s state-of-the-art approach. In addition, our design avoids traffic loss triggered by switch rule overflow. Finally, the execution time is 10× faster than the current approach.
papers.abstract_zh: 数据中心流量工程 (TE) 按照自定义权重分布在一组可用路径上路由流量，以实现最佳负载平衡或流量吞吐量。然而，由于硬件限制，对于大型数据中心网络来说，在数据平面交换机上精确实现 TE 权重分布具有挑战性，而且通常是不可能的。 TE 实施中由此产生的精度损失会导致负载不平衡，进而导致拥塞和流量丢失。我们没有平等地对待所有流，而是根据流的流量及其对整体精度损失的贡献来调整硬件资源分配。我们智能地修剪权重分布中的选定端口并合并相同的分布以释放硬件资源。使用实际流量负载进行的评估表明，我们的技术在各种场景下都接近理想的 TE 解决方案，误差在 7% 以内，而当今最先进的方法的误差为 67%。此外，我们的设计避免了交换机规则溢出引发的流量丢失。最后，执行时间比当前方法快 10 倍。

papers.title: Pudica: Toward Near-Zero Queuing Delay in Congestion Control for Cloud Gaming.
papers.abstract: Congestion control (CC) plays a pivotal role in cloud gaming services. However, existing CC methods often cause self-induced bottleneck queuing. As a result, they may largely delay game frame transmission and undermine the player's gaming experience. We present a new end-to-end CC algorithm named Pudica that strives to achieve near-zero queuing delay and high link utilization while respecting cross-flow fairness. Pudica introduces several judicious approaches to utilize the paced frame to probe the bandwidth utilization ratio (BUR) instead of bandwidth itself. By leveraging BUR estimations, Pudica designs a holistic bitrate adjustment policy to balance low queuing, efficiency, and fairness. We conducted thorough and comprehensive evaluations in real networks. In comparison to baseline methods, Pudica reduces the average and tailed frame delay by 3.1× and 4.9× respectively, and cuts down the stall rate by 10.3×. Meanwhile, it increases the frame bitrate by 12.1\%. Pudica has been deployed in a large-scale cloud gaming platform, serving millions of players.
papers.abstract_zh: 拥塞控制（CC）在云游戏服务中发挥着关键作用。然而，现有的CC方法经常会导致自引发的瓶颈排队。因此，它们可能会很大程度上延迟游戏帧传输并破坏玩家的游戏体验。我们提出了一种名为 Pudica 的新端到端 CC 算法，该算法力求在尊重交叉流公平性的同时实现接近零的排队延迟和高链路利用率。 Pudica 引入了几种明智的方法来利用定步帧来探测带宽利用率 (BUR)，而不是带宽本身。通过利用 BUR 估算，Pudica 设计了整体码率调整策略，以平衡低排队、效率和公平性。我们在真实网络中进行了彻底、全面的评估。与基线方法相比，Pudica 的平均帧延迟和尾帧延迟分别降低了 3.1 倍和 4.9 倍，停顿率降低了 10.3 倍。同时，帧比特率提高了12.1%。 Pudica已部署在大型云游戏平台，服务数百万玩家。

papers.title: QuickUpdate: a Real-Time Personalization System for Large-Scale Recommendation Models.
papers.abstract: Deep learning recommendation models play an important role in online companies and consume a major part of the AI infrastructure dedicated to training and inference. The accuracy of these models highly depends on how quickly they are published on the serving side. One of the main challenges in improving the model update latency and frequency is the model size, which has reached the order of Terabytes and is expected to further increase in the future. The large model size causes large latency (and write bandwidth) to update the model in geo-distributed servers. We present QuickUpdate, a system for real-time personalization of large-scale recommendation models, that publishes the model in high frequency as part of online training, providing serving accuracy that is comparable to that of a fully fresh model. The system employs novel techniques to minimize the required write bandwidth, including prioritized parameter updates, intermittent full model updates, model transformations, and relaxed consistency. We evaluate QuickUpdate using real-world data, on one of the largest production models in Meta. The results show that QuickUpdate provides serving accuracy that is comparable to a fully fresh model, while reducing the average published update size and the required bandwidth by over 13x. It provides a scalable solution for serving production models in real-time fashion, which is otherwise not feasible at scale due to the limited network and storage bandwidth.
papers.abstract_zh: 深度学习推荐模型在在线公司中发挥着重要作用，并消耗了专门用于训练和推理的人工智能基础设施的主要部分。这些模型的准确性很大程度上取决于它们在服务端发布的速度。改善模型更新延迟和频率的主要挑战之一是模型大小，其已达到 TB 量级，并且预计未来将进一步增加。较大的模型大小会导致在地理分布式服务器中更新模型时出现较大的延迟（和写入带宽）。我们推出了 QuickUpdate，这是一个用于大规模推荐模型实时个性化的系统，它作为在线训练的一部分高频次发布模型，提供与全新模型相当的服务准确性。该系统采用新颖的技术来最大限度地减少所需的写入带宽，包括优先参数更新、间歇性完整模型更新、模型转换和宽松一致性。我们使用 Meta 中最大的生产模型之一的真实数据来评估 QuickUpdate。结果表明，QuickUpdate 提供的服务准确性可与全新模型相媲美，同时将平均已发布更新大小和所需带宽减少 13 倍以上。它提供了一种可扩展的解决方案，用于以实时方式为生产模型提供服务，而由于网络和存储带宽有限，这种解决方案无法大规模实现。

papers.title: Reasoning about Network Traffic Load Property at Production Scale.
papers.abstract: This paper presents Jingubang, the first reported system for checking network traffic load properties (e.g., if any link’s utilization would exceed 80% during a network change) in a production Wide Area Network (WAN). Motivated by our network operators, Jingubang should meet three important requirements: ( R1 ) comprehensive support for complex traffic behavior under BGP, IS-IS, policy-based routes (PBR), and segment routes (SR), ( R2 ) reasoning on traffic load of billions of flows across a period of time, ( R3 ) real-time failure-tolerance analysis. These requirements pose challenges in modeling the complex traffic behavior and maintaining the checking efficiency. Jingubang has successfully addressed these challenges. First, we propose the traffic distribution graph (or TDG), capable of modeling equal-cost multi-path (ECMP), packet rewriting, and tunneling, introduced by BGP/IS-IS, PBR, and SR, respectively. Second, we design an algorithm based on TDG to simulate traffic distribution for billions of flows across a time period both efficiently and accurately. Third, Jingubang proposes an incremental traffic simulation approach that first computes an incremental TDG and then simulates only the differential traffic distribution, avoiding the need to simulate the entire network traffic distribution from scratch. Jingubang has been used in the daily checking of our WAN for more than one year and prevented service downtime resulting from traffic load violations.
papers.abstract_zh: 本文介绍了 Jinubang，这是第一个报告的用于检查生产广域网 (WAN) 中网络流量负载属性（例如，在网络更改期间任何链路的利用率是否超过 80%）的系统。在我们网络运营商的推动下，金谷邦应该满足三个重要需求：（R1）全面支持BGP、IS-IS、策略路由（PBR）、分段路由（SR）下的复杂流量行为；（R2）一段时间内亿级流的流量负载推理；（R3）实时容错分析。这些要求对复杂流量行为建模和保持检查效率提出了挑战。金固邦成功应对了这些挑战。首先，我们提出了流量分布图（TDG），能够对等价多路径（ECMP）、数据包重写和隧道进行建模，分别由 BGP/IS-IS、PBR 和 SR 引入。其次，我们设计了一种基于TDG的算法，可以高效、准确地模拟一段时间内数十亿流的流量分布。第三，金谷邦提出了一种增量流量模拟方法，首先计算增量TDG，然后仅模拟差分流量分布，避免了从头开始模拟整个网络流量分布的需要。金固邦已用于我们广域网的日常检查一年多，避免了因流量负载违规而导致的服务停机。

papers.title: Resiliency at Scale: Managing Google's TPUv4 Machine Learning Supercomputer.
papers.abstract: TPUv4 (Tensor Processing Unit) is Google’s 3rd generation accelerator for machine learning training, deployed as a 4096-node supercomputer with a custom 3D torus interconnect. In this paper, we describe our experience designing and operating the software infrastructure that allows TPUv4 supercomputers to operate at scale, including features for automatic fault resiliency and hardware recovery. We adopt a software-defined networking (SDN) approach to manage TPUv4’s high-bandwidth inter-chip interconnect (ICI) fabric, using optical circuit switching to dynamically configure routes to work around machine, chip and link failures. Our infrastructure detects failures and automatically triggers reconfiguration to minimize disruption to running workloads, as well as initiating remediation and repair workflows for the affected components. Similar techniques interface with maintenance and upgrade workflows for both hardware and software. Our dynamic reconfiguration approach allows our TPUv4 supercomputers to achieve 99.98% system availability, gracefully handling hardware outages experienced by ~1% of the training jobs.
papers.abstract_zh: TPUv4（张量处理单元）是 Google 用于机器学习训练的第三代加速器，部署为具有定制 3D 环面互连的 4096 节点超级计算机。在本文中，我们描述了我们设计和操作允许 TPUv4 超级计算机大规模运行的软件基础设施的经验，包括自动故障恢复和硬件恢复的功能。我们采用软件定义网络 (SDN) 方法来管理 TPUv4 的高带宽芯片间互连 (ICI) 结构，使用光路交换动态配置路由以解决机器、芯片和链路故障。我们的基础设施检测故障并自动触发重新配置，以最大程度地减少对运行工作负载的干扰，并启动受影响组件的补救和修复工作流程。类似的技术与硬件和软件的维护和升级工作流程相结合。我们的动态重新配置方法使我们的 TPUv4 超级计算机能够实现 99.98% 的系统可用性，妥善处理约 1% 的训练作业所经历的硬件中断。

papers.title: Reverie: Low Pass Filter-Based Switch Buffer Sharing for Datacenters with RDMA and TCP Traffic.
papers.abstract: The switch buffers in datacenters today are shared by traffic classes with different loss tolerance and reaction to congestion signals. In particular, while legacy applications use loss-tolerant transport, e.g., DCTCP, newer applications require lossless datacenter transport, e.g., RDMA over Converged Ethernet. The allocation of buffers for this diverse traffic mix is managed by a buffer-sharing scheme. Unfortunately, as we analytically show in this paper, the buffer-sharing practices of today's datacenters pose a fundamental limitation to effectively isolate RDMA and TCP while also maximizing burst absorption . We identify two root causes: (i) the buffer-sharing for RDMA and TCP relies on two independent and often conflicting views of the buffer, namely ingress and egress; and (ii) the buffer-sharing scheme micromanages the buffer and overreacts to the changes in its occupancy during transient congestion. In this paper, we present Reverie, a buffer-sharing scheme, which, unlike prior works, is suitable for both lossless and loss-tolerant traffic classes, providing isolation as well as superior burst absorption. At the core of Reverie lies a unified (consolidated ingress and egress) admission control that jointly optimizes the buffers for both traffic classes. Reverie, allocates buffer based on a low-pass filter that naturally absorbs bursty queue lengths during transient congestion within the buffer limits. Our evaluation shows that Reverie can improve the performance of RDMA as well as TCP in terms of flow completion times by up to 33%.
papers.abstract_zh: The switch buffers in datacenters today are shared by traffic classes with different loss tolerance and reaction to congestion signals.特别是，虽然传统应用程序使用丢失容忍传输，例如 DCTCP，但较新的应用程序需要无损数据中心传输，例如融合以太网上的 RDMA。这种不同流量混合的缓冲区分配是通过缓冲区共享方案来管理的。不幸的是，正如我们在本文中分析表明的那样，当今数据中心的缓冲区共享实践对有效隔离 RDMA 和 TCP 同时最大化突发吸收造成了根本限制。我们确定了两个根本原因：(i) RDMA 和 TCP 的缓冲区共享依赖于两个独立且经常冲突的缓冲区视图，即入口和出口； (ii) 缓冲区共享方案对缓冲区进行微观管理，并对瞬时拥塞期间的占用变化反应过度。在本文中，我们提出了 Reverie，一种缓冲区共享方案，与之前的工作不同，它适用于无损和丢失容忍的流量类别，提供隔离以及出色的突发吸收。 Reverie 的核心在于统一（整合入口和出口）准入控制，可联合优化两种流量类别的缓冲区。 Reverie 基于低通滤波器分配缓冲区，该滤波器在缓冲区限制内的瞬时拥塞期间自然吸收突发队列长度。我们的评估表明，Reverie 可以将 RDMA 和 TCP 在流完成时间方面的性能提高高达 33%。

papers.title: Revisiting Congestion Control for Lossless Ethernet.
papers.abstract: Congestion control is a key enabler for lossless Ethernet at scale. In this paper, we revisit this classic topic from a new perspective, i.e., understanding and exploiting the intrinsic properties of the underlying lossless network. We experimentally and analytically find that the intrinsic properties of lossless networks, such as packet conservation , can indeed provide valuable implications in estimating pipe capacity and the precise number of excessive packets. Besides, we derive principles on how to treat congested flows and victim flows individually to handle HoL blocking efficiently. Then, we propose ACK-driven congestion control (ACC) for lossless Ethernet, which simply resorts to the knowledge of ACK time series to exert a temporary halt to exactly drain out excessive packets of congested flows and then match its rate to pipe capacity. Testbed and large-scale simulations demonstrate that ACC ameliorates fundamental issues in lossless Ethernet (e.g., congestion spreading, HoL blocking, and deadlock) and achieves excellent low latency and high throughput performance. For instance, compared with existing schemes, ACC improves the average and 99th percentile FCT performance of small flows by 1.3~3.3× and 1.4~11.5×, respectively.
papers.abstract_zh: 拥塞控制是大规模无损以太网的关键推动因素。在本文中，我们从一个新的角度重新审视这个经典主题，即理解和利用底层无损网络的内在属性。我们通过实验和分析发现，无损网络的内在属性（例如数据包守恒）确实可以为估计管道容量和过量数据包的精确数量提供有价值的影响。此外，我们还得出了如何单独处理拥塞流和受害者流以有效处理 HoL 阻塞的原则。然后，我们提出了用于无损以太网的 ACK 驱动的拥塞控制（ACC），它简单地利用 ACK 时间序列的知识来施加暂时停止，以准确排出拥塞流中的过多数据包，然后将其速率与管道容量相匹配。测试台和大规模仿真表明，ACC 改善了无损以太网中的基本问题（例如拥塞扩散、HoL 阻塞和死锁），并实现了出色的低延迟和高吞吐量性能。例如，与现有方案相比，ACC将小流的平均和99% FCT性能分别提高了1.3~3.3倍和1.4~11.5倍。

papers.title: RFID+: Spatially Controllable Identification of UHF RFIDs via Controlled Magnetic Fields.
papers.abstract: In the fast-paced landscape of UHF RFID technology, achieving precise spatial-selective identification is of critical importance in the logistics and retail domain. This work introduces RFID+, a magnetically-driven UHF RFID system that leverages the matching loops of commercial-off-the-shelf UHF RFID tags for efficient energy harvesting from tailored magnetic fields. The RFID+ delivers a level of spatial precision comparable to that of HF NFC systems, effectively mitigating issues of miss-reading and cross-reading. Our primary contributions reside in the development of a specialized multi-turn, capacitor-segmented coil antenna and an innovative fast inventory algorithm. The RFID+ seamlessly integrates traditional radiative coupling with the innovative magnetic coupling in UHF RFID systems, bolstering their overall performance and efficiency. Real-world pilot studies in warehouses and logistics settings reveal that RFID+ significantly diminishes the miss-reading rate from 22.9% down to a remarkable 1.06%, while entirely eliminating cross-reading challenges. Moreover, our RFID+ variant demonstrates better resilience against materials traditionally challenging for UHF RFID, such as water bottles and containers. These advancements make RFID+ exceedingly relevant for practical applications in logistical networks.
papers.abstract_zh: 在 UHF RFID 技术的快节奏环境中，实现精确的空间选择性识别对于物流和零售领域至关重要。这项工作介绍了 RFID+，这是一种磁力驱动的 UHF RFID 系统，它利用商用现成 UHF RFID 标签的匹配环路，从定制的磁场中高效收集能量。 RFID+ 提供与 HF NFC 系统相当的空间精度，有效减少误读和交叉读取问题。我们的主要贡献在于开发了专门的多匝、电容器分段线圈天线和创新的快速库存算法。 RFID+ 将传统的辐射耦合与 UHF RFID 系统中的创新磁耦合无缝集成，提高了其整体性能和效率。仓库和物流环境中的实际试点研究表明，RFID+ 将误读率从 22.9% 显着降低至 1.06%，同时完全消除了交叉阅读挑战。此外，我们的 RFID+ 变体对传统上对 UHF RFID 具有挑战性的材料（例如水瓶和容器）表现出更好的弹性。这些进步使得 RFID+ 与物流网络的实际应用极为相关。

papers.title: Seer: Enabling Future-Aware Online Caching in Networked Systems.
papers.abstract: State-intensive network and distributed applications rely heavily on online caching heuristics for high performance. However, there remains a fundamental performance gap between online caching heuristics and the optimal offline caching algorithm due to the lack of visibility into future state access requests in an online setting. Driven by the observation that state access requests in network and distributed applications are often carried in incoming network packets, we present Seer, an online caching solution for networked systems, that exploits the delays experienced by a packet inside a network—most prominently, transmission and queuing delays—to notify in advance of future packet arrivals to the target network nodes (switches/routers/middleboxes/end-hosts) implementing caching. Using this as a building block, Seer presents the design of an online cache manager that leverages visibility into (partial) set of future state access requests to make smarter prefetching and cache eviction decisions. Our evaluations show that Seer achieves up to 65% lower cache miss ratio and up to 78% lower flow completion time compared to LRU for key network applications over realistic workloads.
papers.abstract_zh: 状态密集型网络和分布式应用程序严重依赖在线缓存启发式方法来获得高性能。然而，由于缺乏对在线设置中未来状态访问请求的可见性，在线缓存启发法和最佳离线缓存算法之间仍然存在根本的性能差距。由于网络和分布式应用程序中的状态访问请求通常在传入网络数据包中携带，我们提出了 Seer，这是一种用于网络系统的在线缓存解决方案，它利用网络内数据包所经历的延迟（最突出的是传输和排队延迟）来提前通知未来数据包到达实现缓存的目标网络节点（交换机/路由器/中间盒/终端主机）。 Seer 以此为构建块，提出了在线缓存管理器的设计，该管理器利用对（部分）未来状态访问请求集的可见性来做出更智能的预取和缓存驱逐决策。我们的评估表明，对于实际工作负载下的关键网络应用程序，与 LRU 相比，Seer 的缓存未命中率降低了 65%，流程完成时间缩短了 78%。

papers.title: Sequence Abstractions for Flexible, Line-Rate Network Monitoring.
papers.abstract: We develop FLM, a high-level language that enables network operators to write programs that recognize and react to specific packet sequences. To be able to examine every packet, our compilation procedure can transform FLM programs into P4 code that can run on programmable switch ASICs. It first splits FLM programs into a state management component and a classical regular expression, then generates an efficient implementation of the regular expression using SMT-based program synthesis. Our experiments find that FLM can express 15 sequence monitoring tasks drawn from prior literature. Our compiler can convert all of these programs to run on switch hardware in way that fit within available pipeline stages and consume less than 15% additional header fields and instruction words when run alongside switch programs.
papers.abstract_zh: 我们开发了 FLM，这是一种高级语言，使网络运营商能够编写能够识别特定数据包序列并做出反应的程序。为了能够检查每个数据包，我们的编译程序可以将 FLM 程序转换为可以在可编程交换机 ASIC 上运行的 P4 代码。它首先将 FLM 程序拆分为状态管理组件和经典正则表达式，然后使用基于 SMT 的程序合成生成正则表达式的高效实现。我们的实验发现 FLM 可以表达从先前文献中提取的 15 种序列监控任务。我们的编译器可以将所有这些程序转换为在交换机硬件上运行，以适合可用的流水线阶段，并且在与交换机程序一起运行时消耗不到 15% 的额外标头字段和指令字。

papers.title: Sidekick: In-Network Assistance for Secure End-to-End Transport Protocols.
papers.abstract: In response to concerns about protocol ossification and privacy, post-TCP transport protocols such as QUIC and Web-RTC include end-to-end encryption and authentication at the transport layer. This makes their packets opaque to middleboxes, freeing the transport protocol to evolve but preventing some in-network innovations and performance improvements. This paper describes sidekick protocols : an approach to in-network assistance for opaque transport protocols where in-network intermediaries help endpoints by sending information adjacent to the underlying connection, which remains opaque and unmodified on the wire. A key technical challenge is how the sidekick connection can efficiently refer to ranges of packets of the underlying connection without the ability to observe cleartext sequence numbers. We present a mathematical tool called a quACK that concisely represents a selective acknowledgment of opaque packets, without access to cleartext sequence numbers. In real-world and emulation-based evaluations, the sidekick improved performance in several scenarios: early retransmission over lossy Wi-Fi paths, proxy acknowledgments to save energy, and a path-aware congestion-control mechanism we call PACUBIC that emulates a "split" connection.
papers.abstract_zh: 为了应对协议僵化和隐私问题，QUIC 和 Web-RTC 等后 TCP 传输协议在传输层加入了端到端加密和身份验证。这使得它们的数据包对中间盒不透明，从而使传输协议得以自由发展，但阻碍了一些网络内创新和性能改进。本文描述了 sidekick 协议：一种针对不透明传输协议的网络内协助方法，其中网络中介通过发送与底层连接相邻的信息来帮助端点，该信息在网络上保持不透明且未经修改。一个关键的技术挑战是 sidekick 连接如何能够有效地引用底层连接的数据包范围，而无需观察明文序列号。我们提出了一种称为 quACK 的数学工具，它简明地表示对不透明数据包的选择性确认，而无需访问明文序列号。在现实世界和基于仿真的评估中，Sidekick 在多种场景中提高了性能：有损 Wi-Fi 路径上的早期重传、节省能源的代理确认，以及我们称为 PACUBIC 的路径感知拥塞控制机制，该机制模拟“分离”连接。

papers.title: SIEVE is Simpler than LRU: an Efficient Turn-Key Eviction Algorithm for Web Caches.
papers.abstract: Caching is an indispensable technique for low-cost and fast data serving. The eviction algorithm, at the heart of a cache, has been primarily designed to maximize efficiency—reducing the cache miss ratio. Many eviction algorithms have been designed in the past decades. However, they all trade off throughput, simplicity, or both for higher efficiency. Such a compromise often hinders adoption in production systems. This work presents SIEVE, an algorithm that is simpler than LRU and provides better than state-of-the-art efficiency and scalability for web cache workloads.
