We implemented SIEVE in five production cache libraries, requiring fewer than 20 lines of code changes on average. Our evaluation on 1559 cache traces from 7 sources shows that SIEVE achieves up to 63.2% lower miss ratio than ARC. Moreover, SIEVE has a lower miss ratio than 9 state-of-the-art algorithms on more than 45% of the 1559 traces, while the next best algorithm only has a lower miss ratio on 15%. SIEVE's simplicity comes with superior scalability as cache hits require no locking. Our prototype achieves twice the throughput of an optimized 16-thread LRU implementation. SIEVE is more than an eviction algorithm; it can be used as a cache primitive to build advanced eviction algorithms just like FIFO and LRU.
papers.abstract_zh: 缓存是低成本、快速数据服务不可或缺的技术。驱逐算法是缓存的核心，其主要设计目的是最大限度地提高效率，从而降低缓存未命中率。在过去的几十年里，人们设计了许多驱逐算法。然而，它们都以吞吐量、简单性或两者兼而有之来换取更高的效率。这种妥协通常会阻碍生产系统的采用。这项工作提出了 SIEVE，这是一种比 LRU 更简单的算法，可为 Web 缓存工作负载提供优于最先进的效率和可扩展性。我们在五个生产缓存库中实现了 SIEVE，平均需要不到 20 行代码更改。我们对来自 7 个来源的 1559 条缓存跟踪的评估表明，SIEVE 的未命中率比 ARC 降低了 63.2%。此外，SIEVE 在 1559 条轨迹中超过 45% 的缺失率低于 9 个最先进的算法，而次优算法仅在 15% 的缺失率上较低。 SIEVE 的简单性带来了卓越的可扩展性，因为缓存命中不需要锁定。我们的原型实现的吞吐量是优化的 16 线程 LRU 实现的两倍。 SIEVE 不仅仅是一种驱逐算法；它可以用作缓存原语来构建高级驱逐算法，就像 FIFO 和 LRU 一样。

papers.title: Sifter: An Inversion-Free and Large-Capacity Programmable Packet Scheduler.
papers.abstract: Packet schedulers play a crucial role in determining the order in which packets are served. They achieve this by assigning a rank to each packet and sorting them based on these ranks. However, when dealing with a large number of flows at high packet rates, sorting functions can become extremely complex and time-consuming. To address this issue, fast-approximating packet schedulers have been proposed, but they come with the risk of producing scheduling errors, or packet inversions, which can lead to undesirable consequences. We present Sifter, a programmable packet scheduler that offers high accuracy and large capacity while ensuring inversion-free operation. Sifter employs a unique sorting technique called “Sift Sorting” to coarsely sort packets with larger ranks into buckets, while accurately and finely sorting those with smaller ranks using a small Push-In-First-Out (PIFO) queue in parallel. The sorting process takes advantage of the “Speed-up Factor”, which is a function of the memory bandwidth to output link bandwidth ratio, to achieve Sift Sorting and ensure accurate scheduling with low resource consumption. Sifter combines the benefits of PIFO’s accuracy and FIFO-based schedulers’ large capacity, resulting in guaranteed delivery of packets in an accurate scheduling order. Our simulation results demonstrate Sifter’s efficiency in achieving inversion-free scheduling, while the FPGA-based hardware prototype validates that Sifter supports a throughput of 100Gbps without packet inversion errors.
papers.abstract_zh: 数据包调度程序在确定数据包的服务顺序方面发挥着至关重要的作用。他们通过为每个数据包分配一个等级并根据这些等级对它们进行排序来实现这一点。然而，当以高数据包速率处理大量流时，排序功能可能变得极其复杂且耗时。为了解决这个问题，人们提出了快速逼近数据包调度器，但它们存在产生调度错误或数据包反转的风险，这可能会导致不良后果。我们推出了 Sifter，一种可编程数据包调度器，可提供高精度和大容量，同时确保无反转操作。 Sifter 采用一种称为“筛选排序”的独特排序技术，将排名较大的数据包粗略地分类到存储桶中，同时使用小型推入先出 (PIFO) 并行队列对排名较小的数据包进行精确、精细的排序。排序过程利用“加速因子”（内存带宽与输出链路带宽比的函数）来实现Sift排序，并确保在低资源消耗的情况下准确调度。 Sifter 结合了 PIFO 的准确性和基于 FIFO 的调度程序的大容量的优点，从而保证按照准确的调度顺序传送数据包。我们的仿真结果证明了 Sifter 在实现无反转调度方面的效率，而基于 FPGA 的硬件原型验证了 Sifter 支持 100Gbps 的吞吐量，且没有数据包反转错误。

papers.title: Sirius: Composing Network Function Chains into P4-Capable Edge Gateways.
papers.abstract: Alibaba Cloud designs and deploys P4-capable gateway to accelerate the processing of the diverse business traffics in the edge cloud. Since the programmable ASIC in the gateway only accepts a monolithic, pipelined P4 program, the dozens network function chains for different business traffics have to be composed into one. This is non-trivial due to the contention between the complexity of network function chains and the limited resource in the programmable ASIC. In this paper, we present Sirius, a system that automates network function chain composition process. Sirius synthesizes tables to identify which business traffic the input packet belongs to, pipelines loops in the merged network function graph via recirculations, and partitions the graph between programmable ASIC and CPU when the required memory consumption exceeds the ASIC’s capability. So far, Sirius has automated network function arrangement in hundreds of gateways, and has effectively decreased our programmers’ workload by three orders of magnitude, from weeks to minutes.
papers.abstract_zh: 阿里云设计并部署了支持P4的网关，以加速边缘云多样化业务流量的处理。由于网关中的可编程ASIC只接受单片、流水线的P4程序，因此必须将针对不同业务流量的数十个网络功能链组合成一个。由于网络功能链的复杂性和可编程 ASIC 中的有限资源之间的争用，这一点并不简单。在本文中，我们提出了 Sirius，一个自动化网络功能链组成过程的系统。 Sirius 综合表格来识别输入数据包所属的业务流量，通过再循环在合并的网络功能图中进行管道循环，并在所需的内存消耗超出 ASIC 的能力时在可编程 ASIC 和 CPU 之间划分图形。到目前为止，Sirius已经在数百个网关中实现了网络功能的自动化部署，并有效地将我们程序员的工作量减少了三个数量级，从几周减少到几分钟。

papers.title: SMUFF: Towards Line Rate Wi-Fi Direct Transport with Orchestrated On-device Buffer Management.
papers.abstract: Wi-Fi direct transport provides versatile connectivity that enables convenient data sharing and improves the productivity of mobile end users. However, as today's smartphones are capable of near-Gbps wireless data rates, current solutions do not efficiently utilize the available bandwidth in this single-hop environment. We show that existing transport schemes suffer from resource-intensive reliable delivery mechanisms, inadequate congestion control, and inefficient flow control for achieving line-rate transmission in peer-to-peer Wi-Fi direct links. In this paper, we present SMUFF, a reliable file transfer service that achieves nearly the practical line rate of the underlying wireless bandwidth. We note a unique feature of direct transport—the sender can monitor each buffer along the data path and determine an optimal sending rate accordingly. Therefore, SMUFF can maximize throughput by strategically backlogging the appropriate amount of data in the bottleneck buffer. We have deployed SMUFF on four different phone models, and our evaluations with other transport schemes show that SMUFF achieves up to 94.7% of the practical line rate and 22.6% throughput improvement with a 37% reduction in CPU usage and a 15% reduction in power consumption, compared to state-of-the-art solutions.
papers.abstract_zh: Wi-Fi 直连传输提供多功能连接，可实现便捷的数据共享并提高移动终端用户的工作效率。然而，由于当今的智能手机能够实现接近 Gbps 的无线数据速率，因此当前的解决方案无法有效利用这种单跳环境中的可用带宽。我们表明，现有的传输方案存在资源密集型的可靠传输机制、拥塞控制不足以及在点对点 Wi-Fi 直接链路中实现线速传输的低效流量控制等问题。在本文中，我们提出了 SMUFF，这是一种可靠的文件传输服务，可实现接近底层无线带宽的实际线路速率。我们注意到直接传输的一个独特功能 - 发送方可以监视数据路径上的每个缓冲区并相应地确定最佳发送速率。因此，SMUFF 可以通过策略性地在瓶颈缓冲区中积压适当数量的数据来最大化吞吐量。我们在四种不同的手机型号上部署了 SMUFF，我们对其他传输方案的评估表明，与最先进的解决方案相比，SMUFF 实现了高达 94.7% 的实际线路速率和 22.6% 的吞吐量提升，同时 CPU 使用率降低了 37%，功耗降低了 15%。

papers.title: Solving Max-Min Fair Resource Allocations Quickly on Large Graphs.
papers.abstract: We consider the max-min fair resource allocation problem. The best-known solutions use either a sequence of optimizations or waterfilling, which only applies to a narrow set of cases. These solutions have become a practical bottleneck in WAN traffic engineering and cluster scheduling, especially at larger problem sizes. We improve both approaches: (1) we show how to convert the optimization sequence into a single fast optimization, and (2) we generalize waterfilling to the multi-path case. We empirically show our new algorithms Pareto-dominate prior techniques: they produce faster, fairer, and more efficient allocations. Some of our allocators also have theoretical guarantees: they trade off a bounded amount of unfairness for faster allocation. We have deployed our allocators in Azure's WAN traffic engineering pipeline, where we preserve solution quality and achieve a roughly 3× speedup.
papers.abstract_zh: 我们考虑最大-最小公平资源分配问题。最著名的解决方案使用一系列优化或注水，这仅适用于少数情况。这些解决方案已成为 WAN 流量工程和集群调度的实际瓶颈，尤其是在问题规模较大时。我们改进了这两种方法：（1）我们展示了如何将优化序列转换为单个快速优化，（2）我们将注水推广到多路径情况。我们凭经验证明我们的新算法帕累托主导现有技术：它们产生更快、更公平、更有效的分配。我们的一些分配者也有理论上的保证：他们会牺牲有限的不公平性来换取更快的分配。我们已在 Azure 的 WAN 流量工程管道中部署了分配器，在其中我们保持了解决方案质量并实现了大约 3 倍的加速。

papers.title: Spectrumize: Spectrum-efficient Satellite Networks for the Internet of Things.
papers.abstract: Low Earth Orbit satellite constellations are gaining traction for providing connectivity to low-power outdoor Internet of Things (IoT) devices. This is made possible by the development of low-cost, low-complexity pico-satellites that can be easily launched, offering global connectivity without the need for Earth-based gateways. In this paper, we report the space-to-Earth communication bottlenecks derived from our experience of deploying an IoT satellite. Specifically, we characterize the challenges posed by the low link budgets, satellite motion, and packet collisions. To address these challenges, we design a new class of technique that use the Doppler shift caused by the satellite's motion as a unique signature for packet detection and decoding, even at low signal-to-noise ratios and in the presence of collisions. We integrate these techniques into our system, called Spectrumize, and evaluate its performance through both simulations and real-world deployments. Our evaluation shows that Spectrumize performs 3x better compared to classic approach in detecting packet with over 80% average accuracy in decoding.
papers.abstract_zh: 近地轨道卫星星座因提供低功耗户外物联网 (IoT) 设备连接而受到越来越多的关注。这是通过开发低成本、低复杂性的微微卫星而实现的，这些卫星可以轻松发射，无需地面网关即可提供全球连接。在本文中，我们报告了根据我们部署物联网卫星的经验得出的空对地通信瓶颈。具体来说，我们描述了低链路预算、卫星运动和数据包冲突带来的挑战。为了应对这些挑战，我们设计了一种新型技术，即使在低信噪比和存在冲突的情况下，也可以使用卫星运动引起的多普勒频移作为数据包检测和解码的独特签名。我们将这些技术集成到我们的系统中，称为 Spectrumize，并通过模拟和实际部署来评估其性能。我们的评估表明，与传统方法相比，Spectrumize 在检测数据包方面的性能提高了 3 倍，解码的平均准确率超过 80%。

papers.title: Sprinter: Speeding Up High-Fidelity Crawling of the Modern Web.
papers.abstract: Crawling the web at scale forms the basis of many important systems: web search engines, smart assistants, generative AI, web archives, and so on. Yet, the research community has paid little attention to this workload in the last decade. In this paper, we highlight the need to revisit the notion that web crawling is a solved problem. Specifically, to discover and fetch all page resources dependent on JavaScript and modern web APIs, crawlers today have to employ compute-intensive web browsers. This significantly inflates the scale of the infrastructure necessary to crawl pages at high throughput. To make web crawling more efficient without any loss of fidelity, we present Sprinter, which combines browser-based and browserless crawling to get the best of both. The key to Sprinter’s design is our observation that crawling workloads typically include many pages from every site that is crawled and, unlike in traditional user-facing page loads, there is significant potential to reuse client-side computations across pages. Taking advantage of this property, Sprinter crawls a small, carefully chosen, subset of pages on each site using a browser, and then efficiently identifies and exploits opportunities to reuse the browser’s computations on other pages. Sprinter was able to crawl a corpus of 50,000 pages 5x faster than browser-based crawling, while still closely matching a browser in the set of resources fetched.
papers.abstract_zh: 大规模的网络爬行构成了许多重要系统的基础：网络搜索引擎、智能助手、生成式人工智能、网络档案等等。然而，在过去的十年里，研究界很少关注这一工作量。在本文中，我们强调需要重新审视网络爬行是一个已解决的问题这一概念。具体来说，为了发现和获取依赖于 JavaScript 和现代 Web API 的所有页面资源，当今的爬虫必须使用计算密集型 Web 浏览器。这大大增加了以高吞吐量抓取页面所需的基础设施的规模。为了使网络爬行更加高效而不损失任何保真度，我们推出了 Sprinter，它结合了基于浏览器的爬行和无浏览器爬行，以充分利用两者的优势。 Sprinter 设计的关键是我们的观察，即抓取工作负载通常包括来自每个被抓取站点的许多页面，并且与传统的面向用户的页面加载不同，跨页面重用客户端计算具有巨大的潜力。利用这一特性，Sprinter 使用浏览器在每个站点上抓取一小部分精心选择的页面子集，然后有效地识别和利用在其他页面上重用浏览器计算的机会。 Sprinter 能够以比基于浏览器的抓取速度快 5 倍的速度抓取 50,000 个页面的语料库，同时在获取的资源集中仍然与浏览器紧密匹配。

papers.title: SwiftPaxos: Fast Geo-Replicated State Machines.
papers.abstract: Cloud services improve their availability by replicating data across sites in different geographical regions. A variety of state-machine replication protocols have been proposed for this setting that reduce the latency under workloads with low contention. However, when contention increases, these protocols may deliver lower performance than Paxos. This paper introduces SwiftPaxos—a protocol that lowers the best-case latency in comparison to Paxos without hurting the worst-case one. SwiftPaxos executes a command in 2 message delays if there is no contention, and in 3 message delays otherwise. To achieve this, the protocol allows replicas to vote on the order in which they receive state-machine commands. Differently from previous protocols, SwiftPaxos permits a replica to vote twice: first for its own ordering proposal, and then to follow the leader. This mechanism avoids restarting the voting process when a disagreement occurs among replicas, saving computation time and message delays. Our evaluation shows that the throughput of SwiftPaxos is up to 2.9x better than state-of-the-art alternatives.
papers.abstract_zh: 云服务通过在不同地理区域的站点之间复制数据来提高其可用性。为此设置提出了各种状态机复制协议，以减少低争用工作负载下的延迟。然而，当争用增加时，这些协议的性能可能会低于 Paxos。本文介绍了 SwiftPaxos——一种与 Paxos 相比可以降低最佳情况延迟而不影响最坏情况延迟的协议。如果没有争用，SwiftPaxos 将在 2 个消息延迟内执行命令，否则在 3 个消息延迟内执行命令。为了实现这一点，该协议允许副本对它们接收状态机命令的顺序进行投票。与以前的协议不同，SwiftPaxos 允许副本投票两次：首先是为自己的排序提案投票，然后是跟随领导者。这种机制避免了当副本之间出现分歧时重新启动投票过程，从而节省了计算时间和消息延迟。我们的评估表明，SwiftPaxos 的吞吐量比最先进的替代方案高出 2.9 倍。

papers.title: Swing: Short-cutting Rings for Higher Bandwidth Allreduce.
papers.abstract: The allreduce collective operation accounts for a significant fraction of the runtime of workloads running on distributed systems. One factor determining its performance is the number of hops between communicating nodes, especially on networks like torus, where a higher number of hops implies multiple messages being forwarded on the same link, thus reducing the allreduce bandwidth. Torus networks are widely used on systems optimized for machine learning workloads (e.g., Google TPUs and Amazon Trainium devices), as well as on some of the Top500 supercomputers. To improve allreduce performance on torus networks we introduce Swing, a new algorithm that reduces the number of hops between communicating nodes by swinging between torus directions. Our analysis and experimental evaluation show that Swing outperforms by up to 3x existing allreduce algorithms for vectors ranging from 32B to 128MiB, on different types of torus and torus-like topologies, regardless of their shape and size.
papers.abstract_zh: allreduce 集体操作占分布式系统上运行的工作负载运行时间的很大一部分。决定其性能的因素之一是通信节点之间的跳数，尤其是在像环面这样的网络上，跳数越高意味着在同一链路上转发多个消息，从而减少所有带宽。环面网络广泛应用于针对机器学习工作负载优化的系统（例如 Google TPU 和 Amazon Trainium 设备）以及一些 Top500 超级计算机上。为了提高环面网络上的 allreduce 性能，我们引入了 Swing，这是一种新算法，通过在环面方向之间摆动来减少通信节点之间的跳数。我们的分析和实验评估表明，对于 32B 到 128MiB 的矢量，在不同类型的环面和类环面拓扑上，Swing 的性能比现有的 allreduce 算法高出多达 3 倍，无论其形状和大小如何。

papers.title: TANGO: Secure Collaborative Route Control across the Public Internet.
papers.abstract: As the demands of modern latency-critical applications grow, major service providers are seeking to meet those demands by expanding their infrastructure to the edge and offering global connectivity through private WANs or Network-as-a-Service solutions. Unfortunately, these approaches are costly for smaller edge networks and lead to Internet consolidation. Worse, since the public Internet suffers from limited visibility and control over interdomain routing, smaller edges today are left with poor alternatives outside of joining the hypergiants. As a new alternative, we introduce TANGO, which enables smaller edges to expose paths and exert route control over the public Internet without relying on third parties or cooperation from the Internet core , to dynamically meet the performance needs of their customers. We show that, using collaboration, TANGO edges can jointly (i) expose more BGP-compliant wide-area paths via coordinated BGP advertisements; (ii) collect fine-grained, trustworthy telemetry using cryptographically-protected custom headers; and (iii) dynamically reroute traffic in the data plane. TANGO innovates in both the control and data planes, and runs on a programmable switch or in eBPF. Our Internet-scale experiments uncover rich path diversity, exposing paths that outperform the default BGP path 75-100% of the time for 20 edge pairs across multiple continents, while reducing latency by up to 39% compared to the default.
papers.abstract_zh: 随着现代延迟关键型应用程序的需求不断增长，主要服务提供商正在寻求通过将其基础设施扩展到边缘并通过专用 WAN 或网络即服务解决方案提供全球连接来满足这些需求。不幸的是，这些方法对于较小的边缘网络来说成本高昂，并会导致互联网整合。更糟糕的是，由于公共互联网的可见性和对域间路由的控制有限，如今较小的边缘除了加入超级巨头之外没有其他选择。作为一种新的替代方案，我们引入了 TANGO，它使较小的边缘能够在公共互联网上公开路径并实施路由控制，而无需依赖第三方或互联网核心的合作，从而动态满足客户的性能需求。我们表明，通过协作，TANGO 边缘可以共同 (i) 通过协调的 BGP 通告公开更多符合 BGP 的广域路径； (ii) 使用受加密保护的自定义标头收集细粒度、值得信赖的遥测数据； (iii) 动态地重新路由数据平面中的流量。 TANGO 在控制平面和数据平面上都进行了创新，并在可编程交换机或 eBPF 上运行。我们的互联网规模实验揭示了丰富的路径多样性，对于跨多个大陆的 20 个边缘对，暴露的路径在 75-100% 的情况下优于默认 BGP 路径，同时与默认值相比，延迟降低高达 39%。

papers.title: TECC: Towards Efficient QUIC Tunneling via Collaborative Transmission Control.
papers.abstract: In this paper, we present TECC, a system based on collaborative transmission control that mitigates the mismatch of sending behavior between the inner and outer connections to achieve efficient QUIC tunneling. In TECC, a feedback framework is implemented to enable end hosts to collect more precise network information that is sensed on the tunnel server, which assists the inner end-to-end connection to achieve better congestion control and loss recovery. Extensive experiments in emulated networks and real-world large-scale A/B tests demonstrate the efficiency of TECC. Specifically, compared with the state-of-the-art QUIC tunneling solution, TECC significantly reduces flow completion time. In emulated networks, TECC decreases flow completion time by 30% on average and 53% at the 99th percentile. TECC also gains a reduction in RPC (Remote Procedure Call) request completion time of 3.9% on average and 13.3% at the 99th percentile in large-scale A/B tests.
papers.abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们提出了 TECC，这是一种基于协作传输控制的系统，可以减轻内部和外部连接之间发送行为的不匹配，以实现高效的 QUIC 隧道。在TECC中，实现了反馈框架，使终端主机能够收集隧道服务器上感知到的更精确的网络信息，这有助于内部端到端连接实现更好的拥塞控制和丢失恢复。仿真网络和现实世界大规模 A/B 测试中的大量实验证明了 TECC 的效率。具体来说，与最先进的 QUIC 隧道解决方案相比，TECC 显着缩短了流程完成时间。在仿真网络中，TECC 将流量完成时间平均缩短了 30%，在第 99 个百分位数时缩短了 53%。 TECC 还使 RPC（远程过程调用）请求完成时间平均缩短了 3.9%，在大规模 A/B 测试中，第 99 个百分点缩短了 13.3%。

papers.title: THC: Accelerating Distributed Deep Learning Using Tensor Homomorphic Compression.
papers.abstract: Deep neural networks (DNNs) are the de facto standard for essential use cases, such as image classification, computer vision, and natural language processing. As DNNs and datasets get larger, they require distributed training on increasingly larger clusters. A main bottleneck is the resulting communication overhead where workers exchange model updates (i.e., gradients) on a per-round basis. To address this bottleneck and accelerate training, a widely-deployed approach is compression. However, previous deployments often apply bi-directional compression schemes by simply using a uni-directional gradient compression scheme in each direction. This results in significant computational overheads at the parameter server and increased compression error, leading to longer training and lower accuracy. We introduce Tensor Homomorphic Compression (THC), a novel bi-directional compression framework that enables the direct aggregation of compressed values and thus eliminating the aforementioned computational overheads. Moreover, THC is compatible with in-network aggregation (INA), which allows for further acceleration. Our evaluation shows that training representative vision and language models with THC reaches target accuracy by 1.40× to 1.47× faster using INA and 1.28× to 1.33× faster using a software PS compared with state-of-the-art systems.
papers.abstract_zh: 深度神经网络 (DNN) 是图像分类、计算机视觉和自然语言处理等基本用例的事实上的标准。随着 DNN 和数据集变得越来越大，它们需要在越来越大的集群上进行分布式训练。主要瓶颈是由此产生的通信开销，其中工作人员每轮交换模型更新（即梯度）。为了解决这个瓶颈并加速训练，一种广泛部署的方法是压缩。然而，以前的部署通常通过在每个方向简单地使用单向梯度压缩方案来应用双向压缩方案。这会导致参数服务器产生大量计算开销并增加压缩误差，从而导致训练时间更长和准确性降低。我们引入张量同态压缩（THC），这是一种新颖的双向压缩框架，可以直接聚合压缩值，从而消除上述计算开销。此外，THC 与网内聚合 (INA) 兼容，可以进一步加速。我们的评估表明，与最先进的系统相比，使用 THC 训练代表性视觉和语言模型，使用 INA 训练的目标准确度要快 1.40 倍到 1.47 倍，使用软件 PS 的目标准确度要快 1.28 倍到 1.33 倍。

papers.title: The Bedrock of Byzantine Fault Tolerance: A Unified Platform for BFT Protocols Analysis, Implementation, and Experimentation.
papers.abstract: Byzantine Fault-Tolerant (BFT) protocols cover a broad spectrum of design dimensions from infrastructure settings, such as the communication topology, to more technical features, such as commitment strategy and even fundamental social choice properties like order-fairness. The proliferation of different protocols has made it difficult to navigate the BFT landscape, let alone determine the protocol that best meets application needs. This paper presents Bedrock, a unified platform for BFT protocols analysis, implementation, and experimentation. Bedrock proposes a design space consisting of a set of dimensions and explores several design choices that capture the trade-offs between different design space dimensions. Within Bedrock, a wide range of BFT protocols can be implemented and uniformly evaluated under a unified deployment environment.
papers.abstract_zh: 拜占庭容错（BFT）协议涵盖了广泛的设计维度，从基础设施设置（例如通信拓扑）到更多技术功能（例如承诺策略），甚至基本的社会选择属性（例如订单公平）。不同协议的激增使得浏览 BFT 领域变得困难，更不用说确定最能满足应用程序需求的协议了。本文介绍了 Bedrock，一个用于 BFT 协议分析、实现和实验的统一平台。 Bedrock 提出了一个由一组维度组成的设计空间，并探索了几种设计选择，以捕获不同设计空间维度之间的权衡。在Bedrock内，可以在统一的部署环境下实施和统一评估多种BFT协议。

papers.title: The Eternal Tussle: Exploring the Role of Centralization in IPFS.
papers.abstract: Web centralization and consolidation has created potential single points of failure, e.g., in areas such as content hosting, name resolution, and certification. The "Decentralized Web", led by open-source software implementations, attempts to build decentralized alternatives. The InterPlanetary File System (IPFS) is part of this effort and attempts to provide a decentralized layer for object storage and retrieval. This comes with challenges, though: Decentralization can increase complexity, overhead, as well as compromise performance and scalability. As the core maintainers of IPFS, we have therefore begun to explore more hybrid approaches. This paper reports on our experiences building three centralized components within IPFS: (i) InterPlanetary Network Indexers, which provides an alternative centralized method for content indexing; (ii) Hydra Boosters, which are strategic DHT nodes that assist IPFS in content routing; and (iii) HTTP Gateways, which are a public access point for users to retrieve IPFShosted content. Through this approach, we trade-off the level of decentralization within IPFS in an attempt to gain certain benefits of centralization. We evaluate the performance of these components and demonstrate their ability to successfully address the challenges that IPFS faces.
papers.abstract_zh: Web 集中化和整合造成了潜在的单点故障，例如在内容托管、名称解析和认证等领域。以开源软件实现为主导的“去中心化网络”试图构建去中心化的替代方案。星际文件系统（IPFS）是这项工作的一部分，试图为对象存储和检索提供一个分散的层。但这也带来了挑战：去中心化会增加复杂性和开销，并会影响性能和可扩展性。作为IPFS的核心维护者，我们因此开始探索更多混合方法。本文报告了我们在 IPFS 中构建三个集中式组件的经验：（i）星际网络索引器，它为内容索引提供了另一种集中式方法； (ii) Hydra Booster，这是协助 IPFS 进行内容路由的战略 DHT 节点； (iii) HTTP 网关，这是用户检索 IPFS 托管内容的公共访问点。通过这种方法，我们权衡 IPFS 内的去中心化程度，试图获得中心化的某些好处。我们评估这些组件的性能，并证明它们成功解决 IPFS 面临的挑战的能力。

papers.title: Towards Domain-Specific Network Transport for Distributed DNN Training.
papers.abstract: The nature of machine learning (ML) applications exposes rich characteristics to underlying network transport, yet little work has been done so far to systematically exploit these properties in transport layer design. This paper takes the initiative to pursue a domain-specific network transport, called MLT, for distributed DNN training that fully embraces several unique characteristics of machine learning. At its heart, MLT employs three simple-yet-effective techniques to form a 3-step progressive scheme against long tail latency caused by transient packet drops and queueing. First, it leverages the independencies among gradient updates to enable per-packet load balancing to minimize network hotspots without worrying about packet re-ordering. Then, if hotspot arises, it performs priority queueing/dropping by differentiating gradients based on their layers and magnitudes to optimize model convergence and accuracy. Lastly, if drop occurs, it enables bounded-loss tolerance—a certain amount of gradient losses tolerated by the DNN training without affecting the final model performance. MLT is readily deployable with commodity switches and imposes minimal modifications on popular DNN training libraries (e.g., TensorFlow, MXNet and PyTorch) and communication routines (e.g., PS and Ring All-reduce). We show, via both testbed experiments and simulations, that MLT can effectively optimize network tail latency and achieve up to 62.2% better end-to-end training time over prior work.
papers.abstract_zh: 机器学习 (ML) 应用程序的本质向底层网络传输暴露了丰富的特性，但迄今为止，在传输层设计中系统地利用这些特性的工作还很少。本文主动寻求一种称为 MLT 的特定于领域的网络传输，用于完全包含机器学习的几个独特特征的分布式 DNN 训练。从本质上讲，MLT 采用三种简单但有效的技术来形成一个三步渐进方案，以应对由瞬时数据包丢失和排队引起的长尾延迟。首先，它利用梯度更新之间的独立性来实现每个数据包的负载平衡，以最大限度地减少网络热点，而无需担心数据包重新排序。然后，如果出现热点，它会根据梯度的层数和大小来区分梯度，从而执行优先级排队/丢弃，以优化模型收敛性和准确性。最后，如果发生下降，它会启用有界损失容限——DNN 训练可以容忍一定量的梯度损失，而不影响最终的模型性能。 MLT 可以通过商用交换机轻松部署，并对流行的 DNN 训练库（例如 TensorFlow、MXNet 和 PyTorch）和通信例程（例如 PS 和 Ring All-reduce）进行最小程度的修改。通过测试台实验和模拟，我们表明 MLT 可以有效优化网络尾部延迟，并将端到端训练时间比之前的工作缩短 62.2%。

papers.title: Towards Intelligent Automobile Cockpit via A New Container Architecture.
papers.abstract: An intelligent cockpit is now crucial in automobiles, not just to provide digital instrumentation and in-vehicle controls but also to offer a wide range of entertainment functionalities. To cater to the demands of these intelligent vehicles, the automotive industry starts employing virtualization technology to offer a unified hardware and software architecture that can simplify system management and enhance resource utilization. Particularly in the domain of intelligent cockpits, virtualization can tightly integrate systems with different criticality levels (e.g., safety and real-time) on a single hardware platform, improving inter-system communication quality and the timely response to user-initiated requests. Currently, microhypervisor virtualization has been used in production to achieve intelligent automobile cockpit. However, in addition to the performance concern and high production costs, this solution is suffering from the global shortage of chips capable of running microhypervisor systems. Our key insight is that, most functions within intelligent cockpit systems are non-safety-critical and non-real-time multimedia tasks. Based on this characteristic, in this paper we present AutoVP , a new cockpit virtualization architecture. The hardware foundation of AutoVP consists of two low-cost chips: 1) a consumer-grade System-on-Chip (SoC) multi-core processor as the main chip; 2) a typical automotive-grade Microcontroller Unit (MCU) as the auxiliary chip. The MCU auxiliary chip is responsible for hosting real-time and safety-critical tasks, while the SoC main chip primarily handles multimedia tasks, such as entertainment systems and digital instrumentation. Further more, we construct an Android container virtual environment on the SoC main chip. This environment integrates multiple media functions onto a single chip, resulting in efficient utilization of chip computational resources and high system scalability. Our comparative performance evaluation demonstrates that AutoVP is a cost-effective and efficient solution to build intelligent cockpits.
papers.abstract_zh: 智能驾驶舱现在在汽车中至关重要，不仅提供数字仪表和车内控制，还提供广泛的娱乐功能。为了满足这些智能汽车的需求，汽车行业开始采用虚拟化技术来提供统一的硬件和软件架构，以简化系统管理并提高资源利用率。特别是在智能座舱领域，虚拟化可以将不同关键级别（例如安全性和实时性）的系统紧密集成在单一硬件平台上，提高系统间通信质量和对用户发起请求的及时响应。目前，微管理程序虚拟化已经应用于生产，实现智能汽车座舱。然而，除了性能问题和高生产成本之外，该解决方案还面临全球范围内能够运行微管理程序系统的芯片短缺的问题。我们的主要见解是，智能座舱系统中的大多数功能都是非安全关键和非实时多媒体任务。基于这一特点，本文提出了一种新型座舱虚拟化架构AutoVP。 AutoVP的硬件基础由两块低成本芯片组成：1）消费级片上系统（SoC）多核处理器作为主芯片； 2）典型的汽车级微控制器单元（MCU）作为辅助芯片。 MCU辅助芯片负责托管实时和安全关键任务，而SoC主芯片主要处理多媒体任务，例如娱乐系统和数字仪器。进一步，我们在SoC主芯片上构建了Android容器虚拟环境。该环境将多种媒体功能集成到单个芯片上，从而有效利用芯片计算资源和高系统可扩展性。我们的比较性能评估表明，AutoVP 是构建智能座舱的经济高效的解决方案。

papers.title: Towards provably performant congestion control.
papers.abstract: We seek to ease the design of congestion control algorithms (CCAs) that provably perform well under diverse network scenarios including, cellular links, policers, token bucket filters, operating system jitter, etc. Guaranteeing performance under such conditions is hard as it requires considering combinatorial possibilities of CCA and network interactions. We build a framework that allows us to reason about CCAs. It describes (1) the necessary actions that any performant CCA must take, and (2) a provably sufficient amount of information for CCAs to consider when deciding their sending rate. Combining this framework with techniques in formal methods, we synthesize CCAs that provably perform across a diverse set of network conditions. Our methodology also led us to discover and prove fundamental impossibility results.
papers.abstract_zh: 我们寻求简化拥塞控制算法 (CCA) 的设计，使其在不同的网络场景下表现良好，包括蜂窝链路、监管器、令牌桶过滤器、操作系统抖动等。在这种条件下保证性能很困难，因为它需要考虑 CCA 和网络交互的组合可能性。我们建立了一个框架来推理 CCA。它描述了 (1) 任何高性能 CCA 必须采取的必要操作，以及 (2) CCA 在决定其发送速率时需要考虑的可证明足够的信息量。将该框架与形式化方法中的技术相结合，我们合成了可在多种网络条件下运行的 CCA。我们的方法还引导我们发现并证明根本不可能的结果。

papers.title: UFO: The Ultimate QoS-Aware Core Management for Virtualized and Oversubscribed Public Clouds.
papers.abstract: Public clouds typically adopt (1) multi-tenancy to increase server utilization; (2) virtualization to provide isolation between different tenants; (3) oversubscription of resources to further increase resource efficiency. However, prior work all focuses on optimizing one or two elements, and fails to considerately bring QoS-aware multi-tenancy, virtualization and resource oversubscription together. We find three challenges when the three elements coexist. First, the double scheduling symptoms are 10x worse with latency-critical (LC) workloads which are comprised of numerous sub-millisecond tasks and are significantly different from conventional batch applications. Second, inner-VM resource contention also exists between threads of the same VM when running LC applications, calling for inner-VM core isolation. Third, no application-level performance metrics can be obtained by the host to guide resource management in realistic public clouds. To address these challenges, we propose a QoS-aware core manager dubbed UFO to specifically support co-location of multiple LC workloads in virtualized and oversubscribed public cloud environments. UFO solves the three above-mentioned challenges, by (1) coordinating the guest and host CPU cores (vCPU-pCPU coordination), and (2) doing fine-grained inner-VM resource isolation, to push core management in realistic public clouds to the extreme. Compared with the state-of-the-art core manager, it saves up to 50% (average of 22%) of physical cores under the same co-location scenario.
papers.abstract_zh: 公有云通常采用（1）多租户来提高服务器利用率； (2)虚拟化以提供不同租户之间的隔离； (3)超额认购资源，进一步提高资源效率。然而，现有的工作都集中在优化一两个元素上，而未能充分考虑将QoS感知的多租户、虚拟化和资源超额订阅结合在一起。当这三个要素共存时，我们发现了三个挑战。首先，对于延迟关键 (LC) 工作负载，双重调度症状会严重 10 倍，这些工作负载由大量亚毫秒级任务组成，与传统批处理应用程序显着不同。其次，运行LC应用时，同一VM的线程之间也存在VM内部资源争用，需要VM内部核心隔离。第三，主机无法获得应用程序级性能指标来指导现实公共云中的资源管理。为了应对这些挑战，我们提出了一种名为 UFO 的 QoS 感知核心管理器，专门支持虚拟化和超额订阅的公共云环境中多个 LC 工作负载的共置。 UFO通过（1）协调Guest和Host CPU核心（vCPU-pCPU协调）和（2）进行细粒度的VM内部资源隔离来解决上述三个挑战，将现实公共云中的核心管理推向极致。与最先进的核心管理器相比，在相同的共置场景下最多可节省 50%（平均为 22%）的物理核心。

papers.title: Understanding Routable PCIe Performance for Composable Infrastructures.
papers.abstract: Routable PCIe has become the predominant cluster interconnect to build emerging composable infrastructures. Empowered by PCIe non-transparent bridge devices, PCIe transactions can traverse multiple switching domains, enabling a server to elastically integrate a number of remote PCIe devices as local ones. However, it is unclear how to move data or perform communication efficiently over the routable PCIe fabric without understanding its capabilities and limitations. This paper presents the design and implementation of rPCIeBench , a software-hardware co-designed benchmarking framework to systematically characterize the routable PCIe fabric. rPCIeBench provides flexible data communication primitives, exposes end-to-end PCIe transaction observability, and enables reconfigurable experiment deployment. Using rPCIeBench, we first analyze the communication characteristics of a routable PCIe path, quantify its performance tax, and compare it with the local PCIe link. We then use it to dissect in-fabric traffic orchestration behaviors and draw three interesting findings: approximate max-min bandwidth partition, fast end-to-end bandwidth synchronization, and interference-free among orthogonal data paths. Finally, we encode gathered characterization insights as traffic orchestration rules and develop an edge constraints relaxing algorithm to estimate PCIe flow transmission performance over a shared fabric. We validate its accuracy and demonstrate its potential to provide an optimization guide to design efficient flow schedulers.
papers.abstract_zh: 可路由 PCIe 已成为构建新兴可组合基础设施的主要集群互连。在PCIe非透明桥接设备的支持下，PCIe事务可以穿越多个交换域，使得服务器能够将多个远程PCIe设备弹性地集成为本地设备。然而，在不了解其功能和限制的情况下，尚不清楚如何通过可路由 PCIe 结构有效地移动数据或执行通信。本文介绍了 rPCIeBench 的设计和实现，rPCIeBench 是一个软件-硬件共同设计的基准测试框架，用于系统地表征可路由 PCIe 结构。 rPCIeBench 提供灵活的数据通信原语，公开端到端 PCIe 事务可观察性，并支持可重新配置的实验部署。使用 rPCIeBench，我们首先分析可路由 PCIe 路径的通信特性，量化其性能负担，并将其与本地 PCIe 链路进行比较。然后，我们使用它来剖析结构内流量编排行为，并得出三个有趣的发现：近似最大-最小带宽划分、快速端到端带宽同步以及正交数据路径之间的无干扰。最后，我们将收集到的表征见解编码为流量编排规则，并开发边缘约束放松算法来估计共享结构上的 PCIe 流传输性能。我们验证其准确性并证明其为设计高效流调度程序提供优化指南的潜力。

papers.title: VILAM: Infrastructure-assisted 3D Visual Localization and Mapping for Autonomous Driving.
papers.abstract: Visual Simultaneous Localization and Mapping (SLAM) presents a promising avenue for fulfilling the essential perception and localization tasks in autonomous driving systems using cost-effective visual sensors. Nevertheless, existing visual SLAM frameworks often suffer from substantial cumulative errors and performance degradation in complicated driving scenarios. In this paper, we propose VILAM, a novel framework that leverages intelligent roadside infrastructures to realize high-precision and globally consistent localization and mapping on autonomous vehicles. The key idea of VILAM is to utilize the precise scene measurement from the infrastructure as global references to correct errors in the local map constructed by the vehicle. To overcome the unique deformation in the 3D local map to align it with the infrastructure measurement, VILAM proposes a novel elastic point cloud registration method that enables independent optimization of different parts of the local map. Moreover, VILAM adopts a lightweight factor graph construction and optimization to first correct the vehicle trajectory, and thus reconstruct the consistent global map efficiently. We implement the VILAM end-to-end on a real-world smart lamppost testbed in multiple road scenarios. Extensive experiment results show that VILAM can achieve decimeter-level localization and mapping accuracy with consumer-level onboard cameras and is robust under diverse road scenarios. A video demo of VILAM on our real-world testbed is available at https://youtu.be/lTlqDNipDVE .
papers.abstract_zh: 视觉同步定位和建图 (SLAM) 为使用经济高效的视觉传感器完成自动驾驶系统中的基本感知和定位任务提供了一种有前途的途径。然而，现有的视觉SLAM框架在复杂的驾驶场景中经常会出现大量的累积误差和性能下降。在本文中，我们提出了 VILAM，这是一种利用智能路边基础设施实现自动驾驶车辆高精度且全球一致的定位和地图绘制的新颖框架。 VILAM 的关键思想是利用基础设施的精确场景测量作为全局参考来纠正车辆构建的局部地图中的错误。为了克服 3D 局部地图中的独特变形，使其与基础设施测量对齐，VILAM 提出了一种新颖的弹性点云配准方法，可以对局部地图的不同部分进行独立优化。此外，VILAM采用轻量级因子图构建和优化，首先校正车辆轨迹，从而有效地重建一致的全局地图。我们在多个道路场景的真实智能灯柱测试台上实现了 VILAM 端到端。大量实验结果表明，VILAM可以通过消费级车载摄像头实现分米级的定位和建图精度，并且在多种道路场景下具有鲁棒性。我们的真实测试平台上的 VILAM 视频演示请访问 https://youtu.be/lTlqDNipDVE 。

papers.title: Vulcan: Automatic Query Planning for Live ML Analytics.
papers.abstract: Live ML analytics have gained increasing popularity with large-scale deployments due to recent evolution of ML technologies. To serve live ML queries, experts nowadays still need to perform manual query planning, which involves pipeline construction, query configuration, and pipeline placement across multiple edge tiers in a heterogeneous infrastructure. Finding the best query plan for a live ML query requires navigating a huge search space, calling for an efficient and systematic solution. In this paper, we propose Vulcan, a system that automatically generates query plans for live ML queries to optimize their accuracy, latency, and resource consumption. Based on the user query and performance requirements, Vulcan determines the best pipeline, placement, and query configuration for the query with low profiling cost; it also performs fast online adaptation after query deployment. Vulcan outperforms state-of-the-art ML analytics systems by 4.1×-30.1× in terms of search cost while delivering up to 3.3× better query latency.
papers.abstract_zh: 由于机器学习技术的最新发展，实时机器学习分析在大规模部署中越来越受欢迎。为了服务实时机器学习查询，专家现在仍然需要执行手动查询规划，这涉及异构基础设施中跨多个边缘层的管道构建、查询配置和管道放置。为实时 ML 查询找到最佳查询计划需要浏览巨大的搜索空间，需要高效且系统的解决方案。在本文中，我们提出了 Vulcan，这是一个自动为实时 ML 查询生成查询计划的系统，以优化其准确性、延迟和资源消耗。根据用户的查询和性能要求，Vulcan以较低的分析成本为查询确定最佳的管道、放置和查询配置；它还在查询部署后执行快速在线适配。就搜索成本而言，Vulcan 的性能比最先进的 ML 分析系统高出 4.1 倍-30.1 倍，同时查询延迟提高了 3.3 倍。

papers.title: Where The Wild Things Are: Brute-Force SSH Attacks In The Wild And How To Stop Them.
papers.abstract: SSH (Secure Shell) is widely used for remote access to systems and cloud services. This access comes with the persistent threat of SSH password-guessing brute-force attacks (BFAs) directed at sshd-enabled devices connected to the Internet. In this work, we present a comprehensive study of such attacks on a production facility (CloudLab), offering previously unreported insight. Our study provides a detailed analysis of SSH BFAs occurring on the Internet today through an in-depth analysis of sshd logs collected over a period of four years from over 500 servers. We report several patterns in attacker behavior, present insight on the targets of the attacks, and devise a method for tracking individual attacks over time across sources. Leveraging our insight, we develop a defense mechanism against SSH BFAs that blocks 99.5% of such attacks, significantly outperforming the 66.1% coverage of current state-of-the-art rate-based blocking while also cutting false positives by 83%. We have deployed our defense in production on CloudLab, where it catches four-fifths of SSH BFAs missed by other defense strategies.
papers.abstract_zh: SSH（Secure Shell）广泛用于远程访问系统和云服务。这种访问伴随着针对连接到互联网的启用 sshd 的设备的 SSH 密码猜测暴力攻击 (BFA) 的持续威胁。在这项工作中，我们对生产设施 (CloudLab) 的此类攻击进行了全面研究，提供了以前未报告的见解。我们的研究通过对四年来从 500 多台服务器收集的 sshd 日志进行深入分析，对当今互联网上发生的 SSH BFA 进行了详细分析。我们报告了攻击者行为的几种模式，提供了对攻击目标的洞察，并设计了一种跨来源跟踪单个攻击的方法。利用我们的洞察力，我们开发了一种针对 SSH BFA 的防御机制，可以阻止 99.5% 的此类攻击，显着优于当前最先进的基于速率的阻止的 66.1% 覆盖率，同时还将误报率降低了 83%。我们已在 CloudLab 上的生产中部署了防御，它捕获了其他防御策略错过的五分之四的 SSH BFA。

papers.title: Zombie: Middleboxes that Don't Snoop.
papers.abstract: Zero-knowledge middleboxes (ZKMBs) are a recent paradigm in which clients get privacy and middleboxes enforce policy: clients prove in zero knowledge that the plaintext underlying their encrypted traffic complies with network policies, such as DNS filtering. However, prior work had impractically poor performance and was limited in functionality. This work presents Zombie, the first system built using the ZKMB paradigm. Zombie introduces techniques that push ZKMBs to the verge of practicality: preprocessing (to move the bulk of proof generation to idle times between requests), asynchrony (to remove proving and verifying costs from the critical path), and batching (to amortize some of the verification work). Zombie’s choices, together with these techniques, reduce client and middlebox overhead by ≈ 3.5×, lowering the critical path overhead for a DNS filtering application on commodity hardware to less than 300ms or, in the asynchronous configuration, to 0. As an additional contribution that is likely of independent interest, Zombie introduces a portfolio of techniques to encode regular expressions in probabilistic (and zero-knowledge) proofs. These techniques significantly improve performance over a standard baseline, asymptotically and concretely. Zombie builds on this portfolio to support policies based on regular expressions, such as data loss prevention.
papers.abstract_zh: 零知识中间盒 (ZKMB) 是一种最新范例，其中客户端获得隐私，中间盒执行策略：客户端以零知识证明其加密流量背后的明文符合网络策略，例如 DNS 过滤。然而，之前的工作性能不佳且功能有限，不切实际。这项工作提出了 Zombie，这是第一个使用 ZKMB 范例构建的系统。 Zombie 引入了将 ZKMB 推向实用边缘的技术：预处理（将大量证明生成转移到请求之间的空闲时间）、异步（从关键路径中消除证明和验证成本）和批处理（分摊部分验证工作）。 Zombie 的选择与这些技术一起，将客户端和中间盒开销减少了约 3.5 倍，将商用硬件上 DNS 过滤应用程序的关键路径开销降低到 300 毫秒以下，或者在异步配置中降低到 0。作为可能具有独立兴趣的额外贡献，Zombie 引入了一系列技术，用于在概率（和零知识）证明中对正则表达式进行编码。这些技术在标准基线上渐进且具体地显着提高了性能。 Zombie 在此产品组合的基础上构建，支持基于正则表达式的策略，例如数据丢失防护。

papers.title: A High-Speed Stateful Packet Processing Approach for Tbps Programmable Switches.
papers.abstract: High-speed ASIC switches hold great promise for offloading complex packet processing pipelines directly in the highspeed data-plane. Yet, a large variety of today's packet processing pipelines, including stateful network functions and packet schedulers, require storing some (or all the) packets for short amount of times in a programmatic manner. Such a programmable buffer feature is missing on today's high-speed ASIC switches. In this work, we present RIBOSOME, a system that extends programmable switches with external memory (to store packets) and external general-purpose packet processing devices such as CPUs or FPGAs (to perform stateful operations). As today's packet processing devices are bottlenecked by their network interface speeds, RIBOSOME carefully transmits only the relevant bits to these devices. RIBOSOME leverages spare bandwidth from any directly connected servers to store the incoming payloads through RDMA. Our evaluation shows that RIBOSOME can process 300G of traffic through a stateful packet processing pipeline (e.g., firewall, load balancer, packet scheduler) by running the pipeline logic on a single server equipped with one 100G interface.
papers.abstract_zh: 高速 ASIC 交换机在直接在高速数据平面中卸载复杂的数据包处理管道方面具有广阔的前景。然而，当今的各种数据包处理管道，包括状态网络功能和数据包调度程序，都需要以编程方式在短时间内存储一些（或全部）数据包。当今的高速 ASIC 交换机缺少这种可编程缓冲器功能。在这项工作中，我们提出了 RIBOSOME，这是一种使用外部存储器（用于存储数据包）和外部通用数据包处理设备（例如 CPU 或 FPGA）（用于执行有状态操作）扩展可编程交换机的系统。由于当今的数据包处理设备受到网络接口速度的瓶颈，RIBOSOME 小心翼翼地仅将相关位传输到这些设备。 RIBOSOME 利用任何直接连接的服务器的空闲带宽通过 RDMA 存储传入的有效负载。我们的评估表明，通过在配备一个 100G 接口的单台服务器上运行管道逻辑，RIBOSOME 可以通过有状态数据包处理管道（例如防火墙、负载均衡器、数据包调度器）处理 300G 的流量。

papers.title: Acoustic Sensing and Communication Using Metasurface.
papers.abstract: Acoustic sensing is increasingly popular owing to widely available devices that support them. Yet the sensing resolution and range are still limited due to limited bandwidth and sharp decay in the signal at inaudible frequencies. Inspired by recent development in acoustic metasurfaces, in this paper, we first perform an in-depth study of acoustic metasurface (AMS) and compare it with the phased array speaker. Our results show that AMS is attractive as it achieves a significant SNR increase while maintaining a compact size. A major limitation of existing AMS is its static configuration. Since our target may be at any possible location, it is important to support scanning in different directions. We develop a novel acoustic system that leverages a metasurface and a small number of speakers. We jointly optimize the configuration of metasurface and transmission signals from the speakers to achieve low-cost dynamic steering. Using a prototype implementation and extensive evaluation, we demonstrate its effectiveness in improving SNR, acoustic sensing accuracy, and acoustic communication reliability over a wide range of scenarios.
papers.abstract_zh: 由于支持声学传感的设备广泛存在，声学传感越来越受欢迎。然而，由于带宽有限以及听不见频率下信号的急剧衰减，传感分辨率和范围仍然受到限制。受声学超表面最新发展的启发，在本文中，我们首先对声学超表面（AMS）进行了深入研究，并将其与相控阵扬声器进行了比较。我们的结果表明，AMS 很有吸引力，因为它在保持紧凑尺寸的同时实现了 SNR 的显着提高。现有 AMS 的一个主要限制是其静态配置。由于我们的目标可能位于任何可能的位置，因此支持不同方向的扫描非常重要。我们开发了一种新颖的声学系统，利用超表面和少量扬声器。我们共同优化超表面的配置和扬声器的传输信号，以实现低成本的动态转向。通过原型实施和广泛的评估，我们证明了其在各种场景下提高信噪比、声学传感精度和声学通信可靠性的有效性。

papers.title: Addax: A fast, private, and accountable ad exchange infrastructure.
papers.abstract: This paper proposes Addax, a fast, verifiable, and private online ad exchange. When a user visits an ad-supported site, Addax runs an auction similar to those of leading exchanges; Addax requests bids, selects the winner, collects payment, and displays the ad to the user. A key distinction is that bids in Addax's auctions are kept private and the outcome of the auction is publicly verifiable. Addax achieves these properties by adding public verifiability to the affine aggregatable encodings in Prio (NSDI'17) and by building an auction protocol out of them. Our implementation of Addax over WAN with hundreds of bidders can run roughly half the auctions per second as a non-private and non-verifiable exchange, while delivering ads to users in under 600 ms with little additional bandwidth requirements. This efficiency makes Addax the first architecture capable of bringing transparency to this otherwise opaque ecosystem.
papers.abstract_zh: 本文提出了 Addax，一种快速、可验证且私密的在线广告交易平台。当用户访问广告支持的网站时，Addax 会进行类似于领先交易所的拍卖； Addax 请求出价、选择获胜者、收取付款并向用户展示广告。一个关键的区别是 Addax 拍卖中的出价是保密的，并且拍卖结果是可以公开验证的。 Addax 通过向 Prio (NSDI'17) 中的仿射可聚合编码添加公共可验证性并从中构建拍卖协议来实现这些属性。我们在 WAN 上实施的 Addax 与数百个投标人相比，作为非私有且不可验证的交易所，每秒可以运行大约一半的拍卖，同时在 600 毫秒内向用户提供广告，几乎不需要额外的带宽要求。这种效率使 Addax 成为第一个能够为这个原本不透明的生态系统带来透明度的架构。

papers.title: ARK: GPU-driven Code Execution for Distributed Deep Learning.
papers.abstract: Modern state-of-the-art deep learning (DL) applications tend to scale out to a large number of parallel GPUs. Unfortunately, we observe that the collective communication overhead across GPUs is often the key limiting factor of performance for distributed DL. It under-utilizes the networking bandwidth by frequent transfers of small data chunks, which also incurs a substantial I/O overhead on GPU that interferes with computation on GPU. The root cause lies in the inefficiency of CPU-based communication event handling as well as the inability to control the GPU's internal DMA engine with GPU threads. To address the problem, we propose a GPU-driven code execution system that leverages a GPU-controlled hardware DMA engine for I/O offloading. Our custom DMA engine pipelines multiple DMA requests to support efficient small data transfer while it eliminates the I/O overhead on GPU cores. Unlike existing GPU DMA engines initiated only by CPU, we let GPU threads to directly control DMA operations, which leads to a highly efficient system where GPUs drive their own execution flow and handle communication events autonomously without CPU intervention. Our prototype DMA engine achieves a line-rate from a message size as small as 8KB (3.9x better throughput) with only 4.3us of communication latency (9.1x faster) while it incurs little interference with computation on GPU, achieving 1.8x higher all-reduce throughput in a real training workload.
papers.abstract_zh: 现代最先进的深度学习 (DL) 应用程序往往会扩展到大量并行 GPU。不幸的是，我们观察到 GPU 之间的集体通信开销通常是分布式深度学习性能的关键限制因素。它通过频繁传输小数据块而未充分利用网络带宽，这也会在 GPU 上产生大量 I/O 开销，从而干扰 GPU 上的计算。根本原因在于基于CPU的通信事件处理效率低下，以及无法通过GPU线程控制GPU内部DMA引擎。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种 GPU 驱动的代码执行系统，该系统利用 GPU 控制的硬件 D​​MA 引擎进行 I/O 卸载。我们的定制 DMA 引擎通过管道传输多个 DMA 请求，以支持高效的小数据传输，同时消除 GPU 内核上的 I/O 开销。与仅由 CPU 启动的现有 GPU DMA 引擎不同，我们让 GPU 线程直接控制 DMA 操作，从而形成一个高效的系统，其中 GPU 驱动自己的执行流并自主处理通信事件，无需 CPU 干预。我们的原型 DMA 引擎可从小至 8KB 的消息大小实现线速率（吞吐量提高 3.9 倍），通信延迟仅为 4.3 秒（加快 9.1 倍），同时对 GPU 上的计算几乎没有干扰，在实际训练工作负载中实现 1.8 倍的全归约吞吐量。

papers.title: Arya: Arbitrary Graph Pattern Mining with Decomposition-based Sampling.
papers.abstract: Graph pattern mining is compute-intensive in processing massive amounts of graph-structured data. This paper presents Arya, an ultra-fast approximate graph pattern miner that can detect and count arbitrary patterns of a graph. Unlike all prior approximation systems, Arya combines novel graph decomposition theory with edge sampling-based approximation to reduce the complexity of mining complex patterns on graphs with up to tens of billions of edges, a scale that was only possible on supercomputers. Arya can run on a single machine or distributed machines with an Error-Latency Profile (ELP) for users to configure the running time of pattern mining tasks based on different error targets. Our evaluation demonstrates that Arya outperforms existing exact and approximate pattern mining solutions by up to five orders of magnitude. Arya supports graphs with 5 billion edges on a single machine and scales to 10-billion-edge graphs on a 32-server testbed.
papers.abstract_zh: 图模式挖掘在处理大量图结构数据时是计算密集型的。本文介绍了 Arya，一种超快的近似图模式挖掘器，可以检测和计算图的任意模式。与所有先前的近似系统不同，Arya 将新颖的图分解理论与基于边缘采样的近似相结合，以降低在具有多达数百亿条边的图上挖掘复杂模式的复杂性，这种规模只有在超级计算机上才能实现。 Arya 可以运行在单机或分布式机器上，并具有错误延迟配置文件 (ELP)，供用户根据不同的错误目标配置模式挖掘任务的运行时间。我们的评估表明，Arya 的性能比现有的精确和近似模式挖掘解决方案高出五个数量级。 Arya 支持单台机器上具有 50 亿条边的图，并可在 32 台服务器测试台上扩展到 100 亿条边的图。

papers.title: Augmenting Augmented Reality with Non-Line-of-Sight Perception.
papers.abstract: We present the design, implementation, and evaluation of X-AR, an augmented reality (AR) system with non-line-of-sight perception. X-AR augments AR headsets with RF sensing to enable users to see things that are otherwise invisible to the human eye or to state-of-the-art AR systems. Our design introduces three main innovations: the first is an AR-conformal antenna that tightly matches the shape of the AR headset visor while providing excellent radiation and bandwidth capabilities for RF sensing. The second is an RF-visual synthetic aperture localization algorithm that leverages natural human mobility to localize RF-tagged objects in line-of-sight and non-line-of-sight settings. Finally, the third is an RF-visual verification primitive that fuses RF and vision to deliver actionable tasks to end users such as picking verification. We built an end-to-end prototype of our design by integrating it into a Microsoft Hololens 2 AR headset and evaluated it in line-of-sight and non-line-of-sight environments. Our results demonstrate that X-AR achieves decimeter-level RF localization (median of 9.8 cm) of fully-occluded items and can perform RFvisual picking verification with over 95% accuracy (FScore) when extracting RFID-tagged items. These results show that X-AR is successful in extending AR systems to non-line-of-sight perception, with important implications to manufacturing, warehousing, and smart home applications. Demo video: y2u.be/bdUN21ft7G0
papers.abstract_zh: 我们介绍了 X-AR 的设计、实现和评估，X-AR 是一种具有非视距感知的增强现实 (AR) 系统。 X-AR 通过 RF 传感增强 AR 耳机，使用户能够看到人眼或最先进的 AR 系统看不到的东西。我们的设计引入了三项主要创新：第一个是 AR 共形天线，它与 AR 耳机面罩的形状紧密匹配，同时为 RF 传感提供出色的辐射和带宽能力。第二个是射频视觉合成孔径定位算法，它利用人类的自然移动性来定位视线和非视线设置中的射频标记物体。最后，第三个是射频视觉验证原语，它融合了射频和视觉，为最终用户提供可操作的任务，例如拣选验证。我们通过将其集成到 Microsoft Hololens 2 AR 耳机中来构建我们的设计的端到端原型，并在视线和非视线环境中对其进行评估。我们的结果表明，X-AR 实现了完全遮挡物品的分米级 RF 定位（中位数为 9.8 厘米），并且在提取 RFID 标签物品时可以以超过 95% 的准确度 (FScore) 进行 RF 视觉拾取验证。这些结果表明，X-AR成功地将AR系统扩展到非视距感知，对制造、仓储和智能家居应用具有重要影响。演示视频：y2u.be/bdUN21ft7G0

papers.title: Bamboo: Making Preemptible Instances Resilient for Affordable Training of Large DNNs.
papers.abstract: DNN models across many domains continue to grow in size, resulting in high resource requirements for effective training, and unpalatable (and often unaffordable) costs for organizations and research labs across scales. This paper aims to significantly reduce training costs with effective use of preemptible instances, i.e., those that can be obtained at a much cheaper price while idle, but may be preempted whenever requested by priority users. Doing so, however, requires new forms of resiliency and efficiency to cope with the possibility of frequent preemptions – a failure model that is drastically different from the occasional failures in normal cluster settings that existing checkpointing techniques target. We present Bamboo, a distributed system that tackles these challenges by introducing redundant computations into the training pipeline, i.e., whereby one node performs computations over not only its own layers but also over some layers in its neighbor. Our key insight is that training large models often requires pipeline parallelism where "pipeline bubbles" naturally exist. Bamboo carefully fills redundant computations into these bubbles, providing resilience at a low cost. Across a variety of widely used DNN models, Bamboo outperforms traditional checkpointing by 3.7× in training throughput, and reduces costs by 2.4× compared to a setting where on-demand instances are used.
papers.abstract_zh: 跨许多领域的 DNN 模型的规模不断增长，导致有效培训对资源的要求很高，并且给各种规模的组织和研究实验室带来了令人难以接受（而且通常难以承受）的成本。本文旨在通过有效使用可抢占实例来显着降低培训成本，即那些可以在空闲时以便宜得多的价格获得的实例，但可以在优先级用户请求时被抢占。然而，这样做需要新形式的弹性和效率来应对频繁抢占的可能性——这种故障模型与现有检查点技术所针对的正常集群设置中的偶尔故障截然不同。我们提出了 Bamboo，一种分布式系统，它通过在训练管道中引入冗余计算来解决这些挑战，即一个节点不仅在自己的层上执行计算，而且还在其邻居的某些层上执行计算。我们的主要见解是，训练大型模型通常需要管道并行，而“管道气泡”自然存在。 Bamboo 小心地将冗余计算填充到这些气泡中，以低成本提供弹性。在各种广泛使用的 DNN 模型中，Bamboo 的训练吞吐量比传统检查点高出 3.7 倍，与使用按需实例的设置相比，成本降低了 2.4 倍。

papers.title: Better Together: Jointly Optimizing ML Collective Scheduling and Execution Planning using SYNDICATE.
papers.abstract: Emerging ML training deployments are trending towards larger models, and hybrid-parallel training that is not just dominated by compute-intensive all-reduce for gradient aggregation but also bandwidth-intensive collectives (e.g., all-to-all). These emerging collectives exacerbate the communication bottlenecks despite heterogeneous network interconnects with ample multipath opportunities. In this work, we propose SYNDICATE, a systematic, general framework to minimize communication bottlenecks and speed up training for both state-of-the-art and future large-scale models and interconnects. SYNDICATE proposes a novel abstraction, the motif, to break large communication work as smaller pieces as part of execution planning. SYNDICATE also does joint optimization of scheduling and execution planning by rethinking the interfaces in the networking systems stacks used for ML training. Motifs afford greater flexibility during scheduling and the joint optimizer exploits this flexibility by packing and ordering communication work so as to maximize both network utilization and overlap with compute. This improves the speed of training state-of-the-art large models by 21-74%.
papers.abstract_zh: 新兴的机器学习训练部署正趋向于更大的模型和混合并行训练，这种训练不仅以用于梯度聚合的计算密集型全归约为主，而且还以带宽密集型集合（例如，all-to-all）为主。尽管异构网络互连具有充足的多路径机会，但这些新兴的集体加剧了通信瓶颈。在这项工作中，我们提出了 SYNDICATE，这是一个系统的通用框架，可以最大限度地减少通信瓶颈并加快对最先进的和未来的大规模模型和互连的训练。 SYNDICATE 提出了一种新颖的抽象概念，即主题，将大型沟通工作分解为较小的部分，作为执行计划的一部分。 SYNDICATE 还通过重新考虑用于 ML 训练的网络系统堆栈中的接口来联合优化调度和执行计划。主题在调度过程中提供了更大的灵活性，联合优化器通过打包和排序通信工作来利用这种灵活性，从而最大限度地提高网络利用率和计算重叠。这将训练最先进的大型模型的速度提高了 21-74%。

papers.title: BGL: GPU-Efficient GNN Training by Optimizing Graph Data I/O and Preprocessing.
papers.abstract: Graph neural networks (GNNs) have extended the success of deep neural networks (DNNs) to non-Euclidean graph data, achieving ground-breaking performance on various tasks such as node classification and graph property prediction. Nonetheless, existing systems are inefficient to train large graphs with billions of nodes and edges with GPUs. The main bottlenecks are the process of preparing data for GPUs – subgraph sampling and feature retrieving. This paper proposes BGL, a distributed GNN training system designed to address the bottlenecks with a few key ideas. First, we propose a dynamic cache engine to minimize feature retrieving traffic. By co-designing caching policy and the order of sampling, we find a sweet spot of low overhead and a high cache hit ratio. Second, we improve the graph partition algorithm to reduce cross-partition communication during subgraph sampling. Finally, careful resource isolation reduces contention between different data preprocessing stages. Extensive experiments on various GNN models and large graph datasets show that BGL significantly outperforms existing GNN training systems by 1.9x on average.
papers.abstract_zh: 图神经网络 (GNN) 将深度神经网络 (DNN) 的成功扩展到非欧几里德图数据，在节点分类和图属性预测等各种任务上实现了突破性的性能。尽管如此，现有系统在使用 GPU 训练具有数十亿个节点和边缘的大型图时效率很低。主要瓶颈是为 GPU 准备数据的过程——子图采样和特征检索。本文提出了 BGL，一种分布式 GNN 训练系统，旨在通过一些关键思想解决瓶颈。首先，我们提出了一个动态缓存引擎来最小化特征检索流量。通过共同设计缓存策略和采样顺序，我们找到了低开销和高缓存命中率的最佳点。其次，我们改进了图分区算法，以减少子图采样期间的跨分区通信。最后，仔细的资源隔离减少了不同数据预处理阶段之间的争用。对各种 GNN 模型和大型图数据集的大量实验表明，BGL 的平均性能明显优于现有 GNN 训练系统 1.9 倍。

papers.title: Boggart: Towards General-Purpose Acceleration of Retrospective Video Analytics.
papers.abstract: Commercial retrospective video analytics platforms have increasingly adopted general interfaces to support the custom queries and convolutional neural networks (CNNs) that different applications require. However, existing optimizations were designed for settings where CNNs were platform- (not user-) determined, and fail to meet at least one of the following key platform goals when that condition is violated: reliable accuracy, low latency, and minimal wasted work. We present Boggart, a system that simultaneously meets all three goals while supporting the generality that today's platforms seek. Prior to queries being issued, Boggart carefully employs traditional computer vision algorithms to generate indices that are imprecise, but are fundamentally comprehensive across different CNNs/queries. For each issued query, Boggart employs new techniques to quickly characterize the imprecision of its index, and sparingly run CNNs (and propagate results to other frames) in a way that bounds accuracy drops. Our results highlight that Boggart's improved generality comes at low cost, with speedups that match (and most often, exceed) prior, model-specific approaches.
papers.abstract_zh: 商业回顾性视频分析平台越来越多地采用通用接口来支持不同应用程序所需的自定义查询和卷积神经网络（CNN）。然而，现有的优化是针对 CNN 由平台（而非用户）确定的设置而设计的，当违反该条件时，无法满足以下至少一个关键平台目标：可靠的准确性、低延迟和最少的浪费工作。我们推出了 Boggart，这是一个能够同时满足所有三个目标的系统，同时支持当今平台所追求的通用性。在发出查询之前，Boggart 仔细地采用传统的计算机视觉算法来生成不精确的索引，但在不同的 CNN/查询中基本上是全面的。对于每个发出的查询，Boggart 采用新技术来快速表征其索引的不精确性，并以限制准确性下降的方式谨慎运行 CNN（并将结果传播到其他帧）。我们的结果强调，博格特改进的通用性是以低成本实现的，其速度与先前的特定于模型的方法相匹配（并且通常超过）。

papers.title: Bolt: Sub-RTT Congestion Control for Ultra-Low Latency.
papers.abstract: Data center networks are inclined towards increasing line rates to 200Gbps and beyond to satisfy the performance requirements of applications such as NVMe and distributed ML. With larger Bandwidth Delay Products (BDPs), an increasing number of transfers fit within a few BDPs. These transfers are not only more performance-sensitive to congestion, but also bring more challenges to congestion control (CC) as they leave little time for CC to make the right decisions. Therefore, CC is under more pressure than ever before to achieve minimal queuing and high link utilization, leaving no room for imperfect control decisions. We identify that for CC to make quick and accurate decisions, the use of precise congestion signals and minimization of the control loop delay are vital. We address these issues by designing Bolt, an attempt to push congestion control to its theoretical limits by harnessing the power of programmable data planes. Bolt is founded on three core ideas, (i) Sub-RTT Control (SRC) reacts to congestion faster than RTT control loop delay, (ii) Proactive Ramp-Up (PRU) foresees flow completions in the future to promptly occupy released bandwidth, and (iii) Supply matching (SM) explicitly matches bandwidth demand with supply to maximize utilization. Our experiments in testbed and simulations demonstrate that Bolt reduces 99th-p latency by 80% and improves 99th-p flow completion time by up to 3× compared to Swift and HPCC while maintaining near line-rate utilization even at 400Gbps.
papers.abstract_zh: 数据中心网络倾向于将线路速率提高到 200Gbps 及以上，以满足 NVMe 和分布式 ML 等应用的性能要求。随着带宽延迟乘积 (BDP) 的增大，几个 BDP 内可以容纳越来越多的传输。这些传输不仅对拥塞性能更加敏感，而且给拥塞控制（CC）带来更多挑战，因为它们几乎没有时间让 CC 做出正确的决策。因此，CC 面临着比以往更大的压力，需要实现最小排队和高链路利用率，不为不完美的控制决策留下空间。我们发现，为了让 CC 做出快速、准确的决策，使用精确的拥塞信号和最小化控制环路延迟至关重要。我们通过设计 Bolt 来解决这些问题，Bolt 试图通过利用可编程数据平面的力量将拥塞控制推向理论极限。 Bolt 建立在三个核心理念之上：(i) 子 RTT 控制 (SRC) 对拥塞的反应速度快于 RTT 控制环路延迟；(ii) 主动加速 (PRU) 预见未来的流量完成，以迅速占用释放的带宽；(iii) 供应匹配 (SM) 明确地将带宽需求与供应相匹配，以最大限度地提高利用率。我们在测试台和模拟中的实验表明，与 Swift 和 HPCC 相比，Bolt 将 99th-p 延迟减少了 80%，并将 99th-p 流完成时间提高了 3 倍，同时即使在 400Gbps 下也能保持接近线速的利用率。

papers.title: Boomerang: Metadata-Private Messaging under Hardware Trust.
papers.abstract: In end-to-end encrypted (E2EE) messaging systems, protecting communication metadata, such as who is communicating with whom, at what time, etc., remains a challenging problem. Existing designs mostly fall into the balancing act among security, performance, and trust assumptions: 1) designs with cryptographic security often use hefty operations, incurring performance roadblocks and expensive operational costs for large-scale deployment; 2) more performant systems often follow a weaker security guarantee, like differential privacy, and generally demand more trust from the involved servers. So far, there has been no dominant solution. In this paper, we take a different technical route from prior art, and propose Boomerang, an alternative metadata-private messaging system leveraging the readily available trust assumption on secure enclaves (as those emerging in the cloud). Through a number of carefully tailored oblivious techniques on message shuffling, workload distribution, and proactive patching of the communication pattern, Boomerang brings together low latency, horizontal scalability, and cryptographic security, without prohibitive extra cost. With 32 machines, Boomerang achieves 99th percentile latency of 7.76 seconds for 2 20 clients. We hope Boomerang offers attractive alternative options to the current landscape of metadata-private messaging designs.
papers.abstract_zh: 在端到端加密（E2EE）消息传递系统中，保护通信元数据（例如谁在何时与谁通信等）仍然是一个具有挑战性的问题。现有设计大多陷入安全性、性能和信任假设之间的平衡行为：1）具有加密安全性的设计通常使用大量操作，导致大规模部署时出现性能障碍和昂贵的运营成本； 2）性能更高的系统通常遵循较弱的安全保证，例如差异隐私，并且通常需要所涉及的服务器更多的信任。到目前为止，还没有一个占主导地位的解决方案。在本文中，我们采取了与现有技术不同的技术路线，并提出了 Boomerang，这是一种替代元数据私有消息传递系统，利用安全飞地（如云中出现的那些）上易于获得的信任假设。通过一系列精心定制的消息混洗、工作负载分配和主动修补通信模式的不经意技术，Boomerang 将低延迟、水平可扩展性和加密安全性结合在一起，而无需高昂的额外成本。通过 32 台机器，Boomerang 为 2 20 个客户端实现了 7.76 秒的 99% 延迟。我们希望 Boomerang 为当前的元数据私有消息传递设计提供有吸引力的替代选择。

papers.title: Building Flexible, Low-Cost Wireless Access Networks With Magma.
papers.abstract: Billions of people remain without Internet access due to availability or affordability of service. In this paper, we present Magma, an open and flexible system for building low-cost wireless access networks. Magma aims to connect users where operator economics are difficult due to issues such as low population density or income levels while preserving features expected in cellular networks such as authentication and billing policies. To achieve this, and in contrast to traditional cellular networks, Magma adopts an approach that extensively leverages Internet design patterns, terminating access network-specific protocols at the edge and abstracting the access network from the core architecture. This decision allows Magma to refactor the wireless core using SDN (software-defined networking) principles and leverage other techniques from modern distributed systems. In doing so, Magma lowers cost and operational complexity for network operators while achieving resilience, scalability, and rich policy support.
papers.abstract_zh: 由于服务的可用性或负担能力，数十亿人仍然无法接入互联网。在本文中，我们介绍了 Magma，这是一个开放且灵活的系统，用于构建低成本无线接入网络。 Magma 旨在连接因人口密度或收入水平低等问题而导致运营商经济困难的用户，同时保留蜂窝网络中预期的功能，例如身份验证和计费策略。为了实现这一目标，与传统蜂窝网络相比，Magma 采用了一种广泛利用互联网设计模式的方法，在边缘终止特定于接入网络的协议，并将接入网络从核心架构中抽象出来。这一决定使 Magma 能够使用 SDN（软件定义网络）原理重构无线核心，并利用现代分布式系统的其他技术。在此过程中，Magma 降低了网络运营商的成本和运营复杂性，同时实现了弹性、可扩展性和丰富的政策支持。

papers.title: Canvas: Isolated and Adaptive Swapping for Multi-Applications on Remote Memory.
papers.abstract: Remote memory techniques for datacenter applications have recently gained a great deal of popularity. Existing remote memory techniques focus on the efficiency of a single application setting only. However, when multiple applications co-run on a remote-memory system, significant interference could occur, resulting in unexpected slowdowns even if the same amounts of physical resources are granted to each application. This slowdown stems from massive sharing in applications' swap data paths. Canvas is a redesigned swap system that fully isolates swap paths for remote-memory applications. Canvas allows each application to possess its dedicated swap partition, swap cache, prefetcher, and RDMA bandwidth. Swap isolation lays a foundation for adaptive optimization techniques based on each application's own access patterns and needs. We develop three such techniques: (1) adaptive swap entry allocation, (2) semantics-aware prefetching, and (3) two-dimensional RDMA scheduling. A thorough evaluation with a set of widely-deployed applications demonstrates that Canvas minimizes performance variation and dramatically reduces performance degradation.
papers.abstract_zh: 用于数据中心应用的远程存储技术最近得到了广泛的普及。现有的远程存储技术仅关注单个应用程序设置的效率。然而，当多个应用程序在远程内存系统上共同运行时，可能会发生严重干扰，从而导致意外的速度下降，即使向每个应用程序授予相同数量的物理资源也是如此。这种放缓源于应用程序交换数据路径的大量共享。 Canvas 是一个重新设计的交换系统，可以完全隔离远程内存应用程序的交换路径。 Canvas 允许每个应用程序拥有其专用的交换分区、交换缓存、预取器和 RDMA 带宽。交换隔离为基于每个应用程序自己的访问模式和需求的自适应优化技术奠定了基础。我们开发了三种这样的技术：(1) 自适应交换条目分配，(2) 语义感知预取，以及 (3) 二维 RDMA 调度。对一组广泛部署的应用程序的全面评估表明，Canvas 最大限度地减少了性能变化并显着减少了性能下降。

papers.title: CausalSim: A Causal Framework for Unbiased Trace-Driven Simulation.
papers.abstract: We present CausalSim, a causal framework for unbiased trace-driven simulation. Current trace-driven simulators assume that the interventions being simulated (e.g., a new algorithm) would not affect the validity of the traces. However, real-world traces are often biased by the choices algorithms make during trace collection, and hence replaying traces under an intervention may lead to incorrect results. CausalSim addresses this challenge by learning a causal model of the system dynamics and latent factors capturing the underlying system conditions during trace collection. It learns these models using an initial randomized control trial (RCT) under a fixed set of algorithms, and then applies them to remove biases from trace data when simulating new algorithms. Key to CausalSim is mapping unbiased trace-driven simulation to a tensor completion problem with extremely sparse observations. By exploiting a basic distributional invariance property present in RCT data, CausalSim enables a novel tensor completion method despite the sparsity of observations. Our extensive evaluation of CausalSim on both real and synthetic datasets, including more than ten months of real data from the Puffer video streaming system shows it improves simulation accuracy, reducing errors by 53% and 61% on average compared to expert-designed and supervised learning baselines. Moreover, CausalSim provides markedly different insights about ABR algorithms compared to the biased baseline simulator, which we validate with a real deployment.
papers.abstract_zh: 我们提出了 CausalSim，一个用于无偏跟踪驱动模拟的因果框架。当前的轨迹驱动模拟器假设所模拟的干预措施（例如新算法）不会影响轨迹的有效性。然而，现实世界的跟踪通常会因跟踪收集期间算法所做的选择而产生偏差，因此在干预下重放跟踪可能会导致不正确的结果。 CausalSim 通过学习系统动态的因果模型和在跟踪收集期间捕获底层系统条件的潜在因素来解决这一挑战。它使用一组固定算法下的初始随机对照试验 (RCT) 来学习这些模型，然后在模拟新算法时应用它们来消除跟踪数据中的偏差。 CausalSim 的关键是将无偏轨迹驱动的模拟映射到具有极其稀疏观测值的张量完成问题。通过利用 RCT 数据中存在的基本分布不变性特性，CausalSim 实现了一种新颖的张量补全方法，尽管观察结果稀疏。我们对 CausalSim 对真实数据集和合成数据集的广泛评估（包括来自 Puffer 视频流系统的十多个月的真实数据）表明，与专家设计的监督学习基线相比，它提高了模拟精度，平均减少了 53% 和 61% 的错误。此外，与有偏差的基线模拟器相比，CausalSim 提供了关于 ABR 算法的明显不同的见解，我们通过实际部署进行了验证。

papers.title: CellDAM: User-Space, Rootless Detection and Mitigation for 5G Data Plane.
papers.abstract: Despite all deployed security fences in 5G, attacks against its data plane are still feasible. A smart attacker can fabricate data packets or intelligently forge/drop/modify data-plane signaling messages between the 5G infrastructure and the device to inflict damage. In this work, we propose CellDAM, a new solution that is used at the device without any infrastructure upgrades or standard changes. CellDAM exploits the key finding that such data-plane attacks by the adversary would trigger unexpected data signaling operations. It thus detects all known and even currently unreported attacks via verifying data signaling correctness with novel state-dependent model checking. CellDAM could work with or without firmware access at the device using inference on low-level 5G signaling and configurations. It mitigates the damage upon detection by inducing frequency band switches at the device via the existing handover procedure. The prototype and empirical evaluation in our testbed confirm the viability of CellDAM.
papers.abstract_zh: 尽管 5G 中部署了所有安全围栏，但针对其数据平面的攻击仍然是可行的。聪明的攻击者可以伪造数据包或智能地伪造/丢弃/修改 5G 基础设施和设备之间的数据平面信令消息以造成损害。在这项工作中，我们提出了 CellDAM，这是一种在设备上使用的新解决方案，无需任何基础设施升级或标准更改。 CellDAM 利用了一项重要发现，即对手的此类数据平面攻击会触发意外的数据信令操作。因此，它通过使用新颖的状态相关模型检查来验证数据信号的正确性，从而检测所有已知的甚至当前未报告的攻击。 CellDAM 可以使用低级 5G 信令和配置的推理，在设备上有或没有固件访问的情况下工作。它通过现有的切换程序在设备上引起频带切换，从而减轻检测时的损坏。我们测试台中的原型和实证评估证实了 CellDAM 的可行性。

papers.title: Channel-Aware 5G RAN Slicing with Customizable Schedulers.
papers.abstract: This paper focuses on 5G RAN slicing, where the 5G radio resources must be divided across slices (or enterprises) so as to achieve high spectrum efficiency, fairness and isolation across slices, and the ability for each slice to customize how the radio resources are divided across its own users. Realizing these goals requires accounting for the channel quality for each user (that varies over time and frequency domain) at both levels – inter-slice scheduling (i.e. dividing resources across slices) and enterprise scheduling (i.e. dividing resources within a slice). However, a cyclic dependency between the inter-slice and enterprise schedulers makes it difficult to incorporate channel awareness at both levels. We observe that the cyclic dependency can be broken if both the inter-slice and enterprise schedulers are greedy. Armed with this insight, we design RadioSaber, the first RAN slicing mechanism to do channel-aware inter-slice and enterprise scheduling. We implement RadioSaber on an open-source RAN simulator, and our evaluation shows how RadioSaber can achieve 17%-72% better throughput than the state-of-theart RAN slicing technique (that performs channel-agnostic inter-slice scheduling), while meeting the primary goals of fairness across slices and the ability to support a wide variety of customizable enterprise scheduling policies.
papers.abstract_zh: 本文重点关注 5G RAN 切片，其中 5G 无线电资源必须跨切片（或企业）划分，以实现跨切片的高频谱效率、公平性和隔离性，以及每个切片能够自定义如何在其自己的用户之间划分无线电资源。实现这些目标需要在两个层面上考虑每个用户的信道质量（随时间和频域变化）——片间调度（即跨片划分资源）和企业调度（即在片内划分资源）。然而，片间调度程序和企业调度程序之间的循环依赖性使得很难在两个级别上合并通道感知。我们观察到，如果片间调度程序和企业调度程序都是贪婪的，则可以打破循环依赖关系。有了这种洞察力，我们设计了 RadioSaber，这是第一个 RAN 切片机制，用于进行通道感知的切片间和企业调度。我们在开源 RAN 模拟器上实现 RadioSaber，我们的评估显示 RadioSaber 如何实现比最先进的 RAN 切片技术（执行与通道无关的切片间调度）高 17%-72% 的吞吐量，同时满足切片间公平性的主要目标以及支持各种可定制企业调度策略的能力。

papers.title: Dashlet: Taming Swipe Uncertainty for Robust Short Video Streaming.
papers.abstract: Short video streaming applications have recently gained substantial traction, but the non-linear video presentation they afford swiping users fundamentally changes the problem of maximizing user quality of experience in the face of the vagaries of network throughput and user swipe timing. This paper describes the design and implementation of Dashlet, a system tailored for high quality of experience in short video streaming applications. With the insights we glean from an in-the-wild TikTok performance study and a user study focused on swipe patterns, Dashlet proposes a novel out-of-order video chunk pre-buffering mechanism that leverages a simple, non machine learning-based model of users' swipe statistics to determine the pre-buffering order and bitrate. The net result is a system that outperforms TikTok by 28-101%, while also reducing by 30% the number of bytes wasted on downloaded video that is never watched.
papers.abstract_zh: 短视频流应用程序最近获得了巨大的关注，但它们为刷卡用户提供的非线性视频呈现从根本上改变了面对网络吞吐量和用户刷卡时间的变幻莫测时最大化用户体验质量的问题。本文介绍了 Dashlet 的设计和实现，这是一个专为短视频流应用程序提供高质量体验而定制的系统。根据我们从野外 TikTok 性能研究和专注于滑动模式的用户研究中收集到的见解，Dashlet 提出了一种新颖的无序视频块预缓冲机制，该机制利用简单的、非基于机器学习的用户滑动统计模型来确定预缓冲顺序和比特率。最终结果是系统的性能比 TikTok 高出 28-101%，同时还减少了 30% 因下载但从未观看过的视频而浪费的字节数。

papers.title: DChannel: Accelerating Mobile Applications With Parallel High-bandwidth and Low-latency Channels.
papers.abstract: Interactive mobile applications like web browsing and gaming are known to benefit significantly from low latency networking, as applications communicate with cloud servers and other users' devices. Emerging mobile channel standards have not met these needs: 5G's general-purpose eMBB channel has much higher bandwidth than 4G but empirically offers little improvement for common latency-sensitive applications, while its ultra-low-latency URLLC channel is targeted at only specific applications with very low bandwidth requirements. We explore a different direction for wireless channel design to address the fundamental bandwidth-latency tradeoff: utilizing two channels—one high bandwidth, one low latency—simultaneously to improve performance of common Internet applications. We design DChannel, a fine-grained packet-steering scheme that takes advantage of these parallel channels to transparently improve application performance. With 5G channels, our trace-driven and live network experiments show that even though URLLC offers just 1% of the bandwidth of eMBB, using both channels can improve web page load time and responsiveness of common mobile apps by 16-40% compared to using exclusively eMBB. This approach may provide service providers important incentives to make low latency channels available for widespread use.
papers.abstract_zh: 众所周知，网页浏览和游戏等交互式移动应用程序可以从低延迟网络中受益匪浅，因为应用程序与云服务器和其他用户设备进行通信。新兴的移动信道标准尚未满足这些需求：5G的通用eMBB信道具有比4G高得多的带宽，但根据经验，对于常见的延迟敏感型应用几乎没有改善，而其超低延迟URLLC信道仅针对带宽要求非常低的特定应用。我们探索无线通道设计的不同方向，以解决基本的带宽与延迟权衡问题：同时利用两个通道（一个高带宽，一个低延迟）来提高常见互联网应用程序的性能。我们设计了 DChannel，这是一种细粒度的数据包引导方案，它利用这些并行通道来透明地提高应用程序性能。通过 5G 通道，我们的跟踪驱动和实时网络实验表明，尽管 URLLC 仅提供 eMBB 的 1% 带宽，但与仅使用 eMBB 相比，使用这两个通道可以将常见移动应用程序的网页加载时间和响应速度提高 16-40%。这种方法可以为服务提供商提供重要的激励，使低延迟通道可供广泛使用。

papers.title: Disaggregating Stateful Network Functions.
papers.abstract: For security, isolation, metering and other purposes, public clouds today implement complex network functions at every server. Today's implementations, in software or on FPGAs and ASICs that are attached to each host, are becoming increasingly complex, costly and bottlenecks to scalability. We present a different design that disaggregates network function processing off the host and into shared resource pools by making novel use of appliances which tightly integrate general-purpose ARM cores with high-speed stateful match processing ASICs. When work is skewed across VMs, such disaggregation can offer better reliability and performance over the state-of-art at a lower per-server cost. We describe our solutions to the consequent challenges and present results from a production deployment at a large public cloud.
papers.abstract_zh: 出于安全、隔离、计量和其他目的，当今的公共云在每台服务器上实现了复杂的网络功能。当今的实施方式，无论是在软件中还是在连接到每个主机的 FPGA 和 ASIC 中，都变得越来越复杂、成本高昂，并且成为可扩展性的瓶颈。我们提出了一种不同的设计，通过新颖地使用将通用 ARM 内核与高速状态匹配处理 ASIC 紧密集成的设备，将网络功能处理从主机中分解到共享资源池中。当工作分布在虚拟机之间时，这种分解可以以更低的每台服务器成本提供比最先进技术更好的可靠性和性能。我们描述了针对随之而来的挑战的解决方案，并展示了在大型公共云上的生产部署的结果。

papers.title: DiSh: Dynamic Shell-Script Distribution.
papers.abstract: Shell scripting remains prevalent for automation and data-processing tasks, partly due to its dynamic features—e.g., expansion, substitution—and language agnosticism—i.e., the ability to combine third-party commands implemented in any programming language. Unfortunately, these characteristics hinder automated shell-script distribution, often necessary for dealing with large datasets that do not fit on a single computer. This paper introduces DiSh, a system that distributes the execution of dynamic shell scripts operating on distributed filesystems. DiSh is designed as a shim that applies program analyses and transformations to leverage distributed computing, while delegating all execution to the underlying shell available on each computing node. As a result, DiSh does not require modifications to shell scripts and maintains compatibility with existing shells and legacy functionality. We evaluate DiSh against several options available to users today: (i) Bash, a single-node shell-interpreter baseline, (ii) PaSh, a state-of-the-art automated-parallelization system, and (iii) Hadoop Streaming, a MapReduce system that supports language-agnostic third-party components. Combined, our results demonstrate that DiSh offers significant performance gains, requires no developer effort, and handles arbitrary dynamic behaviors pervasive in real-world shell scripts.
papers.abstract_zh: Shell 脚本在自动化和数据处理任务中仍然很流行，部分原因是它的动态特性（例如扩展、替换）和语言不可知论（即能够组合以任何编程语言实现的第三方命令）。不幸的是，这些特性阻碍了自动 shell 脚本分发，而这通常是处理不适合单台计算机的大型数据集所必需的。本文介绍了 DiSh，这是一个在分布式文件系统上分布式执行动态 shell 脚本的系统。 DiSh 被设计为一个垫片，它应用程序分析和转换来利用分布式计算，同时将所有执行委托给每个计算节点上可用的底层 shell。因此，DiSh 不需要修改 shell 脚本并保持与现有 shell 和遗留功能的兼容性。我们根据当今用户可用的几个选项来评估 DiSh：(i) Bash，一个单节点 shell 解释器基线，(ii) PaSh，一个最先进的自动并行化系统，以及 (iii) Hadoop Streaming，一个支持与语言无关的第三方组件的 MapReduce 系统。综合起来，我们的结果表明 DiSh 提供了显着的性能提升，不需要开发人员的努力，并且可以处理现实世界 shell 脚本中普遍存在的任意动态行为。

papers.title: Doing More with Less: Orchestrating Serverless Applications without an Orchestrator.
papers.abstract: Standalone orchestrators simplify the development of serverless applications by providing higher-level programming interfaces, coordinating function interactions and ensuring exactly-once execution. However, they limit application flexibility and are expensive to use. We show that these specialized orchestration services are unnecessary. Instead, application-level orchestration, deployed as a library, can support the same programming interfaces, complex interactions and execution guarantees, utilizing only basic serverless components that are already universally supported and billed at a fine-grained per-use basis. Furthermore, application-level orchestration affords applications more flexibility and reduces costs for both providers and users. To demonstrate this, we present Unum, an application-level serverless orchestration system. Unum introduces an intermediate representation that partitions higher-level application definitions at compile-time and provides orchestration as a runtime library that executes in-situ with user-defined FaaS functions. On unmodified serverless infrastructures, Unum functions coordinate and ensure correctness in a decentralized manner by leveraging strongly consistent data stores. Compared with AWS Step Functions, a state-of-the-art standalone orchestrator, our evaluation shows that Unum performs well, costs significantly less and grants applications greater flexibility to employ application-specific patterns and optimizations. For a representative set of applications, Unum runs as much as 2x faster and costs 9x cheaper.
papers.abstract_zh: 独立编排器通过提供更高级别的编程接口、协调函数交互并确保一次性执行来简化无服务器应用程序的开发。然而，它们限制了应用程序的灵活性并且使用成本昂贵。我们证明这些专门的编排服务是不必要的。相反，部署为库的应用程序级编排可以支持相同的编程接口、复杂的交互和执行保证，仅利用已经得到普遍支持并按使用细粒度计费的基本无服务器组件。此外，应用程序级编排为应用程序提供了更大的灵活性，并降低了提供商和用户的成本。为了证明这一点，我们推出了 Unum，一个应用程序级无服务器编排系统。 Unum 引入了一种中间表示形式，可以在编译时对更高级别的应用程序定义进行分区，并提供编排作为运行时库，使用用户定义的 FaaS 函数就地执行。在未经修改的无服务器基础设施上，Unum 功能通过利用高度一致的数据存储，以去中心化的方式协调并确保正确性。与最先进的独立编排器 AWS Step Functions 相比，我们的评估表明 Unum 性能良好，成本显着降低，并为应用程序提供了更大的灵活性来采用特定于应用程序的模式和优化。对于一组有代表性的应用程序，Unum 的运行速度提高了 2 倍，成本降低了 9 倍。

papers.title: DOTE: Rethinking (Predictive) WAN Traffic Engineering.
papers.abstract: We explore a new design point for traffic engineering on wide-area networks (WANs): directly optimizing traffic flow on the WAN using only historical data about traffic demands. Doing so obviates the need to explicitly estimate, or predict, future demands. Our method, which utilizes stochastic optimization, provably converges to the global optimum in well-studied theoretical models. We employ deep learning to scale to large WANs and real-world traffic.
