Intuitively, model ensembling can address the accuracy gap by intelligently combining different models in parallel. However, selecting the appropriate models dynamically at runtime to meet the desired accuracy with low latency at minimal deployment cost is a nontrivial problem. Towards this, we propose Cocktail, a cost effective ensembling-based model serving framework. Cocktail comprises of two key components: (i) a dynamic model selection framework, which reduces the number of models in the ensemble, while satisfying the accuracy and latency requirements; (ii) an adaptive resource management (RM) framework that employs a distributed proactive autoscaling policy combined with importance sampling, to efficiently allocate resources for the models. The RM framework leverages transient virtual machine (VM) instances to reduce the deployment cost in a public cloud. A prototype implementation of Cocktail on the AWS EC2 platform and exhaustive evaluations using a variety of workloads demonstrate that {Cocktail} can reduce deployment cost by 1.45x, while providing 2x reduction in latency and satisfying the target accuracy for up to 96% of the requests, when compared to state-of-the-art model-serving frameworks.
papers.abstract_zh: 随着各种应用程序服务采用机器学习模型的需求不断增长，服务这些模型的框架必须能够以最小的延迟提供高度准确的预测，并降低公共云环境中的部署成本，这一点至关重要。尽管延迟很高，但该领域的先前工作受到各个模型提供的准确性的严重限制。直观地说，模型集成可以通过智能地并行组合不同模型来解决准确性差距。然而，在运行时动态选择适当的模型以满足所需的精度、低延迟和最小的部署成本是一个不小的问题。为此，我们提出了 Cocktail，一种具有成本效益的基于集成的模型服务框架。 Cocktail 由两个关键组件组成：(i) 动态模型选择框架，减少集成中模型的数量，同时满足精度和延迟要求； (ii) 自适应资源管理 (RM) 框架，采用分布式主动自动缩放策略与重要性采样相结合，为模型有效分配资源。 RM 框架利用瞬态虚拟机 (VM) 实例来降低公共云中的部署成本。 AWS EC2 平台上 Cocktail 的原型实现以及使用各种工作负载的详尽评估表明，与最先进的模型服务框架相比，{Cocktail} 可以将部署成本降低 1.45 倍，同时将延迟降低 2 倍，并满足高达 96% 的请求的目标准确性。

papers.title: Collie: Finding Performance Anomalies in RDMA Subsystems.
papers.abstract: High-speed RDMA networks are getting rapidly adopted in the industry for their low latency and reduced CPU overheads. To verify that RDMA can be used in production, system administrators need to understand the set of application workloads that can potentially trigger abnormal performance behaviors (e.g., unexpected low throughput, PFC pause frame storm). We design and implement Collie, a tool for users to systematically uncover performance anomalies in RDMA subsystems without the need to access hardware internal designs. Instead of individually testing each hardware device (e.g., NIC, memory, PCIe), Collie is holistic, constructing a comprehensive search space for application workloads. Collie then uses simulated annealing to drive RDMA-related performance and diagnostic counters to extreme value regions to find workloads that can trigger performance anomalies. We evaluate Collie on combinations of various RDMA NIC, CPU, and other hardware components. Collie found 15 new performance anomalies. All of them are acknowledged by the hardware vendors. 7 of them are already fixed after we reported them. We also present our experience in using Collie to avoid performance anomalies for an RDMA RPC library and an RDMA distributed machine learning framework.
papers.abstract_zh: 高速 RDMA 网络因其低延迟和降低的 CPU 开销而在业界迅速采用。为了验证 RDMA 是否可以在生产中使用，系统管理员需要了解可能触发异常性能行为（例如意外的低吞吐量、PFC 暂停帧风暴）的一组应用程序工作负载。我们设计并实现了 Collie，这是一种工具，用户可以系统地发现 RDMA 子系统中的性能异常，而无需访问硬件内部设计。 Collie 不是单独测试每个硬件设备（例如 NIC、内存、PCIe），而是整体性的，为应用程序工作负载构建全面的搜索空间。然后，Collie 使用模拟退火将 RDMA 相关性能和诊断计数器驱动到极值区域，以查找可能触发性能异常的工作负载。我们根据各种 RDMA NIC、CPU 和其他硬件组件的组合来评估 Collie。柯利牧羊犬发现了 15 种新的表现异常现象。所有这些都得到了硬件供应商的认可。在我们报告后，其中 7 个已修复。我们还介绍了使用 Collie 避免 RDMA RPC 库和 RDMA 分布式机器学习框架性能异常的经验。

papers.title: Configanator: A Data-driven Approach to Improving CDN Performance.
papers.abstract: The web serving protocol stack is constantly evolving to tackle the technological shifts in networking infrastructure and website complexity. As a result of this evolution, web servers can use a plethora of protocols and configuration parameters to address a variety of realistic network conditions. Yet, today, despite the significant diversity in end-user networks and devices, most content providers have adopted a “one-size-fits-all” approach to configuring the networking stack of their user-facing web servers (or at best employ moderate tuning). In this paper, we demonstrate that the status quo results in sub-optimal performance and argue for a novel framework that extends existing CDN architectures to provide programmatic control over a web server’s configuration parameters. We designed a data-driven framework, Configanator, that leverages data across connections to identify their network and device characteristics, and learn the optimal configuration parameters to improve end-user performance. We evaluate Configanator on five traces, including one from a global content provider, and evaluate the performance improvements for real users through two live deployments. Our results show that Configanator improves tail (p95) web performance by 32-67% across diverse websites and networks.
papers.abstract_zh: Web 服务协议栈不断发展，以应对网络基础设施和网站复杂性的技术转变。由于这种演变，Web 服务器可以使用大量协议和配置参数来解决各种实际的网络条件。然而，如今，尽管最终用户网络和设备存在显着差异，但大多数内容提供商都采用了“一刀切”的方法来配置其面向用户的 Web 服务器的网络堆栈（或者最多采用适度的调整）。在本文中，我们证明了现状导致性能不佳，并提出了一种新颖的框架来扩展现有的 CDN 架构，以提供对 Web 服务器配置参数的编程控制。我们设计了一个数据驱动框架 Configanator，它利用跨连接的数据来识别其网络和设备特征，并学习最佳配置参数以提高最终用户性能。我们根据五项跟踪评估 Configanator，其中一项来自全球内容提供商，并通过两次实时部署评估真实用户的性能改进。我们的结果表明，Configanator 将不同网站和网络的尾部 (p95) Web 性能提高了 32-67%。

papers.title: CurvingLoRa to Boost LoRa Network Throughput via Concurrent Transmission.
papers.abstract: LoRaWAN has emerged as an appealing technology to connect IoT devices but it functions without explicit coordination among transmitters, which can lead to many packet collisions as the network scales. State-of-the-art work proposes various approaches to deal with these collisions, but most functions only in high signal-to-interference ratio (SIR) conditions and thus does not scale to real scenarios where weak receptions are easily buried by stronger receptions from nearby transmitters. In this paper, we take a fresh look at LoRa’s physical layer, revealing that its underlying linear chirp modulation fundamentally limits the capacity and scalability of concurrentLoRa transmissions. We show that by replacing linear chirps with their non-linear counterparts, we can boost the throughput of concurrent LoRa transmissions and empower the LoRa receiver to successfully receive weak transmissions in the presence of strong colliding signals. Such a non-linear chirp design further enables the receiver to demodulate fully aligned collision symbols — a case where none of the existing approaches can deal with. We implement these ideas in a holistic LoRaWAN stack based on the USRP N210 software-defined radio platform. Our head-to-head comparison with two state-of-the-art research systems and a standard LoRaWAN base-line demonstrates that CurvingLoRa improves the network throughput by 1.6–7.6× while simultaneously sacrificing neither power efficiency nor noise resilience
papers.abstract_zh: LoRaWAN 已成为连接物联网设备的一项颇具吸引力的技术，但它的运行无需发射器之间的明确协调，随着网络规模的扩大，这可能会导致许多数据包冲突。最先进的工作提出了各种方法来处理这些冲突，但大多数仅在高信号干扰比（SIR）条件下起作用，因此无法扩展到实际场景中，在这种情况下，弱接收很容易被附近发射器的较强接收所掩盖。在本文中，我们重新审视 LoRa 的物理层，揭示其底层线性调频调制从根本上限制了并发 LoRa 传输的容量和可扩展性。我们表明，通过用非线性对应物替换线性线性调频信号，我们可以提高并发 LoRa 传输的吞吐量，并使 LoRa 接收器能够在存在强冲突信号的情况下成功接收弱传输。这种非线性调频脉冲设计进一步使接收器能够解调完全对齐的冲突符号——现有方法都无法处理这种情况。我们在基于 USRP N210 软件定义无线电平台的整体 LoRaWAN 堆栈中实现了这些想法。我们与两个最先进的研究系统和标准 LoRaWAN 基线的头对头比较表明，CurvingLoRa 将网络吞吐量提高了 1.6–7.6 倍，同时既不牺牲功率效率，也不牺牲噪声恢复能力

papers.title: Data-Parallel Actors: A Programming Model for Scalable Query Serving Systems.
papers.abstract: We present data-parallel actors (DPA) , a programming model for building distributed query serving systems. Query serving systems are an important class of applications characterized by low-latency data-parallel queries and frequent bulk data updates; they include data analytics systems like Apache Druid, full-text search engines like ElasticSearch, and time series databases like InfluxDB. They are challenging to build because they run at scale and need complex distributed functionality like data replication, fault tolerance, and update consistency. DPA makes building these systems easier by allowing developers to construct them from purely single-node components while automatically providing these critical properties. In DPA, we view a query serving system as a collection of stateful actors, each encapsulating a partition of data. DPA provides parallel operators that enable consistent, atomic, and fault-tolerant parallel updates and queries over data stored in actors. We have used DPA to build a new query serving system, a simplified data warehouse based on the single-node database MonetDB, and enhance existing ones, such as Druid, Solr, and MongoDB, adding missing user-requested features such as load balancing and elasticity. We show that DPA can distribute a system in <1K lines of code (>10× less than typical implementations in current systems) while achieving state-of-the-art performance and adding rich functionality.
papers.abstract_zh: 我们提出了数据并行参与者（DPA），这是一种用于构建分布式查询服务系统的编程模型。查询服务系统是一类重要的应用程序，其特点是低延迟的数据并行查询和频繁的批量数据更新；它们包括 Apache Druid 等数据分析系统、ElasticSearch 等全文搜索引擎以及 InfluxDB 等时间序列数据库。它们的构建具有挑战性，因为它们大规模运行并且需要复杂的分布式功能，例如数据复制、容错和更新一致性。 DPA 允许开发人员从纯粹的单节点组件构建这些系统，同时自动提供这些关键属性，从而使构建这些系统变得更加容易。在 DPA 中，我们将查询服务系统视为有状态参与者的集合，每个参与者封装了一个数据分区。 DPA 提供并行运算符，可以对 Actor 中存储的数据进行一致、原子和容错的并行更新和查询。我们使用DPA构建了一个新的查询服务系统，一个基于单节点数据库MonetDB的简化数据仓库，并增强了现有的系统，例如Druid、Solr和MongoDB，添加了缺少的用户请求的功能，例如负载平衡和弹性。我们证明，DPA 可以用 <1K 行代码（比当前系统中的典型实现少 10 倍以上）来分发系统，同时实现最先进的性能并添加丰富的功能。

papers.title: Decentralized cloud wide-area network traffic engineering with BLASTSHIELD.
papers.abstract: Cloud networks are increasingly managed by centralized software defined controllers. Centralized traffic engineering controllers achieve higher network throughput than decentralized implementations, but are a single point of failure in the network. Large scale networks require controllers with isolated fault domains to contain the blast radius of faults. In this work, we present BLASTSHIELD, Microsoft’s software-defined decentralized WAN traffic engineering system. BLASTSHIELD slices the WAN into smaller fault domains, each managed by its own slice controller. Slice controllers independently engineer traffic in their slices to maximize global network throughput without relying on hierarchical or central coordination. BLASTSHIELD is fully deployed in Microsoft’s WAN and carries a majority of the backbone traffic. BLASTSHIELD achieves similar network throughput as the previous generation centralized controller and reduces traffic loss from controller failures by 60%.
papers.abstract_zh: 云网络越来越多地由集中式软件定义控制器进行管理。集中式流量工程控制器比分散式实施实现了更高的网络吞吐量，但却是网络中的单点故障。大规模网络需要具有隔离故障域的控制器来遏制故障的爆炸半径。在这项工作中，我们展示了 BLASTSHIELD，微软的软件定义的去中心化 WAN 流量工程系统。 BLASTSHIELD 将 WAN 分割成更小的故障域，每个故障域都由自己的切片控制器管理。切片控制器独立地设计其切片中的流量，以最大化全局网络吞吐量，而不依赖于分层或中央协调。 BLASTSHIELD 完全部署在 Microsoft 的 WAN 中并承载大部分骨干流量。 BLASTSHIELD 实现了与上一代集中式控制器相似的网络吞吐量，并将控制器故障造成的流量损失减少了 60%。

papers.title: Detecting Ephemeral Optical Events with OpTel.
papers.abstract: Degradation or failure events in optical backbone networks affect the service level agreements for cloud services. It is critical to detect and troubleshoot these events promptly to minimize their impact. Existing telemetry systems rely on arcane tools (e.g., SNMP) and vendor-specific controllers to collect optical data, which affects both the flexibility and scale of these systems. As a result, they fail to collect the required data on time to detect and troubleshoot degradation or failure events in a timely fashion. This paper presents the design and implementation of OpTel, an optical telemetry system, that uses a centralized vendor-agnostic controller to collect optical data in a streaming fashion. More specifically, it offers flexible vendor-agnostic interfaces between the optical devices and the controller and offloads data-management tasks (e.g., creating a queryable database) from the devices to the controller. As a result, OpTel enables the collection of fine-grained optical telemetry data at the one-second granularity. It has been running in Tencent's optical backbone network for the past six months. The fine-grained data collection enables the detection of short-lived events (i.e., ephemeral events). Compared to existing telemetry systems, OpTel accurately detects 2x more optical events. It also enables troubleshooting of these optical events in a few seconds, which is orders of magnitude faster than the state-of-the-art.
papers.abstract_zh: 光骨干网络中的退化或故障事件会影响云服务的服务级别协议。及时检测并排除这些事件以最大程度地减少其影响至关重要。现有的遥测系统依靠神秘的工具（例如 SNMP）和供应商特定的控制器来收集光学数据，这会影响这些系统的灵活性和规模。因此，他们无法按时收集所需的数据来及时检测退化或故障事件并对其进行故障排除。本文介绍了 OpTel（一种光学遥测系统）的设计和实现，该系统使用与供应商无关的集中式控制器以流式传输方式收集光学数据。更具体地说，它在光学设备和控制器之间提供灵活的与供应商无关的接口，并将数据管理任务（例如，创建可查询的数据库）从设备卸载到控制器。因此，OpTel 能够以一秒的粒度收集细粒度的光学遥测数据。它已在腾讯的光骨干网络中运行了六个月。细粒度的数据收集能够检测短暂事件（即短暂事件）。与现有遥测系统相比，OpTel 检测光学事件的准确度高出 2 倍。它还可以在几秒钟内排除这些光学事件的故障，这比最先进的技术快了几个数量级。

papers.title: Differential Network Analysis.
papers.abstract: Networks are constantly changing. To avoid outages, operators need to know whether prospective changes in a network's control plane will cause undesired changes in end-to-end forwarding behavior. For example, which pairs of end hosts are reachable before a configuration change but unreachable after the change? Control plane verifiers are ill-suited for answering such questions because they operate on a single snapshot to check its "compliance" with "explicitly specified" properties, instead of quantifying the "differences" in "affected" end-to-end forwarding behaviors. We argue for a new control plane analysis paradigm that makes differences first class citizens. Differential Network Analysis (DNA) takes control plane changes, incrementally computes control and data plane state, and outputs consequent differences in end-to-end behavior. We break the computation into three stages---control plane simulation, data plane modeling, and property checking---and leverage differential dataflow programming frameworks, incremental data plane verification, and customized graph algorithms, respectively, to make each stage incremental. Evaluations using both real and synthetic control plane changes demonstrate that DNA can compute the resulting differences in reachability in a few seconds---up to 3 orders of magnitude faster than state-of-the-art control plane verifiers.
papers.abstract_zh: 网络在不断变化。为了避免中断，运营商需要知道网络控制平面的预期变化是否会导致端到端转发行为发生意外的变化。例如，哪些终端主机对在配置更改之前可以访问，但在更改之后就无法访问？控制平面验证器不适合回答此类问题，因为它们对单个快照进行操作以检查其与“明确指定”属性的“合规性”，而不是量化“受影响的”端到端转发行为中的“差异”。我们主张一种新的控制平面分析范式，使差异成为一等公民。差分网络分析 (DNA) 获取控制平面更改，增量计算控制和数据平面状态，并输出端到端行为的后续差异。我们将计算分为控制平面模拟、数据平面建模和属性检查三个阶段，并分别利用差分数据流编程框架、增量数据平面验证和定制图算法，使每个阶段都是增量的。使用真实和合成控制平面变化进行的评估表明，DNA 可以在几秒钟内计算出可达性的差异，比最先进的控制平面验证器快 3 个数量级。

papers.title: DispersedLedger: High-Throughput Byzantine Consensus on Variable Bandwidth Networks.
papers.abstract: The success of blockchains has sparked interest in large-scale deployments of Byzantine fault tolerant (BFT) consensus protocols over wide area networks. A central feature of such networks is variable communication bandwidth across nodes and across time. We present DispersedLedger, an asynchronous BFT protocol that provides near-optimal throughput in the presence of such variable network bandwidth. The core idea of DispersedLedger is to enable nodes to propose, order, and agree on blocks of transactions without having to download their full content. By enabling nodes to agree on an ordered log of blocks, with a guarantee that each block is available within the network and unmalleable, DispersedLedger decouples bandwidth-intensive block downloads at different nodes, allowing each to make progress at its own pace. We build a full system prototype and evaluate it on real-world and emulated networks. Our results on a geo-distributed wide-area deployment across the Internet shows that DispersedLedger achieves 2x better throughput and 74% reduction in latency compared to HoneyBadger, the state-of-the-art asynchronous protocol.
papers.abstract_zh: 区块链的成功引发了人们对在广域网上大规模部署拜占庭容错（BFT）共识协议的兴趣。此类网络的一个核心特征是跨节点和跨时间的可变通信带宽。我们提出了 DispersedLedger，这是一种异步 BFT 协议，可在存在此类可变网络带宽的情况下提供接近最佳的吞吐量。 DispersedLedger 的核心思想是使节点能够提议、订购和商定交易块，而无需下载其完整内容。通过使节点能够就区块的有序日志达成一致，并保证每个区块在网络中可用且不可延展，DispersedLedger 解耦了不同节点上的带宽密集型区块下载，允许每个区块按照自己的节奏取得进展。我们构建了一个完整的系统原型，并在现实世界和模拟网络上对其进行评估。我们对跨互联网的地理分布式广域部署的结果表明，与最先进的异步协议 HoneyBadger 相比，DispersedLedger 的吞吐量提高了 2 倍，延迟降低了 74%。

papers.title: Donar: Anonymous VoIP over Tor.
papers.abstract: We present DONAR, a system enabling anonymous VoIP with good quality-of-experience (QoE) over Tor. No individual Tor link can match VoIP networking requirements. DONAR bridges this gap by spreading VoIP traffic over several links. It combines active performance monitoring, dynamic link selection, adaptive traffic scheduling, and redundancy at no extra bandwidth cost. DONAR enables high QoE: latency remains under 360 ms for 99% of VoIP packets during most (86%) 5-minute and 90-minute calls.
papers.abstract_zh: 我们推出了 DONAR，这是一个通过 Tor 实现匿名 VoIP 且具有良好体验质量 (QoE) 的系统。没有任何单独的 Tor 链路能够满足 VoIP 网络要求。 DONAR 通过将 VoIP 流量分散到多个链路上来弥补这一差距。它结合了主动性能监控、动态链路选择、自适应流量调度和冗余，无需额外的带宽成本。 DONAR 可实现高 QoE：在大多数 (86%) 5 分钟和 90 分钟通话期间，99% 的 VoIP 数据包的延迟保持在 360 毫秒以下。

papers.title: Dynamic Scheduling of Approximate Telemetry Queries.
papers.abstract: Network telemetry systems provide critical visibility into the state of networks. While significant progress has been made by leveraging programmable switch hardware to scale these systems to high and time-varying traffic workloads, less attention has been paid towards efficiently utilizing limited hardware resources in the face of dynamics such as the composition of traffic as well as the number and types of queries running at a given point in time. Both these dynamics have implications on resource requirements and query accuracy. In this paper, we argue that this dynamics problem motivates reframing telemetry systems as resource schedulers---a significant departure from state-of-the-art. More concretely, rather than statically partition queries across hardware and software platforms, telemetry systems ought to decide on their own and at runtime when and for how long to execute the set of active queries on the data plane. To this end, we propose an efficient approximation and scheduling algorithm that exposes accuracy and latency tradeoffs with respect to query execution to reduce hardware resource usage. We evaluate our algorithm by building DynATOS, a hardware prototype built around a reconfigurable approach to ASIC programming. We show that our approach is more robust than state-of-the-art methods to traffic dynamics and can execute dynamic workloads comprised of multiple concurrent and sequential queries of varied complexities on a single switch while meeting per-query accuracy and latency goals.
papers.abstract_zh: 网络遥测系统提供对网络状态的重要可见性。虽然利用可编程交换机硬件将这些系统扩展到高且时变的流量工作负载方面已经取得了重大进展，但在面对动态（例如流量的组成以及在给定时间点运行的查询的数量和类型）时，对有效利用有限的硬件资源的关注较少。这两种动态都会对资源需求和查询准确性产生影响。在本文中，我们认为这个动态问题促使将遥测系统重新构建为资源调度程序——这与最先进的技术有很大的不同。更具体地说，遥测系统不应在硬件和软件平台上静态地划分查询，而应在运行时自行决定在数据平面上执行一组活动查询的时间和时长。为此，我们提出了一种有效的近似和调度算法，该算法公开了查询执行方面的准确性和延迟权衡，以减少硬件资源的使用。我们通过构建 DynATOS 来评估我们的算法，DynATOS 是一种围绕可重新配置的 ASIC 编程方法构建的硬件原型。我们表明，我们的方法比最先进的流量动态方法更强大，并且可以在单个交换机上执行由多个并发和顺序查询组成的不同复杂性的动态工作负载，同时满足每个查询的准确性和延迟目标。

papers.title: Efficient Scheduling Policies for Microsecond-Scale Tasks.
papers.abstract: Datacenter operators today strive to support microsecond-latency applications while also using their limited CPU resources as efficiently as possible. To achieve this, several recent systems allow multiple applications to run on the same server, granting each a dedicated set of cores and reallocating cores across applications over time as load varies. Unfortunately, many of these systems do a poor job of navigating the tradeoff between latency and efficiency, sacrificing one or both, especially when handling tasks as short as 1 μ s. While the implementations of these systems (threading libraries, network stacks, etc.) have been heavily optimized, the policy choices that they make have received less scrutiny. Most systems implement a single choice of policy for allocating cores across applications and for load-balancing tasks across cores within an application. In this paper, we use simulations to compare these different policy options and explore which yield the best combination of latency and efficiency. We conclude that work stealing performs best among load-balancing policies, multiple policies can perform well for core allocations, and, surprisingly, static core allocations often outperform reallocation with small tasks. We implement the best-performing policy choices by building on Caladan, an existing core-allocating system, and demonstrate that they can yield efficiency improvements of up to 13-22% without degrading (median or tail) latency.
papers.abstract_zh: 如今，数据中心运营商努力支持微秒级延迟的应用程序，同时尽可能高效地利用有限的 CPU 资源。为了实现这一目标，最近的几个系统允许多个应用程序在同一服务器上运行，为每个应用程序授予一组专用的核心，并随着负载变化而在应用程序之间重新分配核心。不幸的是，这些系统中的许多系统在处理延迟和效率之间的权衡方面做得很差，牺牲了其中一个或两者，特别是在处理短至 1 μs 的任务时。虽然这些系统（线程库、网络堆栈等）的实现已经过大量优化，但它们做出的策略选择受到的审查较少。大多数系统都实现单一策略选择，用于跨应用程序分配核心以及应用程序内跨核心的负载平衡任务。在本文中，我们使用模拟来比较这些不同的策略选项，并探索哪种策略可以产生延迟和效率的最佳组合。我们得出的结论是，工作窃取在负载平衡策略中表现最好，多个策略可以在核心分配中表现良好，并且令人惊讶的是，静态核心分配通常优于小任务的重新分配。我们通过在现有核心分配系统 Caladan 的基础上实施性能最佳的策略选择，并证明它们可以将效率提高高达 13-22%，而不会降低（中值或尾部）延迟。

papers.title: Ekya: Continuous Learning of Video Analytics Models on Edge Compute Servers.
papers.abstract: Video analytics applications use edge compute servers for processing videos. Compressed models that are deployed on the edge servers for inference suffer from data drift where the live video data diverges from the training data. Continuous learning handles data drift by periodically retraining the models on new data. Our work addresses the challenge of jointly supporting inference and retraining tasks on edge servers, which requires navigating the fundamental tradeoff between the retrained model’s accuracy and the inference accuracy. Our solution Ekya balances this tradeoff across multiple models and uses a micro-profiler to identify the models most in need of retraining. Ekya’s accuracy gain compared to a baseline scheduler is 29% higher, and the baseline requires 4× more GPU resources to achieve the same accuracy as Ekya.
papers.abstract_zh: 视频分析应用程序使用边缘计算服务器来处理视频。部署在边缘服务器上用于推理的压缩模型会受到数据漂移的影响，其中实时视频数据与训练数据存在偏差。持续学习通过定期根据新数据重新训练模型来处理数据漂移。我们的工作解决了在边缘服务器上联合支持推理和再训练任务的挑战，这需要在再训练模型的准确性和推理准确性之间进行基本权衡。我们的解决方案 Ekya 平衡了多个模型之间的这种权衡，并使用微分析器来识别最需要重新训练的模型。与基线调度程序相比，Ekya 的准确度增益高出 29%，并且基线需要多 4 倍的 GPU 资源才能达到与 Ekya 相同的准确度。

papers.title: Elixir: A High-performance and Low-cost Approach to Managing Hardware/Software Hybrid Flow Tables Considering Flow Burstiness.
papers.abstract: Hardware/software hybrid flow table is common in modern commodity network devices, such as NFV servers, smart NICs and SDN/OVS switches. The overall forwarding performance of the network device and the required CPU resources are considerably affected by the method of how to split the flow table between hardware and software. Previous works usually leverage the traffic skewness for flow table splitting, e.g. offloading top 10% largest flows to the hardware can save up to ~90% CPU resources. However, the widely-existing bursty flows bring more challenges to flow table splitting. In particular, we need to identify the proper flows and proper timing to exchange the flows between hardware and software by considering flow burstiness, so as to maximize the overall performance with low overhead. In this paper we present Elixir, a high-performance and low-cost approach to managing hardware/software hybrid flow tables on commodity devices. The core idea of Elixir includes three parts, namely, combining sampling-based and counter-based mechanisms for flow rate measurement, separating the replacement of large flows and bursty flows, as well as decoupling the flow rate identification window and the flow replacement window. We have implemented Elixir prototypes on both Mellanox ConnectX-5 NIC and Barefoot Wedge100BF-32X/65X P4 Switch, with a software library on top of DPDK. Our experiments based on real-world data traces demonstrate that, compared with the state-of-the-art solutions, Elixir can save up to ~50% software CPU resources while keeping the tail forwarding latency ~97.6% lower.
papers.abstract_zh: 硬件/软件混合流表在现代商用网络设备中很常见，例如 NFV 服务器、智能 NIC 和 SDN/OVS 交换机。流表在硬件和软件之间的分割方式对网络设备的整体转发性能和所需的CPU资源有很大的影响。以前的工作通常利用流量偏度来进行流表分割，例如将前 10% 的最大流量卸载到硬件可以节省高达约 90% 的 CPU 资源。然而，广泛存在的突发流给流表分裂带来了更多的挑战。特别是，我们需要考虑流量突发性来确定硬件和软件之间交换流量的适当流量和适当时机，从而以较低的开销最大化整体性能。在本文中，我们介绍了 Elixir，一种高性能且低成本的方法，用于管理商用设备上的硬件/软件混合流表。 Elixir的核心思想包括三个部分，即基于采样和基于计数器的流量测量机制相结合、大流和突发流的替换分离、以及流量识别窗口和流替换窗口的解耦。我们在 Mellanox ConnectX-5 NIC 和 Barefoot Wedge100BF-32X/65X P4 交换机上实现了 Elixir 原型，并在 DPDK 之上提供了软件库。我们基于真实世界数据跟踪的实验表明，与最先进的解决方案相比，Elixir 可以节省高达约 50% 的软件 CPU 资源，同时将尾部转发延迟降低约 97.6%。

papers.title: Enabling In-situ Programmability in Network Data Plane: From Architecture to Language.
papers.abstract: In-situ programmability refers to the capability for network devices to update data plane functions and protocol processing logic at runtime without interrupting the services, driven by dynamic and interactive network operations towards autonomous networks. The existing programmable switch architecture (e.g., PISA) and programming language (e.g., P4) were designed for monolithic and static implementation, which requires a complete programming and deployment cycle for functional update, incurring long delay and service interruption. Addressing the fundamental reasons for such inflexibility, we design a new In-situ Programmable Switch Architecture (IPSA) and the corresponding design flow using rP4, a P4 language extension, as a fix. The compiler contains algorithms to support efficient resource mapping for both base design and incremental updates. To manifest the in-situ programming feasibility, we demonstrate several practical use cases on both a software switch, ipbm, and an FPGA-based prototype. Our experiments and analysis show that IPSA incurs moderate hardware cost which can be justified by its benefits and compensated by newer chip technologies. The in-situ programmability enabled by IPSA and rP4 advances the state of the art of programmable networks and opens a promising new design space.
papers.abstract_zh: 原位可编程性是指网络设备在运行时更新数据平面功能和协议处理逻辑而不中断服务的能力，由面向自治网络的动态和交互式网络操作驱动。现有的可编程交换机架构（例如PISA）和编程语言（例如P4）都是为单片和静态实现而设计的，这需要完整的编程和部署周期来进行功能更新，从而导致较长的延迟和服务中断。针对这种不灵活性的根本原因，我们设计了一种新的原位可编程交换机架构 (IPSA) 以及使用 P4 语言扩展 rP4 的相应设计流程作为修复。该编译器包含支持基本设计和增量更新的高效资源映射的算法。为了证明现场编程的可行性，我们在软件交换机、ipbm 和基于 FPGA 的原型上演示了几个实际用例。我们的实验和分析表明，IPSA 会产生适中的硬件成本，这可以通过其优势来证明是合理的，并可以通过更新的芯片技术进行补偿。 IPSA 和 rP4 实现的原位可编程性推进了可编程网络的最先进水平，并开辟了充满希望的新设计空间。

papers.title: Enabling IoT Self-Localization Using Ambient 5G Signals.
papers.abstract: This paper presents ISLA , a system that enables low power IoT nodes to self-localize using ambient 5G signals without any coordination with the base stations. ISLA operates by simply overhearing transmitted 5G packets and leverages the large bandwidth used in 5G to compute high-resolution time of flight of the signals. Capturing large 5G bandwidth consumes a lot of power. To address this, ISLA leverages recent advances in MEMS acoustic resonators to design a RF filter that can stretch the effective localization bandwidth to 100 MHz while using 6.25 MHz receivers, improving ranging resolution by 16x. We implement and evaluate ISLA in three large outdoors testbeds and show high localization accuracy that is comparable with having the full 100 MHz bandwidth.
papers.abstract_zh: 本文提出了 ISLA 系统，该系统使低功耗物联网节点能够使用环境 5G 信号进行自我定位，而无需与基站进行任何协调。 ISLA 通过简单地监听传输的 5G 数据包来运行，并利用 5G 中使用的大带宽来计算信号的高分辨率飞行时间。获取大的 5G 带宽会消耗大量电量。为了解决这个问题，ISLA 利用 MEMS 声学谐振器的最新进展来设计射频滤波器，该滤波器可以在使用 6.25 MHz 接收器时将有效定位带宽扩展到 100 MHz，从而将测距分辨率提高 16 倍。我们在三个大型户外测试台中实施和评估 ISLA，并显示出与 100 MHz 完整带宽相当的高定位精度。

papers.title: Evolvable Network Telemetry at Facebook.
papers.abstract: Network telemetry is essential for service availability and performance in large-scale production environments. While there is recent advent in novel measurement primitives and algorithms for network telemetry, a challenge that is not well studied is Change. Facebook runs fast-evolving networks to adapt to varying application requirements. Changes occur not only in the data collection and processing stages but also when interpreted and consumed by applications. In this paper, we present PCAT, a production change-aware telemetry system that handles changes in fast-evolving networks. We propose to use a change cube abstraction to systematically track changes, and an intent-based layering design to confine and track changes. By sharing our experiences with PCAT, we bring a new aspect to the monitoring research area: improving the adaptivity and evolvability of network telemetry.
papers.abstract_zh: 网络遥测对于大规模生产环境中的服务可用性和性能至关重要。虽然最近出现了用于网络遥测的新颖测量原语和算法，但尚未充分研究的挑战是变化。 Facebook 运行快速发展的网络来适应不同的应用程序需求。变化不仅发生在数据收集和处理阶段，而且还发生在应用程序解释和使用时。在本文中，我们提出了 PCAT，一种生产变化感知遥测系统，可处理快速发展的网络中的变化。我们建议使用变更立方体抽象来系统地跟踪变更，并使用基于意图的分层设计来限制和跟踪变更。通过分享我们与 PCAT 的经验，我们为监测研究领域带来了一个新的方面：提高网络遥测的适应性和可进化性。

papers.title: Exploiting Digital Micro-Mirror Devices for Ambient Light Communication.
papers.abstract: There is a growing interest in exploiting ambient light for wireless communication. This new research area has two key advantages: it utilizes a free portion of the spectrum and does not require modifications of the lighting infrastructure. Most existing designs, however, rely on a single type of optical surface at the transmitter: liquid crystal displays (LCDs). LCDs have two inherent limitations, they cut the optical power in half, which affects the range; and they have slow time responses, which affects the data rate. We take a step back to provide a new perspective for ambient light communication with two novel contributions. First, we propose an optical model to understand the fundamental limits and opportunities of ambient light communication. Second, based on the insights of our model, we build a novel platform, dubbedPhotoLink, that exploits a different type of optical surface: digital micro-mirror devices (DMDs). Considering the same scenario in terms of surface area and ambient light conditions, we benchmark the performance of PhotoLink using two types of receivers, one optimized for LCDs and the other for DMDs. In both cases, PhotoLink outperforms the data rate of equivalent LCD-transmitters by factors of 30 and 80: 30kbps & 80 kbps vs. 1 kbps, while consuming less than 50 mW. Even when compared to a more sophisticated multi-cell LCD platform, which has a surface area that is 500 times bigger than ours, PhotoLink’s data rate is 10-fold: 80 kbps vs. 8 kbps. To the best of our knowledge this is the first work providing an optical model for ambient light communication and breaking the 10 kbps barrier for these types of links.
papers.abstract_zh: 人们对利用环境光进行无线通信越来越感兴趣。这个新的研究领域有两个关键优势：它利用光谱的免费部分，并且不需要修改照明基础设施。然而，大多数现有设计都依赖于发射器上的单一类型光学表面：液晶显示器 (LCD)。 LCD 有两个固有的限制，它们将光功率减半，这会影响范围；它们的时间响应速度较慢，这会影响数据速率。我们退后一步，通过两项新颖的贡献为环境光通信提供了新的视角。首先，我们提出了一个光学模型来了解环境光通信的基本限制和机会。其次，根据我们模型的见解，我们构建了一个名为 PhotoLink 的新颖平台，它利用了不同类型的光学表面：数字微镜器件 (DMD)。考虑到表面积和环境光条件方面的相同场景，我们使用两种类型的接收器对 PhotoLink 的性能进行基准测试，一种针对 LCD 进行优化，另一种针对 DMD 进行优化。在这两种情况下，PhotoLink 的数据速率均优于同等 LCD 发射器 30 倍和 80 倍：30kbps 和 80 kbps 与 1 kbps，而功耗不到 50 mW。即使与表面积比我们大 500 倍的更复杂的多单元 LCD 平台相比，PhotoLink 的数据速率也是其 10 倍：80 kbps 与 8 kbps。据我们所知，这是第一项为环境光通信提供光学模型并突破此类链路 10 kbps 障碍的工作。

papers.title: FlexTOE: Flexible TCP Offload with Fine-Grained Parallelism.
papers.abstract: FlexTOE is a flexible, yet high-performance TCP offload engine (TOE) to SmartNICs. FlexTOE eliminates almost all host data-path TCP processing and is fully customizable. FlexTOE interoperates well with other TCP stacks, is robust under adverse network conditions, and supports POSIX sockets. FlexTOE focuses on data-path offload of established connections, avoiding complex control logic and packet buffering in the NIC. FlexTOE leverages fine-grained parallelization of the TCP data-path and segment reordering for high performance on wimpy SmartNIC architectures, while remaining flexible via a modular design. We compare FlexTOE on an Agilio-CX40 to host TCP stacks Linux and TAS, and to the Chelsio Terminator TOE. We find that Memcached scales up to 38% better on FlexTOE versus TAS, while saving up to 81% host CPU cycles versus Chelsio. FlexTOE provides competitive performance for RPCs, even with wimpy SmartNICs. FlexTOE cuts 99.99th-percentile RPC RTT by 3.2× and 50% versus Chelsio and TAS, respectively. FlexTOE's data-path parallelism generalizes across hardware architectures, improving single connection RPC throughput up to 2.4× on x86 and 4× on BlueField. FlexTOE supports C and XDP programs written in eBPF. It allows us to implement popular data center transport features, such as TCP tracing, packet filtering and capture, VLAN stripping, flow classification, firewalling, and connection splicing.
papers.abstract_zh: FlexTOE 是一种灵活且高性能的 SmartNIC TCP 卸载引擎 (TOE)。 FlexTOE 消除了几乎所有主机数据路径 TCP 处理，并且完全可定制。 FlexTOE 与其他 TCP 堆栈具有良好的互操作性，在不利的网络条件下也具有鲁棒性，并且支持 POSIX 套接字。 FlexTOE 专注于已建立连接的数据路径卸载，避免 NIC 中的复杂控制逻辑和数据包缓冲。 FlexTOE 利用 TCP 数据路径的细粒度并行化和段重新排序，在微弱的 SmartNIC 架构上实现高性能，同时通过模块化设计保持灵活性。我们将 Agilio-CX40 上的 FlexTOE 与主机 TCP 堆栈 Linux 和 TAS 以及 Chelsio Terminator TOE 进行比较。我们发现，与 TAS 相比，Memcached 在 FlexTOE 上的扩展能力提高了 38%，同时与 Chelsio 相比节省了高达 81% 的主机 CPU 周期。 FlexTOE 为 RPC 提供了具有竞争力的性能，即使智能网卡性能较差。与 Chelsio 和 TAS 相比，FlexTOE 将 99.99% 的 RPC RTT 分别降低了 3.2 倍和 50%。 FlexTOE 的数据路径并行性遍及硬件架构，将 x86 上的单连接 RPC 吞吐量提高至 2.4 倍，在 BlueField 上提高至 4 倍。 FlexTOE 支持用 eBPF 编写的 C 和 XDP 程序。它使我们能够实现流行的数据中心传输功能，例如 TCP 跟踪、数据包过滤和捕获、VLAN 剥离、流分类、防火墙和连接拼接。

papers.title: Gearbox: A Hierarchical Packet Scheduler for Approximate Weighted Fair Queuing.
papers.abstract: Bandwidth allocation and performance isolation are crucial to achieving network virtualization and guaranteeing service quality in data centers as well as other network systems. Weighted Fair Queuing (WFQ) can achieve customized bandwidth allocation and flow isolation; however, its implementation in large-scale high-speed network systems is very challenging due to the high complexity of the scheduling and the large number of queues required. This paper proposes Gearbox, a scheduler primitive for next-generation programmable switches and smart NICs that practically approximates WFQ. Gearbox consists of a logical hierarchy of queuing levels, which accommodate a wide range of packet departure times using a relatively small number of FIFOs. Gearbox's enqueue and dequeue operations have O(1) time complexity, which makes it suitable to cope with high-speed line rates. Gearbox provides its simplicity and performance advantages by allowing slight discrepancies in packet departure time from strict WFQ. We show that Gearbox's normalized departure time discrepancy is bounded and has a negligible impact on bandwidth allocation and flow completion time (FCT). We implement Gearbox in NS2 and in VHDL, targeted to a Xilinx Alveo U250 card with an XCVU13P FPGA. The NS2 evaluation results show that Gearbox closely approximates WFQ and achieves weighted max-min fairness in bandwidth allocation as well as flow isolation. Gearbox provides FCT performance comparable to ideal WFQ. The Gearbox FPGA prototype runs at 350MHz and achieves full line rate for 100GbE with packets larger than 123 bytes. Gearbox consumes less than 1% of the FPGA's logic resources and less than 4% of its internal block memory.
papers.abstract_zh: 带宽分配和性能隔离对于数据中心及其他网络系统实现网络虚拟化和保证服务质量至关重要。加权公平队列（WFQ）可以实现定制化的带宽分配和流量隔离；然而，由于调度复杂度高、需要大量队列，其在大规模高速网络系统中的实现非常具有挑战性。本文提出了 Gearbox，一种用于下一代可编程交换机和智能 NIC 的调度器原语，实际上类似于 WFQ。 Gearbox 由排队级别的逻辑层次结构组成，它使用相对较少数量的 FIFO 来适应各种数据包出发时间。 Gearbox的入队和出队操作具有O(1)的时间复杂度，这使得它适合应对高速线速率。 Gearbox 通过允许数据包离开时间与严格的 WFQ 略有差异，提供了简单性和性能优势。我们表明 Gearbox 的标准化出发时间差异是有界的，并且对带宽分配和流完成时间 (FCT) 的影响可以忽略不计。我们在 NS2 和 VHDL 中实现 Gearbox，目标是带有 XCVU13P FPGA 的 Xilinx Alveo U250 卡。 NS2 评估结果表明，Gearbox 非常接近 WFQ，并在带宽分配和流量隔离方面实现了加权最大最小公平性。 Gearbox 提供与理想 WFQ 相当的 FCT 性能。 Gearbox FPGA 原型运行频率为 350MHz，可实现 100GbE 的全线速，且数据包大于 123 字节。 Gearbox 消耗的 FPGA 逻辑资源不到 1%，其内部块存储器不到 4%。

papers.title: Graham: Synchronizing Clocks by Leveraging Local Clock Properties.
papers.abstract: High performance, strongly consistent applications are beginning to require scalable sub-microsecond clock synchronization. State-of-the-art clock synchronization focuses on improving accuracy or frequency of synchronization, ignoring the properties of the local clock: lost of connectivity to the remote clock means synchronization failure. Our system, Graham, leverages the fact that the local clock still keeps time even when connectivity is lost and builds a failure model using the characteristics of the local clock and the desired synchronization accuracy. Graham characterizes the local clock using commodity sensors present in nearly every server and leverages this data to further improve clock accuracy, increasing the tolerance of Graham to failures. Graham reduces the clock drift of a commodity server by up to 2000×, reducing the maximum assumed drift in most situations from 200ppm to 100ppb.
papers.abstract_zh: 高性能、高度一致的应用程序开始需要可扩展的亚微秒时钟同步。最先进的时钟同步侧重于提高同步的准确性或频率，而忽略了本地时钟的属性：失去与远程时钟的连接意味着同步失败。我们的系统 Graham 利用本地时钟即使在连接丢失时仍然保持时间的事实，并使用本地时钟的特性和所需的同步精度构建故障模型。 Graham 使用几乎每台服务器中存在的商品传感器来表征本地时钟，并利用这些数据进一步提高时钟精度，从而提高 Graham 对故障的容忍度。 Graham 将商品服务器的时钟漂移降低了 2000 倍，将大多数情况下的最大假设漂移从 200ppm 降低到 100ppb。

papers.title: HeteroSketch: Coordinating Network-wide Monitoring in Heterogeneous and Dynamic Networks.
papers.abstract: Network monitoring and measurement have always been critical components of network management. Recent developments in sketch-based monitoring techniques and the deployment opportunities arising from the increasing programmability of network elements (e.g., programmable switches, SmartNICs, and software switches) have made the possibility of accurate, detailed, network-wide telemetry tantalizingly within reach. However, the wide heterogeneity of the programmable hardware and dynamic changes in both resources available and resources needed for monitoring over time make existing approaches to network-wide monitoring impractical. We present HeteroSketch, a framework that consists of two main components: (1) a profiling tool that automatically quantifies the capabilities of arbitrary hardware by predicting their performance for sketching algorithms, and (2) an optimization framework that decides placement of measurement tasks and resource allocation for devices to meet monitoring goals while considering heterogeneous device capabilities. HeteroSketch enables optimized deployments for large networks (> 40,000 nodes) using a novel clustering approach and enables prompt responses to network topology, traffic, query, and resource dynamics. Our evaluation shows that HeteroSketch reduces resource overheads by 20-60% compared to prior art, while maintaining monitoring performance, coverage, and accuracy.
papers.abstract_zh: 网络监控和测量一直是网络管理的重要组成部分。基于草图的监控技术的最新发展以及网络元件（例如可编程交换机、SmartNIC 和软件交换机）可编程性的增加所带来的部署机会，使得准确、详细、全网络遥测变得触手可及。然而，可编程硬件的广泛异构性以及可用资源和监控所需资源随时间的动态变化使得现有的全网络监控方法变得不切实际。我们提出了 HeteroSketch，一个由两个主要组件组成的框架：（1）一个分析工具，通过预测草图算法的性能来自动量化任意硬件的功能；（2）一个优化框架，决定测量任务的放置和设备的资源分配，以满足监控目标，同时考虑异构设备的功能。 HeteroSketch 使用新颖的集群方法实现大型网络（> 40,000 个节点）的优化部署，并实现对网络拓扑、流量、查询和资源动态的快速响应。我们的评估表明，与现有技术相比，HeteroSketch 可减少 20-60% 的资源开销，同时保持监控性能、覆盖范围和准确性。

papers.title: How to diagnose nanosecond network latencies in rich end-host stacks.
papers.abstract: Low-latency network stacks have brought down network latencies within end-hosts to the microsecond-regime . However, end-host profilers have such high overheads that they are useful only to confirm a hypothesis, not to diagnose a problem in the first place. Indeed, every one of twenty low-latency network projects we surveyed rolled their own analysis tools instead of using an existing profiler. This paper shows how to build a latency diagnosis tool with full-stack coverage and low overhead that can identify, not just confirm, sources of latency in end hosts. The unique measurement methodology reconstructs network-message lifetimes within end hosts with nanosecond precision, by reconciling CPU and NIC hardware profiling traces across multiple time domains (network and CPU). It uncovers unexpected latency sources in both kernel and user-space stacks. We demonstrate these capabilities by using our implementation, NSight, to systematically identify and remove performance overheads in memcached, reducing 99.9th percentile latency by a factor of 40 from 2:2 ms to 41 μs.
papers.abstract_zh: 低延迟网络堆栈已将终端主机内的网络延迟降低至微秒级。然而，终端主机分析器的开销如此之高，以至于它们只能用于确认假设，而不能首先诊断问题。事实上，我们调查的二十个低延迟网络项目中，每一个都推出了自己的分析工具，而不是使用现有的分析器。本文展示了如何构建一个具有全栈覆盖和低开销的延迟诊断工具，该工具可以识别（而不仅仅是确认）终端主机中的延迟来源。独特的测量方法通过跨多个时域（网络和 CPU）协调 CPU 和 NIC 硬件分析跟踪，以纳秒精度重建终端主机内的网络消息生命周期。它发现了内核和用户空间堆栈中意外的延迟源。我们通过使用我们的实现 NSight 来系统地识别和消除 memcached 中的性能开销，从而将 99.9% 的延迟减少 40 倍，从 2:2 毫秒减少到 41 微秒，从而展示了这些功能。

papers.title: IA-CCF: Individual Accountability for Permissioned Ledgers.
papers.abstract: Permissioned ledger systems allow a consortium of members that do not trust one another to execute transactions safely on a set of replicas. Such systems typically use Byzantine fault tolerance (BFT) protocols to distribute trust, which only ensures safety when fewer than 1/3 of the replicas misbehave. Providing guarantees beyond this threshold is a challenge: current systems assume that the ledger is corrupt and fail to identify misbehaving replicas or hold the members that operate them accountable—instead all members share the blame. We describe IA-CCF, a new permissioned ledger system that provides individual accountability . It can assign blame to the individual members that operate misbehaving replicas regardless of the number of misbehaving replicas or members. IA-CCF achieves this by signing and logging BFT protocol messages in the ledger, and by using Merkle trees to provide clients with succinct, universally-verifiable receipts as evidence of successful transaction execution. Anyone can audit the ledger against a set of receipts to discover inconsistencies and identify replicas that signed contradictory statements. IA-CCF also supports changes to consortium membership and replicas by tracking signing keys using a sub-ledger of governance transactions. IA-CCF provides strong disincentives to misbehavior with low overhead: it executes 47,000 tx/s while providing clients with receipts in two network round trips.
papers.abstract_zh: 许可账本系统允许互不信任的成员联盟在一组副本上安全地执行交易。此类系统通常使用拜占庭容错 (BFT) 协议来分配信任，只有在少于 1/3 的副本行为不当时才能确保安全。提供超出此阈值的保证是一项挑战：当前系统假设分类账已损坏，无法识别行为不当的副本或追究操作副本的成员的责任，而是所有成员都承担责任。我们描述了 IA-CCF，这是一种提供个人问责制的新许可账本系统。它可以将责任归咎于操作行为不当副本的各个成员，无论行为不当的副本或成员的数量如何。 IA-CCF 通过在账本中签名和记录 BFT 协议消息，并使用 Merkle 树为客户提供简洁、普遍可验证的收据作为交易成功执行的证据来实现这一目标。任何人都可以根据一组收据审核分类账，以发现不一致之处并识别签署矛盾声明的副本。 IA-CCF 还通过使用治理交易的子分类账跟踪签名密钥来支持对联盟成员资格和副本的更改。 IA-CCF 以较低的开销提供了对不当行为的强有力的抑制措施：它每秒执行 47,000 笔交易，同时在两次网络往返中为客户提供收据。

papers.title: IMap: Fast and Scalable In-Network Scanning with Programmable Switches.
papers.abstract: Network scanning has been a standard measurement technique to understand a network’s security situations, e.g., revealing security vulnerabilities, monitoring service deployments. However, probing a large-scale scanning space with existing network scanners is both difficult and slow, since they are all implemented on commodity servers and deployed at the network edge. To address this, we introduce IMap, a fast and scalable in-network scanner based on programmable switches. In designing IMap, we overcome key restrictions posed by computation models and memory resources of programmable switches, and devise numerous techniques and optimizations, including an address-random and rate-adaptive probe packet generation mechanism, and a correct and efficient response packet processing scheme, to turn a switch into a practical high-speed network scanner. We implement an open-source prototype of IMap, and evaluate it with extensive testbed experiments and real-world deployments in our campus network. Evaluation results show that even with one switch port enabled, IMap can survey all ports of our campus network (i.e., a total of up to 25 billion scanning space) in 8 minutes. This demonstrates a nearly 4 times faster scanning speed and 1.5 times higher scanning accuracy than the state of the art, which shows that IMap has great potentials to be the next-generation terabit network scanner with all switch ports enabled. Leveraging IMap, we also discover several potential security threats in our campus network, and report them to our network administrators responsibly.
papers.abstract_zh: 网络扫描已成为了解网络安全状况的标准测量技术，例如揭示安全漏洞、监控服务部署。然而，使用现有的网络扫描仪探测大规模扫描空间既困难又缓慢，因为它们都是在商用服务器上实现并部署在网络边缘。为了解决这个问题，我们推出了 IMap，这是一种基于可编程交换机的快速且可扩展的网络内扫描器。在设计IMap时，我们克服了可编程交换机的计算模型和内存资源带来的关键限制，并设计了许多技术和优化，包括地址随机和速率自适应的探测包生成机制，以及正确有效的响应包处理方案，将交换机变成实用的高速网络扫描器。我们实现了 IMap 的开源原型，并通过广泛的测试台实验和校园网络中的实际部署对其进行了评估。评估结果表明，即使启用一个交换机端口，IMap也可以在8分钟内勘测我们校园网的所有端口（即总共高达250亿的扫描空间）。这表明，与现有技术相比，扫描速度快了近 4 倍，扫描精度提高了 1.5 倍，这表明 IMap 具有成为启用所有交换机端口的下一代太比特网络扫描器的巨大潜力。利用IMap，我们还发现了校园网络中的一些潜在安全威胁，并负责任地将其报告给我们的网络管理员。

papers.title: In-Network Velocity Control of Industrial Robot Arms.
papers.abstract: In-network computing has emerged as a new computational paradigm made possible with the advent of programmable data planes. The benefits of moving computations traditionally performed by servers to the network have recently been demonstrated through different applications. In this paper, we argue that programmable data planes could be a key technology enabler of cloud and edge-cloud robotics, and in general could revitalize industrial networking. We propose an in-network approach for real-time robot control that separates delay sensitive tasks from high-level control processes. The proposed system offloads real-time velocity control of robot arms to P4-enabled programmable data planes and only keeps the high-level control and planning at the industrial controller. This separation allows the deployment of industrial control in non-real-time environments like virtual machines and service containers running in a remote cloud or an edgecomputing infrastructure. In addition, we also demonstrate that our method can smoothly control 100s of robot arms with a single P4-switch, enables fast reroute between trajectories, solves the precise synchronization of multiple robots by design and supports the plug-and-play deployment of new robot devices in the industrial system, reducing both operational and management costs.
papers.abstract_zh: 随着可编程数据平面的出现，网络内计算已经成为一种新的计算范式。最近通过不同的应用程序证明了将传统上由服务器执行的计算转移到网络的好处。在本文中，我们认为可编程数据平面可能是云和边缘云机器人技术的关键技术推动者，并且总体上可以振兴工业网络。我们提出了一种用于实时机器人控制的网络内方法，它将延迟敏感任务与高级控制过程分开。所提出的系统将机器人手臂的实时速度控制卸载到支持 P4 的可编程数据平面，并且仅在工业控制器上保留高级控制和规划。这种分离允许在非实时环境中部署工业控制，例如在远程云或边缘计算基础设施中运行的虚拟机和服务容器。此外，我们还证明了我们的方法可以通过单个 P4 开关平滑控制 100 个机械臂，实现轨迹之间的快速重新路由，通过设计解决多个机器人的精确同步，并支持工业系统中新机器人设备的即插即用部署，降低运营和管理成本。

papers.title: Isolation Mechanisms for High-Speed Packet-Processing Pipelines.
papers.abstract: Data-plane programmability is now mainstream. As we find more use cases, deployments need to be able to run multiple packet-processing modules in a single device. These are likely to be developed by independent teams, either within the same organization or from multiple organizations. Therefore, we need isolation mechanisms to ensure that modules on the same device do not interfere with each other. This paper presents Menshen, an extension of the Reconfigurable Match Tables (RMT) pipeline that enforces isolation between different packet-processing modules. Menshen is comprised of a set of lightweight hardware primitives and an extension to the open source P4-16 reference compiler that act in conjunction to meet this goal. We have prototyped Menshen on two FPGA platforms (NetFPGA and Corundum). We show that our design provides isolation, and allows new modules to be loaded without impacting the ones already running. Finally, we demonstrate the feasibility of implementing Menshen on ASICs by using the FreePDK45nm technology library and the Synopsys DC synthesis software, showing that our design meets timing at a 1 GHz clock frequency and needs approximately 6% additional chip area. We have open sourced the code for Menshen’s hardware and software at https://isolation.quest/ .
papers.abstract_zh: 数据平面可编程性现已成为主流。随着我们发现更多用例，部署需要能够在单个设备中运行多个数据包处理模块。这些可能是由同一组织内或来自多个组织的独立团队开发的。因此，我们需要隔离机制来保证同一设备上的模块不会互相干扰。本文介绍了 Menshen，它是可重新配置匹配表 (RMT) 管道的扩展，可强制不同数据包处理模块之间的隔离。 Menshen 由一组轻量级硬件原语和开源 P4-16 参考编译器的扩展组成，它们共同作用来实现这一目标。我们在两个 FPGA 平台（NetFPGA 和 Corundum）上制作了 Menshen 原型。我们表明我们的设计提供了隔离，并允许加载新模块而不影响已经运行的模块。最后，我们展示了使用 FreePDK45nm 技术库和 Synopsys DC 综合软件在 ASIC 上实现 Menshen 的可行性，表明我们的设计满足 1 GHz 时钟频率的时序，并且需要大约 6% 的额外芯片面积。我们在 https://isolation.quest/ 开源了 Menshen 的硬件和软件代码。

papers.title: Justitia: Software Multi-Tenancy in Hardware Kernel-Bypass Networks.
papers.abstract: Kernel-bypass networking (KBN) is becoming the new norm in modern datacenters. While hardware-based KBN offloads all dataplane tasks to specialized NICs to achieve better latency and CPU efficiency than software-based KBN, it also takes away the operator’s control over network sharing policies. Providing policy support in multi-tenant hardware KBN brings unique challenges – namely, preserving ultra-low latency and low CPU cost, finding a well-defined point of mediation, and rethinking traffic shapers. We present Justitia to address these challenges with three key design aspects: (i) Split Connection with message-level shaping, (ii) sender-based resource mediation together with receiver-side updates, and (iii) passive latency monitoring. Using a latency target as its knob, Justitia enables multi-tenancy policies such as predictable latencies and fair/weighted resource sharing. Our evaluation shows Justitia can effectively isolate latency-sensitive applications at the cost of slightly decreased utilization and ensure that throughput and bandwidth of the rest are not unfairly penalized.
papers.abstract_zh: 内核旁路网络 (KBN) 正在成为现代数据中心的新规范。虽然基于硬件的 KBN 将所有数据平面任务卸载到专用 NIC，以实现比基于软件的 KBN 更好的延迟和 CPU 效率，但它也剥夺了运营商对网络共享策略的控制。在多租户硬件 KBN 中提供策略支持带来了独特的挑战，即保持超低延迟和低 CPU 成本、找到明确定义的中介点以及重新思考流量整形器。我们提出 Justitia 通过三个关键设计方面来应对这些挑战：(i) 具有消息级整形的拆分连接，(ii) 基于发送者的资源中介以及接收者端更新，以及 (iii) 被动延迟监控。 Justitia 使用延迟目标作为旋钮，支持多租户策略，例如可预测的延迟和公平/加权资源共享。我们的评估表明，Justitia 可以有效隔离对延迟敏感的应用程序，但代价是利用率略有下降，并确保其余应用程序的吞吐量和带宽不会受到不公平的惩罚。

papers.title: Katra: Realtime Verification for Multilayer Networks.
papers.abstract: We present a new verification algorithm to efficiently and incrementally verify arbitrarily layered network data planes that are implemented using packet encapsulation and decapsulation. Inspired by work on model checking of pushdown systems for recursive programs, we develop a verification algorithm for networks consisting of stacks of headers. Our algorithm is based on a new technique that lazily "repairs" a decomposed stack of header sets on demand to account for cross-layer dependencies. We demonstrate how to integrate our approach with existing fast incremental data plane verifiers and have implemented our ideas in a tool called Katra. Evaluating Katra against an alternative approach based on equipping existing incremental verifiers to emulate finite header stacks, we show that Katra is between 5x-32x faster for packets with just 2 headers (layers), and that its performance advantage grows with both network size and layering.
papers.abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种新的验证算法，可以有效地、增量地验证使用数据包封装和解封装实现的任意分层的网络数据平面。受到递归程序下推系统模型检查工作的启发，我们开发了一种用于由标头堆栈组成的网络的验证算法。我们的算法基于一种新技术，该技术可以根据需要延迟“修复”已分解的标头集堆栈，以解决跨层依赖性。我们演示了如何将我们的方法与现有的快速增量数据平面验证器集成，并在名为 Katra 的工具中实现了我们的想法。根据装备现有增量验证器模拟有限标头堆栈的替代方法来评估 Katra，我们发现 Katra 对于只有 2 个标头（层）的数据包速度提高了 5 倍到 32 倍，并且其性能优势随着网络规模和分层的增加而增长。

papers.title: Learning to Communicate Effectively Between Battery-free Devices.
papers.abstract: Successful wireless communication requires that sender and receiver are operational at the same time. This requirement is difficult to satisfy in battery-free networks, where the energy harvested from ambient sources varies across time and space and is often too weak to continuously power the devices. We present Bonito, the first connection protocol for battery-free systems that enables reliable and efficient bi-directional communication between intermittently powered nodes. We collect and analyze real-world energy-harvesting traces from five diverse scenarios involving solar panels and piezoelectric harvesters, and find that the nodes' charging times approximately follow well-known distributions. Bonito learns a model of these distributions online and adapts the nodes' wake-up times so that sender and receiver are operational at the same time, enabling successful communication. Experiments with battery-free prototype nodes built from off-the-shelf hardware components demonstrate that our design improves the average throughput by 10-80× compared with the state of the art.
papers.abstract_zh: 成功的无线通信需要发送器和接收器同时运行。这一要求在无电池网络中很难满足，因为在无电池网络中，从环境来源收集的能量随时间和空间的不同而变化，并且通常太弱而无法为设备持续供电。我们推出 Bonito，这是第一个用于无电池系统的连接协议，可在间歇供电的节点之间实现可靠且高效的双向通信。我们收集并分析了涉及太阳能电池板和压电采集器的五种不同场景的真实能量采集痕迹，发现节点的充电时间大致遵循众所周知的分布。 Bonito 在线学习这些分布的模型，并调整节点的唤醒时间，以便发送者和接收者同时运行，从而实现成功的通信。对由现成硬件组件构建的无电池原型节点进行的实验表明，与现有技术相比，我们的设计将平均吞吐量提高了 10-80 倍。

papers.title: MLaaS in the Wild: Workload Analysis and Scheduling in Large-Scale Heterogeneous GPU Clusters.
papers.abstract: With the sustained technological advances in machine learning (ML) and the availability of massive datasets recently, tech companies are deploying large ML-as-a-Service (MLaaS) clouds, often with heterogeneous GPUs, to provision a host of ML applications. However, running diverse ML workloads in heterogeneous GPU clusters raises a number of challenges. In this paper, we present a characterization study of a two-month workload trace collected from a production MLaaS cluster with over 6,000 GPUs in Alibaba. We explain the challenges posed to cluster scheduling, including the low GPU utilization, the long queueing delays, the presence of hard-to-schedule tasks demanding high-end GPUs with picky scheduling requirements, the imbalance load across heterogeneous machines, and the potential bottleneck on CPUs. We describe our current solutions and call for further investigations into the challenges that remain open to address. We have released the trace for public access, which is the most comprehensive in terms of the workloads and cluster scale.
papers.abstract_zh: 随着最近机器学习 (ML) 技术的持续进步和海量数据集的可用性，科技公司正在部署大型机器学习即服务 (MLaaS) 云（通常使用异构 GPU）来提供大量机器学习应用程序。然而，在异构 GPU 集群中运行不同的 ML 工作负载会带来许多挑战。在本文中，我们对从阿里巴巴拥有 6,000 多个 GPU 的生产 MLaaS 集群收集的两个月工作负载跟踪进行了表征研究。我们解释了集群调度面临的挑战，包括GPU利用率低、排队延迟长、难以调度的任务需要高端GPU且调度要求挑剔、异构机器之间的负载不平衡以及CPU的潜在瓶颈。我们描述了我们当前的解决方案，并呼吁对仍然有待解决的挑战进行进一步调查。我们已经发布了公共访问的跟踪，它在工作负载和集群规模方面是最全面的。

papers.title: Modular Switch Programming Under Resource Constraints.
papers.abstract: Programmable networks support a wide variety of applications, including access control, routing, monitoring, caching, and synchronization. As demand for applications grows, so does resource contention within the switch data plane. Cramming applications onto a switch is a challenging task that often results in non-modular programming, frustrating “trial and error” compile-debug cycles, and suboptimal use of resources. In this paper, we present P4All, an extension of P4 that allows programmers to define elastic data structures that stretch automatically to make optimal use of available switch resources. These data structures are defined using symbolic primitives (that parameterize the size and shape of the structure) and objective functions (that quantify the value gained or lost as that shape changes). A top-level optimization function specifies how to share resources amongst data structures or applications. We demonstrate the inherent modularity and effectiveness of our design by building a range of reusable elastic data structures including hash tables, Bloom filters, sketches, and key-value stores, and using those structures within larger applications. We show how to implement the P4All compiler using a combination of dependency analysis, loop unrolling, linear and non-linear constraint generation, and constraint solving. We evaluate the compiler’s performance, showing that a range of elastic programs can be compiled to P4 in few minutes at most, but usually less.
papers.abstract_zh: 可编程网络支持多种应用，包括访问控制、路由、监控、缓存和同步。随着应用需求的增长，交换机数据平面内的资源争用也在增加。将应用程序塞到交换机上是一项具有挑战性的任务，通常会导致非模块化编程、令人沮丧的“试错”编译调试周期以及资源的次优利用。在本文中，我们提出了 P4All，它是 P4 的扩展，它允许程序员定义自动扩展的弹性数据结构，以最佳地利用可用的交换机资源。这些数据结构是使用符号基元（参数化结构的大小和形状）和目标函数（量化形状变化时获得或损失的值）来定义的。顶级优化函数指定如何在数据结构或应用程序之间共享资源。我们通过构建一系列可重用的弹性数据结构（包括哈希表、布隆过滤器、草图和键值存储）并在更大的应用程序中使用这些结构来展示我们设计的固有模块化性和有效性。我们展示了如何结合使用依赖性分析、循环展开、线性和非线性约束生成以及约束求解来实现 P4All 编译器。我们评估了编译器的性能，结果表明一系列弹性程序最多可以在几分钟内编译到 P4，但通常更短。

papers.title: NetHint: White-Box Networking for Multi-Tenant Data Centers.
papers.abstract: A cloud provider today provides its network resources to its tenants as a black box, such that cloud tenants have little knowledge of the underlying network characteristics. Meanwhile, data-intensive applications have increasingly migrated to the cloud, and these applications have both the ability and the incentive to adapt their data transfer schedules based on the cloud network characteristics. We find that the black-box networking abstraction and the adaptiveness of data-intensive applications together create a mismatch, leading to sub-optimal application performance. This paper explores a white-box approach to resolving this mismatch. We propose NetHint, an interactive mechanism between a cloud tenant and a cloud provider to jointly enhance application performance. With NetHint, the provider provides a hint — an indirect indication of the underlying network characteristics (e.g., link-layer network topologies for a tenant's virtual machines, number of co-locating tenants, network bandwidth utilization), and the tenant's applications then adapt their transfer schedules accordingly. The NetHint design provides abundant network information for cloud tenants to compute their optimal transfer schedules, while introducing little overhead for the cloud provider to collect and expose this information. Evaluation results show that NetHint improves the average performance of allreduce completion time, broadcast completion time, and MapReduce shuffle completion time by 2.7×, 1.5×, and 1.2×, respectively.
papers.abstract_zh: 如今，云提供商将其网络资源作为黑匣子提供给租户，使得云租户对底层网络特征知之甚少。与此同时，数据密集型应用越来越多地迁移到云端，这些应用程序有能力也有动力根据云网络特性调整其数据传输时间表。我们发现黑盒网络抽象和数据密集型应用程序的适应性共同造成了不匹配，导致应用程序性能不佳。本文探讨了解决这种不匹配问题的白盒方法。我们提出了NetHint，一种云租户和云提供商之间的交互机制，共同增强应用程序性能。通过 NetHint，提供商提供了一个提示 - 底层网络特征的间接指示（例如，租户虚拟机的链路层网络拓扑、共置租户的数量、网络带宽利用率），然后租户的应用程序相应地调整其传输计划。 NetHint 设计为云租户提供了丰富的网络信息来计算其最佳传输计划，同时为云提供商收集和公开此信息带来了很少的开销。评估结果表明，NetHint 将 allreduce 完成时间、broadcast 完成时间和 MapReduce shuffle 完成时间的平均性能分别提高了 2.7 倍、1.5 倍和 1.2 倍。

papers.title: NetVRM: Virtual Register Memory for Programmable Networks.
papers.abstract: Programmable networks are enabling a new class of applications that leverage the line-rate processing capability and on-chip register memory of the switch data plane. Yet the status quo is focused on developing approaches that share the register memory statically. We present NetVRM, a network management system that supports dynamic register memory sharing between multiple concurrent applications on a programmable network and is readily deployable on commodity programmable switches. NetVRM provides a virtual register memory abstraction that enables applications to share the register memory in the data plane, and abstracts away the underlying details. In principle, NetVRM supports any memory allocation algorithm given the virtual register memory abstraction . It also provides a default memory allocation algorithm that exploits the observation that applications have diminishing returns on additional memory. NetVRM provides an extension of P4, P4VRM, for developing applications with virtual register memory, and a compiler to generate data plane programs and control plane APIs. Testbed experiments show that NetVRM generalizes to a diverse variety of applications, and that its utility-based dynamic allocation policy outperforms static resource allocation. Specifically, it improves the mean satisfaction ratio (i.e., the fraction of a network application’s lifetime that it meets its utility target) by 1.6–2.2× under a range of workloads.
papers.abstract_zh: 可编程网络正在支持利用线速处理能力和交换机数据平面的片上寄存器存储器的新型应用。然而现状的重点是开发静态共享寄存器内存的方法。我们推出的 NetVRM 是一种网络管理系统，支持可编程网络上多个并发应用程序之间的动态寄存器内存共享，并且可以轻松部署在商用可编程交换机上。 NetVRM 提供虚拟寄存器内存抽象，使应用程序能够共享数据平面中的寄存器内存，并抽象出底层细节。原则上，NetVRM 支持任何给定虚拟寄存器内存抽象的内存分配算法。它还提供了默认的内存分配算法，该算法利用了应用程序在额外内存上收益递减的观察结果。 NetVRM 提供了 P4 的扩展 P4VRM，用于开发具有虚拟寄存器内存的应用程序，以及用于生成数据平面程序和控制平面 API 的编译器。测试台实验表明，NetVRM 可以推广到多种应用，并且其基于效用的动态分配策略优于静态资源分配。具体来说，它在一系列工作负载下将平均满意度（即网络应用程序生命周期中满足其效用目标的比例）提高了 1.6-2.2 倍。

papers.title: Optimizing Network Provisioning through Cooperation.
papers.abstract: The rise of cloud-scale services has fueled a huge growth in inter-data center (DC) Wide-Area Network (WAN) traffic. As a result, cloud providers provision large amounts of WAN bandwidth at very high costs. However, the inter-DC traffic is often dominated by first-party applications , i.e., applications that are owned and operated by the same entity as the cloud provider. This creates a unique opportunity for the applications and the network to cooperate to optimize the provisioning plane, (which we term as optimizing the “provisioning plane” ), since the demands placed by dominant first-party applications often define the network. Such optimization is distinct from and goes beyond past work focused on the control and data planes (e.g., traffic engineering), in that it helps optimize the provisioning of network capacity and consequently helps reduce cost. In this paper, we show how cooperation between application and network can optimize network capacity based on knowledge of the application’s deadline coupled with network link failure statistics. Using data from a tier-1 cloud provider and a large enterprise collaboration service, we show that our techniques can potentially help provision significantly lower network capacity, with savings ranging from 30% to 45%.
papers.abstract_zh: 云规模服务的兴起推动了数据中心间 (DC) 广域网 (WAN) 流量的巨大增长。因此，云提供商以非常高的成本提供大量 WAN 带宽。然而，数据中心间的流量通常由第一方应用程序主导，即由与云提供商相同的实体拥有和运营的应用程序。这为应用程序和网络合作优化配置平面（我们称之为优化“配置平面”）创造了独特的机会，因为主导的第一方应用程序提出的需求通常定义网络。这种优化不同于并超越了过去专注于控制和数据平面（例如流量工程）的工作，因为它有助于优化网络容量的配置，从而有助于降低成本。在本文中，我们展示了应用程序和网络之间的合作如何基于应用程序截止日期的知识以及网络链路故障统计来优化网络容量。使用来自一级云提供商和大型企业协作服务的数据，我们表明我们的技术可以帮助配置显着降低的网络容量，节省 30% 到 45% 不等。

papers.title: OrbWeaver: Using IDLE Cycles in Programmable Networks for Opportunistic Coordination.
papers.abstract: Network operators are frequently presented with a tradeoff: either (a) introduce a control-/management-plane application that may improve overall performance, or (b) use the bandwidth it would have occupied to deliver user traffic. In this paper, we present OrbWeaver, a framework that can exploit unused network bandwidth for in-network coordination. Using real hardware, we demonstrate that OrbWeaver can harvest this bandwidth (1) with little-to-no impact on the bandwidth/latency of user packets and (2) while providing guarantees on the interarrival time of the injected traffic. Through an exploration of three example use cases, we show that this opportunistic coordination abstraction is sufficient to approximate recently proposed systems without any of their associated bandwidth overheads.
papers.abstract_zh: 网络运营商经常面临权衡：要么（a）引入可以提高整体性能的控制/管理平面应用程序，要么（b）使用它本来占用的带宽来传输用户流量。在本文中，我们提出了 OrbWeaver，一个可以利用未使用的网络带宽进行网络内协调的框架。使用真实硬件，我们证明 OrbWeaver 可以获取此带宽 (1) 对用户数据包的带宽/延迟几乎没有影响，(2) 同时保证注入流量的到达间隔时间。通过对三个示例用例的探索，我们表明这种机会协调抽象足以近似最近提出的系统，而无需任何相关的带宽开销。

papers.title: Orca: Server-assisted Multicast for Datacenter Networks.
papers.abstract: Group communications appear in various large-scale datacenter applications. These applications, however, do not currently benefit from multicast, despite its potential substantial savings in network and processing resources. This is because current multicast systems do not scale and they impose considerable state and communication overheads. We propose a new architecture, called Orca, that addresses the challenges of multicast in datacenter networks. Orca divides the state and tasks of the data plane among switches and servers, and it partially offloads the management of multicast sessions to servers. Orca significantly reduces the state at switches, minimizes the bandwidth overhead, incurs small and constant processing overhead, and does not limit the size of multicast sessions. We implemented Orca in a testbed to demonstrate its performance in terms of throughput, consumption of server resources, packet latency, and the impact of server failures. We also implemented a sample multicast application in our testbed, and showed that Orca can substantially reduce its communication time, through optimizing the data transfer between nodes using multicast instead of unicast. In addition, we simulated a datacenter consisting of 27,648 hosts and handling 1M multicast sessions, and we compared Orca versus the state-of-art system in the literature. Our results show that Orca reduces the switch state by up to two orders of magnitude, the communication overhead by up to 19X, and the control overhead by up to 14X, compared to the state-of-art.
papers.abstract_zh: 群组通信出现在各种大型数据中心应用中。然而，这些应用程序目前并没有从多播中受益，尽管多播可能会大大节省网络和处理资源。这是因为当前的多播系统无法扩展，并且会带来相当大的状态和通信开销。我们提出了一种名为 Orca 的新架构，可以解决数据中心网络中多播的挑战。 Orca 在交换机和服务器之间划分数据平面的状态和任务，并将组播会话的管理部分卸载给服务器。 Orca 显着减少了交换机的状态，最大限度地减少了带宽开销，产生小而恒定的处理开销，并且不限制多播会话的大小。我们在测试台中实现了 Orca，以展示其在吞吐量、服务器资源消耗、数据包延迟以及服务器故障影响方面的性能。我们还在测试台中实现了一个示例多播应用程序，并表明 Orca 可以通过使用多播而不是单播优化节点之间的数据传输来显着减少其通信时间。此外，我们还模拟了一个由 27,648 台主机组成并处理 1M 多播会话的数据中心，并将 Orca 与文献中最先进的系统进行了比较。我们的结果表明，与最先进的技术相比，Orca 将开关状态减少了两个数量级，通信开销减少了 19 倍，控制开销减少了 14 倍。

papers.title: Packet Order Matters! Improving Application Performance by Deliberately Delaying Packets.
papers.abstract: Data centers increasingly deploy commodity servers with high-speed network interfaces to enable low-latency communication. However, achieving low latency at high data rates crucially depends on how the incoming traffic interacts with the system's caches. When packets that need to be processed in the same way are consecutive, i.e., exhibit high temporal and spatial locality, caches deliver great benefits. In this paper, we systematically study the impact of temporal and spatial traffic locality on the performance of commodity servers equipped with high-speed network interfaces. Our results show that (i) the performance of a variety of widely deployed applications degrade substantially with even the slightest lack of traffic locality, and (ii) a traffic trace from our organization reveals poor traffic locality as networking protocols, drivers, and the underlying switching/routing fabric spread packets out in time (reducing locality). To address these issues, we built Reframer, a software solution that deliberately delays packets and reorders them to increase traffic locality. Despite introducing μs-scale delays of some packets, we show that Reframer increases the throughput of a network service chain by up to 84% and reduces the flow completion time of a web server by 11% while improving its throughput by 20%.
papers.abstract_zh: 数据中心越来越多地部署具有高速网络接口的商用服务器，以实现低延迟通信。然而，在高数据速率下实现低延迟关键取决于传入流量如何与系统缓存交互。当需要以相同方式处理的数据包是连续的（即表现出高时间和空间局部性）时，缓存会带来巨大的好处。在本文中，我们系统地研究了时间和空间流量局部性对配备高速网络接口的商品服务器性能的影响。我们的结果表明，(i) 各种广泛部署的应用程序的性能会大幅下降，即使是最轻微的流量局部性缺失，以及 (ii) 我们组织的流量跟踪显示，由于网络协议、驱动程序和底层交换/路由结构及时传播数据包（减少局部性），流量局部性较差。为了解决这些问题，我们构建了 Reframer，这是一种软件解决方案，可以故意延迟数据包并对它们重新排序以增加流量局部性。尽管引入了一些数据包的微秒级延迟，但我们表明，Reframer 将网络服务链的吞吐量提高了 84%，并将 Web 服务器的流完成时间减少了 11%，同时将其吞吐量提高了 20%。

papers.title: Passive DSSS: Empowering the Downlink Communication for Backscatter Systems.
papers.abstract: The uplink and downlink transmissions in most backscatter communication systems are highly asymmetric. The downlink transmission often suffers from its short range and vulnerability to interference, which limits the practical application and deployment of backscatter communication systems. In this paper, we propose passive DSSS to improve the downlink communication for practical backscatter systems. Passive DSSS is able to increase the downlink signal-to-interference-plus-noise ratio (SINR) by using direct sequence spread-spectrum (DSSS) techniques to suppress interference and noise. The key challenge lies in the demodulation of DSSS signals, where the conventional solutions require power-hungry computations to synchronize a locally generated spreading code with the received DSSS signal, which is infeasible on energy-constrained backscatter devices. Passive DSSS addresses such a challenge by shifting the generation and synchronization of the spreading code from the receiver to the gateway side, and therefore achieves ultra-low power DSSS demodulation. We prototype passive DSSS for proof of concept. The experimental results show that passive DSSS improves the downlink SINR by 16.5 dB, which translates to a longer effective downlink range for backscatter communication systems.
papers.abstract_zh: 大多数反向散射通信系统中的上行链路和下行链路传输是高度不对称的。下行链路传输往往存在距离短、易受干扰的问题，限制了反向散射通信系统的实际应用和部署。在本文中，我们提出无源 DSSS 来改善实际反向散射系统的下行链路通信。无源DSSS能够通过使用直接序列扩频（DSSS）技术来抑制干扰和噪声，从而提高下行链路信号与干扰加噪声比（SINR）。关键挑战在于 DSSS 信号的解调，传统解决方案需要高耗电的计算才能将本地生成的扩频码与接收到的 DSSS 信号同步，这在能量受限的反向散射设备上是不可行的。无源DSSS通过将扩频码的生成和同步从接收器侧转移到网关侧来解决这一挑战，从而实现超低功耗DSSS解调。我们对被动 DSSS 进行原型设计以进行概念验证。实验结果表明，无源 DSSS 将下行链路 SINR 提高了 16.5 dB，这意味着反向散射通信系统的有效下行链路范围更长。

papers.title: Performance Interfaces for Network Functions.
papers.abstract: Modern programmers routinely use third-party code, and infrastructure operators deploy software they did not write. This would not be possible without semantic interfaces---documentation, header files, specifications---that succinctly describe what that third-party code does. We propose performance interfaces as a way to describe a system's performance, akin to how a semantic interface describes its functionality. We concretize this idea in the domain of network functions (NFs) and present a tool (PIX) that automatically extracts performance interfaces from NF implementations. We evaluate PIX on 12 NFs, including several used in production. The resulting performance interfaces are accurate yet orders of magnitude simpler than the code itself and take minutes to extract. We show how developers and operators can use performance interfaces to identify performance regressions, diagnose and fix performance bugs and identify the latency impact of NIC offloads. PIX is available at https://github.com/dslab-epfl/pix .
papers.abstract_zh: 现代程序员通常使用第三方代码，而基础设施运营商部署的软件不是他们编写的。如果没有语义接口（文档、头文件、规范）来简洁地描述第三方代码的功能，这是不可能的。我们提出性能接口作为描述系统性能的一种方式，类似于语义接口描述其功能的方式。我们在网络功能（NF）领域具体化了这个想法，并提出了一个工具（PIX），可以自动从 NF 实现中提取性能接口。我们在 12 个 NF 上评估 PIX，其中包括生产中使用的几个。生成的性能接口是准确的，但比代码本身简单几个数量级，并且需要几分钟才能提取。我们展示了开发人员和运营商如何使用性能接口来识别性能回归、诊断和修复性能错误以及识别 NIC 卸载的延迟影响。 PIX 可在 https://github.com/dslab-epfl/pix 上获取。

papers.title: PLatter: On the Feasibility of Building-scale Power Line Backscatter.
papers.abstract: This paper explores the feasibility of reusing power lines in a large industrial space to enable long-range backscatter communication between a single reader and ultra-low-power backscatter sensors on the walls that are physically not connected to these power lines, but merely in their vicinity. Such a system could significantly improve the data rate and range of backscatter communication with only a single reader installed, by using pre-existing power lines as communication media. We present PLatter, a building-scale backscatter system that allows ultra-low-power backscatter sensors or tags attached to walls with power lines right behind them to communicate with a reader several hundred feet away. PLatter achieves this by inducing and modulating parasitic impedance on power lines with the tag toggling between two loads in specialized patterns. We present a detailed evaluation of both the strengths and weaknesses of PLatter on a large industrial testbed with power lines up to 300 feet long, demonstrating a maximum data rate of 4 Mbps.
papers.abstract_zh: 本文探讨了在大型工业空间中重复使用电源线的可行性，以实现单个阅读器与墙壁上的超低功耗反向散射传感器之间的远程反向散射通信，这些传感器在物理上并未连接到这些电源线，而仅在其附近。通过使用预先存在的电力线作为通信介质，这样的系统只需安装一个读取器就可以显着提高数据速率和反向散射通信的范围。我们推出了 PLAtter，这是一种建筑规模的反向散射系统，允许将超低功耗反向散射传感器或标签附着在墙壁上，并通过其后面的电源线与数百英尺外的阅读器进行通信。 PLAtter 通过感应和调制电源线上的寄生阻抗来实现这一点，标签以专门的模式在两个负载之间切换。我们在电源线长达 300 英尺的大型工业测试台上对 PLAtter 的优点和缺点进行了详细评估，展示了 4 Mbps 的最大数据速率。

papers.title: PowerTCP: Pushing the Performance Limits of Datacenter Networks.
papers.abstract: Increasingly stringent throughput and latency requirements in datacenter networks demand fast and accurate congestion control. We observe that the reaction time and accuracy of existing datacenter congestion control schemes are inherently limited. They either rely only on explicit feedback about the network state (e.g., queue lengths in DCTCP) or only on variations of state (e.g., RTT gradient in TIMELY). To overcome these limitations, we propose a novel congestion control algorithm, PowerTCP, which achieves much more fine-grained congestion control by adapting to the bandwidth-window product (henceforth called power). PowerTCP leverages in-band network telemetry to react to changes in the network instantaneously without loss of throughput and while keeping queues short. Due to its fast reaction time, our algorithm is particularly well-suited for dynamic network environments and bursty traffic patterns. We show analytically and empirically that PowerTCP can significantly outperform the state-of-the-art in both traditional datacenter topologies and emerging reconfigurable datacenters where frequent bandwidth changes make congestion control challenging. In traditional datacenter networks, PowerTCP reduces tail flow completion times of short flows by 80% compared to DCQCN and TIMELY, and by 33% compared to HPCC even at 60% network load. In reconfigurable datacenters, PowerTCP achieves 85% circuit utilization without incurring additional latency and cuts tail latency by at least 2x compared to existing approaches.
papers.abstract_zh: 数据中心网络日益严格的吞吐量和延迟要求需要快速、准确的拥塞控制。我们观察到现有数据中心拥塞控制方案的反应时间和准确性本质上是有限的。它们要么仅依赖于有关网络状态的显式反馈（例如 DCTCP 中的队列长度），要么仅依赖于状态的变化（例如 TIMELY 中的 RTT 梯度）。为了克服这些限制，我们提出了一种新颖的拥塞控制算法 PowerTCP，它通过适应带宽窗口乘积（以下称为功率）来实现更细粒度的拥塞控制。 PowerTCP 利用带内网络遥测技术即时对网络变化做出反应，不会损失吞吐量，同时保持队列较短。由于其快速反应时间，我们的算法特别适合动态网络环境和突发流量模式。我们通过分析和经验证明，PowerTCP 可以显着优于传统数据中心拓扑和新兴可重构数据中心的最新技术，在这些数据中心中，频繁的带宽变化使拥塞控制具有挑战性。在传统数据中心网络中，即使在 60% 的网络负载下，PowerTCP 与 DCQCN 和 TIMELY 相比，也能将短流的尾流完成时间减少 80%，与 HPCC 相比，减少 33%。在可重新配置的数据中心中，PowerTCP 实现了 85% 的电路利用率，而不会产生额外的延迟，并且与现有方法相比，尾部延迟至少减少了 2 倍。

papers.title: Privid: Practical, Privacy-Preserving Video Analytics Queries.
papers.abstract: Analytics on video recorded by cameras in public areas have the potential to fuel many exciting applications, but also pose the risk of intruding on individuals’ privacy. Unfortunately, existing solutions fail to practically resolve this tension between utility and privacy, relying on perfect detection of all private information in each video frame—an elusive requirement. This paper presents: (1) a new notion of differential privacy (DP) for video analytics, ( ρ,K,ε )-event-duration privacy, which protects all private information visible for less than a particular duration, rather than relying on perfect detections of that information, and (2) a practical system called Privid that enforces duration-based privacy even with the (untrusted) analyst-provided deep neural networks that are commonplace for video analytics today. Across a variety of videos and queries, we show that Privid increases error by 1-21% relative to a non-private system.
papers.abstract_zh: 对公共区域摄像头录制的视频进行分析有可能推动许多令人兴奋的应用，但也带来侵犯个人隐私的风险。不幸的是，现有的解决方案无法真正解决实用性和隐私之间的紧张关系，依赖于对每个视频帧中所有私人信息的完美检测——这是一个难以实现的要求。本文提出：(1) 用于视频分析的差分隐私 (DP) 新概念，(ρ,K,ε)-事件持续时间隐私，它保护在特定持续时间内可见的所有私人信息，而不是依赖于对该信息的完美检测，以及 (2) 一个名为 Privid 的实用系统，即使使用当今视频分析中常见的（不受信任的）分析师提供的深度神经网络，也可以强制执行基于持续时间的隐私。在各种视频和查询中，我们表明，相对于非私有系统，Privid 的错误增加了 1-21%。

papers.title: RDC: Energy-Efficient Data Center Network Congestion Relief with Topological Reconfigurability at the Edge.
papers.abstract: The rackless data center (RDC) is a novel network architecture that logically removes the rack boundary of traditional data centers and the inefficiencies that come with it. As modern applications generate more and more inter-rack traffic, the traditional architecture suffers from contention at the core, imbalanced bandwidth utilization across racks, and longer network paths. RDC addresses these limitations by enabling servers to logically move across the rack boundary at runtime. Our design achieves this by inserting circuit switches at the network edge between the ToR switches and the servers, and by reconfiguring the circuits to regroup servers across racks based on the traffic patterns. We have performed extensive evaluations of RDC both in a hardware testbed and packet-level simulations and show that RDC can speed up a 4:1 oversubscribed network by 1.78× ∼ 3.9× for realistic applications and more than 10× in large-scale simulation; furthermore, RDC is up to 2.4× better in performance per watt than a conventional non-blocking network.
papers.abstract_zh: 无机架数据中心（RDC）是一种新颖的网络架构，从逻辑上消除了传统数据中心的机架边界以及随之而来的低效率。随着现代应用程序产生越来越多的机架间流量，传统架构面临核心争用、机架间带宽利用率不平衡以及网络路径更长的问题。 RDC 通过使服务器能够在运行时逻辑地跨机架边界移动来解决这些限制。我们的设计通过在 ToR 交换机和服务器之间的网络边缘插入电路交换机，并根据流量模式重新配置电路以跨机架重新分组服务器来实现这一目标。我们在硬件测试台和数据包级模拟中对 RDC 进行了广泛的评估，结果表明，在实际应用中，RDC 可以将 4:1 超额订阅网络加速 1.78× ∼ 3.9×，在大规模模拟中加速超过 10 倍；此外，RDC 的每瓦性能比传统的非阻塞网络高出 2.4 倍。

papers.title: RDMA is Turing complete, we just did not know it yet!
papers.abstract: It is becoming increasingly popular for distributed systems to exploit offload to reduce load on the CPU. Remote Direct Memory Access (RDMA) offload, in particular, has become popular. However, RDMA still requires CPU intervention for complex offloads that go beyond simple remote memory access. As such, the offload potential is limited and RDMA-based systems usually have to work around such limitations. We present RedN, a principled, practical approach to implementing complex RDMA offloads, without requiring any hardware modifications. Using self-modifying RDMA chains, we lift the existing RDMA verbs interface to a Turing complete set of programming abstractions. We explore what is possible in terms of offload complexity and performance with a commodity RDMA NIC. We show how to integrate these RDMA chains into applications, such as the Memcached key-value store, allowing us to offload complex tasks such as key lookups. RedN can reduce the latency of key-value get operations by up to 2.6× compared to state-of-the-art KV designs that use one-sided RDMA primitives (e.g., FaRM-KV), as well as traditional RPC-over-RDMA approaches. Moreover, compared to these baselines, RedN provides performance isolation and, in the presence of contention, can reduce latency by up to 35× while providing applications with failure resiliency to OS and process crashes.
papers.abstract_zh: 分布式系统利用卸载来减少 CPU 负载变得越来越流行。远程直接内存访问 (RDMA) 卸载尤其变得流行。然而，RDMA 仍然需要 CPU 干预来处理超出简单远程内存访问范围的复杂卸载。因此，卸载潜力是有限的，基于 RDMA 的系统通常必须解决这些限制。我们提出了 RedN，这是一种原则性的、实用的方法来实现复杂的 RDMA 卸载，无需任何硬件修改。使用自修改 RDMA 链，我们将现有的 RDMA 动词接口提升为图灵完备的编程抽象集。我们探索使用商用 RDMA NIC 在卸载复杂性和性能方面的可能性。我们展示了如何将这些 RDMA 链集成到应用程序中，例如 Memcached 键值存储，从而使我们能够卸载键查找等复杂任务。与使用单侧 RDMA 原语（例如 FaRM-KV）的最先进的 KV 设计以及传统的 RPC-over-RDMA 方法相比，RedN 可以将键值获取操作的延迟减少高达 2.6 倍。此外，与这些基准相比，RedN 提供性能隔离，并且在存在争用的情况下，可以将延迟减少高达 35 倍，同时为应用程序提供针对操作系统和进程崩溃的故障恢复能力。
