papers.title: Re-architecting Traffic Analysis with Neural Network Interface Cards.
papers.abstract: We present an approach to improve the scalability of online machine learning-based network traffic analysis. We first make the case to replace widely-used supervised machine learning models for network traffic analysis with binary neural networks . We then introduce Neural Networks on the NIC (N3IC), a system that compiles binary neural network models into implementations that can be directly integrated in the data plane of SmartNICs. N3IC supports different hardware targets, and it generates data plane descriptions using both micro-C and P4 languages. We implement and evaluate our solution using two use cases related to traffic identification and to anomaly detection. In both cases, N3IC provides up to a 100x lower classification latency, and 1.5–7x higher throughput than state-of-the-art software-based machine learning classification systems. This is achieved by running the entire traffic analysis pipeline within the data plane of the SmartNIC, thereby completely freeing the system's CPU from any related tasks, while forwarding traffic at line rate (40Gbps) on the target NICs. Encouraged by these results we finally present the design and FPGA-based prototype of a hardware primitive that adds binary neural network support to a NIC data plane. Our new primitive requires less than 1–2% of the logic and memory resources of a VirteX7 FPGA. We show through experimental evaluation that extending the NIC data plane enables more challenging use cases that require online traffic analysis to be performed in a few microseconds.
papers.abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种提高基于在线机器学习的网络流量分析的可扩展性的方法。我们首先提出用二元神经网络取代广泛使用的用于网络流量分析的监督机器学习模型的案例。然后，我们介绍 NIC 上的神经网络 (N3IC)，该系统将二进制神经网络模型编译为可直接集成到 SmartNIC 数据平面中的实现。 N3IC 支持不同的硬件目标，并使用 micro-C 和 P4 语言生成数据平面描述。我们使用与流量识别和异常检测相关的两个用例来实施和评估我们的解决方案。在这两种情况下，与最先进的基于软件的机器学习分类系统相比，N3IC 的分类延迟降低了 100 倍，吞吐量提高了 1.5 至 7 倍。这是通过在 SmartNIC 的数据平面内运行整个流量分析管道来实现的，从而将系统的 CPU 完全从任何相关任务中解放出来，同时在目标 NIC 上以线速 (40Gbps) 转发流量。受到这些结果的鼓舞，我们最终提出了硬件原语的设计和基于 FPGA 的原型，该硬件原语为 NIC 数据平面添加了二进制神经网络支持。我们的新原语需要的逻辑和内存资源不到 VirteX7 FPGA 的 1-2%。我们通过实验评估表明，扩展 NIC 数据平面可以实现更具挑战性的用例，需要在几微秒内执行在线流量分析。

papers.title: Runtime Programmable Switches.
papers.abstract: Programming the network to add, remove, and modify functions has been a longstanding goal in our community. Unfortunately, in today’s programmable networks, the velocity of change is restricted by a practical yet fundamental barrier: reprogramming network devices is an intrusive change, requiring management operations such as draining and rerouting traffic from the target node, re-imaging the data plane, and redirecting traffic back to its original route. This project investigates design techniques to make future networks runtime programmable. FlexCore enables partial reconfiguration of switch data planes at runtime with minimum resource overheads, without service disruption, while processing packets with consistency guarantees. It involves design considerations in switch architectures, partial reconfiguration primitives, reconfiguration algorithms, as well as consistency guarantees. Our evaluation results demonstrate the feasibility and benefits of runtime programmable switches.
papers.abstract_zh: 对网络进行编程以添加、删除和修改功能一直是我们社区的长期目标。不幸的是，在当今的可编程网络中，变化的速度受到实际但基本的障碍的限制：重新编程网络设备是一种侵入性变化，需要管理操作，例如从目标节点排出和重新路由流量、重新镜像数据平面以及将流量重定向回其原始路由。该项目研究了使未来网络运行时可编程的设计技术。 FlexCore 能够在运行时以最小的资源开销对交换机数据平面进行部分重新配置，而不会中断服务，同时处理具有一致性保证的数据包。它涉及交换机架构、部分重配置原语、重配置算法以及一致性保证的设计考虑。我们的评估结果证明了运行时可编程开关的可行性和优势。

papers.title: Saiyan: Design and Implementation of a Low-power Demodulator for LoRa Backscatter Systems.
papers.abstract: The radio range of backscatter systems continues growing as new wireless communication primitives are continuously invented. Nevertheless, both the bit error rate and the packet loss rate of backscatter signals increase rapidly with the radio range, thereby necessitating the cooperation between the access point and the backscatter tags through a feedback loop. Unfortunately, the low-power nature of backscatter tags limits their ability to demodulate feedback signals from a remote access point and scales down to such circumstances. This paper presents Saiyan, an ultra-low-power demodulator for long-range LoRa backscatter systems. With Saiyan, a backscatter tag can demodulate feedback signals from a remote access point with moderate power consumption and then perform an immediate packet re-transmission in the presence of packet loss. Moreover, Saiyan enables rate adaption and channel hopping – two PHY-layer operations that are important to channel efficiency yet unavailable on long-range backscatter systems. We prototype Saiyan on a two-layer PCB board and evaluate its performance in different environments. Results show that Saiyan achieves 3.5–5x gain on the demodulation range, compared with state-of-the-art systems. Our ASIC simulation shows that the power consumption of Saiyan is around 93.2 μW. Code and hardware schematics can be found at: https://github.com/ZangJac/Saiyan .
papers.abstract_zh: 随着新的无线通信原语的不断发明，反向散射系统的无线电范围不断扩大。然而，反向散射信号的误码率和丢包率随着无线电范围的增加而迅速增加，因此需要接入点和反向散射标签之间通过反馈环路进行配合。不幸的是，反向散射标签的低功耗特性限制了它们解调来自远程接入点的反馈信号并按比例缩小到这种情况的能力。本文介绍了 Saiyan，一种用于远程 LoRa 反向散射系统的超低功耗解调器。借助 Saiyan，反向散射标签可以以适度的功耗解调来自远程接入点的反馈信号，然后在出现数据包丢失的情况下立即执行数据包重传。此外，Saiyan 还支持速率自适应和信道跳跃——这两种 PHY 层操作对于信道效率很重要，但在远程反向散射系统上不可用。我们在两层 PCB 板上制作 Saiyan 原型，并评估其在不同环境下的性能。结果表明，与最先进的系统相比，Saiyan 在解调范围上实现了 3.5-5 倍的增益。我们的 ASIC 仿真显示 Saiyan 的功耗约为 93.2 μW。代码和硬件原理图可以在：https://github.com/ZangJac/Saiyan 找到。

papers.title: SCALE: Automatically Finding RFC Compliance Bugs in DNS Nameservers.
papers.abstract: The Domain Name System (DNS) has intricate features that interact in subtle ways. Bugs in DNS implementations while handling combinations of these features can lead to incorrect or implementation-dependent behavior, security vulnerabilities, and more. We introduce the first approach for finding RFC compliance errors in DNS nameserver implementations via automatic test generation. Our SCALE (Small-scope Constraint-driven Automated Logical Execution) approach jointly generates zone files and corresponding queries to cover RFC behaviors specified by an executable model of DNS resolution. We have built a tool called Ferret based on this approach and applied it to test 8 open-source DNS implementations, including popular implementations such as Bind, PowerDNS, Knot, and Nsd. Ferret generated over 13K test files, of which 62% resulted in some difference among implementations. We identified and reported 30 new unique bugs from these failed test cases, including at least one bug in every implementation, of which 20 have already been fixed. Many of these existed in even the most popular DNS implementations, including a new critical vulnerability in Bind that attackers could easily exploit to crash DNS resolvers and nameservers remotely.
papers.abstract_zh: 域名系统 (DNS) 具有以微妙方式相互作用的复杂功能。处理这些功能组合时 DNS 实现中的错误可能会导致不正确或依赖于实现的行为、安全漏洞等。我们介绍第一种通过自动测试生成来查找 DNS 名称服务器实现中的 RFC 合规性错误的方法。我们的 SCALE（小范围约束驱动的自动逻辑执行）方法联合生成区域文件和相应的查询，以涵盖由 DNS 解析的可执行模型指定的 RFC 行为。我们基于这种方法构建了一个名为 Ferret 的工具，并用它来测试 8 个开源 DNS 实现，包括 Bind、PowerDNS、Knot 和 Nsd 等流行的实现。 Ferret 生成了超过 13K 的测试文件，其中 62% 导致实现之间存在一些差异。我们从这些失败的测试用例中识别并报告了 30 个新的独特错误，其中每个实现中至少有一个错误，其中 20 个已得到修复。其中许多漏洞甚至存在于最流行的 DNS 实现中，包括 Bind 中的一个新的严重漏洞，攻击者可以轻松利用该漏洞远程破坏 DNS 解析器和名称服务器。

papers.title: Scaling Open vSwitch with a Computational Cache.
papers.abstract: Open vSwitch (OVS) is a widely used open-source virtual switch implementation. In this work, we seek to scale up OVS to support hundreds of thousands of OpenFlow rules by accelerating the core component of its data-path — the packet classification mechanism. To do so we use NuevoMatch, a recent algorithm that uses neural network inference to match packets, and promises significant scalability and performance benefits. We overcome the primary algorithmic challenge of the slow rule update rate in the vanilla NuevoMatch, speeding it up by over three orders of magnitude . This improvement enables two design options to integrate NuevoMatch with OVS: (1) using it as an extra caching layer in front of OVS's megaflow cache, and (2) using it to completely replace OVS's data-path while performing classification directly on OpenFlow rules, and obviating control-path upcalls. Our comprehensive evaluation on real-world packet traces and between 1K to 500K ClassBench rules demonstrates the geometric mean speedups of 1.9× and 12.3× for the first and second designs, respectively, for 500K rules, with the latter also supporting up to 60K OpenFlow rule updates/second, by far exceeding the original OVS.
papers.abstract_zh: Open vSwitch (OVS) 是一种广泛使用的开源虚拟交换机实现。在这项工作中，我们寻求通过加速其数据路径的核心组件——数据包分类机制来扩展 OVS 以支持数十万条 OpenFlow 规则。为此，我们使用 NuevoMatch，这是一种最新的算法，它使用神经网络推理来匹配数据包，并承诺显着的可扩展性和性能优势。我们克服了普通 NuevoMatch 中规则更新速度慢的主要算法挑战，将其速度提高了三个数量级以上。这一改进支持两种设计选项将 NuevoMatch 与 OVS 集成：(1) 将其用作 OVS 兆流缓存前面的额外缓存层，(2) 使用它完全取代 OVS 的数据路径，同时直接对 OpenFlow 规则执行分类，并避免控制路径上行调用。我们对真实数据包跟踪和 1K 至 500K ClassBench 规则的综合评估表明，对于 500K 规则，第一个和第二个设计的几何平均加速分别为 1.9× 和 12.3×，后者还支持每秒高达 60K OpenFlow 规则更新，远远超过原始 OVS。

papers.title: SketchLib: Enabling Efficient Sketch-based Monitoring on Programmable Switches.
papers.abstract: Sketching algorithms or sketches enable accurate network measurement results with low resource footprints. While emerging programmable switches are an attractive target to get these benefits, current implementations of sketches are either inefficient and/or infeasible on hardware. Our contributions in the paper are: (1) systematically analyzing the resource bottlenecks of existing sketch implementations in hardware; (2) identifying practical and correct-by-construction optimization techniques to tackle the identified bottlenecks; and (3) designing an easy-to-use library called SketchLib to help developers efficiently implement their sketch algorithms in switch hardware to benefit from these resource optimizations. Our evaluation on state-of-the-art sketches demonstrates that SketchLib reduces the hardware resource footprint up to 96% without impacting fidelity.
papers.abstract_zh: 绘制算法或草图可以以较低的资源占用实现准确的网络测量结果。虽然新兴的可编程交换机是获得这些好处的一个有吸引力的目标，但当前的草图实现在硬件上要么效率低下，要么不可行。我们在本文中的贡献是：（1）系统地分析了现有草图硬件实现的资源瓶颈； (2) 确定实用且通过构建纠正的优化技术来解决已确定的瓶颈； (3) 设计一个名为 SketchLib 的易于使用的库，帮助开发人员在交换机硬件中高效地实现草图算法，从而从这些资源优化中受益。我们对最先进草图的评估表明，SketchLib 将硬件资源占用量减少了 96%，且不影响保真度。

papers.title: Spectrum: High-bandwidth Anonymous Broadcast.
papers.abstract: We present Spectrum, a high-bandwidth, metadata-private file broadcasting system. In Spectrum, a small number of broadcasters share a file with many subscribers via two or more non-colluding broadcast servers. Subscribers generate cover traffic by sending dummy files, hiding which users are broadcasters and which users are only consumers. Spectrum optimizes for a setting with few broadcasters and many subscribers—as is common to many real-world applications—to drastically improve throughput over prior work. Malicious clients are prevented from disrupting broadcasts using a novel blind access control technique that allows servers to reject malformed requests. Spectrum also prevents deanonymization of broadcasters by malicious servers deviating from protocol. Our techniques for providing malicious security are applicable to other systems for anonymous broadcast and may be of independent interest. We implement and evaluate Spectrum. Compared to the state-of-the-art in cryptographic anonymous communication systems, Spectrum’s peak throughput is 4–120,000× faster (and commensurately cheaper) in a broadcast setting. Deployed on two commodity servers, Spectrum allows broadcasters to share 1GB (two full-length 720p documentary movies) in 13h 20m with an anonymity set of 10,000 (for a total cost of about $6.84). These costs scale roughly linearly in the size of the file and total number of users, and Spectrum parallelizes trivially with more hardware.
papers.abstract_zh: 我们推出 Spectrum，一种高带宽、元数据私有文件广播系统。在 Spectrum 中，少数广播公司通过两个或多个非共谋广播服务器与许多订阅者共享文件。订阅者通过发送虚拟文件来生成覆盖流量，隐藏哪些用户是广播者，哪些用户只是消费者。 Spectrum 针对广播公司较少、订阅者较多的环境进行了优化（这对于许多现实世界的应用程序来说很常见），与之前的工作相比，大大提高了吞吐量。使用新颖的盲访问控制技术可以防止恶意客户端中断广播，该技术允许服务器拒绝格式错误的请求。 Spectrum 还可以防止违反协议的恶意服务器对广播公司进行去匿名化。我们提供恶意安全的技术适用于其他匿名广播系统，并且可能具有独立的利益。我们实施并评估 Spectrum。与最先进的加密匿名通信系统相比，Spectrum 在广播环境中的峰值吞吐量要快 4-120,000 倍（并且相应地更便宜）。 Spectrum 部署在两台商用服务器上，允许广播公司在 13 小时 20 分钟内以 10,000 名匿名用户共享 1GB（两部完整长度的 720p 纪录片）（总成本约为 6.84 美元）。这些成本与文件大小和用户总数大致呈线性关系，并且 Spectrum 可以通过更多硬件轻松实现并行化。

papers.title: Starlight: Fast Container Provisioning on the Edge and over the WAN.
papers.abstract: Containers, originally designed for cloud environments, are increasingly popular for provisioning workers outside the cloud, for example in mobile and edge computing. These settings, however, bring new challenges: high latency links, limited bandwidth, and resource-constrained workers. The result is longer provisioning times when deploying new workers or updating existing ones, much of it due to network traffic. Our analysis shows that current piecemeal approaches to reducing provisioning time are not always sufficient, and can even make things worse as round-trip times grow. Rather, we find that the very same layer-based structure that makes containers easy to develop and use also makes it more difficult to optimize deployment. Addressing this issue thus requires rethinking the container deployment pipeline as a whole. Based on our findings, we present Starlight: an accelerator for container provisioning. Starlight decouples provisioning from development by redesigning the container deployment protocol, filesystem, and image storage format. Our evaluation using 21 popular containers shows that, on average, Starlight deploys and starts containers 3.0x faster than the current state-of-the-art implementation while incurring no runtime overhead and little (5%) storage overhead. Finally, it is backwards compatible with existing workers and uses standard container registries.
papers.abstract_zh: 容器最初是为云环境设计的，现在越来越受到云外配置工作人员的欢迎，例如在移动和边缘计算中。然而，这些设置带来了新的挑战：高延迟链路、有限的带宽和资源受限的工作人员。结果是部署新工作人员或更新现有工作人员时的配置时间更长，其中大部分是由于网络流量造成的。我们的分析表明，当前减少配置时间的零碎方法并不总是足够的，而且随着往返时间的增长，甚至可能使情况变得更糟。相反，我们发现，使容器易于开发和使用的基于层的结构也使优化部署变得更加困难。因此，解决这个问题需要重新思考整个容器部署管道。根据我们的发现，我们推出了 Starlight：容器配置加速器。 Starlight 通过重新设计容器部署协议、文件系统和映像存储格式，将配置与开发分离。我们使用 21 个流行容器进行的评估表明，平均而言，Starlight 部署和启动容器的速度比当前最先进的实现快 3.0 倍，同时不会产生运行时开销和很少 (5%) 的存储开销。最后，它向后兼容现有的工作人员并使用标准容器注册表。

papers.title: SwarmMap: Scaling Up Real-time Collaborative Visual SLAM at the Edge.
papers.abstract: The Edge-based Multi-agent visual SLAM plays a key role in emerging mobile applications such as search-and-rescue, inventory automation, and drone grouping. This algorithm relies on a central node to maintain the global map and schedule agents to execute their individual tasks. However, as the number of agents continues growing, the operational overhead of the visual SLAM system such as data redundancy, bandwidth consumption, and localization errors also scale, which challenges the system scalability. In this paper, we present the design and implementation of SwarmMap, a framework design that scales up collaborative visual SLAM service in edge offloading settings. At the core of SwarmMap are three simple yet effective system modules — a change log-based server-client synchronization mechanism, a priority-aware task scheduler, and a lean representation of the global map that work hand-in-hand to address the data explosion caused by the growing number of agents. We make SwarmMap compatible with the robotic operating system (ROS) and open-source it. Existing visual SLAM applications could incorporate SwarmMap to enhance their performance and capacity in multi-agent scenarios. Comprehensive evaluations and a three-month case study at one of the world's largest oil fields demonstrate that SwarmMap can serve 2× more agents (>20 agents) than the state of the arts with the same resource overhead, meanwhile maintaining an average trajectory error of 38 cm , outperforming existing works by > 55%.
papers.abstract_zh: 基于边缘的多智能体视觉 SLAM 在搜索救援、库存自动化和无人机分组等新兴移动应用中发挥着关键作用。该算法依靠中央节点来维护全局地图并调度代理来执行各自的任务。然而，随着智能体数量的不断增长，视觉SLAM系统的数据冗余、带宽消耗和定位错误等运行开销也会随之增加，这对系统的可扩展性提出了挑战。在本文中，我们介绍了 SwarmMap 的设计和实现，这是一种在边缘卸载设置中扩展协作视觉 SLAM 服务的框架设计。 SwarmMap 的核心是三个简单而有效的系统模块——基于变更日志的服务器-客户端同步机制、优先级感知任务调度程序以及全局地图的精益表示，它们携手合作，解决因代理数量不断增长而导致的数据爆炸问题。我们使 SwarmMap 与机器人操作系统（ROS）兼容并开源。现有的视觉 SLAM 应用程序可以合并 SwarmMap，以增强其在多智能体场景中的性能和容量。对世界上最大的油田之一进行的综合评估和为期三个月的案例研究表明，在相同的资源开销下，SwarmMap 可以比现有技术多服务 2 倍的智能体（>20 个智能体），同时保持 38 厘米的平均轨迹误差，比现有工作高出 55% 以上。

papers.title: Swift: Adaptive Video Streaming with Layered Neural Codecs.
papers.abstract: Layered video coding compresses video segments into layers(additional code bits). Decoding with each additional layer improves video quality incrementally. This approach has potential for very fine-grained rate adaptation. However, layered coding has not seen much success in practice because of its cross-layer compression overheads and decoding latencies.We take a fresh new approach to layered video coding by exploiting recent advances in video coding using deep learning techniques. We develop Swift, an adaptive video streaming system that includes i) a layered encoder that learns to encode a video frame into layered codes by purely encoding residuals from previous layers without introducing any cross-layer compression overheads, ii) a decoder that can fuse together a subset of these codes (based on availability) and decode the mall in one go, and, iii) an adaptive bit rate (ABR) protocol that synergistically adapts video quality based on available network and client-side compute capacity. Swift can be integrated easily in the current streaming ecosystem without any change to network protocols and applications by simply replacing the current codecs with the proposed layered neural video codec when appropriate GPU or similar accelerator functionality is available on the client side. Extensive evaluations reveal Swift’s multi-dimensional benefits over prior video streaming systems.
papers.abstract_zh: 分层视频编码将视频片段压缩成层（附加码位）。每个附加层的解码都会逐渐提高视频质量。这种方法具有非常细粒度的速率适应的潜力。然而，由于其跨层压缩开销和解码延迟，分层编码在实践中并未取得太大成功。我们通过利用深度学习技术在视频编码方面的最新进展，采用了一种全新的分层视频编码方法。我们开发了 Swift，一种自适应视频流系统，其中包括：i）分层编码器，通过纯粹编码前一层的残差来学习将视频帧编码为分层代码，而不引入任何跨层压缩开销；ii）解码器，可以将这些代码的子集（基于可用性）融合在一起并一次性解码；iii）自适应比特率（ABR）协议，根据可用网络和客户端计算能力协同调整视频质量。当客户端提供适当的 GPU 或类似的加速器功能时，只需将当前的编解码器替换为建议的分层神经视频编解码器，Swift 就可以轻松集成到当前的流媒体生态系统中，而无需对网络协议和应用程序进行任何更改。广泛的评估揭示了 Swift 相对于之前的视频流系统的多维优势。

papers.title: SwiSh: Distributed Shared State Abstractions for Programmable Switches.
papers.abstract: We design and evaluate SwiSh , a distributed shared state management layer for data-plane P4 programs. SwiSh enables running scalable stateful distributed network functions on programmable switches entirely in the data-plane. We explore several schemes to build a shared variable abstraction, which differ in consistency, performance, and in-switch implementation complexity. We introduce the novel Strong Delayed-Writes (SDW) protocol which offers consistent snapshots of shared data-plane objects with semantics known as r -relaxed strong linearizability, enabling implementation of distributed concurrent sketches with precise error bounds. We implement strong, eventual, and SDW consistency protocols in Tofino switches, and compare their performance in microbenchmarks and three realistic network functions, NAT, DDoS detector, and rate limiter. Our results show that the distributed state management in the data plane is practical, and outperforms centralized solutions by up to four orders of magnitude in update throughput and replication latency.
papers.abstract_zh: 我们设计并评估了 SwiSh，这是一个用于数据平面 P4 程序的分布式共享状态管理层。 SwiSh 允许完全在数据平面中的可编程交换机上运行可扩展的有状态分布式网络功能。我们探索了几种构建共享变量抽象的方案，这些方案在一致性、性能和交换机内实现复杂性方面有所不同。我们引入了新颖的强延迟写入 (SDW) 协议，该协议提供共享数据平面对象的一致快照，其语义称为 r 松弛强线性化，从而能够实现具有精确错误界限的分布式并发草图。我们在 Tofino 交换机中实现了强大的、最终的和 SDW 一致性协议，并在微基准测试和三种实际网络功能（NAT、DDoS 检测器和速率限制器）中比较了它们的性能。我们的结果表明，数据平面中的分布式状态管理是实用的，并且在更新吞吐量和复制延迟方面比集中式解决方案高出四个数量级。

papers.title: Tiara: A Scalable and Efficient Hardware Acceleration Architecture for Stateful Layer-4 Load Balancing.
papers.abstract: Stateful layer-4 load balancers (LB) are deployed at datacenter boundaries to distribute Internet traffic to backend real servers. To steer terabits per second traffic, traditional software LBs scale out with many expensive servers. Recent switch-accelerated LBs scale up efficiently, but fail to offload a massive number of concurrent flows into limited on-chip SRAMs. This paper presents Tiara, a hardware architecture for stateful layer-4 LBs that aims to support a high traffic rate (> 1 Tbps), a large number of concurrent flows (> 10M), and many new connections per second (> 1M), without any assumption on traffic patterns. The three-tier architecture of Tiara makes the best use of heterogeneous hardware for stateful LBs, including a programmable switch and FPGAs for the fast path and x86 servers for the slow path. The core idea of Tiara is to divide the LB fast path into a memory-intensive task (real server selection) and a throughput-intensive task (packet encap/decap), and map them into the most suitable hardware, respectively (i.e., map real server selection into FPGA with large high-bandwidth memory (HBM) and packet encap/decap into a high-throughput programmable switch). We have implemented a fully functional Tiara prototype, and experiments show that Tiara can achieve extremely high performance (1.6 Tbps throughput, 80M concurrent flows, 1.8M new connections per second, and less than 4 us latency in the fast path) in a holistic server equipped with 8 FPGA cards, with high cost, energy, and space efficiency.
papers.abstract_zh: 有状态的第 4 层负载均衡器 (LB) 部署在数据中心边界，以将 Internet 流量分发到后端真实服务器。为了控制每秒太比特的流量，传统的软件负载均衡器通过许多昂贵的服务器进行扩展。最近的开关加速负载均衡器可以有效地扩展，但无法将大量并发流卸载到有限的片上 SRAM 中。本文介绍了 Tiara，一种用于有状态第 4 层 LB 的硬件架构，旨在支持高流量速率 (> 1 Tbps)、大量并发流量 (> 10M) 和每秒许多新连接 (> 1M)，而无需对流量模式进行任何假设。 Tiara 的三层架构充分利用了有状态 LB 的异构硬件，包括用于快速路径的可编程交换机和 FPGA，以及用于慢速路径的 x86 服务器。 Tiara的核心思想是将LB快速路径分为内存密集型任务（真实服务器选择）和吞吐量密集型任务（数据包封装/解封），并将它们分别映射到最合适的硬件（即，将真实服务器选择映射到具有大容量高带宽内存（HBM）的FPGA，将数据包封装/解封映射到高吞吐量可编程交换机）。我们已经实现了功能齐全的 Tiara 原型，实验表明 Tiara 在配备 8 个 FPGA 卡的整体服务器中可以实现极高的性能（1.6 Tbps 吞吐量、80M 并发流、每秒 1.8M 新连接、快速路径中低于 4 us 的延迟），具有很高的成本、能源和空间效率。

papers.title: Unlocking the Power of Inline Floating-Point Operations on Programmable Switches.
papers.abstract: The advent of switches with programmable dataplanes has enabled the rapid development of new network functionality, as well as providing a platform for acceleration of a broad range of application-level functionality. However, existing switch hardware was not designed with application acceleration in mind, and thus applications requiring operations or datatypes not used in traditional network protocols must resort to expensive workarounds. Applications involving floating point data, including distributed training for machine learning and distributed query processing, are key examples. In this paper, we propose FPISA, a floating point representation designed to work efficiently in programmable switches. We first implement FPISA on an Intel Tofino switch, but find that it has limitations that impact throughput and accuracy. We then propose hardware changes to address these limitations based on the open-source Banzai switch architecture, and synthesize them in a 15-nm standard-cell library to demonstrate their feasibility. Finally, we use FPISA to implement accelerators for training for machine learning and for query processing, and evaluate their performance on a switch implementing our changes using emulation. We find that FPISA allows distributed training to use 25-75% fewer CPU cores and provide up to 85.9% better throughput in a CPU-constrained environment than SwitchML. For distributed query processing with floating point data, FPISA enables up to 2.7× better throughput than Spark.
papers.abstract_zh: 具有可编程数据平面的交换机的出现促进了新网络功能的快速开发，并提供了加速各种应用级功能的平台。然而，现有交换机硬件的设计并未考虑应用程序加速，因此需要传统网络协议中未使用的操作或数据类型的应用程序必须诉诸昂贵的解决方法。涉及浮点数据的应用程序，包括机器学习的分布式训练和分布式查询处理，都是关键的例子。在本文中，我们提出了 FPISA，这是一种浮点表示形式，旨在在可编程开关中高效工作。我们首先在 Intel Tofino 交换机上实施 FPISA，但发现它存在影响吞吐量和准确性的限制。然后，我们基于开源 Banzai 开关架构提出硬件更改以解决这些限制，并将它们综合在 15 nm 标准单元库中以证明其可行性。最后，我们使用 FPISA 来实现用于机器学习训练和查询处理的加速器，并使用仿真评估它们在实施我们的更改的交换机上的性能。我们发现，与 SwitchML 相比，FPISA 允许分布式训练使用的 CPU 核心数减少 25-75%，并在 CPU 受限的环境中提供高达 85.9% 的吞吐量。对于浮点数据的分布式查询处理，FPISA 的吞吐量比 Spark 高出 2.7 倍。

papers.title: Whisper: IoT in the TV White Space Spectrum.
papers.abstract: The deployment of Internet of Things (IoT) networks has rapidly increased over recent years -- to connect homes, cities, farms, and many other industries. Today, these networks rely on connectivity solutions, such as LoRaWAN, operating in the ISM bands. Our experience from deployments in multiple countries has shown that such networks are bottlenecked by range and bandwidth. Therefore, we propose a new connectivity solution operating in TV White Space (TVWS) spectrum, where narrowband devices configured for IoT can opportunistically transmit data, while protecting incumbents from receiving harmful interference. The lower frequency of operation extends the range by a factor of five over ISM bands. In less-densely populated area where larger swaths of such bandwidth are available, TVWS-based IoT networks can support many more devices simultaneously and larger transmission size per device. Our early experimental field work was incorporated into a petition to the US FCC, and further work influenced the subsequent regulations permitting the use of IoT devices in TVWS. We highlight the technical challenges and our solutions involved in deploying IoT devices in the shared spectrum and complying with the FCC rules.
papers.abstract_zh: 近年来，物联网 (IoT) 网络的部署迅速增加，以连接家庭、城市、农场和许多其他行业。如今，这些网络依赖于在 ISM 频段运行的连接解决方​​案，例如 LoRaWAN。我们在多个国家的部署经验表明，此类网络受到范围和带宽的瓶颈。因此，我们提出了一种在电视空白频段 (TVWS) 频谱中运行的新连接解决方​​案，其中为物联网配置的窄带设备可以适时传输数据，同时保护现有设备免受有害干扰。较低的工作频率使 ISM 频段的范围扩大了五倍。在人口密度较低的地区，可以提供更大的带宽，基于 TVWS 的物联网网络可以同时支持更多的设备，并且每个设备的传输规模更大。我们早期的实验现场工作已纳入向美国 FCC 提交的请愿书中，进一步的工作影响了随后允许在 TVWS 中使用物联网设备的法规。我们重点介绍在共享频谱中部署物联网设备并遵守 FCC 规则所涉及的技术挑战和解决方案。

papers.title: Yeti: Stateless and Generalized Multicast Forwarding.
papers.abstract: Current multicast forwarding systems suffer from large state requirements at routers and high communication overheads. In addition, these systems do not support generalized multicast forwarding, where traffic needs to pass through traffic-engineered paths or requires service chaining. We propose a new system, called Yeti, to efficiently implement generalized multicast forwarding inside ISP networks and supports various forwarding requirements. Yeti completely eliminates the state at routers. Yeti consists of two components: centralized controller and packet processing algorithm. We propose an algorithm for the controller to create labels that represent generalized multicast graphs. The controller instructs an ingress router to attach the created labels to packets in the multicast session. We propose an efficient packet processing algorithm at routers to process labels of incoming packets and forwards them accordingly. We prove the correctness and efficiency of Yeti. In addition, we assess the performance of Yeti in a hardware testbed and using simulations. Our experimental results show that Yeti can efficiently support high speed links. Furthermore, we compare Yeti using real ISP topologies in simulations against the closest systems in the literature: a rule-based approach (built on top of OpenFlow) and two label-based systems. Our simulation results show substantial improvements compared to these systems. For example, Yeti reduces the label overhead by 65.3%, on average, compared to the closest label-based multicast approach in the literature.
papers.abstract_zh: 当前的组播转发系统面临着路由器的大量状态要求和高通信开销。此外，这些系统不支持通用组播转发，其中流量需要通过流量工程路径或需要服务链。我们提出了一个名为 Yeti 的新系统，用于在 ISP 网络内高效实现通用组播转发并支持各种转发要求。 Yeti 完全消除了路由器的状态。 Yeti 由两个组件组成：集中控制器和数据包处理算法。我们提出了一种控制器算法来创建表示广义多播图的标签。控制器指示入口路由器将创建的标签附加到多播会话中的数据包。我们在路由器上提出了一种有效的数据包处理算法来处理传入数据包的标签并相应地转发它们。我们证明了 Yeti 的正确性和效率。此外，我们还使用硬件测试台和模拟来评估 Yeti 的性能。我们的实验结果表明 Yeti 可以有效地支持高速链接。此外，我们将在模拟中使用真实 ISP 拓扑的 Yeti 与文献中最接近的系统进行比较：基于规则的方法（构建在 OpenFlow 之上）和两个基于标签的系统。我们的模拟结果显示与这些系统相比有显着的改进。例如，与文献中最接近的基于标签的多播方法相比，Yeti 平均将标签开销减少了 65.3%。

papers.title: YuZu: Neural-Enhanced Volumetric Video Streaming.
papers.abstract: Differing from traditional 2D videos, volumetric videos provide true 3D immersive viewing experiences and allow viewers to exercise six degree-of-freedom (6DoF) motion. However, streaming high-quality volumetric videos over the Internet is extremely bandwidth-consuming. In this paper, we propose to leverage 3D super resolution (SR) to drastically increase the visual quality of volumetric video streaming. To accomplish this goal, we conduct deep intra- and inter-frame optimizations for off-the-shelf 3D SR models, and achieve up to 542× speedup on SR inference without accuracy degradation. We also derive a first Quality of Experience (QoE) model for SR-enhanced volumetric video streaming, and validate it through extensive user studies involving 1,446 subjects, achieving a median QoE estimation error of 12.49%. We then integrate the above components, together with important features such as QoE-driven network/compute resource adaptation, into a holistic system called YuZu that performs line-rate (at 30+ FPS) adaptive SR for volumetric video streaming. Our evaluations show that YuZu can boost the QoE of volumetric video streaming by 37% to 178% compared to no SR, and outperform existing viewport-adaptive solutions by 101% to 175% on QoE.
papers.abstract_zh: 与传统 2D 视频不同，体积视频提供真正的 3D 沉浸式观看体验，并允许观看者进行六自由度 (6DoF) 运动。然而，通过互联网流式传输高质量立体视频非常消耗带宽。在本文中，我们建议利用 3D 超分辨率 (SR) 大幅提高体积视频流的视觉质量。为了实现这一目标，我们对现成的 3D SR 模型进行深度帧内和帧间优化，并在不降低精度的情况下实现 SR 推理高达 542 倍的加速。我们还推导出了第一个用于 SR 增强体积视频流的体验质量 (QoE) 模型，并通过涉及 1,446 名受试者的广泛用户研究对其进行了验证，实现了 12.49% 的中位 QoE 估计误差。然后，我们将上述组件以及 QoE 驱动的网络/计算资源自适应等重要功能集成到名为 YuZu 的整体系统中，该系统为体积视频流执行线速（30+ FPS）自适应 SR。我们的评估表明，与无 SR 相比，YuZu 可以将体积视频流的 QoE 提高 37% 至 178%，并且在 QoE 上比现有的视口自适应解决方案高出 101% 至 175%。

papers.title: Zeta: A Scalable and Robust East-West Communication Framework in Large-Scale Clouds.
papers.abstract: With the broad deployment of distributed applications on clouds, the dominant volume of traffic in cloud networks traverses in an east-west direction, flowing from server to server within a data center. Existing communication solutions are tightly coupled with either the control plane ( e.g. , preprogrammed model) or the location of compute nodes ( e.g. , conventional gateway model). The tight coupling makes it challenging to adapt to rapid network expansion, respond to network anomalies ( e.g. , burst traffic and device failures), and maintain low latency for east-west traffic. To address this issue, we design Zeta, a scalable and robust east-west communication framework with gateway clusters in large-scale clouds. Zeta abstracts the traffic forwarding capability as a Gateway Cluster Layer, decoupled from the logic of control plane and the location of compute nodes. Specifically, Zeta adopts gateway clusters to support large-scale networks and cope with burst traffic. Moreover, a transparent Multi IPs Migration is proposed to quickly recover the system/devices from unpredictable failures. We implement Zeta based on eXpress Data Path (XDP) and evaluate its scalability and robustness through comprehensive experiments with up to 100k container instances. Our evaluation shows that Zeta reduces the 99% RTT by 5.1 × in burst video traffic, and speeds up the gateway recovery by 10.8 × compared with the state-of-the-art solutions.
papers.abstract_zh: 随着分布式应用在云上的广泛部署，云网络中的主要流量是东西向的，在数据​​中心内的服务器之间流动。现有的通信解决方案与控制平面（例如，预编程模型）或计算节点的位置（例如，传统网关模型）紧密耦合。这种紧密的耦合使得适应网络的快速扩展、响应网络异常（例如突发流量和设备故障）以及保持东西向流量的低延迟变得具有挑战性。为了解决这个问题，我们设计了 Zeta，一个可扩展且强大的东西向通信框架，在大规模云中具有网关集群。 Zeta将流量转发能力抽象为网关集群层，与控制平面逻辑和计算节点位置解耦。具体来说，Zeta采用网关集群来支持大规模网络并应对突发流量。此外，还提出了透明的多 IP 迁移，以便从不可预测的故障中快速恢复系统/设备。我们基于 eXpress 数据路径 (XDP) 实现 Zeta，并通过多达 10 万个容器实例的综合实验来评估其可扩展性和鲁棒性。我们的评估表明，与最先进的解决方案相比，Zeta 将突发视频流量的 99% RTT 降低了 5.1 倍，并将网关恢复速度提高了 10.8 倍。
